entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这个道具致敬了《龙与地下城》（Dungeons and Dragons）中的经典法术药剂石肤术药水（Potion of Stoneskin）。; 它的标语和效果也可能是在致敬《合金装备崛起：复仇》（Metal Gear Rising: Revengeance）中的毁灭者（Sundowner）；这名首领会用护盾弹开玩家攻击，同时夸耀自己刀枪不入。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The Knife Shield is a shield made of blasphemous knives. Be wary of using it, as it is believed to bring upon the anger of the Jammed.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 刀盾是由亵渎之刃拼成的护盾。使用时务必小心，因为人们相信它会招来诅咒弹的怒火。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Creates a ring of 8 knives around the player that damage enemies and block enemy bullets. Knives vanish after taking enough damage.; If used again before Knife Shield is recharged, the knives are launched forward.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 在玩家周围生成一圈 8 把飞刀，能伤害敌人并阻挡敌方子弹。飞刀承受足够伤害后会消失。; 如果在刀盾充能完毕前再次使用，现有飞刀会向前发射出去。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Fightknives If the player has Fightsabre, activating Knife Shield while holding Fightsabre makes the knives reflect enemy bullets before getting destroyed. This synergy effect remains even if you switch weapons (provided you were holding Fightsabre upon activation).; Running Blades If the player has Deck4rd, killing an enemy with Deck4rd has a high chance to spawn a knife.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Fightknives：如果玩家拥有军刀，持有军刀时激活刀盾，会让飞刀在被摧毁前先反弹敌方子弹。即使之后切换武器，这个协同效果仍会保留，但前提是激活时手里拿着军刀。; Running Blades：如果玩家拥有德克福德，用德克福德击杀敌人时有很高几率生成一把飞刀。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The knives do not carry on between floors, and disappear once the player enters a new floor.; Knife Shield can be activated while the player already has knives, adding another 8 knives to the ring.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这些飞刀不会带到下一层，玩家进入新楼层后就会全部消失。; 当玩家已经有飞刀环绕时，刀盾依然可以再次激活，并再额外添加 8 把飞刀。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: This mine activates when an enemy gets close.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这种地雷会在敌人靠近时自动启动。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Places a mine that explodes when an enemy comes near it, dealing 60 damage.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 在地上放置一枚地雷。敌人靠近时它会爆炸，造成 60 点伤害。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The mine does not seem to explode upon contact with mimics, even when already revealed.; This item is a reference to the Proximity Mine in GoldenEye 007.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这枚地雷似乎不会在接触宝箱怪时爆炸，即使宝箱怪已经现形。; 这个道具致敬了《黄金眼 007》（GoldenEye 007）里的感应地雷。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: This clock holds mystical properties that enable the activator to slow down time.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这只怀表蕴含神秘力量，可以让启动者放慢时间流速。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Slows down time by 70% while active. The player's movement, firing and reload speeds are unaffected by the slowdown.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 激活期间会让时间减速 70%。玩家的移动速度、射击速度和换弹速度不受减速影响。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Bluer Guon Stone If the player also has Blue Guon Stone, the size and rotation speed of the Guon Stone is increased and it rotates at a fixed distance from the player while they are moving instead of on a slight delay. If the Guon Stone blocks a bullet, it deals 15 damage to all nearby enemies.; Thrown For A Bloop If the player also has Blooper, while Bullet Time is active, a Blooper orbits the player and continually fires at enemies.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: “更蓝的滚石”（Bluer Guon Stone）：如果玩家同时拥有蓝色滚石，滚石的体积和旋转速度都会提高，并且玩家移动时它会以固定距离环绕玩家，而不是带有轻微延迟。如果滚石挡下一发子弹，它会对附近所有敌人造成 15 点伤害。; “抛出一个笨头枪”（Thrown For A Bloop）：如果玩家同时拥有笨头枪，在子弹时钟生效期间，一把笨头枪会环绕玩家并持续向敌人开火。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Distracts enemies. Most inhabitants of the Gungeon are not the most intelligent of creatures, and will fire upon anything that they do not recognize. This crude fascimile of a Gungeoneer will hold their attention for a time. Many Gundead seem content to lock trespassers up in cells, despite their trigger-happy natures. Somewhere deep in the Gungeon, there is probably a prison full of Decoys.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 吸引敌人注意。枪牢里的大多数住民都不算聪明，凡是认不出来的东西都会先开枪再说。这个粗糙仿制的枪牢者能暂时把火力吸引过去。许多枪尸明明特别爱开枪，却又很乐意把闯入者关进牢房。枪牢深处大概真的有一座塞满诱饵的监狱。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Places a decoy at the users current position. This decoy will distract enemies, who will target the decoy instead of the player. This decoy will be destroyed after taking too much damage.; If a decoy is placed in a Shop, it will also distract the shopkeeper, allowing the player to steal from that shop while the Decoy is inside.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 在玩家当前位置放置一个诱饵。敌人会优先攻击诱饵而不是玩家。诱饵承受过多伤害后会被摧毁。; 如果把诱饵放在商店里，它也会吸引店主注意，让玩家在诱饵还在场时从那家商店偷东西。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Deadly Distraction If the player also has Monster Blood, the Decoy creates a large poison pool when attacked.; Decoy Octorok If the player also has Abyssal Tentacle, the decoy will become a charmed enemy once destroyed.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Deadly Distraction：如果玩家同时拥有怪物血，诱饵在被攻击时会生成一大片毒池。; Decoy Octorok：如果玩家同时拥有深渊触手，诱饵被摧毁后会变成一个被魅惑的敌人。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Items cannot be purchased from a shop with a decoy in it; stealing is the only option. Place a decoy close to the shop's entrance and shoot it from outside the shop to enable buying items normally again.; The item itself is a reference to the Body Replacement Technique from Naruto, in which the user replaces themselves with a log to avoid an opponents attack.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 商店里只要还摆着诱饵，就无法正常购买物品，只能偷。把诱饵放在店门附近，再从店外把它打掉，就能恢复正常购买。; 这个道具本身是在致敬《火影忍者》里的替身术，使用者会用一截木头替换自己，从而躲开对手的攻击。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Deflects bullets for a few seconds, similar to Potion of Lead Skin.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 像铅皮药水一样，能在几秒内弹开子弹。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Deflects bullets for a few seconds, similar to Potion of Lead Skin.; Recharges once every two rooms cleared.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 会在几秒内弹开子弹，效果类似铅皮药水。; 每清空两个房间就会充能一次。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Calls in an ammo drop.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 呼叫一箱弹药空投。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Upon use, calls in a crate containing Ammo at the players position.; Cannot be used if the player is holding a gun with full ammo.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 使用后，会在玩家当前位置呼叫一个内含弹药的箱子。; 如果玩家当前持有的枪械弹药已满，则无法使用。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Supply Drops have a very low chance to drop on room clear.; Players can stack multiple uses if they acquire more than one Supply Drop.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 空投补给在清空房间后有极低几率掉落。; 如果玩家获得了多个空投补给，就可以叠加多次使用次数。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The Makarov was brought to the Gungeon by a lost Cosmonaut. Some say that the brave, lost soul still wanders the Gungeon. This gun is no better or worse than any other gun.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把马卡洛夫枪是由一位迷失的宇航员带进枪牢的。有人说，那位勇敢而迷失的灵魂至今仍在枪牢中游荡。这把枪并不比其他枪更好，也不比其他枪更差。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Mak Pak If the player has Bottle or Backpack, Makarov's maximum ammo is increased by 30%. While holding Marakov, it occasionally fires a homing bullet at an enemy for free.; No Odd Job If the player has Klobbe, the two guns are dual-wielded. Their damage is increased by 20% and spread is increased by 60%, decreasing accuracy.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Mak Pak：如果玩家拥有空瓶子或背包，马卡洛夫枪的最大弹药量提高 30%。持有马卡洛夫枪时，它还会偶尔免费向敌人发射一发追踪子弹。; No Odd Job：如果玩家同时拥有可洛比枪，这两把枪会被双持。它们的伤害提高 20%，散布提高 60%，因此精度下降。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun is based on the real life Russian firearm Pistolet Makarova (Makarov's Pistol).; This gun's description references The Cosmonaut, who was originally going to be found in the game as a Gungeoneer, but got cut during development. The gun may also reference the fact that before going into space Russian astronauts are given a gun.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪基于现实中的俄罗斯手枪马卡洛夫手枪（Pistolet Makarova），其名称意为 "Makarov's Pistol"。; 这把枪的说明致敬了宇航员（The Cosmonaut）这一角色，他原本计划作为可操作枪牢者登场，但在开发过程中被删掉了。这把枪也可能是在影射俄罗斯宇航员进入太空前会配枪这一事实。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: This Budget Revolver was brought to the Gungeon by an infamous fugitive. Provided by the Hegemony Regional Magistrate. The Convict won their plea to face the Gungeon in lieu of life imprisonment; undo their crimes, or face an eternity in the Gungeon. With no cost to the state, it was an acceptable arrangement. Cheaply made and prone to jams, the Budget Revolver is used by only the most desperate Gungeoneers.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把廉价左轮是由一名臭名昭著的逃犯带进枪牢的，由霸权地方裁判官（Hegemony Regional Magistrate）配发。罪犯（The Convict）获准以闯入枪牢代替终身监禁：要么改写自己的罪行，要么永远被困在枪牢。这样对当局毫无成本，因此这项安排被接受了。廉价左轮做工粗糙，又容易卡壳，只有最走投无路的枪牢者才会使用它。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Cannot be dropped.; Cannot be obtained by any Gungeoneer other than The Convict or The Paradox.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 无法丢弃。; 除了罪犯（The Convict）和悖论（The Paradox）外，其他枪牢者都无法获得这把枪。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Fires massive explosive rounds. Following the tragic Ten Days' War, a majority of the Hegemony's Shock Troops were decommissioned. A small number of the combat robots escaped however, and they were pursued relentlessly by special forces. This explosive hand cannon belonged to one such detective who tracked his prey to the Gungeon.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 发射威力巨大的爆炸弹。在悲剧性的十日战争（Ten Days' War）之后，霸权的震击部队（Shock Troops）大多被退役了。不过仍有少数战斗机器人逃脱，并遭到特种部队无情追捕。这把爆炸手炮就属于其中一位侦探，他一路追猎自己的猎物来到枪牢。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Although classified as semi-automatic, the Deck4rd is functionally automatic, as its rate of fire does not benefit from tapping the fire button instead of holding it down.; Blade Runner If the player has Origuni, magazine size of both guns is increased by 50%.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 虽然德克福德被归类为半自动武器，但实际机制更接近全自动，因为连点开火键并不会让它射得更快，直接按住即可。; 银翼杀手（Blade Runner）：如果玩家同时拥有折纸枪，这两把枪的弹匣容量提高 50%。

entries.unlock: Reward from [[Frifle_and_the_Grey_Mauser#List_of_Quests
entries.englishGameplaySummary: An inelegant weapon for a less civilized age. These guns were once used to make pianos out of teeth.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 一把粗犷、毫不优雅的老派武器。这些枪曾被用来把牙齿变成钢琴。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires a conical spread of bullets with strong knockback.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射呈锥形散开的子弹，击退力很强。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Iron Stance If the player also has Heavy Boots, the gun's damage and knockback are increased by 20%, its shot speed is increased by 50%, and its reload time is decreased by 20%.; The Elephant In The Room If the player also has Pig, Turkey, Owl, Chicken Flute, Super Space Turtle, Bait Launcher, or Compressed Air Tank the Elephant Gun becomes an elephant head and shoots a pink elephant instead of bullets. The elephant deals 30 damage and has strong knockback, but decreased fire rate.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Iron Stance：如果玩家同时拥有重靴子，这把枪的伤害和击退提高 20%，弹速提高 50%，装填时间减少 20%。; The Elephant In The Room：如果玩家同时拥有英雄猪、火鸡球、猫头鹰、鸡长笛、超级太空龟、饵枪或压缩空气罐，猎象枪会变成象头，并改为发射粉红色的大象而非子弹。大象会造成 30 点伤害并带来强力击退，但射速更低。
entries.englishUsageNotes: So called elephant guns were large guns designed for the hunting of large animals (such as elephants) during safaris in Africa in the 19th century. Real-world elephant guns fired single large slugs, rather than shot.; The Ammonomicon description "These guns were once used to make pianos out of teeth." is a reference to the practice of hunting elephants to harvest their tusks for ivory, a material once used to make piano keys.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 所谓的猎象枪，是 19 世纪非洲狩猎旅行中专门用于猎杀大型动物（如大象）的大型枪械。现实中的猎象枪发射的是单发大型独头弹，而不是霰弹。; 枪之图鉴（Ammonomicon）中的描述 "These guns were once used to make pianos out of teeth" 致敬了猎杀大象以获取象牙的行为；象牙曾被用来制作钢琴琴键。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: This gun is still in the process of being forged! It barely functions in its current state, but could be a viable choice in a truly desperate situation. A small hourglass is embossed on the cylinder.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把枪还在锻造过程中！以它现在的状态来看，勉强能用，但在真正走投无路时也许仍是个可行选择。它的转轮上压着一个小沙漏图案。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Phoenix Up If the player has Phoenix, while Phoenix is held, summons a phoenix companion that fires at enemies.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Phoenix Up：如果玩家拥有凤凰，持有凤凰时会召唤一只会向敌人开火的凤凰伙伴。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Despite not actually igniting enemies, the Unfinished Gun is in the FIRE gun class.; As a consequence, having the Unfinished Gun in the player's inventory makes them less likely to find other guns in the FIRE class that actually burn enemies.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 虽然枪坯实际上并不会点燃敌人，但它属于火焰枪械类别。; 因此，只要枪坯在玩家的物品栏里，玩家就更不容易找到那些同样属于火焰类别、但真的能点燃敌人的枪。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Favored by the huge predatory bird that nests in the Gungeon, it is a weapon to be feared.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把武器深受那只在枪牢筑巢的巨型猛禽喜爱，令人闻之色变。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Heavy Artillery If the player also has Com4nd0, both weapons are dual-wielded.; Not Quite As Mini If the player has Ammo Belt, Drum Clip, or Oiled Cylinder, the Vulcan Cannon changes its appearance, its maximum ammo is increased by 100, and its fire rate gradually increases as long as the trigger is held.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Heavy Artillery：如果玩家同时拥有魔鬼司令，这两把武器会被双持。; Not Quite As Mini：如果玩家拥有弹药带、鼓夹或油缸，火神加农炮会改变外观，最大弹药量提高 100，并且只要持续按住扳机，射速就会逐渐提高。
entries.englishUsageNotes: According to its ammonomicon entry, the Vulcan Cannon is wielded by the Gatling Gull, however its visual appearance is starkly different to the minigun the Gatling Gull can be seen holding in battle.; The gun is a reference to a common trope of action films where people will carry handheld M134 Miniguns, which in reality is very difficult and impractical.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 根据枪之图鉴（Ammonomicon）词条，火神加农炮由加特林海鸥（Gatling Gull）使用；不过它的外观与战斗中加特林海鸥手持的迷你枪差别很大。; 这把枪致敬了动作片里常见的桥段：角色手持 M134 迷你枪扫射，而在现实中这几乎既困难又不切实际。

stats.value: 14.5 (15.6 with The Marine's starting Military Training)
1.2s (0.96 with The Marine's starting Military Training)
5 (4.15 with The Marine's starting Military Training)

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The Marine Sidearm was brought to the Gungeon by a low-ranking Primerdyne soldier. Though this gun appears sturdy, it has been known to fail when it is most needed.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把海军陆战队配枪是由一名低阶普莱默戴恩士兵（Primerdyne soldier）带进枪牢的。虽然这把枪看起来很结实，但它总会在最需要的时候掉链子。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Cannot be dropped.; Is technically automatic, as tapping the fire button does not provide a faster fire rate than holding it down.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 无法丢弃。; 严格来说它属于全自动，因为连点开火键并不会让它射得比按住时更快。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 2 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: This archaic laser has been studied for centuries. Gungeonologists can only conclude that it was used by primitive people to poison each other with radiation.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把古老的激光器已经被研究了数个世纪。枪牢学家们只能得出一个结论：原始人曾用它把辐射当成毒药来互相投放。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires a green laser beam that slightly curves towards enemies.; Continually shooting an enemy with the laser for 0.25 seconds will poison them for 3.5 seconds.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射一道会略微朝敌人弯折的绿色激光束。; 用激光持续照射同一个敌人 0.25 秒后，会令其中毒 3.5 秒。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Beta Ray If the player also has Irradiated Lead, Gamma Ray's beam grows larger and deals 23 damage per second, but no longer travels instantaneously.; Gungeonite If the player also has Clear Guon Stone, Gamma Ray will leave a trail of poison.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Beta Ray：如果玩家同时拥有辐射铅弹，伽玛射线的光束会变得更大，并每秒造成 23 点伤害，但不再瞬间命中。; Gungeonite：如果玩家同时拥有透明滚石，伽玛射线会留下毒液轨迹。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Prior to the Supply Drop Update, Gamma Ray did not curve towards enemies.; The Ammonomicon quote "Mean Green" may be a reference to The Hulk, who was transformed by exposure to gamma radiation.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 在空投补给更新之前，伽玛射线的光束不会朝敌人轻微偏转。; 枪之图鉴（Ammonomicon）引语 "Mean Green" 可能是在致敬绿巨人（The Hulk），因为他正是暴露在伽马辐射后才变身的。

stats.value: 7 (3.5 with The Robot's starting Battery Bullets)

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The right hand of an assault robot that fled to the Gungeon. When weilded by the Robot, combines with Junk to increase all damage output. It is a simple projectile delivery system. Reliable, but its short barrel is lacking in intricacy. Under the control of a targeting AI it becomes fearsome indeed.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 逃往枪牢的突击机器人的右手。由机器人使用时，与垃圾结合会提升所有伤害输出。它是一个简单的弹丸发射系统。虽说可靠，但其短枪管设计缺乏复杂性。在瞄准 AI 的控制下，它确实会变得非常可怕。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Cannot be dropped.; Cannot be obtained by any Gungeoneer other than The Robot or The Paradox.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 无法丢弃。; 无法被机器人或悖论之外的任何枪牢者获得。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The Rogue Special, given to the Pilot by his partner. It's never let him down. This hip shooter has been known to fire half-cocked and often gets itself into more trouble than it can handle.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 伙伴赠予飞行员的流氓专用枪。它从未让他失望。这把随手射击的武器以容易走火而闻名，且经常惹出超出其应对能力的麻烦。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Cannot be dropped.; Cannot be obtained by any Gungeoneer other than The Pilot or The Paradox.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 无法丢弃。; 无法被飞行员或悖论之外的任何枪牢者获得。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The reproductive gun of the terrible Beholster. When wielded by its creator, it summons young Beholster spawn from the void.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 可怕的嗜枪怪的繁殖枪。由其创造者使用时，它会从虚空中召唤出小嗜枪怪。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires instant laser projectiles.; The final shot of each cylinder fires a projectile shaped like a pink Beadie. This beadie-projectile moves slowly forwards, periodically firing more bullets in the direction of the nearest enemy.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射瞬发激光弹丸。; 每个弹匣的最后一发会射出一颗粉红色小眼怪（Beadie）形状的弹丸。这颗小眼怪弹丸会缓慢向前移动，并周期性地朝最近的敌人方向发射更多子弹。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Behold! If the player also has Com4nd0, M1911, Void Marshal, Machine Pistol, and Trank Gun (the weapons the Beholster uses in game), increases damage by 30%, magazine size by 50%, spread by 50%, decreases reload time by 33%, and slows down enemy bullets by 20% when one of the guns is held. When the Eye of the Beholster is held, the other five guns rotate around the player and shoot at nearby enemies, still using up ammo from each gun randomly. Obtainable through the Beholster shrine, although it can be activated without.; This synergy can also be activated if the player has 5 of these weapons and Lich's Eye Bullets.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Behold!：如果玩家同时拥有魔鬼司令、M1911、虚空元帅、机枪和 M9（这些是嗜枪怪在游戏中使用的武器），在持有其中任意一把枪时，伤害增加 30%，弹匣容量增加 50%，散布增加 50%，装填时间减少 33%，且敌方子弹速度减慢 20%。当持有嗜枪怪之眼时，其他五把枪会环绕玩家旋转并对附近的敌人射击，这仍会随机消耗每把枪的弹药。可以通过嗜枪怪祭坛获得，尽管不通过它也能激活。; 如果玩家拥有其中 5 种武器以及巫妖之眼子弹，此协同效果也可以被激活。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Beholster wields this gun.; As it is held by the Beholster, it can be placed on the Beholster Shrine.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 嗜枪怪会使用这把枪。; 由于它由嗜枪怪持有，因此可以将其放置在嗜枪怪祭坛上。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Originally crafted by a gunsmith who favored revolvers but was envious of of the automatic weaponry being developed by his peers. It seems like he accidentally left one of his tools in the clip...?
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 起初是由一位偏爱左轮手枪但嫉妒同行所开发自动武器的枪匠制作的。他似乎不小心把他的一个工具落在了弹夹里……？
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Rapid-fires a barrage of bullets.; The last shot in every magazine is a high-damage hammer.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 快速发射一连串子弹。; 每个弹匣的最后一发会射出一柄高伤害的铁锤。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Hammer and Nail If the player also has Nail Gun, maximum ammo is increased by 50% for both guns. Nail Gun deals triple damage, while H4mmer gets 5 hammer shots at the end of every magazine and spins a wood beam around the player when reloading an empty magazine.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Hammer and Nail：如果玩家同时拥有钉枪，两把枪的最大弹药量均提升 50%。钉枪会造成三倍伤害，而悍马枪在每个弹匣结束时会获得 5 发铁锤子弹，且在装填空弹匣时会在玩家周围旋转一根木梁。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun may be a reference to the trick of "fanning the hammer", where a single-action revolver is fired by flicking the hammer of the weapon rather than pulling the trigger in order to make it shoot faster.; Bug: There is an issue with the Hammer and Nail synergy where if the ammo count exceeds what the base gun would have without the 50% maximum ammo, the current ammo count would revert to that amount. Additionally, partial ammo kits cannot have the ammo go above the base gun's amount, unless it is applied to H4mmer itself.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪可能是在致敬快速压击锤（"fanning the hammer"）技巧，即通过快速拨动单动式左轮手枪的击锤而非扣动扳机来使其射击得更快。; 漏洞："Hammer and Nail" 协同效果存在一个问题，如果当前弹药数超过了该枪在没有 50% 最大弹药量加成时的上限，弹药数会重置回原本的上限。此外，使用部分弹药包无法使弹药量超过原本的上限，除非直接对悍马枪使用。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Originally used to swat down bothersome aircraft, the Stinger has become a favorite of the aim deficient Gungeoneer.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 起初用于击落令人讨厌的飞行器，机尾炮已成为瞄准能力欠佳的枪牢者的最爱。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires an explosive missile, and three 150 bees that seek out and attack enemies. Bees deal 3 damage on impact and apply a lingering 'swarm' effect that deals 1 damage right away, and deals 1 damage every second for 2 more seconds.; When the missile impacts an enemy or obstacle, it will create 5 additional bees.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射一枚爆炸性导弹，以及三只速度为 150 且会追踪并攻击敌人的蜜蜂。蜜蜂在撞击时造成 3 点伤害，并施加持续的“蜂群”效果：立即造成 1 点伤害，且在接下来的 2 秒内每秒造成 1 点伤害。; 当导弹撞击敌人或障碍物时，会额外产生 5 只蜜蜂。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Particle Flow If the player also has Laser Sight, a crosshair will appear on any enemy the Stinger points towards and its homing rockets will be guided to them.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Particle Flow：如果玩家同时拥有激光瞄准镜，机尾炮所指向的任何敌人身上都会出现一个准星，并且其追踪火箭会受其引导射向他们。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Giving the Bee Hive and RPG to the Muncher will always result in a Stinger.; The Stingers long reload time makes it especially affected by the 'gun-dropping' technique. Dropped guns are instantly reloaded, and with guns like the Stinger the process of dropping them and quickly picking them back up is faster than reloading normally.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 将蜂巢和火箭推进式榴弹喂给吞枪怪必定会产出机尾炮。; 机尾炮较长的装填时间使得它特别适合利用“丢枪重装”技巧。丢弃的枪械会立即完成装填，对于像机尾炮这样的武器，丢弃并快速重新捡起的过程比正常装填更快。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: A masterwork shotgun. The right answer isn't always a gun that shoots bees, a water gun, or a flaming hand. Sometimes, all you need is a simple concept executed immaculately. This gold trimmed, double-barreled shotgun represents the best of traditional guncraft.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 一把杰作级霰弹枪。正确答案并不总是发射蜜蜂的枪、水枪或火焰之手。有时，你所需要的只是一个被完美执行的简单概念。这把金边双管霰弹枪代表了传统制枪工艺的最高水平。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires a tight spread of shotgun pellets that deal significant damage, but have short range.; Increases Coolness by 1.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射密集分布的霰弹弹丸，造成可观的伤害，但射程较短。; 增加 1 点冷酷值。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: The Ecstasy Of Gold If the player also has Gilded Bullets, Old Goldie's damage is increased by 25%.; Iron Stance If the player also has Heavy Boots, the gun's damage and knockback are increased by 20%, its shot speed is increased by 50%, and its reload time is decreased by 20%.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: The Ecstasy Of Gold：如果玩家同时拥有镀金子弹，古金色枪的伤害提升 25%。; Iron Stance：如果玩家同时拥有重靴子，该枪的伤害和击退提升 20%，弹速提升 50%，装填时间减少 20%。
entries.englishUsageNotes: When a gun is Duct Taped to Old Goldie, it too will receive the 70% damage boost. However, when Old Goldie is duct taped to another gun, the damage boost is lost. Be sure to use Old Goldie as the base weapon to receive the boost.; Old Goldie is in the SHOTGUN gun class, meaning it benefits from the Shotgun Affinity synergy.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 当一把枪用胶带与古金色枪绑定时，它也将获得 70% 的伤害加成。然而，当古金色枪被用胶带绑定到另一把枪上时，伤害加成会丢失。务必以古金色枪作为基础武器来获得加成。; 古金色枪属于霰弹枪枪械类别，这意味着它会受到 Shotgun Affinity 协同效果加成。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: High rate of fire and relatively compact, making it a favorite among Gungeoneers and criminals alike.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 射速高且相对紧凑，使其同样受到枪牢者和罪犯的喜爱。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Iroquois If the player also has Eyepatch, Rolling Eye, or Cigarettes, the MAC10's reload time is decreased by 33%, magazine size is increased by 50%, and knockback is increased by 50%.; The Submachinist If the player also has Machine Pistol, both weapons are dual wielded and are fired simultaneously.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Iroquois：如果玩家同时拥有眼罩、翻紫眼儿或香烟，MAC10 的装填时间减少 33%，弹匣容量增加 50%，且击退增加 50%。; The Submachinist：如果玩家同时拥有机枪，两把武器会双持并同时开火。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The item's subtext is a reference to the Biggie Smalls song 'Come On'.; The synergy with the Eyepatch is a reference to Kurt Russell as Snake Plissken in the 1981 movie Escape from New York. Snake wears an eyepatch over his left eye and primarily uses a MAC10. 'Iroquois Plissken' is also an alias used by Snake in the Metal Gear series. The character of Snake is heavily based on Snake Plissken, including wearing an eyepatch.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 该物品的副标题致敬了比吉·斯莫斯（Biggie Smalls）的歌曲《来吧》（Come On）。; 与眼罩的协同效果致敬了 1981 年电影《纽约大逃亡》（Escape from New York）中由库尔特·拉塞尔（Kurt Russell）饰演的斯内克·普利斯肯（Snake Plissken）。斯内克在左眼戴着眼罩，并主要使用 MAC10。“Iroquois Plissken”也是斯内克在《合金装备》（Metal Gear）系列中使用的一个别名。斯内克（Snake）的角色在很大程度上基于斯内克·普利斯肯，包括佩戴眼罩这一设定。

entries.unlock: Speak to the Tinker after completing the [[Shortcuts
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Can unlock chests. The AKEY-47 is a masterpiece of Gungeoncraft, perfectly combining the masterful gunplay of an AK-47 with the incredibly useful ability to open locks. An inscription along the frame reads, "EX ARCHA, LIBERTAS."
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 可以解锁宝箱。AKEY-47 是枪牢工艺的杰作，将 AK-47 精妙的射击体验与开锁这一极具实用性的能力完美结合。枪身框架上刻有一行铭文："EX ARCHA, LIBERTAS"。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Akey Breaky If the player has the Shelleton Key, AKEY-47 fires skulls that do 10 damage per skull, receives infinite ammo, and changes in appearance to resemble a Shelleton. Its shots will no longer open locks or reveal secret rooms, though chests can still be opened due to possessing the Shelleton Key.; If the player has obtained this synergy via Lich's Eye Bullets, opening a chest or door with the AKEY-47 equipped will still unlock it for free, if the player has no keys.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Akey Breaky：如果玩家拥有骷髅钥匙，AKEY-47 会发射每颗造成 10 点伤害的骷髅弹丸，获得无限弹药，且外观会改变以像弹壳骷髅（Shelleton）。它射击出的子弹将不再能开锁或显现隐藏房间，但由于玩家拥有骷髅钥匙，仍旧可以打开宝箱。; 如果玩家通过巫妖之眼子弹获得了此协同效果，且玩家身上没有钥匙，那么装备 AKEY-47 时打开宝箱或门仍会免费解锁。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The AKEY-47 Has identical statistics to the AK-47.; Once unlocked, the AKEY-47 may appear for sale in Flynts shop for 3 keys.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: AKEY-47 具有与 AK-47 完全相同的属性数据。; 一旦解锁，AKEY-47 可能会在弗林特（Flynt）的商店中以 3 把钥匙的价格出售。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Trorc for 5 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Alternates with grenades. The M16 is a classic military-issue machine gun that upon reload, switches projectiles to grenade launcher.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 在子弹与榴弹之间切换。M16 是一款经典的军用机枪，装填时会切换到榴弹发射器模式。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Reloading the M16 alternates between a burst-fire mode which shoots a burst of three bullets with every trigger pull, and a grenade launcher mode which lobs explosive projectiles.; Grenades are affected by gravity, falling quickly towards the bottom of the screen.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 装填 M16 会在三连发模式（每次扣动扳机发射三发子弹）与榴弹发射器模式（投掷爆炸性弹丸）之间切换。; 榴弹会受到重力影响，快速落向屏幕底部。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Assault and Battery If the player also has Shock Rifle, the guns are dual wielded.; Keep The Change If the player has Blank Companion's Ring, it will occasionally trigger a blank upon shooting the last bullet in a magazine of the M16.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Assault and Battery：如果玩家同时拥有电击步枪，两把枪可以双持使用。; Keep The Change：如果玩家拥有空响弹伙伴之戒，在射出 M16 弹匣的最后一发子弹时，会偶尔触发空响弹。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Grenades consume 1 ammo each, the exact same as a regular bullet. As such, reloading immediately when in machine gun mode allows the gun to spend most of its time in grenade launcher mode at no additional ammo cost. This can be desirable for an increased dps, and the ability to hit multiple enemies at once with each explosion.; Allowing the M16 to reload passively by switching to another weapon for a few seconds does not switch the gun's form.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 榴弹每次消耗 1 发弹药，与普通子弹完全相同。因此，在机枪模式下立即装填，可以使这把枪大部分时间都处于榴弹发射器模式，而不需要额外的弹药成本。这对于提高每秒伤害（DPS）以及在每次爆炸中同时击中多个敌人的能力非常有用。; 通过切换到其他武器几秒钟来进行被动装填，不会切换 M16 的模式。

entries.unlock: Complete the Hollow 20 times.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: A mysterious gun that grows in strength on each kill. Substantial power is lost any time its wielder is damaged. Stories are told of a rebellious android that once used this gun in a conflict deep underground. The handle is marked with two small tick marks.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 一把神秘的枪，每次击杀都会变得更强。只要使用者受伤，就会损失相当大的威力。传说曾有一个反叛的机器人在地下深处的冲突中使用过这把枪。枪柄上刻有两个小刻度。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Has three different levels, with the gun leveling up after enough enemies are slain. Higher levels deal more damage.; Killing 11 enemies will level up Polaris to level 2.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 拥有三个不同的等级，击杀足够数量的敌人后枪支会升级。更高的等级会造成更高的伤害。; 击杀 11 个敌人会使北极星升级至 2 级。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Star Friends If the player also has Stuffed Star, while Stuffed Star is active and Polaris is held, the player continually fires maximum level Polaris shots in all directions.; Square Brace If the player also has Bracket Key or Bionic Leg, Polaris gains 20% increased damage, increased ammo capacity of 700, increased magazine size of 30, increased fire rate when leveled up, automatic firing, and a new appearance.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Star Friends：如果玩家同时拥有毛绒星星，在毛绒星星处于激活状态且持有北极星时，玩家会持续向所有方向发射最高等级的北极星子弹。; Square Brace：如果玩家同时拥有支架钥匙或仿生腿，北极星获得 20% 伤害提升，弹药容量增加至 700，弹匣容量增加至 30，升级后的射速提升，变为全自动射击并获得全新外观。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Polaris' level does not affect its selling price.; While level 1 and 3 fire a single projectile of varying damage, level 2 fires two. Because of this, level 2 projectiles have double the probability of gaining chance-based bullet effects (e.g., Vorpal Bullets, Katana Bullets, Hungry Bullets, etc.).
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 北极星的等级不影响其出售价格。; 1 级和 3 级发射单发不同伤害的弹丸，而 2 级发射两发。因此，2 级的弹丸触发概率型子弹效果（例如斩首子弹、武士刀子弹、饥饿子弹等）的几率翻倍。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Trorc for 12 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: A powerful machine gun that once belonged to a forgotten hero. This gun's mechanism is overly complicated, but it proves extremely effective in the field. Beloved by many, despite its flaws.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 一把曾经属于一位被遗忘英雄的强大机枪。这把枪的机构过于复杂，但在实战中证明非常有效。尽管有缺陷，但仍深受许多人喜爱。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires high-accuracy bullets that can pierce up to 3 times.; Rate of fire increases the longer the trigger is held.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射高精度的子弹，最多可穿透 3 次。; 扣动扳机的时间越长，射速就会越快。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Gunderlord If the player has Ice Breaker, Patriot shots are connected with electricity. Ice Breaker fires single high-velocity shots, and its ammo slowly regenerates over time.; What A Thrill If the player has Ration, Cigarettes, Fortune's Favor, Ancient Hero's Bandana, or Box, Patriot has a chance to transmogrify enemies into snakes.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Gunderlord：如果玩家拥有破冰者，爱国者发射的子弹会由电流连接。破冰者会发射单发高速子弹，且其弹药会随时间缓慢再生。; What A Thrill：如果玩家拥有口粮、香烟、财富的青睐、古代英雄的头巾或盒子，爱国者有几率将敌人转变为蛇。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun is a reference to the weapon of the same name in Metal Gear Solid 3: Snake Eater.; The Ammonomicon quote "Gun Eater" is a reference to the title of the game- "Snake Eater".
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪是在致敬游戏《合金装备3：食蛇者》（Metal Gear Solid 3: Snake Eater）中的同名武器。; 枪之图鉴（Ammonomicon）中的引用短语 "Gun Eater" 是在致敬该游戏的名字 "Snake Eater"。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The Rusty Sidearm was brought to the Gungeon by the Hunter. Despite its extremely dated design and some signs of rust, this gun appears relatively new. Very strange...
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 生锈的配枪是由猎人带进枪牢的。尽管它的设计极其老旧，也确实有些生锈痕迹，但这把枪看起来却相对较新。真是奇怪……
entries.englishUsageNotes: Cannot be dropped.; Cannot be obtained by any Gungeoneer other than The Hunter or The Paradox.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 无法丢弃。; 无法被猎人或悖论之外的任何枪牢者获得。

entries.unlock: Reward from [[Frifle and the Grey Mauser#List of Quests
entries.englishGameplaySummary: This magic horn is proof that at least one unicorn existed, and now is either dead or hornless.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这根魔法角证明了至少曾有一只独角兽存在过，而它现在要么已经死了，要么已经没角了。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Crystal Horn If the player has Luxin Cannon, Luxin Cannon gets three crystal shots at the end of every magazine, and the crystal bursts into many more crystals. Additionally, when an enemy is killed with the Unicorn Horn, they explode into Luxin Cannon projectiles.; Double Rainbow If the player has Stuffed Star, while Stuffed Star is active, five Unicorn Horn beams are fired from the player in all directions.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Crystal Horn：如果玩家拥有鲁信加农炮，鲁信加农炮在每个弹匣结束时会获得 3 发水晶子弹，且水晶会爆裂成更多水晶。此外，当使用独角兽之角击杀敌人时，敌人会爆炸成鲁信加农炮的弹丸。; Double Rainbow：如果玩家拥有毛绒星星，在毛绒星星处于激活状态时，玩家会向所有方向发射五道独角兽之角光束。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The song played by the Unicorn Horn is Unicorn Power!, composed by Enter the Gungeon sound designer Erica Hampson.; If the player has Helix Bullets, the 2 rainbows fired will follow the same path, and will not lose their homing property, unlike most other homing guns with Helix Bullets.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 独角兽之角播放的歌曲是由《挺进地牢》（Enter the Gungeon）音效设计师埃里卡·汉普森（Erica Hampson）创作的 "Unicorn Power!"。; 如果玩家拥有螺旋子弹，发射的两道彩虹会遵循相同的路径，并且不会失去其追踪属性，这与大多数其他搭配螺旋子弹的追踪枪械不同。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: A standard scope. Increases accuracy!
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 标准的瞄准镜。增加精准度！
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Reduces shot spread by 60%, increasing accuracy.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 减少 60% 的子弹散布，从而提高精准度。
entries.englishUsageNotes: 360 Yes Scope While holding A.W.P. or Sniper Rifle, spinning 360 degrees before firing makes the shot deal 50% more damage.; The buff can stack up to 6 times, and each instance of the buff will last for 3 seconds, providing an additional 1.5x damage multiplier for each instance.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: "360 Yes Scope"：当持有狙击枪或狙击步枪时，在开火前旋转 360 度会使射击伤害提升 50%。; 该增益效果最多可叠加 6 次，每层增益将持续 3 秒，每层提供额外的 1.5 倍伤害倍率加成。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Trorc for 7 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Provides healing on use. If equipped, will be used automatically on death. This MRE comes in the form of a dry and dense cookie. It doesn't taste great, but it delivers the calories the body needs.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 使用时提供治疗。如果已装备，它会在死亡时自动触发。这种单兵即食口粮（MRE）是一块干燥而扎实的饼干。虽然味道不怎么样，但能提供身体所需的热量。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Heals the player for two full hearts.; Automatically used if the player runs out of health.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 为玩家回复两格完整的心。; 如果玩家生命值耗尽，会自动使用。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: I need scissors! 61! If the player also has Trank Gun, Trank Gun changes appearance, its rate of fire is decreased, damage and reload time are increased, and its bullets will inflict slow and stun. Should the player use the synergy item (such as Ration), the Trank Gun will retain the Synergy effects and appearance until using up a full magazine.; Pretty Good If the player has SAA, it increases coolness by 2 and accuracy by 25% while it's held.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: I need scissors! 61!：如果玩家同时拥有 M9，M9 会改变外观，射速降低，伤害和装填时间增加，且其子弹会施加减速和眩晕。如果玩家使用协同道具（例如口粮），M9 将保留协同效果和外观，直到消耗完一整个弹匣。; Pretty Good：如果玩家拥有柯尔特单动左轮，持有时冷酷值提升 2 点，且精准度提升 25%。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Has no effect for The Robot.; Prior to the Supply Drop Update, Ration was an A tier item.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 对机器人没有效果。; 在空投补给更新之前，口粮是 A 级道具。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Enemy bullets go wide. An experimental device worn by a particularly lucky Gungeoneer. In the end, it wasn't enough to save her life, but it certainly extended it.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 让敌人的子弹偏离轨迹。这个实验性装置曾由一位运气格外好的枪牢者佩戴。最终，它还是没能救她一命，但的确让她多活了一阵子。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: While active, enemy bullets are repulsed from the player- curving around them.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 激活期间，敌人的子弹会被玩家排斥，从玩家身边弯曲绕开。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Dead Cell If player has Railgun, its charge time is decreased by 10% and its damage to bosses is increased by 30%.; Pistol Machine If the player has Machine Pistol, its shots pierce enemies and are connected with electricity.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Dead Cell：如果玩家拥有磁轨炮，磁轨炮的蓄力时间减少 10%，且对首领的伤害提高 30%。; Pistol Machine：如果玩家拥有机枪，机枪发射的子弹会穿透敌人，并彼此连出能伤害敌人的电流。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The curving effect is not powerful enough to redirect bullets with significant velocity (e.g. Sniper Shell projectiles) or bigger bullets (e.g. Cannonbalrog's disappearing attack).; The synergy "Pretty Good" is a reference to the popular quote from Metal Gear Solid, "You're pretty good".
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 子弹偏转效果不足以让速度极快的子弹改变轨迹，例如狙击手子弹怪（Sniper Shell）发射的弹丸；体积更大的子弹也一样，例如卡农巴洛格（Cannonbalrog）的隐身攻击。; "Pretty Good" 协同效果致敬了《合金装备》（Metal Gear Solid）中的经典台词 "You're pretty good"。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Grants flight, but restricts the dodge roll. Only a Gungeoneer with a deathwish would give up their dodge roll. Luckily, this jetpack can easily be toggled on or off.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 赋予飞行能力，但会限制翻滚。只有一心求死的枪牢者才会愿意放弃翻滚。幸运的是，这个喷气包可以随时轻松开关。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Use to toggle the jetpack on and off. While active, the players Movement Speed is increased by 2.5 and the player gains flight, but cannot dodge roll.; Passing over pools of flammable goop such as oil or Phaser Spider webs while the jetpack is active will set them on fire.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 使用后可切换喷气包的开关。激活时，玩家的移动速度提高 2.5，并获得飞行能力，但无法翻滚。; 喷气包激活时，飞过石油或相位蜘蛛（Phaser Spider）的蛛网等易燃液体或黏液时，会将其点燃。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Barrage Shot If the player also has Charge Shot, charge time is reduced by 25%, reload time is increased by 50%, and shot size is increased.; MM6 Mini Rocket If the player has Backpack, activating the Jetpack fires a rocket in the direction of the crosshair. This has a cooldown of about 5 seconds.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Barrage Shot：如果玩家同时拥有蓄力枪，蓄力时间缩短 25%，装填时间增加 50%，且子弹体积增大。; MM6 Mini Rocket：如果玩家拥有背包，激活喷气包会朝准星方向发射一枚火箭。该效果有大约 5 秒的冷却时间。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Barrage Shot synergy is a reference to the game Charge Shot, which the weapon of the same name in Enter the Gungeon is a reference to. Combatants in Charge Shot use jetpacks for mobility.; Bug: If Jetpack is active when entering the Resourceful Rat's Lair, the loading screen will be the default loading screen instead of the rat variant.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: "Barrage Shot" 协同效果致敬了游戏《蓄力枪》（蓄力枪），而《挺进地牢》（Enter the Gungeon）中的同名武器也是在致敬它；该游戏中的战斗人员同样使用喷气包进行移动。; 漏洞：如果在进入老鼠层（Resourceful Rat's Lair）时喷气包处于激活状态，加载画面会显示为默认版本，而不是有力鼠版本。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 8 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Damages all enemies on screen, no matter what. This cannon was built for mounting on Supersonic Attack Fighters, but has been retrofitted to be carried by infantry. An inscription on the barrel reads, "Know thy own position, and all others inevitably fall."
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 无论如何都能伤害屏幕上的所有敌人。这门大炮最初是为安装在超音速攻击战斗机上而打造的，后来才被改装成可由步兵携带。枪管上刻着一句铭文：“知己之位，则余者皆终将坠落。”
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: RAIDEN If the player also has Space Friend, maximum ammo is increased by 25%, and 2 homing bullets shoot out periodically from the sides of the weapon. It also drastically reduces its ammo consumption.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: RAIDEN：如果玩家同时拥有太空朋友，最大弹药量提升 25%，且武器两侧会周期性发射 2 发自导子弹。这还会极大地减少其弹药消耗量。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Like other guns, this will not fire if the player is up against a wall and trying to shoot into the wall, even though this gun shoots through walls.; Backup Gun indirectly doubles this gun's damage due to its direct homing.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 和其他枪一样，如果玩家贴着墙并试图朝墙内开火，这把枪也不会射击，哪怕它本身能够穿墙。; 由于“备”用枪会额外复制追踪射击，它会间接让这把枪的总伤害翻倍。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Explodes after a short delay. Countless experienced adventurers have brought Bombs to the Gungeon seeking secret doors, only to be foiled by the existence of Blanks. Still, explosives have their place.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 短暂延迟后爆炸。无数经验丰富的冒险者带着炸弹闯进枪牢，想靠它寻找隐藏门，却总被空响弹的存在泼了冷水。尽管如此，爆炸物依然有它的用武之地。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Throws a bomb onto the ground that explodes after a short delay, dealing 60 damage to nearby enemies.; Triggers an explosion at the position of every enemy on screen.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 向地面扔出一枚炸弹，短暂延迟后爆炸，对附近敌人造成 60 点伤害。; 会在屏幕上每个敌人所在的位置各触发一次爆炸。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Bomberpal If the player has Lil' Bomber, it fires two bombs instead of one, charges twice as fast, and has 40% lower reload time.; Fairy Bow If the player also has Bow, its charge time is halved and the Bow has a chance to fire an extra arrow, similar to the Shadow Bullets effect.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Bomberpal：如果玩家拥有里尔炸弹枪，它会发射两枚炸弹而不是一枚，蓄力速度翻倍，且装填时间减少 40%。; Fairy Bow：如果玩家同时拥有弓，其蓄力时间减半，且弓有几率发射额外的一支箭，类似于阴影子弹的效果。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The bomb's explosion can open secret rooms.; Bomb can be used to hurt Cannonbalrog while it is performing its invulnerable attack.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 炸弹的爆炸可以打开隐藏房间。; 在卡农巴洛格（Cannonbalrog）进行无敌攻击时，炸弹可以用来对其造成伤害。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Freezes enemies.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 冰冻敌人。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Throws a bomb that deals 8 damage and freezes enemies.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 扔出一枚造成 8 点伤害并冰冻敌人的炸弹。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Smart Bombs If the player has Homing Bullets or Crutch, Ice Bomb will home in on enemies.; Battle Mode If the player has Orbital Bullets, creates three bombs which orbit around the player, blocking bullets and exploding in contact with enemies. These bombs won't deal damage to the player, but will knock them back, which could send them into a hazard.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: "Smart Bombs"：如果玩家拥有自导引子弹或拐杖，冰炸弹会追踪敌人。; "Battle Mode"：如果玩家拥有环绕子弹，会生成三个围绕玩家旋转的炸弹，它们会阻挡子弹，并在接触敌人时爆炸。这些炸弹不会伤害玩家，但会把玩家击退，因此可能把玩家撞进危险地形。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Improves health, movement speed, and damage. This treat was originally created as a reward for Winchester's games of skill.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 提升生命值、移动速度和伤害。这种糖果最初是作为温彻斯特技巧游戏的奖品而制作的。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Adds 1 heart container.; Increases by 1.5.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 增加 1 个心之容器。; 移动速度提高 1.5。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Sweetness and Light If the player also has Magic Lamp, it fires three projectiles at a time. The shots deal 25% of their original damage, but the genie deals full damage.; Like other items that grant heart containers, this item gives The Robot 7 to 10 coin upon pickup.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: "Sweetness and Light"：如果玩家同时拥有阿拉丁神灯，它一次会发射三枚弹丸。子弹只造成原本 25% 的伤害，但神灯精灵会造成全额伤害。; 与其他增加心之容器的道具类似，机器人在捡起该道具时会获得 7 到 10 个金币。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Increases damage at the cost of bullet velocity. These faceted bullets glitter with colors unseen in the depths of the Gungeon.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 以牺牲子弹速度为代价提升伤害。这些刻面子弹闪烁着在枪牢深处从未见过的色彩。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Increases damage by 25%.; Halves bullet speed.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 提升 25% 的伤害。; 弹速减半。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Alternative Rock If the player has Face Melter, instead of firing four streams, Face Melter fires two parallel columns of notes. Reloading fires a guitar pick with a chance to stun.; Heavy Jolt If the player has Jolter, it gains increased knockback.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Alternative Rock：如果玩家拥有变脸熔炉，变脸熔炉将不再发射四股音符流，而是发射两列平行的音符。装填时会发射一枚吉他拨片，并有几率造成眩晕。; Heavy Jolt：如果玩家拥有振动机，该武器会获得更高的击退。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Thrown guns will increase in size, and will remain large even after picking them back up. This is purely a cosmetic effect and has no effect on gameplay.; Due to the higher knockback and slower shot speed, this item can be detrimental with short-ranged guns.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 掷出的枪支体积会增大，并且在重新捡起后仍会保持变大状态。这纯粹是外观效果，对游戏玩法没有影响。; 由于更高的击退和更慢的弹速，该道具在搭配短射程枪械时可能会产生不利影响。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Sometimes reveals the floor. The Gungeon is unmappable, but it was not always so. It is said that in his youth, the great cartographer Woban has created four great maps, one for each floor of the Gungeon. While working on the fifth and final map, the walls suddenly began to shift strangely; they continue to do so to this day.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 有时会显示楼层地图。枪牢是无法绘制地图的，但过去并非总是如此。据说在年轻时，伟大的制图师沃班（Woban）制作了四张伟大的地图，对应枪牢的每一层。在绘制第五张也是最后一张地图时，墙壁突然开始发生奇怪的偏移；时至今日它们仍在继续发生偏移。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: New floors have a 50% chance to be mapped out.; Does not reveal secret rooms.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 新楼层有 50% 的几率显示完整地图。; 不会显示隐藏房间。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Cartographer's Ring does not reveal the trapdoor to the Resourceful Rat's Lair.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 制图师的戒指不会显示通往老鼠层（Resourceful Rat's Lair）的活板门。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 4 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Increased bullet speed and power. Known for her impatience, Cadence grew tired of waiting for her bullets to reach their target. She developed these tiny rockets to give each shot extra speed.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 提升子弹速度和威力。以急躁闻名的凯登丝（Cadence）厌倦了等待子弹击中目标。她开发了这些微型火箭，为每次射击提供额外的速度。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Increases the shot speed of the player's bullets by 50%.; Increases damage by 10%.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 使玩家子弹的弹速提升 50%。; 提升 10% 的伤害。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Shot Across The Bow If the player also has Gunbow, it fires explosive missiles.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Shot Across The Bow：如果玩家同时拥有弩炮，该武器会发射爆炸性导弹。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The active item exclusive to The Pilot's past that fires a volley of rockets shares an identical sprite with Rocket-Powered Bullets.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 飞行员（The Pilot）过去线中专属的、能发射一连串火箭的主动道具，与火箭驱动的子弹拥有完全相同的贴图。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Movement speed increased.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 提升移动速度。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Increases Movement Speed by 1.5.; Grants a piece of Armor.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 提升 1.5 移动速度。; 提供一格护甲。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Brave New World If the player also has Siren, while it is equipped, a fish companion follows the player that can block bullets and shows contents of chests without opening them.; If the player has revealed the contents of a chest, the contents of that chest will be permanently locked in as that item. If a chest with a locked-in item attempts to drop a random item when broken, it will always drop the item that was locked in, overriding the usual quality reduction.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Brave New World：如果玩家同时拥有塞壬女妖，装备它时，会有一只鱼同伴跟随玩家。该同伴可以阻挡子弹，并能在不打开宝箱的情况下显示其内容物。; 如果玩家透视了宝箱里的物品，该宝箱的内容物将永久锁定为该道具。被锁定了物品的宝箱在被破坏时，如果尝试掉落随机物品，它将总是掉落锁定的那个物品，而忽略通常的品质降低惩罚。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The quote upon picking up this item is a reference to a Star Wars: Episode VI – Return of the Jedi quote. Obi-Wan talks about Anakin's fall into the Dark Side saying "he's more machine now than man. Twisted and evil."; The synergy Brave New World is a reference to the Disney movie, "The Little Mermaid".
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 捡起该物品时的台词致敬了《星球大战6：绝地归来》（Star Wars: Episode VI - Return of the Jedi）中的名句。欧比旺（Obi-Wan）在谈到阿纳金（Anakin）堕入黑暗面（Dark Side）时说道：“他如今更像机器，而非人类。既扭曲，又邪恶。”; "Brave New World" 协同效果致敬了迪士尼（Disney）电影《小美人鱼》（The Little Mermaid）。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: This ballot is proof of participation in the democratic process. PSA: Voting is cool, no matter what anyone says!
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这张选票是参与民主进程的证明。公益提示（PSA）：无论别人怎么说，投票都很酷！
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Increases Coolness by 3, which decreases the cooldown of active items and increases the chance of items dropping upon clearing a room.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 提升 3 点冷酷值（Coolness），这会减少主动道具的冷却时间并提高清空房间后掉落道具的几率。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Paperwork If the player also has Origuni, the first round of each magazine fires three airplanes instead of one.; Revolution If the player also has Dueling Pistol, the Dueling Pistol's bullets will deal 25% more damage and bounce five times instead of twice.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Paperwork：如果玩家同时拥有折纸枪，每个弹匣的第一发子弹会发射三架纸飞机而不是一架。; Revolution：如果玩家同时拥有决斗手枪，决斗手枪的子弹将造成 25% 的额外伤害，并且可以弹跳五次而不是两次。
entries.englishUsageNotes: If duplicates of this item are somehow obtained, further increases Coolness.; This item being in a gun-themed game is likely a reference to the Abraham Lincoln quote "The ballot is stronger than the bullet."
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 如果以某种方式获得了该道具的复制品，会进一步提升冷酷值（Coolness）。; 这件物品出现在以枪械为主题的游戏中，很可能是在致敬亚伯拉罕·林肯（Abraham Lincoln）的名言：“选票比子弹更有力量。”

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Repurposes spent ammo from fallen Gundead.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 回收倒下的枪尸（Gundead）所消耗的弹药。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Adds a 10% chance to regain 5% of the currently held gun's maximum ammo (rounded down) upon killing an enemy.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 击杀敌人时，有 10% 的几率恢复当前所持枪械最大弹药量的 5%（向下取整）。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Extreme Operation If the player also has Melted Rock, Melted Rock causes each corpse to fire a bullet at a nearby enemy in addition to exploding.; Synthetic Shield If the player also has Heart Synthesizer or Armor Synthesizer, grants a familiar that orbits the player and blocks shots. If all three synthesizers are picked up, grants three familiars.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Extreme Operation：如果玩家同时拥有熔岩，熔岩除了会引爆尸体外，还会使每具尸体向附近的敌人发射一颗子弹。; Synthetic Shield：如果玩家同时拥有爱心合成器或护甲合成器，会获得一个环绕玩家旋转并阻挡子弹的同伴。如果集齐了全部三种合成器，则会获得三个同伴。
entries.englishUsageNotes: If 5% of a gun's maximum ammo is less than 1 (less than 20 maximum ammo), Ammo Synthesizer will restore 1 ammo when it activates.; Works well with Ancient Hero's Bandana as it will restore 4x more ammo effectively making it easier to not run out.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 如果枪支最大弹药量的 5% 小于 1（即最大弹药量小于 20 发），弹药合成器在激活时将恢复 1 发弹药。; 与古代英雄的头巾搭配效果极佳，因为它会恢复 4 倍的弹药，有效地降低了弹药耗尽的可能性。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 8 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Increases damage at the cost of accuracy. The runes carved into the leather of this eyepatch represent a bargain with Kaliber, a revered gun Goddess. In exchange for depth perception, she will bless each bullet fired.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 以牺牲精准度为代价提升伤害。雕刻在这款皮革眼罩上的符文代表着与受人尊崇的枪之女神卡利伯（Kaliber）达成的交易。作为失去深度知觉的交换，她将保佑发射出的每一颗子弹。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Increases damage by 35%.; Increases shot spread by 65%, making shots less accurate.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 提升 35% 的伤害。; 增加 65% 的子弹散布，使射击精度降低。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Careful Iteration If the player has Casey, Casey becomes spiked and fires a spread of 6 nails each time it is swung.; Iroquois If the player also has MAC10, its reload time is decreased by 33%, its magazine size is increased by 50%, and its knockback is increased by 50%.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Careful Iteration：如果玩家拥有卡西，卡西会带刺，并且每次挥舞时会发射 6 枚呈扇形散布的钉子。; Iroquois：如果玩家同时拥有英格拉姆Mac10式冲锋枪，其装填时间减少 33%，弹匣容量增加 50%，且击退增加 50%。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This item is a reference to the Norse god Odin, in particular the poem Völuspá of the Poetic Edda, where it is explained that Odin cast his eye into the well 'Mímisbrunnr' in exchange for wisdom. The runes supposedly carved into the eyepatch item are likely in reference to the nordic Elder Futhark, the oldest runic script.; The Iroquois synergy is a reference to the 1981 film Escape from New York, where the protagonist Snake Plissken wears an eyepatch over his left eye and carries a MAC10.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 该道具是在致敬北欧神话中的主神奥丁（Odin），特别是《诗体埃达》（Poetic Edda）中的诗篇《女巫的预言》（Völuspá），其中解释了奥丁用自己的一只眼睛投入密米尔之泉（Mímisbrunnr）以换取智慧。眼罩上刻有的符文可能是在影射北欧古弗萨克字母（Elder Futhark）——这是最古老的卢恩文字。; "Iroquois" 协同效果致敬了 1981 年的电影《纽约大逃亡》（Escape from New York），片中主角斯内克·普利斯肯（Snake Plissken）左眼戴着眼罩并手持英格拉姆Mac10式冲锋枪。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Improves equipped gun on each sequential kill. Taking damage or changing guns will reduce the bonus back to zero.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 每次连续击杀都会增强装备的枪械。受到伤害或切换枪支会将加成重置为零。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Grants a +2% damage bonus for each enemy killed. The effect maxes out at +150% weapon damage (75 consecutive kills).; The bonus is reset if the player takes damage, changes guns, or drops their gun.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 每次击杀敌人提供 +2% 的伤害加成。该效果最大加成为 +150% 的武器伤害（连续击杀 75 个敌人）。; 如果玩家受到伤害、切换枪支或丢弃枪支，加成将被重置。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Keeping The Beat If the player has Drum Clip, the damage increase is changed to +4% damage per kill instead of +2%, and maxes out at +250% damage instead of +150%. The note at max level becomes silver. Picking up Drum Clip after Metronome resets the damage bonus.; Shredder Doubles the spread of the Face Melter and Gunzheng.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Keeping The Beat：如果玩家拥有鼓夹，每次击杀提升的伤害由 +2% 变更为 +4%，且上限由 +150% 提升至 +250%。满层时的音符会变成银色。在拥有节拍器后拾取鼓夹会重置伤害加成。; Shredder：使变脸熔炉和枪筝的散布翻倍。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Adding currently equipped guns to a Muncher will reset the bonus as if switching guns.; Playing Winchester's minigame will reset the bonus.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 将当前装备的枪械喂给吞枪怪会重置加成，效果等同于切换枪支。; 参加温彻斯特的小游戏会重置加成。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Fires a beam that decoheres matter into its constituent particles. This disintegration ray is outlawed on almost every planet with some form of government, and feared by all beings made primarily of matter. It can be fired legally in only two places: the Gungeon, and the waste disposal facilities of Popolon V.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 发射一束将物质解相干（分裂）为基本粒子的射线。这种分解射线在几乎所有有某种形式政府的星球上都是非法的，并且被所有主要由物质构成的生物所惧怕。它仅在两个地方可以合法发射：枪牢，以及波波隆五号（Popolon V）的废物处理设施。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Weird Science If the player also has Science Cannon, three pairs of Science Cannon beams branch off perpendicular to the Disintegrator's main beam.; If the player also has Singularity, shooting an upgraded Disintegrator beam at or near the black hole will cause a massive number of beams to split off in every direction.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Weird Science：如果玩家同时拥有科技加农枪，三对科技加农枪的射线会垂直于分解者的主射线分支发射。; 如果玩家同时拥有奇点，在黑洞处或黑洞附近发射升级后的分解者射线，会导致大量射线向各个方向分裂。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Disintegrator appears to be a reference to the "M-920 Cain" heavy weapon from Mass Effect 2, having a similar design and very long charge time before firing.https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BF_iYmF_tE8 video of the M-920 Cain being fired at powerful enemies
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 分解者似乎是在致敬《质量效应2》（Mass Effect 2）中的重型武器 "M-920 Cain" ，其设计相似且在发射前需要极长的充能时间。"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BF_iYmF_tE8" 展示了向强大敌人发射 "M-920 Cain" 的视频。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Used mostly by farmers who seek to defend their farms from hungry giants, the Blunderbuss fires anything you put into it. Hold to charge and launch projectiles in an inaccurate short spray. Not as effective against sly dragons.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 主要供想要保护农田免受饥饿巨人侵害的农民使用，喇叭枪可以发射你装填进其中的任何东西。按住来充能并以不精准的短距离散布发射弹药。对狡猾的龙不那么有效。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Blunderbrace If the player also has Macho Brace, Blunderbuss shoots bigger and faster bullets and charge time is reduced.; Hell Singing If the player also has Silver Bullets, Blunderbuss will deal an extra 50% damage to jammed enemies for a total of 487.5% damage.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Blunderbrace：如果玩家同时拥有强制锻炼器，喇叭枪会发射更大且更快的子弹，并且充能时间会缩短。; Hell Singing：如果玩家同时拥有银子弹，喇叭枪会对被诅咒的敌人额外造成50%的伤害，总共造成487.5%的伤害。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Despite firing like a shotgun, the Blunderbuss is not in the SHOTGUN gun class, and as such does not benefit from the Shotgun Affinity synergy.; There is a glitch where firing Blunderbuss by charging until just before the fully charged animation causes the gun to fire without using ammo.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 尽管射击方式像霰弹枪，但喇叭枪不属于霰弹枪枪械类别，因此不会受到 Shotgun Affinity 协同效果加成。; 存在一个漏洞：在充能即将完成但尚未播放完全充能动画时发射喇叭枪，可以在不消耗弹药的情况下开火。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Fires several pulses of decoherent energy. An early, less controlled version of modern energy weaponry.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 发射几束解相干能量脉冲。是现代能量武器的早期且较难控制的版本。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Finger on the Pulse If the player has Heart Bottle, Heart Holster, Heart Purse, Heart Locket, or Heart Lunchbox and takes damage while holding Pulse Cannon, three miniature Pulse Cannons spawn around the player and fire at enemies, before disappearing. This effect stacks with itself, each adding 3 more pulse cannons for each heart item.; Iron Stance If the player also has Heavy Boots, projectile speed and knockback are increased.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Finger on the Pulse：如果玩家拥有红心之瓶、心形皮套、心形钱包、心形小盒或心形饭盒，并在持有时受到伤害，玩家周围会生成三个微型脉冲炮向敌人射击，随后消失。该效果可叠加，每拥有一件红心道具就会多生成3个微型脉冲炮。; Iron Stance：如果玩家同时拥有重靴子，子弹速度和击退会增加。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This weapon may be a reference to the M41A Pulse Rifle in the film Aliens.; The entry for the Pulse Cannon in the Physical Ammonomicon has a small doodle of a monstrous Bullet Kin with another Bullet Kin head emerging out of its toothy maw. This is likely a reference to the iconic inner jaw of Xenomorphs in the Alien franchise.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把武器可能是在致敬电影《异形2》（Aliens）中的 M41A 脉冲步枪。; 实体版《枪之图鉴》（Ammonomicon）中脉冲炮的条目下画有一幅画：一个畸形的子弹人口中又伸出了另一个子弹人的头。这很可能是致敬《异形》（Alien）系列电影中异形（Xenomorphs）标志性的内口器。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Low damage, high rate of fire. Spiny! Remnants of Gun Cacti can be found throughout the Gungeon, but no one is certain as to their source. Perhaps they hail from a yet undiscovered Chamber? Regardless, their impressive needle capacity is a boon to any Gungeoneer.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 低伤害，高射速。多刺！枪用仙人掌（Gun Cacti）的残余在整个枪牢中随处可见，但没有人确定它们的来源。也许它们来自一个尚未被发现的层级？无论如何，它们惊人的飞针容量对任何枪牢者（Gungeoneer）来说都是一项福音。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Cactus Flower If the player has Broccoli or Orange, Cactus has a chance to fire a prickly pear that bounces off walls and fires needles in all directions.; The chance to fire a prickly pear also applies to guns Duct Taped to Cactus with the synergy.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Cactus Flower：如果玩家拥有西兰花或橙子，仙人掌有几率发射一个仙人掌果，该果实会在墙壁上反弹并向所有方向发射飞针。; 在拥有该协同效果时，使用胶带粘在仙人掌上的枪械也有几率发射仙人掌果。
entries.englishUsageNotes: "1000 Needles!" is a reference to a move used by the Cactuar, a recurring enemy from the Final Fantasy series, who resembles a walking cactus.; "Succulent DOOM" may possibly be a reference to the album Special Herbs by MF DOOM.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: “1000根针”（"1000 Needles"）是在致敬《最终幻想》（Final Fantasy）系列中经常出现的敌人仙人刺（Cactuar），它看起来像是一个行走的仙人掌。; “多肉毁灭”（"Succulent DOOM"）可能是在致敬歌手 "MF DOOM" 的专辑 "Special Herbs" 。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Sets enemies aflame. Alben Smallbore, enthralled with the variety of guns he found in the Gungeon, created this spell. Upon casting, the wielder's hand bursts into flame, allowing fireballs to be thrown like bullets.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 点燃敌人。阿尔本·斯莫尔波（Alben Smallbore）着迷于他在枪牢中找到的各种枪械，从而创造了这一法术。施法时，使用者的手会燃起火焰，允许像投掷子弹一样投掷火球。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Hotter Than Heck If the player has Pitchfork, increases the shot size and damage of the guns by 25%, and grants fire immunity while they are held.; Maximize Spell If the player also has Chance Bullets or Gungeon Pepper, the Flame Hand turns green, is always guaranteed to roll at least a 12 (after intelligence modifiers), and fires green flames that no longer pierce enemies but leave pools of green napalm upon hitting enemies. Green napalm does not damage the player, and inflicts greenfire on enemies, which has a massively increased duration.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Hotter Than Heck：如果玩家拥有干草叉，持有时会使枪械的子弹大小和伤害提高25%，并获得火焰免疫。; Maximize Spell：如果玩家同时拥有机会子弹或地牢胡椒，火焰之手会变为绿色，且必定投出至少12点（在计算智力修正后），并发射不再穿透敌人但会在命中时留下绿色凝固汽油弹区域的绿色火焰。绿色凝固汽油弹不会伤害玩家，且会对敌人造成持续时间大幅增加的绿火效果。
entries.englishUsageNotes: As the Flame Hand deals fire-type damage, it deals no damage to Muzzle Wisps and Muzzle Flares.; Due to the high knockback and large size of the fireballs, they can hit the same enemy multiple times.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 由于火焰之手造成的是火焰类型伤害，它无法对枪口幽魂（Muzzle Wisps）和枪口火花（Muzzle Flares）造成伤害。; 由于火球的击退很高且体积较大，它们可以多次命中同一个敌人。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The shotbow fires crossbow bolts in a shotgun burst. The shotbow is the result of a failed experiment using the Gungeon's teleportation network.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 霰弹弓以霰弹枪的喷射方式发射弩箭。霰弹弓是利用枪牢传送网络进行的一次失败实验的产物。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Second Accident If the player has Teleporter Prototype or Chest Teleporter, Shotbow fires 9 parallel arrows straight forward.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Second Accident：如果玩家拥有传送原型机或宝箱传送装置，霰弹弓会向前笔直发射9支平行箭矢。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Shotbow is in the SHOTGUN gun class and as such benefits from the Shotgun Affinity synergy.; This gun's description could be a reference to the episode Tuvix, from the TV show Star Trek Voyager, where two characters were merged into one as a result of a transporter (a sort of teleporter) accident, which is itself a reference to the film The Fly.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 霰弹弓属于霰弹枪（SHOTGUN）枪械类别，因此会受到 Shotgun Affinity 协同效果加成。; 这把枪的描述可能是在影射电视剧《星际旅行：航海家号》（Star Trek Voyager）中的“托维克斯”（Tuvix）一集，剧中两名角色因一次传送器（一种传送装置）事故而融合为一体，而该剧集本身也是在致敬电影《变蝇人》（The Fly）。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Just some junk.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 只是一些垃圾。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Junk has no inherent effect, however it does interact with some other systems and items.; When playing as The Robot, each piece of Junk increases damage by a permanent additive 5%. The damage increase persists no matter what happens to the Junk.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 垃圾本身没有固有效果，但它确实能与其他一些系统和道具产生互动。; 当扮演机器人（The Robot）时，每拥有一件垃圾都会永久性地使伤害加成增加5%（加法叠加）。无论垃圾发生什么变化，该伤害提升都会保持。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Grouch Junk increases the damage of the Trashcannon by 25%. This effect does not stack with multiple Junk.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Grouch：垃圾能使垃圾加农炮的伤害提升25%。该效果不会因拥有多个垃圾而叠加。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Junk has a chest destruction loot weight of 0.45.; If the player is in possession of Ser Junkan, the chest destruction loot weight of junk is multiplied by 1.5.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 垃圾通过摧毁宝箱掉落的权重为0.45。; 如果玩家拥有废品金克（Ser Junkan），摧毁宝箱掉落垃圾的权重会乘以1.5。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: After mostly confirming the functionality of bounce physics, work was done to improve the design. Smaller, lighter, and in an attractive shade of purple, the RUBE-ADYNE MK. II delivers on the promise of the original prototype.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 在基本确认了弹跳物理机制的可行性后，改进设计的工作便开始了。鲁布-亚达因型2号（RUBE-ADYNE MK. II）更小、更轻，并且呈现出迷人的紫色，实现了最初原型的承诺。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires purple lasers that can each bounce up to 2 times.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射紫色激光，每发激光最多可以反弹2次。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Rubenstein's Monster If the player also has RUBE-ADYNE Prototype, the two guns are combined to form Rubenstein's Monster.; This synergy isn't granted with Lich's Eye Bullets.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Rubenstein's Monster：如果玩家同时拥有鲁布-亚达因原型，这两把枪会融合成鲁宾斯坦的怪物（Rubenstein's Monster）。; 该协同效果无法通过巫妖之眼子弹获得。
entries.englishUsageNotes: RUBE-ADYNE MK.II is the upgraded version of the RUBE-ADYNE Prototype.; The RUBE-ABYNE MK.II multiplies the loot weight of the RUBE-ADYNE Prototype by 2, doubling its likelihood of appearing. This is likely to aid players in obtaining the Rubenstein's Monster synergy.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 鲁布-亚达因型2号（RUBE-ADYNE MK.II）是鲁布-亚达因原型的升级版本。; 鲁布-亚达因型2号会将鲁布-亚达因原型的掉落权重乘以2，使其出现的概率翻倍。这很可能是为了帮助玩家获得 Rubenstein's Monster 协同效果。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Trorc for 8 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Standard box rocket. Capacity: 4. Often found atop military transports or mechanized walkers, this box rocket can be fired manually by the strongest Gungeoneers.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 标准的箱式火箭。容量：4。这种箱式火箭经常可以在军事运输工具或机械行走载具顶部找到，最强壮的枪牢者（Gungeoneer）可以手动发射它。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires explosive 220 missiles.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射造成220伤害爆炸的导弹。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Behold! If the player also has Eye of the Beholster, M1911, Void Marshal, Machine Pistol, and Trank Gun (the weapons the Beholster uses in game), when the Eye of the Beholster is held, the other five guns rotate around the player and shoot at nearby enemies, still using up ammo from each gun. Obtainable through the Beholster shrine, although it can be activated without.; Commammo Belt If the player also has Ammo Belt, Com4nd0 gains double magazine size and changes appearance, becoming light green and featuring an ammo belt around it.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Behold!：如果玩家同时拥有嗜枪怪之眼、M1911、虚空元帅、机枪和M9（即嗜枪怪在游戏中使用的武器），当持有着嗜枪怪之眼时，其他五把枪会围绕玩家旋转并射击附近的敌人，同时仍然会消耗各自的弹药。可以通过嗜枪怪祭坛获得，但即使没有祭坛也可以触发。; Commammo Belt：如果玩家同时拥有弹药带，魔鬼司令会获得双倍的弹匣容量并改变外观，变为淡绿色且带有一圈弹药带。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun is one of the six wielded by the Beholster. When used by the Beholster, it fires homing rockets visually identical to those fired by the player.; As it is held by the Beholster, it can be placed on the Beholster Shrine.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪是嗜枪怪（Beholster）使用的六把武器之一。当被嗜枪怪使用时，它发射的寻敌火箭弹在视觉上与玩家发射的完全一致。; 由于它被嗜枪怪所持有，它可以被放置在嗜枪怪祭坛上。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Projectiles shatter and freeze enemies.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 子弹会碎裂并冰冻敌人。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires bouncing ice cubes which leave trails of water, explode, and freeze enemies.; Like most explosions, these ice blasts can destroy enemy bullets.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射弹跳的冰块，冰块会留下水迹、爆炸并冰冻敌人。; 与大多数爆炸一样，这些冰爆可以摧毁敌人的子弹。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Unsinkable If the player has Corsair, Corsair fires exploding Titanic ships.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Unsinkable：如果玩家拥有海盗船，海盗船会发射爆炸的泰坦尼克号邮轮（Titanic ships）。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The ice cubes bounce off Cursed Pots and will destroy them without exploding.; Prior to the Advanced Gungeons & Draguns Update, Glacier was a C gun.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 冰块会在被诅咒的罐子（Cursed Pots）上弹开，并会在不发生爆炸的情况下摧毁它们。; 在《高级枪械与地牢》（Advanced Gungeons & Draguns）更新之前，冰川是一把C级枪。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Carry an additional item and more ammunition.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 携带额外的一件道具和更多弹药。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Grants an extra active item slot.; Increases maximum ammo by 20%.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 提供一个额外的主动道具槽位。; 提升20%的最大弹药量。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Gunnerang If the player also has Boomerang, thrown guns deal 50% more damage.; M1 Multi-Tool If the player also has M1, M1's reload time is decreased by 20%, and its magazine size and maximum ammo are increased. Movement speed is also increased while M1 is held.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: "Gunnerang"：如果玩家同时拥有回飞镖，投掷枪械造成的伤害增加50%。; 鲁布-亚达因型2号多功能工具：如果玩家同时拥有鲁布-亚达因型2号，鲁布-亚达因型2号的装填时间会缩短20%，并且其弹匣容量和最大弹药量会增加。持有鲁布-亚达因型2号时移动速度也会增加。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Increases health substantially. Any purchases will shatter the ring. Before the Shopkeep opened his shop, he was an avaricious and miserly man. He remains careful about any expenditures, but through capitalism he has purged himself of negative emotion.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 大幅增加生命值。任何购买行为都会粉碎这枚戒指。在店主开店之前，他是个贪婪且吝啬的人。他现在对任何支出依然小心翼翼，但通过“资本主义”，他已经消除了负面情绪。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Grants two heart containers. Disappears upon purchasing anything from any shop.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 提供两个心之容器。在任意商店购买任何物品后都会消失。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Porkulent If the player has Pig, purchases will not destroy the ring.; The item disappears if it is dropped.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: Porkulent：如果玩家拥有英雄猪，购买物品将不会摧毁这枚戒指。; 如果丢弃该物品，它会消失。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The Backpack grants you the use of another Active Item. Useful, but cumbersome.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 背包可以让你使用另一个主动道具。虽实用，但也繁琐。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Allows the player to hold an extra active item.; The active items are switched by default by pressing Shift (keyboard) or up on the D-pad (controller).
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 允许玩家额外携带一个主动道具。; 默认情况下，按键盘上的切换键（Shift）或手柄十字键的上方向可切换主动道具。
entries.englishUsageNotes: M1 Multi-Tool If the player also has M1, its reload time is decreased by 20%, and its magazine size and maximum ammo are increased. Movement speed is also increased while M1 is held.; Mak Pak If the player has Makarov, Makarov's maximum ammo is increased by 30%. While holding Marakov, it occasionally fires a homing bullet at an enemy for free.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 鲁布-亚达因型2号多功能工具：如果玩家同时拥有鲁布-亚达因型2号，其装填时间将减少 20%，弹匣容量和最大弹药量也会增加。持有鲁布-亚达因型2号时移动速度同样会增加。; 马卡洛夫背包（Mak Pak）：如果玩家拥有马卡洛夫枪，马卡洛夫枪的最大弹药量将增加 30%。持有马卡洛夫枪时，偶尔会免费向敌人发射一颗自导引子弹。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Ammo capacity increased.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 增加弹药容量。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Increases maximum ammo by 20%.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 增加 20% 的最大弹药量。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Buckle Up If the player has Gungine, continuously moving with Gungine held gives the player a yellow glow, significantly increasing Gungine's rate of fire. The glow disappears if the player stops moving. Additionally, Gungine has a chance to not consume ammo upon firing.; Comammo Belt If the player has Com4nd0, its magazine size is doubled.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 系好安全带（Buckle Up）：如果玩家拥有喷气式枪，在持有喷气式枪时持续移动会使玩家散发黄色光芒，显著提高喷气式枪的射速。一旦玩家停止移动，光芒就会消失。此外，喷气式枪开火时有几率不消耗弹药。; 魔鬼司令弹药带（Comammo Belt）：如果玩家拥有魔鬼司令，其弹匣容量翻倍。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The M1 Multi-Tool synergy is a possible reference to the MIDA Multi-Tool, a gun from the game Destiny.; An Ammo Belt can be seen among the pile of items that makes up the Resourceful Rats throne in the Resourceful Rat's Lair.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: “鲁布-亚达因型2号多功能工具”协同效果可能是在致敬游戏《命运》（Destiny）中的武器“MIDA多功能工具”（MIDA Multi-Tool）。; 在老鼠层（Resourceful Rat's Lair）中，构成有力鼠王座的道具堆里可以看到一条弹药带。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Enables active reload.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 启用主动装填。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: When reloading, pressing the fire or reload buttons when the indicator passes a certain mark on the reload bar will instantly reload the weapon. The mark on the reload bar is set to be at 2/3 of the length of the reload bar/reload time.; This effectively decreases the reload time.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 装填时，当装填条上的指示器经过特定标记时按下开火或装填键，将立即完成武器装填。该标记位于装填条/装填时间长度的 2/3 处。; 这能有效缩短装填时间。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Chest High is the Best High If the player also has Mourning Star, damage is increased by 25% and the Macho Brace effect is activated after flipping a table. This version of the Macho Brace effect is different to the actual item's, as it increases damage by 100% for a brief time rather than Macho Brace's 30%.; This effect is triggered at the same time as and stacks with that of Table Tech Rage, increasing the damage even further.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 胸口高才是真的高（Chest High is the Best High）：如果玩家同时拥有哀悼之星，掀翻桌子后伤害会增加 25%，并触发强制锻炼器的效果。此版本的强制锻炼器效果与实际道具不同，它会在短时间内增加 100% 的伤害，而非原本强制锻炼器的 30%。; 该效果与桌技：愤怒同时触发且可以叠加，从而进一步提高伤害。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Prior to the Supply Drop Update, Cog of Battle was a D item.; All active reload effects (including those of the Cog of Battle) are disabled while the Gun Queue challenge modifier is active.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 在“空投补给”更新前，战争嵌齿轮是 D 级道具。; 当“武器队列”（Gun Queue）挑战因子处于激活状态时，所有主动装填效果（包括战争嵌齿轮的效果）都将被禁用。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: C4 can be placed and then triggered remotely. More useful than a standard time bomb, but less convenient than a proximity mine, plastic explosives can be manually triggered.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: C4 可以被安放并进行远程引爆。塑料炸药虽然比普通定时炸弹更实用，但没有感应地雷那么便利，因为它需要手动引爆。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Places explosives on the ground which then can be detonated by using the item again, dealing 60 damage to nearby enemies. Unlike Bomb, does not open secret rooms.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 在地面上安置炸药，再次使用该道具即可引爆，对附近敌人造成 60 点伤害。与炸弹不同，它不能炸开隐藏房。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The C4 in game is based on the real-life plastic explosive. C4 is often known for its moldable clay-like quality; however, this doesn't appear in-game.; After placing down the C4 charge, the items appearance in the players UI will change to a transmitter switch until the mine is detonated.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 游戏中的 C4 是基于现实中的塑料炸药设计的。C4 以其类似橡皮泥的可塑性而闻名，但这一特性并没有在游戏中体现。; 安置 C4 炸药后，该道具在玩家界面（UI）中的图标会变成引爆开关，直到炸药被引爆。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: A map of the current layout of one floor of the Gungeon. Becomes obsolete quickly.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 当前枪牢楼层布局的地图。很快就会过时。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fully reveals the layout of the current floor, including secret rooms.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 完全显示当前楼层的布局，包括隐藏房。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Parchmental If the player has Origuni, it fires two planes per shot. This lasts for the rest of the run even though the Map only lasts for one floor.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 折纸羊皮纸（Parchmental）：如果玩家拥有折纸枪，每次射击会发射两架纸飞机。即便地图的效果仅持续一层，该协同效果也会在余下的整局游戏中持续生效。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Map is consumed upon pickup and does not appear in the player's inventory.; Has a small chance to drop on room clear.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 地图在拾取时就会被消耗，不会出现在玩家的物品栏中。; 清理房间时有极小几率掉落。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: This honeycomb bonds with the user, releasing bees to protect their hive when damaged.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这个蜂窝会与使用者建立羁绊，在受到伤害时释放蜜蜂保护它们的蜂巢。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Taking damage spawns 12-20 150 bees that seek out and attack enemies. Bees deal 3 damage on impact and apply a lingering 'swarm' effect that deals 1 damage right away, and deals 1 damage every second for 2 more seconds.; These bees are not affected by the player's other items, or any of their stats except for bullet scale.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 受到伤害时会生成 12 到 20 只速度为 150 的蜜蜂，自动寻找并攻击敌人。蜜蜂撞击时造成 3 点伤害，并施加持续的“蜂群”（Swarm）效果：立即造成 1 点伤害，且在接下来的 2 秒内每秒额外造成 1 点伤害。; 这些蜜蜂不受玩家其他道具的影响，也不受除子弹大小外的任何属性影响。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Bee Plus If the player has Jar of Bees, taking damage causes Honeycomb to spawn hornets, which travel faster and deal more damage than regular bees. Jar of Bees will also spawn hornets instead of bees.; BEES If the player has Bee Hive, the size of the Bee Hive's bees is doubled, their damage is increased by 25%, and the Bee Hive's rate of fire is decreased by 34%.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 双重蜜蜂（Bee Plus）：如果玩家拥有瓶装蜜蜂，受到伤害时蜂窝会生成大黄蜂，它们比普通蜜蜂移动更快且伤害更高。瓶装蜜蜂也会生成大黄蜂而非普通蜜蜂。; 蜜蜂（BEES）：如果玩家拥有蜂巢，蜂巢所发射蜜蜂的体型翻倍，伤害增加 25%，同时蜂巢的射速降低 34%。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Prior to the Supply Drop Update, Honeycomb was a B item.; This item is a reference to The Pain, a character in Metal Gear Solid 3: Snake Eater capable of controlling insects due to a parasite infection giving him the ability to secrete pheromones. It may be a further reference to special 'bullet bees', gestated by The Pain inside his own body and released through his mouth.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 在“空投补给”更新之前，蜂窝是 B 级道具。; 该道具致敬了《合金装备3：食蛇者》（Metal Gear Solid 3: Snake Eater）中的角色“痛苦”（The Pain），他因寄生虫感染而能分泌信息素并控制昆虫。这可能还进一步指代了“痛苦”在自己体内孕育并通过嘴部释放的特殊“子弹蜂”。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Increases the chance of gaining a key upon clearing a room.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 增加清理房间后获得钥匙的几率。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Has a 20% chance to give a free Key upon clearing a room if no damage was taken in that room.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 如果在房间内没有受到伤害，清理房间后有 20% 的几率免费获得一把钥匙。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Firing With Flair If the player also has the Flare Gun, it turns green and is guaranteed to inflict enemies with greenfire, which has a massively increased duration.; Key Witness If the player also has Shelleton Key, firing any gun has a chance to fire an AKEY-47 shot.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 华丽开火（Firing With Flair）：如果玩家同时拥有照明弹枪，照明弹枪会变绿，并且必定让击中的敌人燃起持续时间大幅增加的绿火。; 关键证人（Key Witness）：如果玩家同时拥有骷髅钥匙，使用任何枪械开火时都有几率射出一发 AKEY-47 子弹。
entries.englishUsageNotes: In practice, this item can almost fully substitute for infinite unlock items due to the sheer amount of keys it generates (assuming the player has little to no Curse).; This item is a reference to the character Jill Valentine from Resident Evil and her ability to pick locks.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 在实际使用中，由于该道具能产生数量庞大的钥匙，它几乎可以完全替代无限解锁道具（假设玩家的诅咒值极低或为零）。; 该道具致敬了《生化危机》（Resident Evil）中的角色吉尔·瓦伦蒂安（Jill Valentine）及其开锁能力。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: A prototype ricochet blaster. This blaster was created to test the limits of projectile impact and ricochet physics.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 弹跳爆能枪的原型。设计这把爆能枪是为了测试弹丸撞击和弹跳物理的极限。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Rubenstein's Monster If the player also has RUBE-ADYNE MK.II, the two guns are combined to form Rubenstein's Monster.; This synergy isn't granted by Lich's Eye Bullets.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 鲁宾斯坦的怪物（Rubenstein's Monster）：如果玩家同时拥有鲁布-亚达因型2号，这两把枪会融合成 Rubenstein's Monster。; 该协同效果无法通过巫妖之眼子弹触发。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The RUBE-ADYNE MK.II is an upgraded version of this gun.; The RUBE-ADYNE weapons may be named after David Rubel, one of the programmers of Enter the Gungeon.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 鲁布-亚达因型2号是这把枪的升级版本。; 鲁布-亚达因（RUBE-ADYNE）系列武器可能得名于《挺进地牢》（Enter the Gungeon）的程序员之一大卫·鲁贝尔（David Rubel）。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: A merciless shotgun variant, packed with skulls, nails, and poison. After Hespera fell, her shotgun grew dark and corrupted by rage.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 一把毫不留情的霰弹枪变种，装填着骷髅、钉子和毒液。赫斯珀拉（Hespera）陨落后，她的霰弹枪也在怒火中变得阴暗而扭曲。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires a spread of 6 disparate bullets with different effects.; 2 regular bullets with lower range than the other projectiles.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射 6 枚效果各不相同、彼此分散的子弹。; 其中有 2 枚是射程比其他弹体更短的普通子弹。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Careful Iteration If the player also has Casey, Casey becomes spiked and fires a spread of 6 nails each time it is swung.; Love/Hate If the player also has Shotgun Full of Love, the two guns are dual-wielded.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Careful Iteration：如果玩家同时拥有卡西，卡西会带刺，并且每次挥舞时会发射 6 枚呈扇形散布的钉子。; Love/Hate：如果玩家同时拥有爱之霰弹枪，这两把枪会双持使用。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Shotgun Full of Hate being in the SHOTGUN gun class makes it inherently less common than its counterpart, the Shotgun Full of Love which exists in the CHARM class.; This is due to the SHOTGUN class being a more common class, meaning more guns exist where possessing them will make the Shotgun Full of Hate less common.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 充满仇恨的霰弹枪属于 SHOTGUN 枪械类别，因此天生比属于 CHARM 类别的对应武器爱之霰弹枪更稀有。; 这是因为 SHOTGUN 属于更常见的类别，能让充满仇恨的霰弹枪变得不那么常见的枪械也就更多。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Chance to transmogrify. The Witch Pistol is a hexed variant of a standard magnum. A favorite of magic users seeking to become familiar with gunplay.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 有几率将敌人变形。女巫手枪是标准马格南手枪的咒术变体，深受想熟悉枪械战斗的施法者喜爱。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Each bullet fired has a 10% chance to transmogrify enemies into harmless chickens.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 每发射一颗子弹，都有 10% 的几率把敌人变成无害的小鸡。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Cast Iron If the player has Big Iron, each of Big Iron's bullets are replaced with one from Bundle of Wands, Witch Pistol, and Hexagun.; Chicken Arise If the player has Magic Bullets, bullet size and transmogrification chances are increased.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Cast Iron：如果玩家拥有大铁枪，大铁枪的每颗子弹都会改为从一束魔杖、女巫手枪和六角枪中各取一发来发射。; Chicken Arise：如果玩家拥有魔术子弹，子弹体积和变形几率都会提高。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Bosses and Mimics are immune to transmogrification.; Bullets from the Witch Pistol leave R, N, and Φ shaped scorch marks on impacting a north wall.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 首领和拟身怪免疫变形效果。; 女巫手枪的子弹击中北侧墙壁时，会留下类似英文字母和希腊字母的焦痕。

entries.unlock: Defeat the High Dragun.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Finely balanced, rapid fire. Can ignite foes. An Edwin original. The Dragunfire was forged deep in the heart of the Gungeon, crafted to emulate the wrath of the beast from which it takes its name.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 平衡极佳，连射迅猛，还能点燃敌人。埃德温（Edwin）的原创作品。龙焰枪是在枪牢深处锻造而成，旨在复现其名字所源自那头巨兽的怒火。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Dragunice If the player has the Heart of Ice, the Dragunfire will shoot blue fire that has a chance to burn and/or freeze an enemy.; Kalibreath If the player has Yellow Chamber or Holey Grail, the Dragunfire and its projectiles turn gray. It gains increased rate of fire and knockback, but loses piercing projectiles.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Dragunice：如果玩家拥有冰之心，龙焰枪会发射蓝色火焰，并有几率灼烧和/或冻结敌人。; Kalibreath：如果玩家拥有黄色膛室或剩杯，龙焰枪及其弹丸会变成灰色。它会获得更高的射速和击退，但会失去弹丸穿透效果。
