entries.chineseUsageNotes: 中文待定（Cerebral Bros）：如果玩家同时拥有钻头枪，这把枪会多打一枚钻头并变红。; 中文待定（Mine Craft）：如果玩家同时拥有矿井切割机，装备矿井切割机时地雷会追踪敌人。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Improves dodging. This ancient ring spins slowly about its axis, even when worn. It is of unknown origin.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 提升翻滚闪避能力。这枚古老戒指即使佩戴着也会缓慢绕轴旋转，来源不明。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Increases dodge roll speed by 15.8%.; Increases the amount of time during a dodge roll that the player is invulnerable.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 翻滚速度提高 15.8%。; 提高玩家在翻滚期间处于无敌状态的持续时间。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Hot Rolls If the player also has Ring of Fire Resistance, rolling creates a trail of fire.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Hot Rolls：如果玩家同时拥有耐火之戒，翻滚时会留下火焰轨迹。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This item is a reference to a Dark Souls item of the same name.; Like in Enter The Gungeon, dodge rolling in Dark Souls is a commonly used move to avoid enemy attacks.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这件物品致敬了同名的《黑暗之魂》道具。; 和《挺进地牢》里一样，《黑暗之魂》里的翻滚也是用来躲避敌人攻击的常见动作。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: A pair of enchanted wings, which grant flight. Your caterpillar friend has metamorphosed into a wondrous creature! And that wondrous creature is a spine fly, which burrows into the spinal column of vertebrates. The survivors of this parasite sprout wings.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 一对附魔翅膀，可赋予飞行能力。你的毛毛虫朋友已经蜕变成了奇妙生物！而那只奇妙生物其实是一种脊背蝇，它会钻进脊椎动物的脊柱里。幸存下来的寄生虫会长出翅膀。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Grants flight.; Rolls leave pink slime that temporarily charms enemies.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 赋予飞行能力。; 翻滚会留下粉色黏液，暂时魅惑敌人。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Granted by Hungry Caterpillar.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 由饥饿毛毛虫赐予。

entries.unlock: Transport [[Ox and Cadence
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Extra Life. An uncomfortable answer to an uncomfortable truth. This clone can replace a single Gungeoneer upon their death, with almost no lapse in memory.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 额外一条命。面对不愿面对的真相时，一个并不舒服的答案。这个克隆体可以在一名枪牢者死亡时替代他，几乎不会造成记忆上的断层。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Upon death, the player respawns at the very beginning of their run with full health, as well as all of their accumulated guns, items, and pickups- with the exception of Clone itself. This essentially allows the player to immediately start a new run with all of the loot of the last run.; The Robot will always respawn with 6 Armor.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 死亡后，玩家会在本轮开局处以满血复活，并保留当前累计的枪械、道具和拾取物，但克隆人本身除外。这实际上等于让玩家带着上一轮的全部战利品立即开始新一轮。; 机器人复活时始终会带着 6 点护甲。
entries.englishUsageNotes: If the shopkeeper has been angered (ex. shooting in shop, stealing), he will not return after revival.; Allows the collection of duplicate Master Rounds on a single run, all of which count towards unlocking the Super Hot Watch.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 如果店主已经被激怒（例如在商店里开枪、偷东西），复活后他不会回来。; 允许在同一轮中收集重复的胜者之弹，这些胜者之弹都会计入解锁超级热的手表。

entries.unlock: "Rescue" the Ledge Goblin multiple times.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Reduces hazard radius of explosions. This hardy helmet provides protection when too close to an explosion. Be wary though, it only works at a distance.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 降低爆炸的危险半径。这顶结实的头盔能在离爆炸太近时提供保护，不过要当心，它只在保持距离时才有效。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Decreases the radius at which explosions can harm the player.; Increases damage dealt by dodge rolling into enemies by 200% (3x multiplier).
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 降低爆炸能够伤害玩家的半径。; 翻滚撞向敌人时造成的伤害提高 200%（3 倍倍率）。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Blast Crown If the player has Crown of Guns, it gains a chance to fire explosives.; Fightsabre Training While Fightsabre is held, an orbital appears that blocks enemy shots.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 爆炸王冠：如果玩家拥有枪之冠，它会获得发射爆炸物的几率。; 军刀训练：持有军刀时会出现一个环绕物，用来挡住敌方子弹。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Prior to the Advanced Gungeons & Draguns Update, this item did not prevent contact damage or increase dodge roll damage.; This item may be a reference to the training helmet that Luke Skywalker wore in Star Wars.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 在中文待定（Advanced Gungeons & Draguns）更新之前，这件物品既不会防止接触伤害，也不会提高翻滚伤害。; 这件物品可能是在致敬《星球大战》中卢克·天行者戴过的训练头盔。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Professor Goopton for 5 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Emits deadly ooze when damaged. This canister contains a poisonous sample of dangerous monster blood, collected by Médecins Sans Diplôme for study.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 受伤时会喷出致命黏液。这个容器里装着危险怪物血液的有毒样本，由 中文待定（Médecins Sans Diplôme） 收集用于研究。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Taking damage spawns a pool of poison goop.; Grants immunity to poison.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 受到伤害时会生成一滩毒液。; 赋予中毒免疫。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Deadly Distraction If the player also has Decoy, the Decoy creates a large poison pool when attacked.; Deadlier Distraction If the player also has Explosive Decoy, the Explosive Decoy explodes and creates a large poison pool when attacked.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 致命诱饵：如果玩家同时拥有诱饵，被攻击时诱饵会生成一大滩毒池。; 更致命的诱饵：如果玩家同时拥有爆炸诱饵，被攻击时爆炸诱饵会爆炸并生成一大滩毒池。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Like all heart container items, The Robot will receive 5 to 10 coin instead.; On the Switch version, and Windows 10 Steam version, the accented characters in the Ammonomicon entry won't show up, instead reading "Mdecins Sans Diplme".
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 和其他心容器类物品一样，机器人会改获得 5 到 10 枚硬币。; 在中文待定（Switch）版和中文待定（Windows 10 Steam）版中，枪之图鉴条目里的重音字符不会显示，结果会读成 "Mdecins Sans Diplme"。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 10 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Gain armor when damaged several times. These self-replicating Nanomachines transform lead that enters the body into armor.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 在受伤数次后获得护甲。这些自我复制的纳米机械会把进入体内的铅转化为护甲。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Grants 2 pieces of Armor upon pickup.; Grants a piece of Armor every 4 times damage is taken.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 拾取时获得 2 点护甲。; 每受到 4 次伤害就获得 1 点护甲。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Future Gangster If the player also has Thompson Sub-Machinegun, the projectiles are turned into lasers.; Pistol Machine If the player also has Machine Pistol, its bullets will be connected by electricity.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 未来黑帮：如果玩家同时拥有汤普森冲锋枪，子弹会变成激光。; 手枪机器：如果玩家同时拥有机枪，子弹之间会连上电流。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This item is a reference to the character Senator Steven Armstrong, antagonist and final boss of Metal Gear Rising: Revengence, who uses nanomachines within his body to grant himself superhuman resilience.; The Ammonomicon quote "Son" in reference to a quote from one of Armstrong's most famous speeches in the game; "Nanomachines, son!".
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这件物品是对《合金装备崛起：复仇》里参议员斯蒂文·阿姆斯特朗这一角色的致敬。他是那个游戏的反派兼最终 Boss，能通过体内的纳米机械赋予自己超人般的韧性。; 枪之图鉴里的引语 "中文待定（Son）" 是在致敬阿姆斯特朗最有名的演讲台词之一：“中文待定（Nanomachines, son!）”。

entries.unlock: Speak to the Tinker after completing the [[Shortcuts
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Improves dodge roll by adding bullets. A hero from the distant past used these gunboots to descend a mysterious abyss. After many years, like all gun artifacts, they made their way to the Gungeon.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 翻滚时会附加子弹。一位来自遥远过去的英雄用这双枪靴向下潜入了一处神秘深渊。多年以后，和所有枪械遗物一样，它们也来到了枪牢。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Dodge rolling fires a spread of five bullets backwards, which deal 8 damage each.; Increases by 1 (approximately 14%).
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 翻滚时会向后发射 5 发子弹的散射，每发造成 8 点伤害。; 移动速度提高 1 点（约 14%）。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Gunboots has a cooldown of about 2 seconds between bursts of bullets.; Can be used to break targets in Winchester's game.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 中文待定（Gunboots） 的子弹散射之间大约有 2 秒冷却。; 可用于击碎温彻斯特小游戏里的靶子。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The handle is shaped like the skull of a rodent. What could it unlock?
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 骆人齿状钥匙柄。它能打开什么呢？
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Unlocks the hatch to the Resourceful Rat's Lair.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 解锁中文待定（Resourceful Rat's Lair）的入口活板门。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Gnawed Key will not spawn until you have completed the Bullet That Can Kill The Past.; The Gnawed Key will not be discounted by discount effects (e.g. Smiley's Revolver, Iron Coin).
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 在你完成可以抹掉过去的子弹之前，被咬的钥匙不会生成。; 被咬的钥匙不会受到折扣效果影响（例如微笑左轮、铁硬币）。

entries.unlock: Speak to the Tinker after completing the [[Shortcuts
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Companion. Fires upon foes. This robot originally served beverages to the Gundead as they wandered the chambers.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 伙伴。对敌开火。这台机器人原本负责在枪尸们穿行房间时为他们端送饮料。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Summons a robotic companion that follows the player.; When an enemy is in range, it prioritizes following the target and periodically fires a rapid burst of 6 bullets at them. Each bullet in the burst deals 5 damage, with the burst having a 4 second cooldown.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 召唤一名会跟随玩家的机器人伙伴。; 当敌人在射程内时，它会优先追着目标走，并定期向其发射一轮 6 发的高速连射。每发子弹造成 5 点伤害，这轮连射的冷却时间为 4 秒。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Battery Powered If the player has Shock Rifle, it automatically regenerates ammo over time.; Tea For Two If the player has the Teapot, a small red aura will appear around the R2G2, when the player reloads the Teapot. Every enemy in this aura will be ignited.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 电池供能：如果玩家拥有电击步枪，它会随着时间自动恢复弹药。; 茶与两杯：如果玩家拥有茶壶，在玩家给茶壶装填时，R2G2 周围会出现一圈小红光环。处在光环中的每个敌人都会被点燃。
entries.englishUsageNotes: R2G2's bullets are affected by all bullet modifiers.; R2G2 will not attack Red-Caped Bullet Kin.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: R2G2 的子弹会受到所有子弹修正效果影响。; R2G2 不会攻击红斗篷子弹枪怪。

entries.unlock: Defeat Gatling Gull 20 times.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Summons Gatling Gull as an ally. Gatling Gull respects martial prowess in Gungeoneers. Spend this ticket to bring in the big guns.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 召唤加特林海鸥作为盟友。加特林海鸥认可枪牢者的武艺。把这张票花出去，就能请来更重的火力。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Upon use, spawns a friendly Gatling Gull that periodically fires spreads of bullets and flies off once the room is cleared. He will also block damage dealt to him, so he can be used as a shield.; He will die if he sustains enough damage.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 使用后会生成一只友方加特林海鸥，它会定期发射一串子弹，并在房间清空后飞走。它也会替你挡下对它造成的伤害，因此可以当作盾牌。; 如果它承受的伤害足够多，它就会死亡。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Secret Twin If the player also has Vulcan Cannon, holding Vulcan Cannon while using Ticket will spawn two friendly Gatling Gulls instead of one.; Gatling Gull gains the effects of most bullet modifiers.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 秘密双胞：如果玩家同时拥有火神加农炮，在使用票时手持火神加农炮会生成两只友方加特林海鸥而不是一只。; 加特林海鸥会获得大多数子弹修正效果。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Blanks will deal increased damage to enemies. This enchanted amulet is not actually made of gold, but brass from melted bullet casings. Even now, it yearns to shoot at something.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 空响弹会对敌人造成更高伤害。这枚附魔护符其实并不是金子做的，而是由融化后的弹壳黄铜制成。哪怕到了现在，它也一心想朝什么东西开火。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: When a Blank is triggered, all enemies within a 25 tile radius of its center point will be stunned and dealt 60 damage.; The damage effect of the Gold Ammolet functions by increasing each blank's regular damage radius to 25, and adding 50 damage (to the default 10). This means that if multiple copies of the Gold Ammolet are somehow obtained, they will stack additively, with each copy adding 50 more damage.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 触发空响弹时，以其中心 25 格半径内的所有敌人都会被击晕并受到 60 点伤害。; 金手镯的伤害效果机制是把每枚空响弹的常规伤害半径提升到 25，并额外增加 50 点伤害（基础值为 10）。这意味着如果设法获得多个金手镯，它们会以加法叠加，每多一件就再增加 50 点伤害。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Relodestar If the player has Relodestone, after Relodestone's effect ends, all bullets absorbed during its use will be shot out in random directions, dealing damage to enemies.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 重新上膛星：如果玩家拥有瑞罗德石，在瑞罗德石效果结束后，使用期间吸收的所有子弹都会朝随机方向射出，对敌人造成伤害。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Prior to the Supply Drop Update, the Gold Ammolet increased blank damage to 35, did not grant an extra blank and was an A item.; The nature of this item as not being made of gold but actually brass is a reference to gold plated brass, often used in jewelry in place of actual gold due to it being considerably cheaper.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 在“空投补给”更新之前，金手镯会把空响弹伤害提高到 35，不会额外提供一枚空响弹，而且本来是 A 级道具。; 这个道具并不是真金，而是黄铜，这点本身就是在致敬镀金黄铜首饰，因为它们比真金便宜得多。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Blanks send enemies flying. This enchanted amulet is strangely polarized, repelling most objects that draw near. It hums softly in the presence of Blanks.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 空响弹会把敌人击飞。这枚附魔护符带着一种奇怪的极性，会排斥靠近它的大多数物体。在空响弹出现时，它还会发出轻微的嗡鸣。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: When a Blank is triggered, all enemies within a 25 tile radius of its center point will be stunned.; Increases the knockback of Blanks by 400% (5x multiplier).
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 触发空响弹时，中心 25 格半径内的所有敌人都会被击晕。; 空响弹的击退效果提高 400%（5 倍倍率）。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Relodestar If the player has Relodestone, after Relodestone's effect ends, all bullets absorbed during its use will be shot out in random directions, dealing damage to enemies.; Don't Worry About The Vase If the player has The Kiln, destroying small breakable objects (vases, barrels, etc.) has a small chance to activate a blank effect.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 重新上膛星：如果玩家拥有瑞罗德石，在瑞罗德石效果结束后，使用期间吸收的所有子弹都会朝随机方向射出，对敌人造成伤害。; 别担心那个花瓶：如果玩家拥有窑枪，打碎花瓶、木桶等可破坏小物件时，有小几率触发空响效果。
entries.englishUsageNotes: If duplicates of this item are somehow obtained, it further increases the knockback of blanks and grants another blank each floor.; Bug: If a large quantity of duplicates are somehow obtained (e.g. around 7 Lodestone Ammolets), saving and quitting to the next floor and continuing grants the player a far higher quantity of blanks than what the ammolets should give.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 如果设法获得多个这件物品，它会进一步提高空响弹的击退，并让每层额外获得 1 发空响弹。; 漏洞：如果设法获得大量重复件（例如大约 7 个磁石弹），存档并退出后再进入下一层，玩家获得的空响弹数量会远高于这些弹药本应提供的数量。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 8 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Hitting an enemy has a chance to refire the projectile at a nearby enemy. These bullets are imbued with the white-hot rage of Kaliber herself.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 击中敌人后，有几率把投射物重新射向附近另一名敌人。这些子弹被卡利伯本人的灼热怒火所浸透。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Bullets that hit enemies will bounce off them into a random direction.; Reflected bullets can trigger the same effect.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 击中敌人的子弹会从其身上弹开，朝随机方向飞去。; 被反弹的子弹也能触发同样的效果。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Needless Acrimony The Rage duration of Table Tech Rage is increased while Shotgun Full of Hate is held.; Angry Bullets role in the synergy is superfluous, as it does not directly synergise with Table Tech Rage, and both Table Tech Rage and Shotgun Full of Hate must already be held for it to have any effect. Despite this, the synergy pop-up will still appear, even if the player only has Angry Bullets and Shotgun Full of Hate, despite it not having any effect.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 无谓的怨气：持有充满仇恨的霰弹枪时，桌技：愤怒的怒气持续时间会增加。; 愤怒的小子弹在这个协同里其实作用不大，因为它并不会直接和桌技：愤怒联动，而且要生效的话，桌技：愤怒和充满仇恨的霰弹枪本来就都得持有。尽管如此，即使玩家只拥有愤怒的小子弹和充满仇恨的霰弹枪，协同提示仍然会照常弹出，哪怕它实际上没有任何效果。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Beam guns will be deflected at a random angle upon hitting an enemy.; Most explosive weapons will not explode upon contact with an enemy. Because of this, it is advisable to drop Angry Bullets during a fight if you intend on using explosive weapons during that fight.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 光束枪在击中敌人时会以随机角度被偏转。; 大多数爆炸武器在碰到敌人时不会爆炸。因此，如果你打算在战斗中使用爆炸武器，建议在战斗中途把愤怒的小子弹丢掉。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Blanks have a chance to poison, freeze, and ignite enemies. This enchanted amulet is made of the most valuable metal of all, lead. There is an artificer's engravure on the bottom, but time has rendered it illegible.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 空响弹有几率让敌人中毒、冻结并点燃。这枚附魔护符由最有价值的金属，也就是铅，制成。底部刻着一段工匠铭文，但时间已经让它无法辨认。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: When a Blank is triggered, all enemies within a 25 tile radius of its center point will suffer the following effects;; stun
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 触发空响弹时，中心 25 格半径内的所有敌人都会受到以下效果：; 击晕
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Don't Worry About The Vase If the player has The Kiln, destroying small breakable objects (vases, barrels, etc.) has a small chance to activate a blank effect.; Relodestar If the player has Relodestone, after Relodestone's effect ends, all bullets absorbed during its use will be shot out in random directions, dealing damage to enemies.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 别担心那个花瓶：如果玩家拥有窑枪，打碎花瓶、木桶等可破坏小物件时，有小几率触发空响效果。; 重新上膛星：如果玩家拥有瑞罗德石，在瑞罗德石效果结束后，使用期间吸收的所有子弹都会朝随机方向射出，对敌人造成伤害。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Ammonomicon quote "What Can Will" is a reference to the phrase "Anything that can go wrong will go wrong.", known colloquially as Murphy's Law.; Bug: If an enemy is frozen while spawning it will remain invulnerable to damage until it has thawed and been allowed to properly finish its spawn animation.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 枪之图鉴里的引语 "What Can Will" 是在致敬中文待定（Anything that can go wrong will go wrong.），也就是俗称的墨菲定律。; 漏洞：如果敌人在生成时被冻住，它就会一直保持无敌，直到解冻并正常完成生成动画为止。

entries.unlock: Enter The Cultist's past.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Boosts stats when alone. Now that the protagonist is dead, it's time to shine!
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 独自行动时强化属性。既然主角已经死了，现在轮到它登场发光了！
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Increases the player's movement speed by 2 (base movement speed is 7) and damage by 41% when their co-op partner is dead. As there is never a co-op partner in singleplayer mode, Number 2 is always active.; Cannot be dropped.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 当合作伙伴死亡时，玩家移动速度提高 2（基础移动速度为 7），伤害提高 41%。由于单人模式下根本没有合作伙伴，2 号始终处于生效状态。; 不能被丢弃。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Number 2 was not obtainable in single player until A Farewell to Arms.; If obtained on any other gungeoneers, it will travel with them into the past.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 直到《永别了，武器》（A Farewell to Arms）更新前，2 号在单人模式下都无法获取。; 如果被其他枪牢者拾取，它会跟着他们一起进入过去。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Circumnavigates the room, then explodes. Many years ago, Gungeon mariners used wind to propel their bullets instead of combustion. The trips would take so long to cross a room that the bullets would sometimes mutiny and change course entirely.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 绕着房间航行，然后爆炸。很多年前，枪牢水手用风力而不是火药来推动子弹。那样一趟旅程跨过一整个房间要花太久，以至于子弹有时会哗变并彻底改道。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires slow moving bullets that accelerate and bounce around the room.; These bullets have a slight homing effect, curving towards enemies.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射移动缓慢的子弹，这些子弹会加速并在房间里弹跳。; 这些子弹带有轻微追踪效果，会朝敌人弯曲飞行。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Black Flag If the player also has Grappling Hook or Serious Cannon, each Corsair shot will periodically fire two bouncing cannonballs perpendicular to itself as it travels.; Swift Sloop If the player also has Sense of Direction, increases Corsair's shot speed by 50%, decreases its charge time by 33%, and decreases its reload time by 20%.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 黑旗：如果玩家同时拥有抓钩或强力加农炮，每次海盗船射击时都会在飞行途中定期向其垂直方向射出 2 发会反弹的炮弹。; 迅捷纵帆船：如果玩家同时拥有方向指针，海盗船的射速提高 50%，蓄力时间减少 33%，装填时间减少 20%。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Prior to the Supply Drop Update, the bullets did not curve.; Corsair's bullets cannot be caught by Gunjurers.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 在“空投补给”更新之前，这些子弹不会弯曲。; 海盗船的子弹不会被枪法师接住。

stats.value: (normal hit) (bounced hit) (hit then bounced hit) (all three hits rare)

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The Charge Shot is a weapon from Distant Lands. Legend says it was once used by mutant gladiators in rocket-propelled deathmatches to the rocket-propelled death.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把枪来自遥远之地。传说它曾被变种角斗士用于火箭推进的死斗，直到被推进火箭般的死亡。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Barrage Shot If the player also has Jetpack, charge time is reduced by 25%, reload time is increased by 50%, and shot size is increased.; Prior to the A Farewell to Arms update, Charge Shot's magazine size was 1 and its max ammo was 50.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 弹幕射击：如果玩家同时拥有喷气包，蓄力时间减少 25%，装填时间增加 50%，而且子弹体积变大。; 在《永别了，武器》（A Farewell to Arms）更新之前，蓄力枪的弹匣容量为 1，最大弹药量为 50。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: A four-barreled shotgun that can be fired all at once. Zilla Industries is famous for crafting bespoke weapons for highly talented gunslingers. This shotgun was created with only one concept in mind: maximum destructive potential.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 一把四管霰弹枪，可以一次性全部发射。齐拉工业以为高超枪手打造定制武器而闻名。这把枪从诞生之初就只为一个概念而生：极致破坏力。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Iron Stance If the player also has Heavy Boots, the gun's damage and knockback are increased by 20%, its shot speed is increased by 50%, and its reload time is decreased by 20%.; Shadow Warrior If the player also has Yari Launcher, when either gun is held, the player gains an orbiting Demon Head that fires on reload. Reduces the guns' spread by 60%, increasing their accuracy.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 钢铁姿态：如果玩家同时拥有重靴子，这把枪的伤害和击退提高 20%，射速提高 50%，装填时间减少 20%。; 影武者：如果玩家同时拥有亚里火箭发射器，只要持有任意一把枪，玩家就会获得一个环绕飞行的恶魔首脑，在空弹匣装填时开火。两把枪的散布还会降低 60%，从而提升精度。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Zilla Shotgun is in the SHOTGUN gun class, and as such benefits from the Shotgun Affinity synergy.; Prior to the Supply Drop Update, Zilla Shotgun had 100 maximum ammo.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 齐拉霰弹枪属于 SHOTGUN 枪械类别，因此会受到 Shotgun Affinity 协同效果加成。; 在“空投补给”更新之前，齐拉霰弹枪的最大弹药量为 100。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Fires linked projectiles. This gun fires powerful electron bursts that imitate ancient spells of chained lightning.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 发射连锁投射物。这把枪会射出强力电子脉冲，模仿古老的连锁闪电法术。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Starburst Fire If the player also has Laser Rifle, firing either The Emperor or Laser Rifle once will cause it to rapidly fire its entire magazine. Increases damage by 20% and doubles fire rate.; You can cancel the effect by reloading or dodge-rolling while firing.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 星爆射击：如果玩家同时拥有激光步枪，射击帝王或激光步枪中的任意一把都会让它迅速把整个弹匣倾泻出去。伤害提高 20%，射速翻倍。; 你可以在射击时通过重新装填或翻滚来取消这个效果。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 6 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: This immense beam cannon was developed as part of a bid to win the Hegemony's military contracts. The steady stream of intense science energy it fires is a true testament to what physics and engineering can accomplish.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这门巨型光束炮是为了争取霸权的军事合同而研发的。它发射出的持续高强度科学能流，足以证明物理学和工程学能做到什么。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires a laser beam with a 0.6s charge-up.; If this laser beam is focused on the same enemy for over 0.5s, it has a 60%~ chance per second to apply each of the following status effects;
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射一束蓄力 0.6 秒的激光。; 如果这束激光持续 0.5 秒以上锁定同一敌人，则每秒有 60% 的几率施加以下状态效果：
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Weird Science If the player also has Disintegrator, three Science Cannon beams branch off perpendicular to the Disintegrator's main beam.; The Return If the player also has Pig, it turns green to resemble Cannon and fires flaming bats.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 怪诞科学：如果玩家同时拥有分解者，会有三对科技加农枪光束从分解者主光束的垂直方向分出。; 归来：如果玩家同时拥有英雄猪，它会变成绿色、长得像加农炮，并发射燃烧蝙蝠。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Charge to fire bombs. A forgetful adventurer left a pouch full of bombs deep in the Gungeon, and they eventually sprouted into this amusing weapon. A favorite of the Gunsling King, who often sends Manservantes to pick up the bombs.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 蓄力后发射炸弹。一名健忘的冒险者把一袋炸弹忘在枪牢深处，它们最终长成了这件有趣的武器。枪手国王很喜欢它，经常派女仆侍从去捡炸弹。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Charges up to fire bouncing, exploding bombs. Like most explosive weapons, this explosion is capable of destroying some enemy bullets.; These bombs are uniquely capable of blasting open secret rooms.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 蓄力后发射会弹跳、爆炸的炸弹。和大多数爆炸武器一样，这种爆炸也能摧毁一些敌方子弹。; 这些炸弹还能独特地炸开隐藏房。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Bomberpal If the player has Bomb, Lil' Bomber fires two bombs instead of one, charges twice as fast, and has 40% lower reload time.; King Bomber If the player has Gilded Bullets, Coin Crown, or Crown of Guns, its bombs become gold and spawn 0-7 coin upon hitting an enemy.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 炸弹搭档：如果玩家拥有炸弹，它会一次发射两枚炸弹，蓄力速度翻倍，装填时间降低 40%。; 炸弹之王：如果玩家拥有镀金子弹、硬币王冠或枪之冠，它的炸弹会变成金色，并在击中敌人时掉落 0-7 枚硬币。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Bomberpal and Super Bomberpal stack, allowing Lil' Bomber to fire three bombs at once if the player has both Bomb and Ice Bomb.; The King Bomber synergy can provide up to 420 coin per ammo pickup, or up to 840 coin with Loot Bag.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 炸弹搭档和超级炸弹搭档会叠加，如果玩家同时拥有炸弹和冰炸弹，里尔炸弹枪可以一次发射三枚炸弹。; 炸弹之王协同每次拾取弹药最多可提供 420 枚硬币，若配合战利品袋则最多可达 840 枚。

entries.unlock: Create 10 guns using any Muncher.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: A horrific consequence of radiation exposure. At least the arm is still somewhat useful.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 辐射照射带来的恐怖后果。至少这条手臂还算有点用。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Contrail If the player has Alien Engine, its flame will turn green, igniting enemies with greenfire. Alien Engine also grants flight while held.; Neo Tech, Yo If the player has Bionic Leg or Shock Rounds, Mutation's beam turns blue, leaves puddles of electrified water, and its ammo capacity is increased to 800. The player is immune to electricity while Mutation is held.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 尾迹：如果玩家拥有外星引擎，它的火焰会变成绿色，以绿火点燃敌人。外星引擎持有时也会赋予飞行能力。; Neo Tech, Yo：如果玩家拥有仿生腿或电击炮，变异手臂的光束会变蓝，留下带电水洼，且弹药容量提高到 800。持有变异手臂时，玩家免疫电击。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The synergy between the Mutation and Bionic Leg/Shock Rounds may be a reference to Tetsuo from the 1982 manga series Akira. Tetsuo similarly possesses a bionic arm, and famously undergoes extreme and disturbing mutations. The synergy's name, "Neo Tech, Yo" also seems to allude to Neotokyo, the setting where the story takes place.; "Didn't Need Two Anyway" refers to the look of the weapon in-game, which envelops the player's whole arm.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 变异手臂与仿生腿/电击炮的协同效果可能是在致敬 1982 年漫画系列《阿基拉》中的铁雄。铁雄同样拥有一条仿生手臂，并且会经历极端而诡异的变异。协同名称“中文待定（Neo Tech）”“中文待定（Yo）”似乎也在影射新东京，也就是故事发生的地方。; “中文待定（Didn't Need Two Anyway）” 指的是游戏中这把武器的外观，它会包住玩家整条手臂。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Decreases in damage output as the clip empties. You gotta wind it!
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 随着弹匣逐渐打空，伤害输出也会下降。得把它上紧发条！
entries.englishUsageNotes: Breakfast Club If the player also has Seven-Leaf Clover, reload time is halved, fire rate is increased by 60%, damage is increased by 50%, magazine size is increased to 27, and all but the last 10 shots of each magazine will be stronger piercing lasers.; Wound Up If the player also has Oiled Cylinder, the bottom half of the magazine retains full damage and piercing, and the damage and bullet size is increased by 25%.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 早餐俱乐部：如果玩家同时拥有七叶幸运草，装填时间减半，射速提高 60%，伤害提高 50%，弹匣容量提高到 27，而且每个弹匣最后 10 发之前的子弹都会变成更强的穿透激光。; 上了弦：如果玩家同时拥有上油的气缸，弹匣下半部分会保留完整伤害和穿透效果，并且伤害和子弹体积提高 25%。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Can stun enemies at close range. Alben Smallbore was known for enchanting mundane objects to make them more gun-like This pillow, which once decorated his guest chambers, is a perfect example of his unique strain of madness.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 可在近距离击晕敌人。阿尔本·斯莫尔博尔以把平凡物件附魔成更像枪的样子而闻名。这只曾装点过他客房的枕头，正是他独特疯狂的完美例证。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires giant zippers.; The gun is swung forward when fired. Hitting an enemy with this close-ranged swing will stun the enemy.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射巨大的拉链。; 开火时枪会被向前挥出。用这一下近身挥击击中敌人会将其击晕。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: A favorite of Fallen Bullet Kin, who learned everything about being devils from television.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 堕落子弹枪怪最喜欢的武器之一，他们是跟着电视学会怎么当恶魔的。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Launches fireballs that set enemies on fire.; Each fireball can pierce through up to 4 enemies.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射火球，使敌人着火。; 每个火球最多可穿透 4 个敌人。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Hail, Satan! If the player has Demon Head, Demon Head gains piercing.; Hotter Than Heck If the player has Flame Hand, the shot size and damage of the guns are increased by 25%, and grants fire immunity while either gun is held.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 地狱礼赞！：如果玩家拥有恶魔首脑，恶魔首脑会获得穿透效果。; 比地狱还烫：如果玩家拥有火焰之手，这两把枪的子弹体积和伤害提高 25%，而且持有任意一把时都会赋予火焰免疫。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Fallen Bullet Kin wield the Pitchfork.; Bug: The special UI icon for both the Pitchfork and Pitch Perfect in the Chinese Mobile Version of Enter the Gungeon appear blue. This is likely due to incorrect colour encoding issues when saving the files, as the same thing can be seen in other UI textures.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 堕落子弹枪怪会持有干草叉。; 漏洞：在《挺进地牢》中文版手机端里，干草叉和中文待定（Pitch Perfect）的特殊 界面（UI） 图标都会显示为蓝色。这很可能是文件保存时颜色编码错误造成的，因为其他 界面（UI） 贴图也能看到同样的问题。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: This gun is made entirely from composite materials and only holds two rounds. It was brought to the Gungeon by a thoughtless agent, not realizing the affront to the Gun that such a thing implied.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把枪完全由复合材料制成，只装得下两发子弹。它被一个粗心的特工带进了枪牢，甚至没意识到这种东西对枪本身有多么冒犯。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: The Line of Fire If the player has Sunglasses, Pig, or Full Metal Jacket, Composite Gun's shots leave a trail of fire.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 火线：如果玩家拥有墨镜、英雄猪或全金属外衣，复合枪射出的子弹会留下火焰轨迹。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Blank effect of this gun can open the entrance to secret rooms.; When checking for secret rooms in the Shop, a charged bullet can be fired into the shop from an adjacent room to avoid angering Bello.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪的空响效果可以打开隐藏房的入口。; 在商店里检查隐藏房时，可以从相邻房间把一发蓄力子弹射进商店，从而避免惹怒 Bello。

stats.value: First Stage: 34.6 Second Stage: 51.9 Third Stage: 69.2
First Stage: 6 Second Stage: 9 Third Stage: 12

entries.unlock: Kill the High Dragun with the Sorceress's blessing.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Grows more powerful with each room cleared. This distrustful gun has gained sentience. As with all intelligent weapons, he should be treated with respect and care.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 随着每个房间清空，它都会变得更强。这把多疑的枪已经有了自我意识。和所有聪明武器一样，它也该被尊重和照顾。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: First Stage: Fires piercing bullets at 6 damage.; Second Stage: Besides piercing, bullets deal 9 damage and bounce twice.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 第一阶段：发射造成 6 点伤害的穿透子弹。; 第二阶段：除了穿透之外，子弹造成 9 点伤害并反弹两次。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Similar to other guns with infinite ammo, Gunther cannot be combined with other guns using Duct Tape, be fed to the muncher, or reveal secret rooms.; Gunjurers cannot absorb Gunther's bullets at stage 3.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 和其他无限弹药枪一样，中文待定（Gunther）不能通过胶带与其他枪合并，不能喂给吞枪怪，也不能揭示隐藏房。; 枪法师在第 3 阶段时无法吸收中文待定（Gunther）的子弹。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: This leafy blaster is made of Mahoguny, a strange wood which will only take root near the Gungeon.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把长着叶子的枪由一种奇特的木材制成，这种木材只会在枪牢附近生根。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires a single explosive pinecone along with three drifting leaf bullets.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射一颗会爆炸的松果，以及三发漂浮的树叶子弹。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Get Equipped With -W- Enables Lead Shield mode on the Megahand, which fires 4 damage leaves when uncharged. Killing enemies causes leaves to orbit the player, blocking enemy shots, similar to Knife Shield. These leaves vanish when switched to a different gun, and reappear when switching back to Megahand. Modes can be switched by reloading the Megahand with a full magazine.; Hardwood If the player also has Decoy, Explosive Decoy, Heavy Boots, or Broccoli, Mahoguny fires four explosive pinecones at a time, and no longer fires leaves.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 装配 -W-：解锁 洛克手炮 的中文待定（Lead Shield）模式，在未充能时会发射造成 4 点伤害的树叶。击杀敌人会让树叶环绕玩家并挡住敌方子弹，类似 刀盾。这些树叶在切换到其他枪时会消失，切回 洛克手炮 时会重新出现。可通过装满弹匣后重新装填 洛克手炮 来切换模式。; 硬木：如果玩家同时拥有诱饵、爆炸诱饵、重靴子或西兰花，桃花心木枪每次会发射四颗爆炸松果，而且不再发射树叶。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The explosions created by the pinecones can destroy enemy bullets.; Mahoguny is a portmanteau of gun and mahogany.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 松果引发的爆炸可以摧毁敌方子弹。; 桃花心木枪是枪和桃花心木的合成词。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The letter r looks like a gun. It is rare, but not unheard of, for abstract concepts to take gun form when discussed near the Gungeon.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 字母中文待定（r）看起来就像一把枪。在枪牢附近谈论抽象概念时，它们变成枪的形态也并不稀奇。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires a burst of 6 letter-shaped projectiles that spell out the word BULLET.; While firing, the gun will voice out the word "bullet".
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射 6 发字母形状的投射物，拼出单词 BULLET。; 射击时，这把枪会读出单词 "bullet"。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Hacker Increases damage by 25% while the Lower Case r is held.; Just In Case The Lower Case r becomes a capital letter R and transforms into a one shot rocket launcher that deals 27 damage and has a max ammo capacity of 100. It fires the word ROCKET with cloud sprites when shot, and creates a cartoon 'BOOM' cloud on impact.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 黑客：持有中文待定（r）时，伤害提高 25%。; 以防万一：中文待定（r）会变成大写字母 R，并变成一把单发火箭发射器，造成 27 点伤害，最大弹药量为 100。它射击时会射出单词 ROCKET 并带有云朵特效，命中时还会生成一朵卡通风格的 “BOOM” 云。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Lower Case r is voiced by Doseone, the composer of Enter the Gungeons soundtrack.; This gun, while obviously a surface level reference to the basic shape of the letter r, may also be a reference to early computer adventure games. These early games used ASCII art comprised of letters and numbers to render a game world.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 中文待定（小写字母r）由中文待定（Doseone）配音，他也是《挺进地牢》原声带的作曲者。; 这把枪虽然显然只是对字母中文待定（r）外形的表层致敬，但也可能是在致敬早期电脑冒险游戏。那些早期游戏使用字母和数字组成的 ASCII 艺术来呈现游戏世界。

stats.value: Assuming each bullet only hits once.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Fires sawblades. The marketing team assigned to the Saw Blader wanted to call it the Sawed-On Shotgun, but were overruled by the gun's designer. It's more of a handgun, anyway.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 发射锯片。负责给锯刃枪做营销的团队本想把它叫作锯上霰弹枪，但被武器设计者否决了。反正它更像手枪。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires sawblades that can ricochet off walls 3 times, and pierce through 2 enemies each.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射的锯片最多可反弹墙壁 3 次，每片还可穿透 2 个敌人。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Get Equipped With -M- Enables Metal Blade mode on the Megahand, which fires sawblades from the Buzzkill when uncharged. Modes can be switched by reloading the Megahand with a full magazine.; I Studied The Blade If the player has Super Meat Gun, the two guns are dual wielded.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 装备 -M-：在洛克手炮未充能时启用金属刀片模式，会发射锯片。装满弹匣后重新装填洛克手炮即可切换模式。; 我研究过刀刃：如果玩家拥有超级肉枪，这两把枪会双持。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Buzzkill is slang for someone who ruins fun (in this case, the gun's designer from the Ammonomicon entry), and the gun's name is also a portmanteau of buzzsaw and kill.; The pickup text "Sawed On!" is a play on words, based on a "sawed-off shotgun."
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 中文待定（Buzzkill）在这里是指破坏乐趣的人，也就是图鉴条目里的那位枪械设计者；这个名字本身也来自电锯和杀戮的组合。; 拾取文本“中文待定（Sawed On）”是对“中文待定（sawed-off shotgun）”的双关。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Blanks have a chance to poison enemies. This enchanted amulet was created by a great gunsmith. Her research with irradiated metals ultimately cost her life, but many of today's guns owe their existence to her work.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 空响弹有几率使敌人中毒。这枚附魔护符由一位伟大的枪匠打造。她对受辐射金属的研究最终夺走了她的生命，但今天许多枪械都得益于她的工作。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: When a Blank is triggered, all enemies within a 25 tile radius of its center point will be stunned and have a 50% chance to be poison.; Adds 1 to the player's minimum number of Blanks, restored at the start of every floor.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 触发空响弹时，中心 25 格半径内的所有敌人都会被击晕，并有 50% 几率中毒。; 每层开始时都会恢复到玩家的空响弹最低持有量，并额外增加 1 发空响弹。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Don't Worry About The Vase If the player has The Kiln, destroying small breakable objects (vases, barrels, etc.) has a small chance to activate a blank effect.; Relodestar If the player has Relodestone, after Relodestone's effect ends, all bullets absorbed during its use will be shot out in random directions, dealing damage to enemies.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 别担心那个花瓶：如果玩家拥有窑枪，打碎花瓶、木桶等可破坏小物件时，有小几率触发空响效果。; 重新上膛之星：如果玩家拥有瑞罗德石，在瑞罗德石效果结束后，使用期间吸收的所有子弹都会朝随机方向射出，对敌人造成伤害。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The item's description is a reference to Marie Curie, a Polish physicist who conducted pioneering research on radioactivity, but died due to aplastic anemia, caused by the high levels of radiation she worked with.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这件物品的描述是在致敬玛丽·居里，这位波兰物理学家开创了放射性研究，却因长期接触高剂量辐射而患上再生障碍性贫血，最终去世。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Blanks have a chance to ignite enemies. This enchanted copper amulet was forged deep in the Forge. Warm to the touch.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 空响弹有几率使敌人着火。这枚附魔铜护符是在熔炉深处锻造出来的。摸上去还有点暖。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: When a Blank is triggered, all enemies within a 25 tile radius of its center point will be stunned and have a 50% chance to be set on fire.; Adds 1 to the player's minimum number of Blanks, restored at the start of every floor.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 触发空响弹时，中心 25 格半径内的所有敌人都会被击晕，并有 50% 几率着火。; 每层开始时都会恢复到玩家的空响弹最低持有量，并额外增加 1 发空响弹。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Backdraft Touching enemies sets them on fire.; Don't Worry About The Vase If the player has The Kiln, destroying small breakable objects (vases, barrels, etc.) has a small chance to activate a blank effect.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 回焰：接触敌人会让它们着火。; 别担心那个花瓶：如果玩家拥有窑枪，打碎花瓶、木桶等可破坏小物件时，有小几率触发空响效果。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Bug: If a large quantity of duplicates are somehow obtained (e.g. around 7 Copper Ammolets), saving and quitting to the next floor and continuing grants the player a far higher quantity of blanks than what the ammolets should give.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 漏洞：如果设法获得大量重复件（例如大约 7 个铜制护身符），存档并退出再进入下一层后，玩家获得的空响弹数量会远高于这些护身符本应提供的数量。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Blanks have a chance to freeze enemies. Cold to the touch.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 空响弹有几率冻结敌人。摸上去很冷。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: When a Blank is triggered, all enemies within a 25 tile radius of its center point will be stunned and have a 50% chance to be freeze.; Adds 1 to the player's minimum number of Blanks, restored at the start of every floor.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 触发空响弹时，中心 25 格半径内的所有敌人都会被击晕，并有 50% 几率冻结。; 每层开始时都会恢复到玩家的空响弹最低持有量，并额外增加 1 发空响弹。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Arctic Warfare If the player has A.W.P., it turns orange and white, deals 62.5% more damage, and its shots are guaranteed to freeze enemies.; Cold Ones If the player has Frost Bullets, the chance to fire ice bullets is significantly increased.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 极地战争：如果玩家拥有狙击枪，它会变成橙白配色，伤害提高 62.5%，而且射出的子弹保证冻结敌人。; 冷冰冰：如果玩家拥有霜子弹，发射冰子弹的几率会显著提高。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The synergy Don’t Worry About The Vase is a reference to The Matrix.; The synergy Arctic Warfare is most likely a reference to the A.W.P. Asiimov skin from Counter Strike. Counter Strike AWP skin
entries.chineseUsageNotes: “别担心那个花瓶”这个协同效果是在致敬《黑客帝国》。; “极地战争”这个协同效果大概率是在致敬《反恐精英》中 AWP 的亚希莫夫皮肤。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Reload to reflect nearby bullets. An ancient weapon, composed entirely of hardened light.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 重新装填即可反射附近的子弹。一件古老武器，由凝固的光组成。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Automatic weapon with a consistent firerate.; While reloading, the weapon is swung around and reflects nearby enemy bullets back towards their owners.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 一把射速稳定的自动武器。; 重新装填时，武器会被挥向四周，把附近敌方子弹反弹回它们的主人。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Fightknives If the player has Knife Shield, activating Knife Shield while holding Fightsabre makes the knives reflect enemy bullets before getting destroyed.; Fightsabre Training If the player has the Blast Helmet, while Fightsabre is held an orbital appears that blocks enemy shots, and reflected bullets will be bigger.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 刀刃飞刀：如果玩家拥有刀盾，在持有军刀时激活刀盾，会让飞刀在被摧毁前先反弹敌方子弹。; 军刀训练：如果玩家拥有爆炸头盔，持有军刀时会出现一个环绕物挡住敌方子弹，而被反弹的子弹会变得更大。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The reflect timing (and animation) is longer than the audio cue would suggest.; The Fightsabre can deflect the High Dragun's rocket attack.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 反弹的时机（以及动画）会比音效暗示的更长。; 军刀可以偏转高龙的火箭攻击。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Reload for momentary safety. A misbegotten attempt to combine melee and ranged combat, the axe portion of this gun is mostly worthless. Reloading it involves swinging the blade around wildly, which might protect you from a stray bullet.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 重新装填时可获得片刻安全。一把把近战和远程战斗硬凑在一起的失败尝试，这把枪里的斧头部分大多没什么用。重新装填时，你会把斧刃胡乱挥一圈，也许能挡住一发流弹。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Insight If the player also has Trick Gun, a creature that resembles the Interdimensional Horror appears at entrances to secret rooms, revealing their location.; Iron Stance If the player also has Heavy Boots, the gun's damage and knockback are increased by 20%, its shot speed is increased by 50%, and its reload time is decreased by 20%.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 洞察：如果玩家同时拥有魔术枪，通往隐藏房间入口处会出现一只外形像异维恐魔的生物，从而揭示其位置。; 钢铁姿态：如果玩家同时拥有重靴子，这把枪的伤害和击退提高 20%，射速提高 50%，装填时间减少 20%。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Peculiarly, the Huntsman is a part of the FULLAUTO gun class despite not being remotely fully automatic. This is probably to classify it with other weapons that delete bullets on reload, such as Excaliber and Fightsabre.; Because the Huntsman is not SHOTGUN type despite being a shotgun, it does not benefit from the Shotgun Affinity synergy.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 有些奇怪的是，尽管斧头枪根本不算自动武器，它却被归在 FULLAUTO 枪械类别里。这大概是为了把它和其他会在装填时清掉子弹的武器归到一起，比如亚瑟王的神剑和军刀。; 由于斧头枪虽然是霰弹枪，却不属于 SHOTGUN 类型，所以它不会受 Shotgun Affinity 协同效果加成。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The infant Shotgrub is typically wielded by an adult Shotgrub, a guardian of Bullet Hell. It fires bullets in unnerving patterns. Gungeoneers should take care that it not attach to their brainstem.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 幼年射蛆通常由成年射蛆拿着，而成年射蛆则是子弹地狱的守卫。它会以令人不安的方式射出子弹。枪牢者们得当心，别让它附着到自己的脑干上。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Contrail If the player has Alien Engine, its flame turns green, igniting enemies with greenfire. Alien Engine also grants flight while held.; Just Like The Real Thing If the player has Sixth Chamber, Yellow Chamber, Holey Grail, or Bullet Idol, Shotgrub's bullets will act like those of the Shotgrub enemy, no longer causing poison, firing in a static spread, but gaining penetration and splitting into wavy bullets upon hitting a wall or enemy.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 尾迹：如果玩家拥有外星引擎，它的火焰会变成绿色，以绿火点燃敌人。外星引擎持有时也会赋予飞行能力。; 就和真货一样：如果玩家拥有第六膛室、黄色膛室、剩杯或子弹偶像，射蛆的子弹会变成射蛆敌人的那种子弹，不再附带中毒效果，而是以固定散布发射，并在撞到墙或敌人后获得穿透和分裂成波浪子弹的效果。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Bullet Component. The primer of one of the first Gundead to ever walk the Gungeon. It still trembles with the energies released when the Bullet struck.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 子弹组件。第一颗曾踏入枪牢的枪尸子弹的底漆。它仍在微微颤动，仿佛还残留着那颗子弹撞击时释放的能量。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: One of four components of the Bullet That Can Kill The Past.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 可作为“能抹掉过去的子弹”的四个组件之一。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This item is useless on The Cultist as it cannot be dropped and the Blacksmith will refuse to talk with the second player.; As it is in a glass display case, it can't be stolen with the Grappling Hook or the Directional Pad's grappling hook ability.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这件物品对邪教徒来说毫无用处，因为它不能被丢弃，而黑匠也不会和第二位玩家说话。; 由于它被放在玻璃展示柜里，所以既不能用抓钩偷走，也不能用方向键的抓钩能力偷走。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Bullet Component. This extraplanar lead was once part of the great Bullet that fell from the sky, the origin of all Gundead. It shimmers softly, shifting between the material and ethereal sides of the Curtain. Grows hot in the presence of enemies.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 子弹组件。这种来自异位面的铅曾是那枚从天而降的大子弹的一部分，也是所有枪尸的起源。它在光幕两侧之间微微闪烁，散发着柔和的光泽。靠近敌人时会发热。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: One of four components of the Bullet That Can Kill The Past.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 可作为“能抹掉过去的子弹”的四个组件之一。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The item cannot be dropped, so if The Cultist picks up the item, there is no way for it to be given to the Blacksmith.; A hidden (possibly bugged) text string that may appear in the Diginomocon in Exit the Gungeon describes the Planar Lead as being bestowed upon a telepathic bullet who would lead the kin to the 'Great Reloading'. The canonicity of this text is unknown.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这件物品不能被丢弃，所以如果邪教徒把它捡起来，就没办法再交给黑匠。; 《挺进地牢：逃出地牢》里的迪吉诺摩康中有一段可能有问题的隐藏文本，描述平面铅弹被授予一颗心灵感应子弹，这颗子弹会把枪尸们带向“大重新装填”。这段文本是否正史尚不清楚。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Bullet Component. Carved from a fang of a High Dragun, this casing is the only material strong enough to jacket Planar Lead.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 子弹组件。由高龙的一颗獠牙雕刻而成，这层弹壳是唯一足够坚固、能包住平面铅弹的材料。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: One of four components of the Bullet That Can Kill The Past.; Cannot be dropped, and will not be stolen by the Resourceful Rat.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 可作为“能抹掉过去的子弹”的四个组件之一。; 不能被丢弃，也不会被资源鼠偷走。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This is the only bullet component that can be re-acquired after giving it to the Blacksmith.; After giving the Obsidian Shell Casing to the Blacksmith, it will appear on the Hero of Time Statue in the Breach as armour.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这是唯一一种在交给黑匠之后仍能重新拿回来的子弹组件。; 把黑曜石子弹套袋交给黑匠后，它会作为护甲出现在大厅里的时之英雄雕像上。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Bullet Component. Before the great Bullet fell, the Gungeon's original master used this powder in his experiments. The Bullet Kin still mine it from the depths, awaiting the return of their master.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 子弹组件。大子弹坠落之前，地牢最初的主人曾用这种火药做实验。子弹枪子弹怪仍在地牢深处开采它，等待主人归来。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Cannot be used.; One of four components of the Bullet That Can Kill The Past.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 无法使用。; “能抹掉过去的子弹”的四个组件之一。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Bug: If either player in a co-op game dies and is holding the gunpowder, the Arcane Gunpowder will disappear.; If the Cultist is holding the gunpowder, it’s not possible to give the gunpowder to the Blacksmith, as the gunpowder is not droppable.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 漏洞：如果联机时任一玩家死亡且手里拿着这包火药，神秘火药会消失。; 如果邪教徒拿着火药，就没法把它交给黑匠，因为它不能被丢弃。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Fires additional projectiles. These umbral bullets hide in the shadows of other bullets, waiting for the right time to strike.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 额外发射投射物。这些暗影子弹藏在其他子弹的阴影里，等待合适时机出手。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Firing a weapon has a 15% chance to fire an additional projectile.; Gives beam style Guns a 15% chance every second while firing to gain double damage for one second, creating random seconds of double damage.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 开火时有 15% 几率额外发射一枚投射物。; 持续射击时，光束类枪械每秒有 15% 几率在 1 秒内获得双倍伤害，形成随机触发的双倍伤害时刻。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Chain Lightning If the player has Shock Rounds, the range that Shock Rounds can connect bullets is increased, and lightning can connect to enemy bullets.; Gruber's Bane If the player has Backup Gun, Backup Gun has a 100% chance of firing shadow bullets.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 连锁闪电：如果玩家拥有电击炮，电击炮可以连接子弹的距离提高，而且闪电还能连到敌方子弹上。; 格鲁伯之祸：如果玩家拥有备用枪，备用枪会 100% 发射暗影子弹。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The beam damage multiplier sometimes granted by Shadow Bullets does not stack with the beam damage multipliers of Shock Rounds, Flak Bullets, Explosive Rounds, Katana Bullets, Vorpal Bullets, Blank Bullets, Devolver Rounds or Hungry Bullets.; While the damage multiplier itself does not stack, the chance for the multiplier to be applied per-second does.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 光束伤害倍率有时会由暗影子弹提供，但它不会与电击炮、高射炮子弹、爆炸弹丸、武士刀子弹、斩首子弹、空响弹子弹、倒转子弹或饥饿子弹的光束伤害倍率叠加。; 虽然伤害倍率本身不会叠加，但触发该倍率的每秒几率会叠加。

entries.unlock: Kill The Convict's past.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: A photo that the Convict brought with her to the Gungeon. Deal extra damage for a short time after getting hit. On the journey to the Breach, the Pilot once asked her why she always stared at this photo. Later, she was released from the brig.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 囚犯带进地牢的一张照片。受击后短时间内伤害提高。飞行员在前往裂隙的路上曾问过她，为什么她总盯着这张照片看。后来，她从禁闭室里被放了出来。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Upon taking damage, all of the player's guns will be instantly reloaded, and the player will be enraged for 4 seconds, dealing double damage.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 受到伤害后，玩家的所有枪械会立刻重新装填，玩家会愤怒 4 秒，造成双倍伤害。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Cannot be dropped when playing as The Convict.; This item will carry over into characters' pasts.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 囚犯使用时不能丢弃。; 这件物品会带到角色的过去关卡中。

entries.unlock: Kill The Marine's past.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Memories of your years in training. Better Reload speeds and weapon accuracy.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 多年训练留下的记忆。更快的装填速度和更高的武器精度。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Decreases reload times by 20%.; Reduces weapon spread by 17%, increasing accuracy.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 装填时间减少 20%。; 武器散布减少 17%，精度提高。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Cannot be dropped when playing as The Marine.; Carries over to the pasts.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 海军陆战队员使用时不能丢弃。; 会带到过去关卡中。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The Chromesteel Assault Rifle was used as the last line of defense against a viscous Blobulonian incursion. Despite such a mighty weapon, greater numbers prevailed.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 铬钢突击步枪曾被用作抵御一场黏液星球人入侵的最后防线。即便如此强大的武器，数量优势最终还是压过了它。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Hegemony soldiers in The Convict's past are equipped with this gun. The Black Stache's boss-card depicts several Hegemony Soldiers holding the rifle.; Due to the way enemy AI is coded in Enter the Gungeon, companions and enemies which use weapons disconnected from their sprite hold real guns which are theoretically usable in the players inventory, albeit unobtainable. This may explain why the Chromesteel Assault Rifle is absent from all loot pools, despite being fully functional.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 囚犯过去关卡中的人类霸权士兵会装备这把枪。黑须头目卡上画着好几名人类霸权士兵手持这把步枪。; 由于《挺进地牢》的敌方 AI 代码机制，那些使用与自身精灵图分离武器的伙伴和敌人会持有真正的枪械，而这些枪理论上可出现在玩家背包中，只是无法实际获得。这或许解释了为什么铬钢突击步枪虽然功能完好，却从未出现在任何战利品池里。

entries.unlock: Kill The Pilot's past.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Chance to pick locks. Can only be used once per lock. These lockpicks have never let the Pilot down, except for the many times they did.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 有几率撬开锁。每把锁只能用一次。这些开锁器从没让飞行员失望过，除了他们确实让他失望的那些次。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Has a 50% chance to unlock a lock or locked chest.; If it fails, the lock will no longer function. The chest can still be destroyed.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 有 50% 几率打开一把锁或一只上锁的宝箱。; 如果失败，这把锁就会失去作用。宝箱仍然可以被摧毁。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Using the lockpicks on a Mimic will not wake it up.; Like other starting items, the Trusty Lockpicks will carry over to the Past.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 对拟身怪使用不会把它吵醒。; 和其他初始道具一样，值得信赖的开锁器会带到过去关卡中。

entries.unlock: Reward from [[Frifle_and_the_Grey_Mauser#List_of_Quests
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Fires explosive homing darts.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 发射会爆炸的追踪飞镖。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires small homing needles that stick into targets.; These needles have a high homing force but low homing radius, meaning that they can completely change their direction to hit a target but can only 'see' targets within 4 tiles.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射会粘住目标的小型追踪针。; 这些针的追踪力很高，但追踪半径很小，也就是说它们可以彻底改变方向去命中目标，但只能“看见” 4 格内的目标。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Cat Friends If the player has Bait Launcher, the Bait Launcher's tigers attach several Cat Claw needles onto enemies when they maul them.; Clawntlet If the player has Gunknight Gauntlet, the player releases a spiral of bullets whenever they take damage.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 猫咪朋友：如果玩家拥有诱饵发射器，诱饵发射器的老虎在扑咬敌人时会把几根猫爪针扎进敌人体内。; 爪套：如果玩家拥有枪骑士手套，每次受伤时都会释放一圈子弹。
entries.englishUsageNotes: As needles only detonate once new needles stop being attached, it is easy to accidentally 'overkill' enemies. For example, it may take 6 darts to kill an enemy, but up to 33 darts can be attached, causing 27 shots to be excess damage and therefore wasted ammo.; For small targets, it is typically best to pause once a small number of needles are attached to allow them to detonate.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 由于针只有在没有新针继续附着后才会爆炸，因此很容易不小心把敌人“杀超量”。例如，杀死一个敌人可能只需要 6 枚飞镖，但最多能附着 33 枚，导致多出 27 枚子弹被浪费。; 对于小目标，通常最好在附着少量针后停顿一下，让它们自行爆炸。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 30 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Launches a dense metal slug at incredible speeds. Ricochets will loosely track enemies. This railgun has moved beyond the prototype stage into production. The slug has been reduced in mass to cut costs, resulting in weaker relative performance but high ricochet potential.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 以惊人的速度发射一枚致密金属弹。反弹弹道会大致追踪敌人。这把磁轨炮已经从原型阶段进入量产阶段。弹体为了降低成本而减重，因此相对威力更弱，但更容易反弹。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Dead Cell If the player also has Fortune's Favor, the charge time is 10% faster and its damage to bosses is increased by 30%.; When this gun is charged, the beam of light coming from the end is usually stopped by walls. However, passages to secret rooms will let the light through, revealing their location. If the weapon is switched before it is discharged, no ammo will be used. Sometimes the laser glitches through random areas of wall. To make sure it is a door and not a glitch, strafe and make sure the laser highlights a door-sized area.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 死细胞：如果玩家同时拥有财富的青睐，蓄力时间缩短 10%，且对 Boss 的伤害提高 30%。; 当这把枪蓄力时，枪口射出的光束通常会被墙壁挡住。不过，通往隐藏房的通道会让光穿过去，从而暴露位置。若在射出前切换武器，则不会消耗弹药。有时激光会穿过墙体的某些随机区域。为了确认那是门而不是故障，可以横向移动，确保激光照出一块门大小的区域。

entries.unlock: Reward from [[Frifle_and_the_Grey_Mauser#List_of_Quests
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Shoots sharks. Really. This gun, a Calx original, fires homing sharks. This would never function under normal circumstances, but the Gungeon respects the pure audacity of its existence.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 发射鲨鱼。真的。这把由卡尔克斯原创的枪会发射追踪鲨鱼。照常理这玩意根本不可能运作，但地牢尊重它纯粹的狂气。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Sharks leave water goop as they travel. Sharks fired into invalid places, such as directly into walls, will immediately disappear, leaving a large circular puddle of water behind.; Sharks trigger a different animation depending on if they kill their target. If the shark kills its prey, it will erupt from the floor and swallow the enemy whole. Enemies are stunned and cannot attack while being swallowed.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 鲨鱼在移动时会留下水洼。朝着无效位置发射的鲨鱼，例如直接打进墙里，会立刻消失，并在后方留下一大片圆形水坑。; 鲨鱼是否击杀目标会触发不同动画。如果鲨鱼咬死猎物，它会从地板里冲出，把敌人整个吞下去。被吞下时，敌人会被击晕并无法攻击。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Smile, you son of a... If the player has M1, Compressed Air Tank's sharks will explode upon biting an enemy. These explosions will hurt the player.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 笑吧，你这个混蛋……：如果玩家拥有 鲁布-亚达因型2号，压缩空气罐的鲨鱼咬到敌人时会爆炸。这些爆炸也会伤到玩家。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Despite sharks disabling the on-death effects of some enemies, enemies will still drop any loot assigned to them. Enemies that split into other enemies such as Blobulons, Poisbulons, and King Bullats will still split when eaten by a shark.; Although this gun fires water, it cannot be used to get the item from the Black Market.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 尽管鲨鱼会使某些敌人的死亡特效失效，敌人仍会掉落原本应掉的战利品。会分裂成其他敌人的目标，例如黏液怪、毒黏液怪和子弹王，被鲨鱼吞掉时仍会照常分裂。; 虽然这把枪发射的是水，但它不能用来从黑市拿到那件物品。

entries.unlock: Reward from [[Frifle_and_the_Grey_Mauser#List_of_Quests
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Chance to transmogrify enemies. The Snakemaker was an attempt to replicate the strange transformative power of certain magics with technology. Though the experiment was a success, further research into transfigurative weaponry seemed excessive.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 有几率把敌人变成别的东西。制蛇者是一次尝试，试图用技术复制某些魔法那种奇怪的变形力量。虽然实验成功了，但继续研究变形武器似乎有些过头。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Twin Snakes If the player has Rattler, the Rattler's shots become beams that have a chance to poison enemies and the Snakemaker's shots gain a homing effect.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 双生蛇：如果玩家拥有响尾蛇枪，响尾蛇枪的子弹会变成激光，并有几率使敌人中毒，而制蛇者的子弹则会获得追踪效果。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Bosses are immune to transmogrification.; Unlike chickens caused by other transmogrification, snakes cannot be killed and will not block shots.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: Boss 对变形免疫。; 与其他变形效果产生的小鸡不同，蛇不会被杀死，也不会挡住子弹。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 14 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: The explosive drills this gun fires will stun enemies before exploding. The Bullet Bore is an exotic weapon from the past, when the only creatures to carry guns were dinosaurs.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把枪射出的爆炸钻头会先击晕敌人，再引爆。钻头枪是一种来自远古时代的奇异武器，那时会持枪的生物只有恐龙。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Cerebral Bros If the player also has Cluster Mine, Bow, Charmed Bow, or Explosive Rounds, Bullet Bore turns red and fires two drills at a time.; Get Equipped With -C- Enables Crash Bomber mode on the Megahand, which fires Bullet Bore drills when fully charged. Modes can be switched by reloading the Megahand with a full magazine.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 大脑兄弟：如果玩家同时拥有集束地雷、弓、魅惑弓或爆炸弹丸，钻头枪会变红并一次发射两枚钻头。; 装备 -C-：在洛克手炮完全蓄力时启用撞击轰炸机模式，会发射钻头枪的钻头。装满弹匣后重新装填洛克手炮即可切换模式。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun can hit Cannonbalrog and High Priest during attacks where not normally possible.; Helix Bullets will cause the bullets to only shoot and have piercing abilities, without the explosion and stunning effect.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪在某些通常打不中的攻击窗口也能命中中文待定（Cannonbalrog）和中文待定（High Priest）。; 螺旋子弹会让子弹只保留射击和穿透能力，而不会带有爆炸和击晕效果。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Alternates between handgun and shotgun forms. Legend tells of demon bullets that inhabit the lowest level of the Gungeon, making their lairs beneath the great Forge. The Trick Gun is a favorite of the Gungeoneers who style themselves as demon hunters.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 在手枪和霰弹枪形态之间切换。传说说，地牢最底层住着恶魔子弹，它们在大锻炉下方筑巢。自诩恶魔猎人的枪牢者都很喜欢这把魔术枪。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Trick Gun can be reloaded without changing its form by switching to another gun, waiting approximately twice the amount of time it takes to reload normally, than switching back.; Fear the Old Blood If the player also has Blood Brooch, Bloody Eye, or Rolling Eye, reload time is decreased by 33% and fire rate is increased by 20%.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 切换到别的枪再等大约两倍正常装填时间，然后切回来，就能在不改变形态的情况下重新装填魔术枪。; 惧旧血：如果玩家同时拥有鲜血胸针、血红的眼睛或翻紫眼儿，装填时间减少 33%，射速提高 20%。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Fires ice projectiles on taking damage. This icy heart was torn from a mighty frost giant, a common target for talented monster hunters.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 受到伤害时发射冰弹。这颗冰冷的心脏是从一位强大的冰霜巨人身上扯下来的，这类怪物常常是技术娴熟的怪物猎人的目标。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Grants a heart container.; Like all heart container items, robot The Robot will receive 5 to 10 coin instead.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 增加 1 个心之容器。; 和所有提供心之容器的物品一样，机器人（The Robot）会改为获得 5 到 10 枚金币。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Arctic Warfare If the player also has A.W.P., it turns orange and white, deals 62.5% more damage, and its shots are guaranteed to freeze enemies.; Dragunice If the player also has Dragunfire, it will both freeze and ignite enemies.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 极地战争：如果玩家同时拥有狙击枪，它会变成橙白配色，伤害提高 62.5%，而且射出的子弹保证冻结敌人。; 龙焰寒冰：如果玩家同时拥有龙焰枪，它会同时冻结并点燃敌人。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Despite being able to be found in C, B and A rank chests, it will always have to be bought from a store at A rank price.; Although it is considered A rank, it does not increase magnificence.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 尽管它能出现在 C、B 和 A 级宝箱中，但仍然总得以 A 级商店价购买。; 虽然它被视为 A 级物品，但它不会提升华丽值。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 9 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: A shotgun used by the highest ranking soldiers of the Hegemony. Designed for rapid deployment and easy storage, the Mass Shotgun fires a single large slug that bursts into smaller pellets.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 一把供人类霸权最高级士兵使用的霰弹枪。它为快速部署和便于收纳而设计，巨形霰弹枪会发射一枚大弹丸，再把它炸成更小的弹丸。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires a single, large, slow moving projectile with a 5 tile range.; After hitting a wall or reaching the end of its exceptionally short range, this ball will split apart into 12 smaller, faster projectiles.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射一枚巨大、缓慢飞行的投射物，射程为 5 格。; 这枚弹丸在撞到墙壁或飞到那异常短的射程终点后，会分裂成 12 枚更小、更快的投射物。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Mass Cutter If the player has Mine Cutter, when the Mass Shotgun shot splits, 6-10 piercing Mine Cutter lasers will be fired in a cone in the direction the shotgun was fired.; If the Mass Shotgun shot hits an enemy before it splits, the lasers will not fire.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 巨形切割器：如果玩家拥有矿井切割机，当巨形霰弹枪的弹丸分裂时，会沿着开枪方向的锥形区域发射出 6 到 10 道穿透性的矿井切割机激光。; 如果巨形霰弹枪的弹丸在分裂前先命中敌人，那么这些激光就不会发射。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Mass Shotgun is best used at a medium range, where the initial projectile will split close enough to the target to maximise the amount of pellets that hit. Hitting enemies with the inital bullet does considerably less damage.; This gun is a reference to collapsible weapons in the Mass Effect franchise. While there is not an exact weapon in the series that the Mass Shotgun is based on, it is somewhat similar in function to the Geth Plasma Shotgun, which shoots 3 plasma pellets when uncharged and 1 plasma slug when charged.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 巨形霰弹枪最适合中距离使用，这样初始弹丸会在靠近目标时分裂，尽可能多地命中敌人。用初始弹丸直接打中敌人反而会造成少得多的伤害。; 这把枪是在致敬质量效应系列里的可折叠武器。虽然系列里并没有一把完全对应的武器，但它的功能和盖斯特等离子霰弹枪颇为相似：后者未蓄力时会射出 3 枚等离子弹丸，蓄力时则会射出 1 枚等离子弹。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Molotov cocktails aren't guns, and so they are frowned upon by long-dwelling Gungeoneers. They get the job done regardless. Knowing the Hegemony wouldn't let her bring her own weaponry to the Gungeon, the Convict smuggled these few bottles in with the transport's cargo.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 燃烧瓶不是枪，所以常住枪牢者对它们颇有微词。不过它们依然管用。囚犯知道霸权不会让她把自己的武器带进枪牢，于是把这几瓶偷偷塞进了运输货物里。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Upon use, throws a Molotov that shatters upon hitting the ground, unleashing a large pool of fire goop that sets enemies on fire and does continuous damage.; When collected, all enemies on screen are set on fire.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 使用后会投出一瓶燃烧瓶，它落地时会碎裂，释放一大片着火的燃烧黏液，对敌人造成持续伤害并点燃它们。; 拾取后，屏幕上的所有敌人都会着火。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Molotov does not function in the Gorguns boss room, as instead of shattering upon hitting the water, it will sink harmlessly below the surface.; As the Molotov deals exclusively fire damage, it is useless against enemies that are immune to fire such as Muzzle Wisps or the Bullet King.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 燃烧瓶在戈贡斯 Boss 房中无法生效，因为它不会在接触水面时碎裂，反而会无害地沉到水下。; 由于燃烧瓶只造成火焰伤害，所以对那些免疫火焰的敌人，比如枪口幽魂或子弹王，毫无作用。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Increases room drop rate.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 增加房间掉落率。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Increases room drop rate.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 增加房间掉落率。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Emmitt Calx was renowned for his hunting prowess and his creative guncraft. El Tigre’s fangs seek prey relentlessly, with each bite more painful to the victim.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 艾米特·卡尔克斯以高超的狩猎技巧和富有创意的枪械工艺闻名。老虎枪的利齿会不懈追猎猎物，每咬一口都让受害者更痛。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun behaves in a similar manner to Cat Claw, and also shares a "cat" theme with it.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪的行为和猫爪很相似，而且也和它一样带有“中文待定（cat）”主题。

entries.unlock: Kill the High Dragun with [[Beastmode
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Launches meat that attracts carnivores. This esoteric weapon was devised by Emmitt Calx during one of his famous big game expeditions. The steak thrown by this small catapult will almost certainly draw the attention of any nearby predators.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 发射会吸引食肉动物的肉。艾米特·卡尔克斯在一次著名的大型狩猎远征中设计了这把玄妙武器。这台小型弹射器扔出的牛排几乎肯定会引来附近任何掠食者的注意。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Launches steaks.; Upon impact, a tiger will appear from off screen and run to the nearest enemy, mauling them before disappearing.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射牛排。; 命中后，会有一只老虎从屏幕外出现，冲向最近的敌人，在消失前把它们扑咬一番。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Cat Friend If the player has Cat Claw, Bait Launcher's tigers attach several Cat Claw needles onto enemies when they maul them.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 猫咪朋友：如果玩家拥有猫爪，诱饵发射器的老虎在扑咬敌人时会把几根猫爪针扎进敌人体内。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The tiger that appears won't necessarily chase the meat, but rather targets the enemy closest to where it lands, no matter how far the target actually is from the meat. This is very useful for attacking enemies from behind cover, as the damage dealt by the steaks themselves is negligible.; If the player has Snowballets, the tigers' damage output will scale as their size increases. The tigers can get quite large, occupying a majority of the screen.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 出现的老虎不一定会追着肉跑，而是会优先锁定落点附近最近的敌人，不管那敌人离肉到底有多远。这在掩体后攻击敌人时特别有用，因为牛排本身造成的伤害很低。; 如果玩家拥有雪球弹，老虎的伤害会随着体型增大而提高。老虎可以变得相当大，几乎占满整个屏幕。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Launches a dense metal slug at incredible speeds. A secret military prototype, built at great cost by the Hegemony of Man. A single shot can punch a hole in anything up to a Destroyer-class starship.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 以惊人的速度发射一枚致密金属弹。人类霸权以高昂代价打造的秘密军事原型机。一发就能在任何不超过毁灭者级星舰的目标上打出一个洞。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Production Model If the player has the Teleporter Prototype or Nanomachines, this gun's shots can ricochet up to five times.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 量产型号：如果玩家拥有传送原型机或纳米机械，这把枪的子弹最多可反弹 5 次。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Enemies killed by the Prototype Railgun are visibly disintegrated, though this will not stop Shotgun Kin from firing bullet bursts upon their deaths.; When this gun is charged, the beam of light coming from the end is usually stopped by walls. However, passages to secret rooms will let the light through, revealing their location. If the weapon is switched before it is discharged, no ammo will be used. Sometimes the laser glitches through random areas of wall. To make sure it is a door and not a glitch, strafe and make sure the laser highlights a door-sized area.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 被原型磁轨炮击杀的敌人会明显分解，不过这不会阻止霰弹枪子弹怪在死亡时发射弹幕。; 当这把枪蓄力时，枪口射出的光束通常会被墙壁挡住。不过，通往隐藏房的通道会让光穿过去，从而暴露位置。如果在射出前切换武器，则不会消耗弹药。有时激光会穿过墙体的某些随机区域。为了确认那是门而不是故障，可以横向移动，确保激光照出一块门大小的区域。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Trorc for 15 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Fires wire-guided missiles, controlled by aiming. These missiles are excellent for catching an enemy off guard, or perhaps for traversing an electrified corridor.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 发射由操控指引的导弹。这些导弹非常适合趁敌人毫无防备时偷袭，也很适合穿过布满电流的走廊。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: These rockets behave with the effect of Remote Bullets.; On keyboard and mouse controls, these rockets home in towards the players crosshair.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 这些火箭会受到远程子弹效果影响。; 在键鼠操作下，这些火箭会朝玩家的准星方向追踪。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun is a reference to the Nikita remote-controlled missile launcher from Metal Gear Solid, which fires controllable missiles. As mentioned in the description, in Metal Gear Solid, you use the gun to traverse an electrified corridor by destroying its power source at the end of it.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪是在致敬《合金装备》里的尼基塔（Nikita）遥控导弹发射器，那玩意也能发射可操控导弹。正如描述里所说，在《合金装备》里，你会靠它摧毁走廊尽头的供电装置，从而穿过带电走廊。

entries.unlock: Construct the Bullet That Can Kill The Past.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Increases the damage dealt by the first bullet in a clip. One of a pair of artifact bullets forged by Edwin's daughter as part of her journeyman's trial.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 提高弹匣中第一发子弹造成的伤害。它是埃德温之女为完成学徒试炼而锻造的一对子弹神器之一。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: The first shot of a guns magazine deals 80% more damage.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 枪械弹匣中的第一发子弹伤害提高 80%。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Added Effect - Fire If the player has Hot Lead, the first shot of each magazine is guaranteed to be a fire bullet.; Added Effect - Ice If the player has Frost Bullets, the first shot of each magazine is guaranteed to be an ice bullet.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 新增效果 - 火焰：如果玩家拥有赤焰弹头，每个弹匣的第一发都会变成火焰子弹。; 新增效果 - 冰霜：如果玩家拥有霜子弹，每个弹匣的第一发都会变成冰弹。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This item is very effective for guns that have a single bullet in each magazine, as every shot will have increased damage.; This item has no effect on beam-style guns.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这件物品对每个弹匣只有一发子弹的枪特别有效，因为每一发都会吃到增伤。; 这件物品对光束类枪械没有效果。

entries.unlock: Construct the Bullet That Can Kill The Past.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Increases the damage dealt by the last bullet in a clip. One of a pair of artifact bullets forged by Edwin's daughter as part of her journeyman's trial.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 提高弹匣中最后一发子弹造成的伤害。它是埃德温之女为完成学徒试炼而锻造的一对子弹神器之一。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: The final shot of a guns magazine deals double damage.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 枪械弹匣的最后一发子弹造成双倍伤害。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Diamond Weapon If the player has Frost Bullets, the last shot of each magazine is guaranteed to be an ice bullet.; Emerald Weapon If the player has Irradiated Lead, the last shot of each magazine is guaranteed to be a poison bullet.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 钻石武器：如果玩家拥有霜子弹，每个弹匣的最后一发都会变成冰弹。; 翡翠武器：如果玩家拥有辐射铅弹，每个弹匣的最后一发都会变成毒弹。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This item is very effective for guns that have a single bullet in each magazine, as every shot will have increased damage, as well as guns that have a unique bullet at the end of the clip, such as The Judge.; This item has no effect on beam guns.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这件物品对每个弹匣只有一发子弹的枪特别有效，因为每一发都会吃到增伤；它对那些弹匣末尾有特殊子弹的枪也很有效，比如审判者。; 这件物品对光束枪没有效果。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: These handcrafted shells are extremely easy to handle. So easy, in fact, that a single shell can be reloaded during a standard dodge roll. Reversable bullets crafted by Edwin. In his old age, he grew tired of squinting to see which end of the bullet was up.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这些手工制作的弹壳非常好操作，甚至可以在标准翻滚时装填一发。它们是埃德温打造的可翻转子弹。年老之后，他已经厌倦了眯着眼去分辨子弹哪一头朝上。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Dodge rolling reloads a single bullet into the players currently held gun.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 翻滚时会给当前手持枪械装填 1 发子弹。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Reload Roll If the player has Magnum, M1911, Dungeon Eagle, 38 Special, Colt 1851, Makarov, or SAA, dodge rolling reloads six bullets, and dodge roll distance is increased by 20% when the gun is held.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 重新装填翻滚：如果玩家拥有马格南手枪、M1911、地牢之鹰、38特种手枪、柯尔特1851、马卡洛夫枪或柯尔特单动左轮，翻滚装填会一次装填 6 发子弹，而且在持枪时翻滚距离会提高 20%。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This item can be used to repeatedly reload and fire the special last shot of guns like H4mmer.; This gun can significantly reduce the effective reload times of single-shot weapons by dodge rolling as soon as fire is pressed.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这件物品可以配合翻滚反复装填并打出枪械的特殊末发。像 悍马枪 这样的枪尤其适合这么用。; 只要在按下射击键后立刻翻滚，这把道具就能显著缩短单发武器的实际装填时间。

entries.unlock: Complete the Keep of the Lead Lord 50 times.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Legends tell of a mysterious alchemist who could turn bricks into coins, turtles, mushrooms, and a wide variety of other things. If true, this gun is a poor facsimile of his abilities, but is still useful nonetheless.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 传说中，有位神秘炼金术士能把砖块变成金币、乌龟、蘑菇，以及各种各样的东西。若传言属实，这把枪对他那种能力只是拙劣仿制，但依然相当实用。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Shells can also pierce up to 4 times.; In Exit the Gungeon, instead of piercing through enemies, shells will bounce off of enemies, expending one of their six bounces without the need to pierce.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 弹壳最多还能穿透 4 次。; 在《逃出地牢》中，这些弹壳不会穿透敌人，而是会在敌人身上弹开，用掉 6 次反弹中的 1 次，而且不需要穿透。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Block Party If the player also has Mustache, the size of the Brick Breaker's shells is increased by 50%, and their damage is increased by 25%.; Softshell If the player also has Stuffed Star, while Stuffed Star is active, Brick Breaker shells are continually fired in random directions.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 积木派对：如果玩家同时拥有络腮胡，砖块破坏者的弹壳体积增加 50%，伤害增加 25%。; 软壳：如果玩家同时拥有毛绒星星，在毛绒星星生效期间，砖块破坏者的弹壳会持续向随机方向射出。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Despite appearing to travel over the ground, Brick Breaker shells are in fact flying, and can travel over pits.; This weapon is a reference to the Mario franchise of video games, well known for hiding items in nondescript, breakable bricks.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 尽管砖块破坏者的弹壳看起来是在地面上移动，但它们实际上是在飞，而且可以越过深坑。; 这把武器是在致敬马里奥系列游戏，这个系列以把道具藏在不起眼、可打碎的砖块里而闻名。

entries.unlock: Map all 5 non-secret chambers for The Lost Adventurer and talk to him in The Breach.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Reload to clear the air of bullets. This abominable weapon angers the Jammed. The weapon of a mythical hero, said to have mastered the Gungeon. Reloading initiates a defensive flurry of slashes, each positioned to carve a bullet from the air.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 重新装填即可清空空气中的子弹。这把可憎武器会激怒被诅咒的敌人。它是一件神话英雄的武器，传说中这位英雄已掌握枪牢的奥秘。重新装填时，会触发一阵防御性连斩，每一刀都像是要把一颗子弹从空气里刻出来。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Buster Gun If the player has RPG, Excaliber fires three or four shots in a cone whenever it is reloaded.; Snicker-snack If the player has Vorpal Bullets, Excaliber fires a spread of 3 homing shots that deal 20% less damage.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 中文待定（Buster Gun）：如果玩家拥有火箭推进式榴弹，每次重新装填时，亚瑟王的神剑都会以锥形射出三到四发子弹。; 中文待定（Snicker-snack）：如果玩家拥有斩首子弹，亚瑟王的神剑会射出 3 发追踪弹，伤害降低 20%。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: This tiny pistol packs a correspondingly small punch, but it is well-known for getting its wielders out of tight spots.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把迷你手枪威力也同样迷你，但它以能把使用者从窘境里拉出来而闻名。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Dead Prez If the player has the Dueling Pistol, Derringer fires bouncing musket balls identical to the Dueling Pistol, and Dueling Pistol fires a wide spread of 4 bullets alongside its normal shots.; Thorn Bath, ooh! If the player has Armor of Thorns, Derringer's damage is increased by 30%. While Derringer is held in a room with enemies, thorns are periodically fired in all directions.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 死之总统：如果玩家拥有决斗手枪，大口径短口手枪会发射和决斗手枪一模一样、会弹跳的滑膛弹，而决斗手枪会在正常射击之外额外发射一片 4 发散射弹幕。; 荆棘浴，哦：如果玩家拥有荆棘之甲，大口径短口手枪的伤害提高 30%。在有敌人的房间里持有大口径短口手枪时，荆棘会定期向四周射出。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Deals damage and potentially charms enemies. The preferred weapon of Hespera, the Pride of Venus, a beloved Gungeoneer.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 造成伤害，并有几率魅惑敌人。维纳斯骄傲的赫斯佩拉最钟爱的武器。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires a spread of 6 disparate bullets with different effects.; 2 regular bullets and a candy which have a 25% chance to charm enemies they hit for 10 seconds.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 一次发射 6 枚效果各不相同的散射子弹。; 其中 2 发是普通子弹，另有一颗糖果，它们都有 25% 几率把命中的敌人魅惑 10 秒。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Love/Hate If the player also has Shotgun Full of Hate, the guns are dual-wielded.; Unbelievably Charming If the player has Charming Rounds or Pink Guon Stone, while Shotgun Full of Love is held, all shots fired by the player (even those not from Shotgun Full of Love) and any companions are guaranteed to charm enemies, and the player is followed by a fairy that blocks bullets and displays the contents of chests.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 爱/恨：如果玩家同时拥有充满仇恨的霰弹枪，这两把枪会双持。; 惊人魅力：如果玩家拥有魅力弹丸或桃红色滚石，在持有爱之霰弹枪时，玩家发射的所有子弹（包括并非来自爱之霰弹枪的子弹）以及任何伙伴都会保证魅惑敌人，而且玩家身边还会跟着一只能挡子弹、还能显示宝箱内容的仙子。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Despite firing like a shotgun, the Shotgun Full of Love is not in the SHOTGUN gun class, and as such does not benefit from the Shotgun Affinity synergy.; The Shotgun Full of Love being in the CHARM gun class makes it inherently more common than its counterpart, the Shotgun Full of Hate, which exists in the SHOTGUN class.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 尽管它射起来像霰弹枪，但爱之霰弹枪并不属于 SHOTGUN 枪械类别，因此不会受到 Shotgun Affinity 协同效果加成。; 爱之霰弹枪属于 CHARM 枪械类别，因此它在机制上比同类武器充满仇恨的霰弹枪更常见，后者属于 SHOTGUN 类别。

entries.unlock: Kill Blockner, and talk to Ser Manuel in the Hall of Knowledge.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Generates a protective shield upon reload. Blockner lost his knighthood when he betrayed Ser Manuel, but he did not lose his gun. He did that much later.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 重新装填时会生成一面防护护盾。布洛克纳背叛塞尔·曼努埃尔后失去了骑士身份，但他没丢掉枪。那是后来的事。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Upon reloading, creates a protective magical shield on the ground. This shield blocks enemy bullets, and will be destroyed upon taking too much damage.; All shields in a room are automatically destroyed when the player leaves it.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 重新装填时，会在地上生成一面防护魔法护盾。该护盾会阻挡敌方子弹，并会在承受过多伤害后破碎。; 房间里的所有护盾会在玩家离开房间时自动销毁。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Betrayer's Lies If the player has Lies, Betrayer's Shield gains infinite ammo, a much larger magazine size, increased accuracy, and extremely high fire rate. Like other guns with infinite ammo, it cannot reveal secret rooms.; Betrayer's Lies can be combined with other guns using Duct Tape by dropping Lies, using Duct Tape, and picking up Lies again.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 背叛者的谎言：如果玩家拥有谎言，背弃者护罩会获得无限弹药、更大的弹匣容量、更高的精准度和极高的射速。和其他无限弹药的枪一样，它也不能显示隐藏房间。; 背叛者的谎言可以通过丢下谎言、使用胶带，再捡起谎言的方式，与其他枪械一起用胶带粘合。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Betrayer's Shield is peculiarly a member of the PISTOL gun class despite almost certainly being more at home among the members of the FULLAUTO class.; There are a few bullet patterns in certain boss fights that the shield will not block, such as the large bullets that the Cannonbalrog shoots when he disappears and the line of bullets that spins around the Resourceful Rat in his first phase.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 奇怪的是，背弃者护罩虽然几乎更适合归在 FULLAUTO 类别里，却偏偏属于 PISTOL 枪械类别。; 有些 Boss 战里的弹幕它挡不住，例如卡农巴洛格消失时发出的巨大子弹，以及机敏老鼠第一阶段绕着它旋转的那圈子弹。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The triple crossbow represents the pinnacle of multiple bolt technology.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 三重十字弩代表了多重箭矢技术的巅峰。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Triple Sticky If the player also has Sticky Crossbow, Sticky Crossbow will fire three bolts per shot, and its magazine size will increase from 5 to 6. Triple Crossbow's triple shot will explode (after hitting an enemy) upon reloading.; The Triple Crossbow is in the SHOTGUN gun class and as such benefits from the Shotgun Affinity synergy.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 三重黏性 如果玩家也持有黏性十字弩，黏性十字弩每次射击会发射三支弩箭，弹匣容量也会从 5 提升到 6。三重十字弩的三连射在换弹时会爆炸（在击中敌人之后）。; 三重十字弩属于霰弹枪枪械类别，因此会受益于霰弹枪亲和协同。

entries.unlock: Reward from [[Frifle_and_the_Grey_Mauser#List_of_Quests
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Sometimes the old ways are the best ways. Deals more damage to powerful foes. This is not one of those old, best ways. The lowly sling is barely a gun, even by Gungeon standards. Only recommended as a last resort for serious Gungeoneers.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 有时候老办法反而最好用。它对强敌能造成更多伤害。可惜这把不属于那种老派妙招。可怜的投石索几乎算不上枪，即使按地牢标准也是如此。只建议在走投无路时给认真闯关的地牢枪手应急使用。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Slings and Arrows If the player has Bow, the Bow can be charged longer to fire a special arrow that deals 50 damage.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 投石与箭矢 如果玩家持有弓，弓可以蓄力更久，射出一支造成 50 点伤害的特殊箭矢。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Despite its Ammonomicon description, the Sling is among the most powerful D tier weapons- especially against bosses.; The Sling dealing additional damage against bosses is a reference to the biblical tale of David and Goliath, where David slays the giant Goliath by the use of his sling.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 尽管弹药图鉴的描述如此，投石索其实是 D 级武器里相当强力的一把，尤其擅长对付 Boss。; 投石索对 Boss 造成额外伤害，指的是大卫与歌利亚的圣经故事，大卫正是借助投石索击败了巨人歌利亚。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 6 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: The trusty sidearm of a spacefaring hero. Featuring a stylish design and solid performance, this blaster is almost always worth keeping around.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把可靠的副武器是星际英雄的标配。它外形时髦、性能扎实，几乎总值得一直带在身上。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Ice Cap If the player also has Freeze Ray, it freezes enemies much quicker.; Savior of the Universe If the player also has Camera, Flash Ray gains double magazine size, unlimited piercing, a thicker beam, one bounce, increased fire rate, and causes a Camera flash when reloading an empty magazine. Camera also fires two laser beams whenever fired.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 冰盖 如果玩家也持有冰冻射线，敌人会被冻住得快得多。; 宇宙救世主 如果玩家也持有照相机，闪光枪会获得双倍弹匣容量、无限穿透、更粗的光束、一次弹跳、更快的射速，并且在换弹打空弹匣时会触发一次照相机闪光。照相机在每次开火时也会同时发射两道激光束。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The muzzle flare from this fiery handgun can ignite enemies. Return enemies to dust. Famously wielded by Two-Shot Erias on her final Gungeon attempt.
