entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把喷火手枪的枪口火焰足以点燃敌人。把敌人烧成灰。传说它曾被中文待定（Two-Shot Erias）在她最后一次地牢挑战中使用。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: The muzzle flare of this gun is a fiery ejection that sets enemies caught within on fire.; Despite emerging from this fiery belch, the projectile itself does not ignite enemies.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 这把枪的枪口火焰是一股灼热的喷焰，会点燃被卷入其中的敌人。; 尽管子弹从这种炽热的喷吐中射出，弹丸本身并不会点燃敌人。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Cryptic Cryptids If the player has Fossilized Gun, Phoenix shots pierce, deal double damage, and leave trails of fire. The player is immune to fire while either Phoenix or Fossilized Gun are equipped.; Phoenix Up If the player has Unfinished Gun, The Scrambler, Hot Lead, Copper Ammolet, Flame Hand, Weird Egg, Napalm Strike, or Gungeon Pepper, a phoenix companion that fires piercing fireballs at enemies is summoned while Phoenix is held, even while not equipped.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 化石克星 如果玩家持有化石枪，凤凰的射击会穿透、造成双倍伤害，并留下火焰轨迹。只要装备了凤凰或化石枪，玩家就会免疫火焰伤害。; 凤凰升腾 如果玩家持有枪坯、爬行者、赤焰弹头、铜制护身符、火焰之手、奇怪的蛋、凝固汽油弹打击或地牢胡椒，手持凤凰时就会召唤一只凤凰伙伴，向敌人发射可穿透的火球，即使没有装备也一样。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Phoenix's blast of fire does no direct damage, only lighting the enemy on fire.; Phoenix Up is likely a reference to the revival item Phoenix Down, from the Final Fantasy series.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 凤凰喷出的火焰本身不会直接造成伤害，只会把敌人点燃。; 凤凰升腾很可能是对《最终幻想》系列中复活道具中文待定（Phoenix Down）的致敬。

stats.value: Assuming each shot only hits one enemy.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The Hexagun was created by a vengeful Gunjurer after his apprentices were slain by a Gungeoneer wielding the humble Bundle of Wands. The stock is formed from what was once his staff, and each piece of metal was enchanted thrice before assembly. His revenge came swiftly, and from a great distance.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 六角枪是一个复仇心切的枪术师制造的，因为他的学徒们被一名拿着朴素魔杖束的地牢枪手杀死了。枪托由他原先的法杖制成，每一块金属在组装前都被施法加持了三次。他的复仇来得又快又远。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires extremely fast, piercing bolts of magic.; Has a 20% chance per hit to transmogrify enemies into harmless Chickens.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 以极快的速度发射可穿透的魔法弹丸。; 每次命中都有 20% 的概率把敌人变成无害的鸡。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Cast Iron If the player has Big Iron, each of Big Iron's bullets are replaced with one from Bundle of Wands, Witch Pistol, and Hexagun.; Chicken Arise If the player has Magic Bullets, the chance for Hexagun to transmogrify is increased.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 铸铁 如果玩家持有大铁枪，大铁枪的每一发子弹都会被来自一束魔杖、女巫手枪和六角枪的弹丸取代。; 小鸡降临 如果玩家持有魔术子弹，六角枪触发变形的概率会提高。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Bosses are immune to transmogrification.; The tagline is a reference to Terry Pratchett's novel The Light Fantastic.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: Boss 免疫变形。; 这句标语是在致敬特里·普拉切特的小说《中文待定（The Light Fantastic）》。

entries.unlock: Defeat the boss of the Hollow without getting hit.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: The arctic blast this gun emits can freeze enemies at close range. This gun was carried by a frost giant, long ago. Though they no longer rule the icy depths, a few of their artifacts remain.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把枪发出的极地寒流能在近距离冻结敌人。它曾在很久以前被一位冰霜巨人携带。虽然他们早已不再统治冰冷深渊，但仍有少数遗物留存。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Jotun Time If the player also has Heart of Ice, reloading the Frost Giant rapidly chills and freezes nearby enemies, and thrown guns deal 180% more damage.; Why's Bullet Crying? If the player also has Cold 45, attacking a frozen enemy with one of the guns causes a yeti to attack it, dealing high damage.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 尤顿时刻 如果玩家也持有冰之心，重新装填冰霜巨人会迅速冻住并冻结附近敌人，而且投掷枪械的伤害提高 180%。; 子弹在哭什么？ 如果玩家也持有寒45，用其中一把枪攻击被冻结的敌人会召唤一只雪怪攻击它，造成高额伤害。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The fire rate is only limited by how quickly the player can press the fire button, giving it high potential damage per second.; If the player also has Helix Bullets, both bullets follow the same path, as opposed to the normal helix pattern.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 它的射速只受玩家按下开火键的速度限制，因此单秒伤害潜力很高。; 如果玩家也持有螺旋子弹，两颗子弹会沿着同一条路径飞行，而不是形成正常的螺旋轨迹。

entries.unlock: Complete the Forge 10 times.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Shoots streaks of blue. Chargeable. Brought to the Gungeon by two of the first souls to conquer the Gungeon. Their ceaseless charge was driven by an unquenchable curiosity, and not even fatigue could slow their progress. Sleeping in shifts, the resting partner was carried into the depths on the other's back. Many adventurers throughout the galaxy would first learn of the Gungeon through tales of their exploits.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 射出蓝色光束。可蓄力。它由两个最早征服地牢的灵魂带入了地牢。他们不知疲倦的冲锋源自无法满足的好奇心，甚至连疲劳都无法减缓他们的脚步。轮流睡觉时，醒着的那位会把休息的同伴背进深处。银河系中的许多冒险者最初都是通过他们的事迹才听说地牢的。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires instantaneous piercing blue lasers.; When fully charged, the Gungeoneer will strike the gun against the ground, damaging all enemies in a short radius and firing lasers in four to five directions which can electrify water.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射瞬发的穿透蓝色激光。; 完全蓄力后，地牢枪手会把枪砸向地面，对短距离内所有敌人造成伤害，并向四到五个方向射出激光，这些激光还能导电。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Hammer and Anvil If the player has Anvillain, firing the Cobalt Hammer's charge attack also sends out anvils in all directions.; Nailed It! If the player has Nail Gun, its nails deal triple damage.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 锤与砧 如果玩家持有砧枪，发射钴锤的蓄力攻击时还会向四面八方射出铁砧。; 钉住了！ 如果玩家持有钉枪，它的钉子会造成三倍伤害。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun is a reference to the streamers Cobalt Streak and Richard_Hammer, who before the release of Enter the Gungeon were known for playing The Binding of Isaac, another shooter rogue-like. They were also known to "break" games or exploit game mechanics to a ridiculous, often beneficial degree.; The item description refers to their several day long stream leading up to Enter the Gungeon's release, where the two would take turns streaming and sleeping.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪是对主播中文待定（Cobalt Streak）和中文待定（Richard_Hammer）的致敬，他们在《挺进地牢》发布前就因游玩《以撒的结合》这类射击肉鸽而闻名。人们也知道他们会把游戏玩到会 "break" 掉，或把机制利用到荒唐、而且常常是有利的程度。; 这段物品描述指的是他们在《挺进地牢》发售前持续了数天的直播，两人轮流直播和睡觉。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Fires anvils! A hometown favorite! The Anvillain has been shown to be the safest and most effective means of dispatching foes with an anvil.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 发射铁砧！本地最爱！砧枪已被证明是用铁砧解决敌人的最安全、最有效的方法。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Hammer and Anvil If the player has Cobalt Hammer, firing the Cobalt Hammer's charge attack also sends out anvils in all directions.; Heavy Metal If the player also has Heavy Bullets or Heavy Boots, damage is increased by 20% and shot speed is decreased by 25%.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 锤与砧 如果玩家持有钴锤，发射钴锤的蓄力攻击时也会向四面八方射出铁砧。; 重金属 如果玩家同时拥有重子弹或重靴子，伤害提高 20%，射速降低 25%。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun can reliably hit an enemy twice due to high knockback, slow travel speed, and pierce.; This guns projectiles are among the few affected by gravity..
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 由于击退强、飞行速度慢且可穿透，它能可靠地命中同一个敌人两次。; 这把枪的弹丸是少数会受重力影响的弹丸之一。

entries.unlock: Complete the Black Powder Mine 30 times.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: This laser was designed to precisely cut rocks in the Gungeon's Black Powder Mining operations, but its powerful blasts are just as effective on Gundead.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把激光原本是为地牢黑火药采矿作业精确切割岩石而设计的，但它强力的爆发对地牢亡灵同样有效。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Dead Place If the player also has Melted Rock, Mine Cutter's damage is increased by 25%.; Mass Cutter If the player also has Mass Shotgun, when the Mass Shotgun shot splits, 6-10 piercing Mine Cutter lasers will be fired in a cone in the direction the shotgun was fired.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 死寂之地 如果玩家同时拥有熔岩，矿井切割机的伤害提高 25%。; 巨切器 如果玩家同时拥有巨形霰弹枪，当巨形霰弹枪的弹丸分裂时，会沿开火方向的锥形区域射出 6 到 10 道穿透性的矿井切割机激光。

entries.unlock: Complete the Gungeon Proper 40 times.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Reload to transform. One of the earliest gun experiments, before the fires of the Forge were lit. This "magic revolver" was created when the then-master of the Gungeon taped one of his staves of power to the top of the barrel.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 重新装填即可变形。这是最早的几次枪械实验之一，早在锻炉之火点燃之前就已诞生。这把 "magic revolver" 是当时的地牢之主把自己的一根力量法杖用胶带粘到枪管顶部做出来的。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun fires faster when shot rapidly like a semi-automatic weapon, rather than holding the trigger like an automatic.; Chicken Arise If the player also has Magic Bullets, the chance for Staff of Firepower to transmogrify enemies and size of bullets are increased.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪的射速在像半自动武器那样快速点射时更快，而不是像自动武器那样一直按住扳机。; 鸡来降临 如果玩家同时拥有魔术子弹，火力法杖让敌人变形的几率和子弹体积都会提高。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: This ancient technique briefly increases gun output whenever a table is flipped. Chapter three of the "Tabla Sutra." And in flipping the table, we are bettered. He who knows the table knows himself.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这门古老技法会在翻桌时短暂提升枪械输出。第 3 章，出自 "Tabla Sutra"。翻桌即修行，桌艺精进。懂桌者，亦懂自己。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Flipping a table briefly slows down time and triples number of bullets fired by the player for three seconds.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 翻桌会让时间短暂变慢，并在 3 秒内将玩家发射的子弹数量翻 3 倍。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: All Out Of Law If the player has Colt 1851, it fires three tight spreads of three bullets upon reloading. These projectiles can ignore tables when fired from behind them, and they can reveal secret rooms without angering the shopkeeper Bello.; Hidden Tech Time If the player has Liquid Valkyrie or Bloody Eye, flipping a table briefly stops time. This only stops enemies currently on the screen, new ones spawning (e.g. by a Blobulon splitting) will not be stopped.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 无法无天 如果玩家拥有柯尔特1851、逃生绳、臀部皮套或心形皮套，柯尔特1851会在装填时射出三组紧密排列、每组 3 发的子弹。这些投射物从桌子后方射出时不会受桌子阻挡，而且还能在不惹恼店主 Bello 的情况下揭示隐藏房间。; 隐秘科技：停时 如果玩家拥有液体女武神或血红的眼睛，翻桌会短暂停止时间。这只会停止当前屏幕上的敌人，新生成的敌人（例如由黏液怪分裂出来的）不会被停止。
entries.englishUsageNotes: If duplicates of this item are somehow obtained, each copy of Table Tech Sight held will multiply the players shots by 3 an additional time.; Sometimes flipping tables with duplicates may not activate time slowing down but shots still remain multiplied as usual.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 如果重复拿到这件道具，每多一份桌技：视域，玩家射出的子弹都会再乘以 3。; 有时在持有多份时，翻桌可能不会触发减速，但子弹数量仍会照常倍增。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: This ancient technique produces money whenever a table is flipped, and flips all unflipped tables in a room. Chapter five of the "Tabla Sutra." A poor man sells tables. A rich man buys tables. The wise man flips tables, and cares not for mundane possessions of the physical world. In this way, he becomes truly wealthy.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这门古老技法会在翻桌时产出金钱，并把房间里所有尚未翻过的桌子全部翻过来。第 5 章，出自 "Tabla Sutra"。穷人卖桌子，富人买桌子，智者翻桌子，对尘世俗物毫不在意。如此方能真正富有。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Flipping a table flips all other tables in the room in the same direction that the original table was flipped.; Every table flipped has a 40% chance to give 1-4 coin. This also applies to tables flipped indirectly by the first effect of this item.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 翻桌会把房间里所有其他桌子沿着原桌被翻倒的方向一起翻倒。; 每翻一张桌子都有 40% 的概率掉落 1 到 4 枚金币。这个效果也会作用于被本道具第一个效果间接翻过来的桌子。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Gilded Tables If the player has Gilded Bullets, tables have a 15% chance to be golden. Flipping a golden table will cause all normal enemies in the room to drop 2 to 6 extra coin upon death. Golden tables will not automatically flip due to Table Tech Money.; Tables created by Portable Table Device cannot be gilded.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: Gilded Tables 如果玩家拥有镀金子弹，桌子有 15% 的概率变成金色。翻动金色桌子会让房间内所有普通敌人在死亡时额外掉落 2 到 6 枚金币。金色桌子不会因为桌技：金钱而自动翻倒。; 便携式桌子装置生成的桌子不能被镀金。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The base price of Table Tech Money is 50 coin, despite D items normally costing 35 coin.; "Tabla" is Hindi for "Table", while a sutra is a kind of short Indian literary composition intended to teach rituals, literature, philosophy, law, or a great number of other concepts in a brief form, requiring interpretation. Famous examples include the Brahma Sutras, Yoga Sutras, or Nyāya Sutras.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 桌技：金钱的基础价格是 50 枚金币，尽管 D 级道具通常只卖 35 枚。; "Tabla" 是印地语里的 "Table"，而经文是一种简短的印度文学体裁，用于以简明形式讲授仪式、文学、哲学、法律或其他大量概念，需要读者自行阐释。著名例子包括梵经、瑜伽经和尼亚耶经。

entries.unlock: Push a table into a pit.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: This ancient technique causes tables to fire off like rockets when flipped. The final chapter of the "Tabla Sutra." The pages are badly scorched, and barely legible.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这门古老技法会让桌子像火箭一样在翻倒时射出去。第 6 章，出自 "Tabla Sutra"。书页已经严重烧焦，几乎无法辨认。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Flipping a table causes it to fly forward in the direction it was flipped, like a rocket, exploding on impact.; This table deals 30 damage to enemies it impacts, and a further 30 damage to enemies caught in its explosion.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 翻桌会让桌子沿着翻倒方向向前飞出，像火箭一样，并在撞击时爆炸。; 这张桌子撞到敌人时会造成 30 点伤害，爆炸还会对被卷入其中的敌人再造成 30 点伤害。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Hunter-Seeker Tables If the player has Com4nd0, table rockets label=home in on enemies.; Paperwork If the player has Origuni, the first shot of each magazine will fire three planes.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 猎手追踪桌 如果玩家拥有 魔鬼司令，桌面火箭会自动追踪敌人。; 纸上作业 如果玩家拥有 折纸枪，每个弹匣的第一发子弹都会发射三架纸飞机。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The patch notes for v1.1.3 claimed to have 'fixed' Table Tech Rocket explosions harming the player, however this feature is still present in the game.; "Tabla" is Hindi for "Table", while a sutra is a kind of short Indian literary composition intended to teach rituals, literature, philosophy, law, or a great number of other concepts in a brief form, requiring interpretation. Famous examples include the Brahma Sutras, Yoga Sutras, or Nyāya Sutras.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 1.1.3 的补丁说明声称已经“修复”了桌技：火箭爆炸会伤到玩家的问题，但这项机制在游戏里依然存在。; "Tabla" 是印地语里的 "Table"，而经文是一种简短的印度文学体裁，用于以简明形式讲授仪式、文学、哲学、法律或其他大量概念，需要读者自行阐释。著名例子包括梵经、瑜伽经和尼亚耶经。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: This ancient technique briefly increases damage whenever a table is flipped. Chapter two of the "Tabla Sutra." When a table is flipped, does it not feel anger? Does it not feel rage? Understand that feeling, and when you flip the table, be yourself flipped. Made famous in a duel between the third Flipjutsu Master and a nameless table flipper.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这门古老技法会在翻桌时短暂提高伤害。第 2 章，出自 "Tabla Sutra"。当桌子被翻倒时，难道不会感到愤怒吗？难道不会感到狂怒吗？理解这种感觉，然后在你翻桌时，让自己也被翻个身。它因第三位翻桌术大师与一位无名翻桌者之间的决斗而闻名。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Flipping a table doubles the player's damage for 4 seconds.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 翻桌会让玩家的伤害翻倍，持续 4 秒。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Needless Acrimony If the player also has Shotgun Full of Hate, rage duration is significantly increased if a table is flipped with Shotgun Full of Hate held.; Paperwork If the player has Origuni, the first shot of every Origuni magazine fires three planes.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 无谓的怨气 如果玩家同时持有充满仇恨的霰弹枪，在手持该枪翻桌时，狂怒持续时间会大幅延长。; 纸上作业 如果玩家拥有 折纸枪，每个 折纸枪 弹匣的第一发子弹都会发射三架纸飞机。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The mechanic of Table Tech Rage is a reference to the popular trope of flipping a table in rage.; "be yourself flipped" is likely a reference to the phrase 'flipped off', meaning to be angered.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 桌技：愤怒是对“愤怒时翻桌”这一常见桥段的致敬。; "be yourself flipped" 很可能是在影射“竖中指”这一说法，意思是被激怒。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: This ancient technique will trigger a Blank when a table is flipped. Chapter four of the "Tabla Sutra." A clear table leads to a clear mind.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这门古老技法会在翻桌时触发一次空响弹。第 4 章，出自 "Tabla Sutra"。一张整洁的桌子，带来一颗清净的心。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Flipping a table activates a free blank effect, clearing all enemy bullets on screen, pushing away nearby enemies, and dealing a small amount of damage to nearby enemies.; This blank effect triggers the effects of Ammolets.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 翻桌会触发一次免费的空响弹效果，清除屏幕上所有敌方子弹、推开附近敌人，并对附近敌人造成少量伤害。; 这次空响效果还会触发护符类道具的效果。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Hidden Tech Bees If the player has Bee Hive, Bumbullets, or Jar of Bees, a swarm of bees replaces enemy bullets when a table is flipped.; Paperwork If the player has Origuni, the first shot of each magazine fires three planes.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 隐藏科技：蜜蜂 如果玩家拥有蜂巢、大黄蜂弹或蜂罐，翻桌时会用一群蜜蜂替换敌方子弹。; 纸上作业 如果玩家拥有 折纸枪，每个弹匣的第一发子弹都会发射三架纸飞机。
entries.englishUsageNotes: If duplicates of this item are somehow obtained, each additional copy of Table Tech Blanks increases the amount of blanks activated when flipping over a table by 1.; "Tabla" is Hindi for "Table", while a sutra is a kind of short Indian literary composition intended to teach rituals, literature, philosophy, law, or a great number of other concepts in a brief form, requiring interpretation. Famous examples include the Brahma Sutras, Yoga Sutras, or Nyāya Sutras.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 如果重复获得这件道具，每多一份桌技：空响弹，翻桌时触发的空响弹数量就会再增加 1。; "Tabla" 是印地语里的 "Table"，而经文是一种简短的印度文学体裁，用于以简明形式讲授仪式、文学、哲学、法律或其他大量概念，需要读者自行阐释。著名例子包括梵经、瑜伽经和尼亚耶经。

entries.unlock: Speak to the Tinker after completing the [[Shortcuts
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Move faster. Reloading converts goop into ammo. Old technology, but reliable. The Gungine, once revved up, emits 40x more bullets than it was rated for.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 跑得更快。装填时会把黏液变成弹药。老技术，但很可靠。喷气式枪一旦轰鸣起来，射出的子弹数量会达到它标称值的 40 倍。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires rapidly.; Increases by 2.25 while held.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射速度极快。; 持有时移动速度提高 2.25 倍。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Buckle Up If the player has Ammo Belt, continuously moving with Gungine held gives the player a yellow glow, significantly increasing Gungine's rate of fire. The glow disappears if the player stops moving. Additionally, Gungine has a chance to refund ammo upon firing.; Contractual Obligation If the player has Devolver, a pool of oil spawns underneath enemies killed using Gungine.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 系好安全带 如果玩家拥有弹药带，持有喷气式枪时持续移动会让玩家散发黄色光芒，显著提高喷气式枪的射速。玩家停止移动后光芒就会消失。此外，喷气式枪开火时有几率返还弹药。; 合同义务 如果玩家拥有 Devolver，用喷气式枪击杀的敌人脚下会生成一滩油。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Oil Sconces in the Black Powder Mine, Blobulons (and their variants), and goop Barrels in the Oubliette are all extremely useful naturally occurring sources of goop within the Gungeon.; This gun is a reference to the Vlambeer game Luftrausers, which features a bullet-firing engine of the same name.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 黑火药矿坑里的油灯、黏液怪（及其变种），以及地牢底层中的黏液桶，都是地牢里天然存在、极其有用的黏液来源。; 这把枪致敬了维兰比尔（Vlambeer）的游戏《Luftrausers》（Luftrausers），那款游戏里也有一个同名的发射子弹引擎。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: This weapon was constructed the single time the Gungeon experienced a snow day. New Gundead simply appeared with these cannons strapped to their bodies and pelted everything in sight with powdery projectiles. There were also many chipped teeth.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把武器是地牢唯一一次下雪天时造出来的。新出现的地牢亡灵就这么把这些炮管绑在身上，用雪粉般的弹体狂轰视野里的一切。顺带还磕坏了不少牙。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Frosty the Bullet Tyrant If the player has Frost Bullets, Snowballer shots increase in size and damage the further they travel.; This effect is similar to Snowballets and stacks with it, leading to rapid growth.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 雪人子弹暴君 如果玩家拥有霜子弹，雪球枪射出的雪球飞得越远，体积和伤害就越高。; 这个效果和雪球弹类似，并且可以叠加，导致雪球迅速膨胀。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The snowballs leave behind pools of water, which can be used to put out chest fuses and the fireplace in the Keep of the Lead Lord.; The Frosty the Bullet Tyrant synergy may be a reference to the boss Bleak from Donkey Kong Country 3, a snowman that throws snowballs that appear to increase in size as they travel towards the player.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 雪球会留下水洼，可以用来熄灭宝箱引线以及领主堡垒里的壁炉。; 雪人子弹暴君这个协同效果可能是在致敬《大金刚国度 3》里的布莱克（Boss Bleak），一个会扔雪球的雪人，而那些雪球看起来会随着飞向玩家而变大。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Resonates with Gundead corpses, causing them to explode. This rock is a testament to one poor soul, whose agony was so great that it still echoes in the bodies of the freshly deceased.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 它会与地牢亡灵的尸体共鸣，让它们爆炸。这块岩石见证了某个可怜灵魂的痛苦，那份痛苦如此强烈，以至于在新死之人的躯体里仍旧回响。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Causes enemy corpses to explode on use, dealing 15 damage to nearby enemies.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 使用时会让敌方尸体爆炸，对附近敌人造成 15 点伤害。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Alternative Rock If the player has Face Melter, instead of firing four streams, Face Melter fires two parallel columns of notes. Reloading fires a guitar pick with a chance to stun.; Dead Place If the player also has Mine Cutter, its damage is increased by 25%.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 另类摇滚 如果玩家拥有变脸熔炉，变脸熔炉就不再发射四股音符流，而是发射两列平行的音符。装填时会射出一枚有几率造成眩晕的吉他拨片。; 死寂之地 如果玩家同时拥有矿井切割机，其伤害提高 25%。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This item and its description are references to the character Melting from Nuclear Throne, who is able to cause corpses to explode.; The synergy Dead Place is a reference to the game Dead Space, where the first weapon is a repurposed laser used for cutting rock.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这件道具及其描述是在致敬《Nuclear Throne》（Nuclear Throne）里的角色 Melting（Melting），他能让尸体爆炸。; 死寂之地这个协同效果是在致敬《死亡空间》（Dead Space），那里的第一把武器是一束改造过、专门用来切石头的激光。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Prevents goop effects. The Siren's watery blasts can be a lifesaver when faced with toxic pools or patches of flame.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 可阻止黏液效果。遇到毒池或火焰地带时，塞壬女妖的水流射击简直能救命。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires a narrow spread of 3 water bullets, that burst into pools of water goop upon hitting an obstacle or enemy.; Prevents damage from falling into pits while held.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射 3 发窄散布的水弹，击中障碍物或敌人时会炸成水洼黏液。; 持有时可防止掉进深坑造成伤害。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Brave New World If the player also has Trident or Bionic Leg, while Siren is held, a fish companion follows the player that can block bullets and shows contents of chests without opening them.; If the player has revealed the contents of a chest, the contents of that chest will be permanently locked in as that item. If a chest with a locked-in item attempts to drop a random item when broken, it will always drop the item that was locked in, overriding the usual quality reduction.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 美丽新世界 如果玩家同时拥有三叉戟或仿生腿，持有塞壬女妖时会有一只鱼同伴跟随玩家。它可以阻挡子弹，并能在不打开宝箱的情况下显示其内容。; 如果玩家已经看到了某个宝箱的内容，那么该宝箱的内容就会永久锁定为那个道具。被锁定道具的宝箱在被破坏时如果尝试掉落随机道具，就会始终掉落锁定的那个道具，覆盖通常的品质下降规则。
entries.englishUsageNotes: As The Siren creates water, it is able to extinguish the Fireplace in the Keep of the Lead Lord, and the fuses of fused chests.; The Siren is in the SHOTGUN gun class, and as such benefits from the Shotgun Affinity synergy.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 由于塞壬女妖会制造水，因此它可以熄灭领主堡垒里的壁炉，以及已融合宝箱的引线。; 塞壬女妖属于 SHOTGUN 枪械类别，因此会受益于 Shotgun Affinity 协同效果。

entries.unlock: Reward from [[Frifle_and_the_Grey_Mauser#List_of_Quests
entries.englishGameplaySummary: The Rattler was one of Emmitt Calx's worst, and last, ideas. This is a Winchester shotgun with an extremely venomous snake wrapped around it, adding a poisonous blast to each volley. Requires extreme dexterity to reload.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 响尾蛇枪是艾米特·卡尔克斯（Emmitt Calx）最糟、也是最后的主意之一。这是一把缠着剧毒毒蛇的温彻斯特霰弹枪，每轮齐射都会附带毒性爆发。装填需要极高的灵巧度。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires 7 regular projectiles in a shotgun blast, and an instantaneous green laser that poisons enemies.; Bullets from the main shotgun blast travel smoothly, and do not have the slight speed variance seen in other shotguns like the Regular Shotgun.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 在一次霰弹枪齐射中发射 7 发普通投射物，并额外发射一道会使敌人中毒的瞬发绿色激光。; 主霰弹枪齐射中的子弹飞行很平稳，不像常规霰弹枪等其他霰弹枪那样会有轻微的速度差异。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Not So Sawed-Off If the player also has Buzzkill, Buzzkill's saw blades move slower and are linked with lightning.; Twin Snakes If the player also has Snakemaker, all of the Rattler's shots become beams that have a chance to poison and the Snakemaker's shots gain a homing effect.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 不那么截短 如果玩家同时拥有锯枪，锯枪的锯片会移动得更慢，并且会连上闪电。; 双生蛇 如果玩家同时拥有制蛇者，响尾蛇枪的所有射击都会变成有几率使敌人中毒的光束，而制蛇者的射击则会获得追踪效果。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Despite visually appearing to be and firing like a shotgun, the Rattler is not a part of the SHOTGUN gun class and as such does not benefit from the Shotgun Affinity synergy.; The pickup line, "Snakes on A Gun," is a reference to the film Snakes on a Plane.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 尽管响尾蛇枪看起来和开火方式都像霰弹枪，但它并不属于 SHOTGUN 枪械类别，因此不会享受 Shotgun Affinity 协同效果。; 提示语 “Snakes on A Gun”（Snakes on A Gun）是对电影《Snakes on a Plane》（Snakes on a Plane）的引用。

entries.unlock: Defeat a Jammed [[Bosses
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Feeds upon curse. One of three artifacts that led to the creation of the Jammed. As their curses grow louder, Kaliber smiles upon the bearer of this portentous omen.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 它以诅咒为食。它是促成“狂热者”诞生的三件神器之一。随着诅咒声愈发响亮，卡利伯会向这凶兆的持有者投以微笑。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Reduces the cooldown of active items by 5% per point of Curse up to a maximum of 50%.; This cooldown reduction stacks with the effects of Coolness, but is still capped to a 50% reduction even when combined.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 每点诅咒会使主动道具的冷却缩短 5%，最多可缩短 50%。; 这项冷却缩减会与潇洒值的效果叠加，但即便结合使用，减免仍然上限为 50%。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Hellhole If the player has Singularity, Singularity spawns a hell portal that sucks enemies in and deals high damage.; Just Like The Real Thing If the player also has Shotgrub, Shotgrub's bullets will behave like those of the Shotgrub enemy, splitting into wavy bullets upon hitting a wall or enemy.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 地狱洞 如果玩家拥有奇点，奇点会生成一个地狱传送门，把敌人吸进去并造成高额伤害。; 就和真货一样 如果玩家同时拥有射蛆，射蛆的子弹会变成和射蛆敌人一样的行为，在撞到墙或敌人后分裂成波浪子弹。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This item can be purchased from Cursula, and doing so is more beneficial than any other means of obtaining the item. Because Cursula gives 2.5 Curse every time an item is purchased, buying the Sixth Chamber from her results in it gaining a substantial boost in initial power.; It is sufficient to kill just one jammed Trigger Twin in order to unlock the item. Killing minibosses, such as Fuselier, while they're jammed, will also unlock the item.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这件道具可以从库苏拉那里购买，而且这么做比任何其他获取方式都更划算。因为库苏拉每卖出一件道具都会给予 2.5 点诅咒，所以从她那里购买第六膛室会让它的初始强度获得相当可观的提升。; 只要击杀一只狂热触发双子就足以解锁这件道具。击杀像缝合怪这类小 Boss 时，如果它们处于狂热状态，也会解锁这件道具。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Use to toss. Cannot be carried through a dodge roll. This television is extremely heavy. It is also extremely broken. These are not useful qualities for traversing a timeless, bullet-filled dungeon.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 用于投掷。无法在翻滚中携带。这台电视极其沉重，也坏得很彻底。对于穿行在一个没有时间、遍地子弹的地牢里来说，这些都不是什么有用的特性。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Upon use, the television is thrown in the direction of the cursor. This does not deal damage to enemies.; Dropped upon dodge rolling.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 使用时，电视会朝鼠标指针方向被扔出去。它不会对敌人造成伤害。; 翻滚时会掉落。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The television can be stolen from any room by the Resourceful Rat, but only after the player enters the elevator maintenance shaft room for the first time in the run. Do not enter this room until you are ready to pick up the television! If you exit the room without picking up the television, the rat may steal it while you are elsewhere.; If the player scares away the Resourceful Rat from stealing the Busted Television, he does not become "scared away" from the room. As long as it is on the ground, he will repeatedly return to the room when the player leaves and attempt to steal it, ad infinitum.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这台电视可以被机灵老鼠从任何房间偷走，但前提是玩家本轮第一次进入电梯维护竖井房间之后才算数。在准备好捡起电视之前，不要进入这个房间！如果你离开房间时没捡起电视，老鼠可能会在你不在的时候把它偷走。; 如果玩家把机灵老鼠吓跑，阻止他偷走损坏的电视，他也不会真的从房间里“scared away”（scared away）。只要电视还躺在地上，只要玩家离开房间，他就会反复回来尝试偷走它，永无止境。

entries.unlock: Defeat the High Dragun with The Robot.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Electrifies all bullets fired. Increases accuracy. The shock troops of the Hegemony of Man consist entirely of heartless machines, shielded from voltage attacks. Their victims however, have learned to fear the inevitable sting of their electrified shells.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 让所有射出的子弹都带电。提高精准度。人类霸权的冲锋队全由无心的机器组成，免疫电压攻击；而他们的受害者则已经学会畏惧那些带电外壳不可避免的刺痛。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Causes water that bullets pass over to become electrified, damaging enemies.; Decreases shot spread by 50%, doubling accuracy.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 会让子弹经过的水面带电，从而伤害敌人。; 将散布降低 50%，使精准度翻倍。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Removed: If the player has Shock Rifle, shot speed is doubled. Likely removed because it includes a starting item.; Cannot be dropped when playing as The Robot.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 移除：如果玩家拥有电击步枪，射速会翻倍。之所以可能被移除，大概是因为它包含一个初始道具。; 作为机器人进行游戏时，这件道具不能被丢弃。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Sprays an area with liquid coolant. Useful for putting out fires or electrifying areas!
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 向一片区域喷洒液态冷却剂。无论是灭火还是给区域通电都很好用！
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Sprays water forward.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 向前喷射水流。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Cannot be obtained by any Gungeoneer other than The Robot.; Cannot be manually dropped, but will be forcibly dropped if another active item is obtained.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 只有机器人（The Robot）能获得这件道具。; 它不能被手动丢弃，但如果获得了另一个主动道具，就会被强制丢弃。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Baked fresh every morning by Mom! It's to die for! Or, just maybe, to live for.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 妈妈每天早上现烤！好吃到让人想死！或者，也许更适合说，好吃到值得活着。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Upon use, resurrects a dead Co-op player with full health.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 使用后，可让一名死亡的合作模式玩家满血复活。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This item is exclusive to co-op mode and cannot be found via normal gameplay.; If cheated into the player's inventory in singleplayer, the Friendship Cookie can be used with no effect.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这件道具仅限合作模式，正常游玩中无法获得。; 如果在单人模式里通过作弊把它塞进背包，友谊饼干可以使用，但不会产生任何效果。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: An elegant weapon... though perhaps obsolete.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 一把优雅的武器……不过也许已经过时了。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun, if spawned through mods or cheats, disappears on being picked up.; It likely would have increased Curse by some amount.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪如果通过模组或作弊刷出，捡起后就会消失。; 它本来很可能会增加一定量的诅咒。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Who needs bullets when you ARE a bullet? Provides immunity to contact damage, and rolling into enemies deals increased damage.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 当你自己就是一颗子弹时，谁还需要子弹？提供接触伤害免疫，而且翻滚撞向敌人时会造成更高伤害。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Grants contact damage immunity.; This does not prevent Muzzle Wisps and Muzzle Flares from setting the player on fire on contact.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 赋予接触伤害免疫。; 这并不能阻止枪口幽火（Muzzle Wisps）和枪口火焰（Muzzle Flares）在接触时把玩家点燃。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This item is unique to The Bullet and cannot be acquired by other Gungeoneers.; Even with this item, Gatling Gulls melee swipe and Wallmongers body still deal contact damage.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这件道具是子弹的专属道具，其他地牢枪手无法获得。; 即便有这件道具，机枪鸥的近战挥击和墙中人（Wallmongers）的身体依然会造成接触伤害。

entries.unlock: Defeat the High Dragun as The Bullet.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Betrayer!
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 叛徒！
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires a piercing rainbow sword projectile when swung.; This projectile is only spawned if the player is at full health. The Robot is never considered at full health, and as such, cannot fire the sword projecitle.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 挥动时会发射一道可穿透的彩虹剑投射物。; 只有在玩家满血时才会生成这枚投射物。机器人永远不会被视为满血，因此无法发射这把剑投射物。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Professor Goopton for 7 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Creates poison on dodge roll, also grants immunity to poison.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 翻滚时会制造毒素，同时也提供毒素免疫。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Dodge rolling leaves a trail of poison goop.; Grants immunity to poison.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 翻滚会留下一条毒黏液轨迹。; 提供毒素免疫。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Buggin' Out If the player has Gungeon Ant, while it is held, Bug Boots spread oil instead of poison, and the player becomes immune to fire.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 发霉大作战 如果玩家拥有地牢蚁，持有它时，臭虫靴子会散播油而不是毒素，并让玩家免疫火焰伤害。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Use of this item allows the player to spread poison over the entrance to Bullet Hell, despite there visually being no ground to spread it on.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 使用这件道具可以让玩家把毒素散播到子弹地狱入口处，尽管那里视觉上并没有可供散播的地面。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Adds one heart container.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 增加一个红心容器。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Grants a heart container.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 赋予一个红心容器。
entries.englishUsageNotes: All Out Of Law If the player has Colt 1851, it fires three tight spreads of three bullets upon reloading. These projectiles can ignore tables when fired from behind them, and they can reveal secret rooms without angering the shopkeeper Bello.; Finger on the Pulse If the player has Pulse Cannon, upon taking damage, three miniature Pulse cannons briefly spawn around the player and fire at enemies.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 无法无天 如果玩家拥有柯尔特1851，重新装填时会射出三组紧密排列、每组 3 发的子弹。这些投射物从桌子后方射出时不会受桌子阻挡，而且还能在不惹恼店主 Bello 的情况下揭示隐藏房间。; 指尖脉搏 如果玩家拥有脉冲炮，在受到伤害时，玩家周围会短暂生成三门微型脉冲炮并向敌人开火。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 5 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Adds one heart container. The miners who originally dug out the Black Powder Mines carried their meals in boxes like these.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 增加一个红心容器。最早挖掘黑火药矿坑的矿工们，就是用这种盒子装饭的。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Grants a heart container.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 赋予一个红心容器。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Finger on the Pulse If the player also has Pulse Cannon and takes damage, three miniature Pulse Cannons spawn around the player and fire at enemies, before disappearing.; Heart-Shaped Box If the player also has Lament Configurum, it will heal the player instead of dealing damage.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 指尖脉搏 如果玩家同时拥有脉冲炮并受到伤害，玩家周围会生成三门微型脉冲炮向敌人开火，随后消失。; 心形盒子 如果玩家同时拥有悲伤拼图盒，它会为玩家治疗而不是造成伤害。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 4 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Adds one heart container. This heart-shaped locket contains a faded photo of two lovers embracing. Perhaps it once reminded a Gungeoneer of a past they hoped to change.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 增加一个红心容器。这个心形小盒里装着一张褪色的照片，照片中是一对相拥的恋人。也许它曾让某位枪牢勇士想起那段他们希望改写的过往。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Grants a heart container.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 赋予一个红心容器。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Finger on the Pulse If the player also has Pulse Cannon and takes damage, three miniature Pulse Cannons spawn around the player and fire at enemies, before disappearing.; Despite being able to be found in C and A rank chests, it will always have to be bought from a store at B rank price.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 指尖脉搏 如果玩家同时拥有脉冲炮并受到伤害，玩家周围会生成三门微型脉冲炮向敌人开火，随后消失。; 尽管它也能在 C 级和 A 级宝箱中找到，但它始终必须以 B 级商店价格购买。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 2 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: This handy carrying device adds one heart container. It also opens on both sides for easy cleaning.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这个便利的携带装置会增加一个红心容器。它还会在两侧打开，方便清洁。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Grants a heart container.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 赋予一个红心容器。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Finger on the Pulse With Pulse Cannon, upon taking damage, three miniature Pulse Cannons briefly appear around the player and fire at enemies.; Despite being able to be found in C and A rank chests, it will always have to be bought from a store at B rank price.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 指尖脉搏 如果玩家拥有脉冲炮，在受到伤害时，玩家周围会短暂出现三门微型脉冲炮并向敌人开火。; 尽管它也能在 C 级和 A 级宝箱中找到，但它始终必须以 B 级商店价格购买。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 4 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: A bag carried by a stylish Gungeoneer. Adds one heart container.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 一位时髦的地牢枪手随身携带的包。增加一个红心容器。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Grants a heart container.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 赋予一个红心容器。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Finger on the Pulse With Pulse Cannon, upon taking damage, three miniature Pulse Cannons briefly appear around the player and fire at enemies.; Queen of Hearts If the player also has the Coin Crown, touching heart pickups while at full health will turn them into coin.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 指尖脉搏 如果玩家拥有脉冲炮，在受到伤害时，玩家周围会短暂出现三门微型脉冲炮并向敌人开火。; 红心女王 如果玩家同时拥有硬币王冠，在满血时接触红心补给会把它们变成金币。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Despite being able to be found in C and A rank chests, it will always have to be bought from a store at B rank price.; Like all heart container items, The Robot will receive 5 to 10 coin instead.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 尽管它也能在 C 级和 A 级宝箱中找到，但它始终必须以 B 级商店价格购买。; 和所有红心容器类道具一样，机器人（The Robot）会改为获得 5 到 10 枚金币。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Highly caffeinated, save the cap.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 咖啡因含量超高，记得保留瓶盖。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Increases by 1.5.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 移动速度提高 1.5 倍。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Five O'Clock Somewhere If the player also has Crestfaller, reloading will fire a glass bottle that has a chance to stun enemies hit. Reloading Crestfaller while standing on a liquid replenishes the ammo missing in the current magazine, similar to Gungine.; Shotgun Affinity If the player also has Shotgun Coffee, all weapons in the SHOTGUN gun class gain piercing, increased knockback, and increased shot speed.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 五点钟某处 如果玩家同时拥有沮丧之枪，装填时会发射一个玻璃瓶，被命中的敌人有几率眩晕。站在液体上装填沮丧之枪时，还会像喷气式枪一样补回当前弹匣缺失的弹药。; 霰弹亲和 如果玩家同时拥有霰弹咖啡，SHOTGUN 枪械类别的所有武器都会获得穿透、额外击退和更快的射速。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The name and effect of this item are a reference to the caffeinated German chocolate Scho-Ka-Kola, which was initially advertised as an athletic performance enhancer in the 1930s. It would later go on to be a stimulant to boost wakefulness and alertness for pilots, tank crews, and U-boat operators in Nazi Germany during World War II.; The Ammonomicon description "save the cap" is a reference to the Fallout franchise, where the caps of beverages such as Nuka-Cola are used as currency.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这件道具的名称和效果是在致敬含咖啡因的德国巧克力 Scho-Ka-Kola（Scho-Ka-Kola），这款产品最早在 20 世纪 30 年代被宣传为一种提升运动表现的补剂。后来它又在二战期间被纳粹德国的飞行员、坦克乘员和 U 型（U）潜艇操作员当作提神醒脑的兴奋剂。; 枪弹百科中的描述 “save the cap”（save the cap）是对《辐射》系列的致敬，在那个系列里，Nuka-Cola（Nuka-Cola）等饮料的瓶盖被当作货币。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Highly caffeinated, with just a hint of gunpowder. Don't drink more than 99 cups.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 咖啡因含量极高，还带着一点点火药味。别喝超过 99 杯。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Increases by 1.2.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 移动速度提高 1.2 倍。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Somewhere If the player also has Crestfaller, reloading it will fire a glass bottle that has a chance to stun enemies hit. Reloading Crestfaller while standing on a liquid replenishes the ammo missing in the current magazine, similar to Gungine.; Shotgun Affinity If the player also has Shotga Cola, all weapons in the SHOTGUN gun class gain piercing, increased knockback, and increased shot speed.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 某处 如果玩家同时拥有沮丧之枪，装填时会发射一个玻璃瓶，被命中的敌人有几率眩晕。站在液体上装填沮丧之枪时，还会像喷气式枪一样补回当前弹匣缺失的弹药。; 霰弹亲和 如果玩家同时拥有霰弹可乐，SHOTGUN 枪械类别的所有武器都会获得穿透、额外击退和更快的射速。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This item's description is a reference to Futurama where Fry drinks 100 cups of coffee, which causes him to move at extreme speeds.; "Shotgun" coffee may be a reference to so-called "Bulletproof" coffee, in which mixing unsalted butter into a cup of hot coffee is said to enhance mental clarity.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这件道具的描述是在致敬《飞出个未来》，其中弗莱（Fry）喝下 100 杯咖啡后以极快的速度移动。; “Shotgun”（Shotgun）咖啡可能是在致敬所谓的 “Bulletproof”（Bulletproof）咖啡，也就是把无盐黄油混进热咖啡里，据说能提升思维清晰度。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Professor Goopton for 7 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Creates poison on dodge roll, also grants immunity to poison.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 翻滚时会制造毒素，同时也提供毒素免疫。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Dodge rolling leaves a trail of poison goop.; Grants immunity to poison.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 翻滚会留下一条毒黏液轨迹。; 提供毒素免疫。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Buggin' Out If the player has Gungeon Ant, while it is held, Bug Boots spread oil instead of poison, and the player becomes immune to fire.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 发霉大作战 如果玩家拥有地牢蚁，持有它时，臭虫靴子会散播油而不是毒素，并让玩家免疫火焰伤害。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Use of this item allows the player to spread poison over the entrance to Bullet Hell, despite there visually being no ground to spread it on.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 使用这件道具可以让玩家把毒素散播到子弹地狱入口处，尽管那里视觉上并没有可供散播的地面。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Slows enemy projectiles. Greatly increases reaction times, with few side effects. Commonly used by rebel forces before raids on Hegemony outposts.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 减缓敌方投射物。极大提升反应时间，副作用很少。叛军在突袭人类霸权前哨前常常会使用它。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Decreases enemy bullet speed by 20%.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 使敌方子弹速度降低 20%。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Hidden Tech Time If the player also has Table Tech Sight, flipping a table briefly stops time.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 隐秘科技：停时 如果玩家同时拥有桌技：视域，翻桌会短暂停止时间。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This item can be counterproductive; since bullets are slower than usual, the time the bullets are in midair is increased, meaning the player can run into bullets that would have already disappeared without Liquid Valkyrie. This is noticeable when fighting Old King while he does his spinning attack; the bullets move slower at the same spread, making it harder to navigate through the gaps. The same applies to Bloody Eye.; The name and Ammonomicon quote of this item are references to Max Payne, specifically the performance-enhancing drug Valkyr.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这件道具有时会适得其反；由于子弹比平时更慢，子弹在空中停留的时间会更长，这意味着如果没有液体奥丁女武神，玩家本可躲开的子弹反而更容易撞上来。和老国王释放旋转攻击时交火，这一点尤其明显；子弹会在相同散布下移动得更慢，让人更难从缝隙中穿过去。血红之眼也一样。; 这件道具的名称和枪弹百科引言是在致敬《马克斯·佩恩》（Max Payne），尤其是那种名为 Valkyr（Valkyr）的增强表现药物。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: These bees have been carefully trained to hunt down enemy munitions... and destroy them.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这些蜜蜂经过精心训练，专门追猎敌方弹药……并将其摧毁。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Throws a jar that shatters upon hitting the floor, releasing a swarm of angry bees that seek out and attack nearby enemies.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 扔出一个罐子，罐子在碰到地面时会破裂，释放出一群愤怒的蜜蜂，它们会寻找并攻击附近敌人。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Bee Plus If the player has Honeycomb, taking damage causes Honeycomb to spawn red wasps, which travel faster and deal more damage than regular bees.; Hidden Tech Bees If the player has Table Tech Blanks, a swarm of bees replaces enemy bullets when a table is flipped.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 蜂群增强 如果玩家拥有蜂窝，受到伤害时蜂窝会生成红黄蜂，它们比普通蜜蜂飞得更快、伤害也更高。; 隐藏科技：蜜蜂 如果玩家拥有桌技：空响弹，翻桌时会用一群蜜蜂替换敌方子弹。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The thrown jar must impact the ground in order to shatter and release the bees inside. If the jar is tossed into a pit, the jar will not shatter and no bees will be released.; The Ammonomicon quote and entry of this item are a reference to the character "The Pain" from Metal Gear Solid 3 who uses bees to attack.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这个被扔出的罐子必须撞到地面才会破碎并释放出里面的蜜蜂。如果罐子被丢进深坑，它就不会破碎，也不会放出任何蜜蜂。; 这件道具在枪弹百科中的引言和条目是在致敬《合金装备 3》里名为 “The Pain”（The Pain）的角色，他会用蜜蜂发动攻击。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Provides temporary invulnerability. This is a shooting star which has been embalmed and stuffed with soft fuzz. Tape several to your body and be safe from harm.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 提供短暂无敌。这是一颗被防腐处理并塞满柔软绒毛的流星。往身上贴上几颗，就能免受伤害。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: While active, makes the player rainbow-colored and invincible to most forms of damage.; Pits and flame traps can still harm the player.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 激活时会让玩家变成彩虹色，并对大多数伤害免疫。; 深坑和火焰陷阱仍然会伤到玩家。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Double Rainbow If the player also has Unicorn Horn, while Stuffed Star is active, the player will emit 5 rainbow beams in a star pattern.; Softshell If the player is holding Brick Breaker, while Stuffed Star is active, Brick Breaker shells are continually fired in random directions.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 双重彩虹 如果玩家同时拥有独角兽之角，激活毛绒星星时，玩家会以星形图案射出 5 道彩虹光束。; 软壳 如果玩家手持砖块破坏者，激活毛绒星星时，砖块破坏者的弹壳会持续向随机方向发射。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Despite being immune to the damage of enemy bullets, the player will still be dealt a small amount of knockback when colliding with them.; Prior to the Supply Drop Update, Stuffed Star was a C item.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 尽管玩家免疫敌方子弹造成的伤害，但与它们碰撞时仍会受到少量击退。; 在“空投补给”更新之前，毛绒星星曾是 C 级道具。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Deals damage to enemies when bearer is wounded. Whosoever wields this idol will have swift vengeance visited upon any who trespass against them.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 当持有者受伤时会对敌人造成伤害。无论是谁挥舞这枚偶像，凡敢冒犯之人都将迅速迎来报应。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Taking damage deals 45 damage to all enemies in the room.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 受到伤害会对房间内所有敌人造成 45 点伤害。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Critcaliber If the player also has Vorpal Gun, after taking damage with the gun held, the next Vorpal Gun shot is guaranteed to be a critical shot.; Devil's Plaything If the player also has Armor of Thorns, Bullet Idol orbits the player, blocking enemy shots. Any enemy shots blocked by Bullet Idol cause 10 damage to every enemy in the room.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 致命卡利伯 如果玩家同时拥有斩首枪，且在持枪时受到伤害，那么下一发斩首枪射击必定是暴击。; 魔鬼玩物 如果玩家同时拥有荆棘之甲，子弹偶像会环绕玩家旋转并阻挡敌方射击。被子弹偶像挡下的敌方子弹会对房间内每个敌人造成 10 点伤害。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Prior to the Supply Drop Update, Bullet Idol dealt 15 damage instead of 45.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 在“空投补给”更新之前，子弹偶像造成的伤害是 15 点而不是 45 点。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Spending money soothes the soul. The power of commerce fills your veins... and your follicles! This mustache vertically integrates your purchasing synergies, giving you a chance to be healed on every transaction.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 花钱能抚慰心灵。商业的力量流淌进你的血管……以及毛囊！这条胡子会把你的购买联动向上整合，让你在每次交易时都有机会得到治疗。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Grants a ?% chance to heal the player for half a heart upon purchasing an item.; Has no effect if the player is playing as The Robot.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 购买道具时有 ?% 的概率为玩家回复半颗红心。; 如果玩家使用的是机器人（The Robot），则没有效果。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Block Party If the player has Brick Breaker, the size of its shells is increased by 50%, and their damage is increased by 25%.; http://merch.devolverdigital.com If the player also has Microtransaction Gun, its damage is doubled.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 砖块派对 如果玩家拥有砖块破坏者，它的弹壳体积提高 50%，伤害提高 25%。; Devolver 数字商店（merch.devolverdigital.com） 如果玩家同时拥有微交易枪，其伤害会翻倍。

entries.unlock: Defeat the Old King.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Dodge roll is replaced with a blink. This simple scarf was once worn by a skilled assassin. Betrayed by his brothers and assumed dead...
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 翻滚被替换为一次闪现。这条简单的围巾曾经属于一名技艺高超的刺客。被兄弟出卖，并被认为已经死去……
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Replaces the dodge roll with a teleport.; Pressing the dodge button teleports the player a short distance in the direction they are moving.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 将翻滚替换为一次传送。; 按下翻滚键会让玩家沿着当前移动方向传送一小段距离。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Raizo's Stuff If the player also has Grappling Hook, bullets shot while being pulled with the grappling hook gain homing.; Venom Veins If the player also has Mutation, Mutation poisons enemies.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 雷佐的装备（Raizo's Stuff） 如果玩家同时拥有抓钩，被抓钩拉动时射出的子弹会获得追踪效果。; 毒脉 如果玩家同时拥有变异手臂，变异手臂会使敌人中毒。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Can be used to blink through locked doors which otherwise require the player to use a key or stand on a pressure plate to open.; Does not work if the door is facing downward.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 可以用来闪现穿过上锁的门，而这些门本来需要玩家使用钥匙或站在压力板上才能打开。; 如果门朝下则无法使用。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Greatly increases accuracy. These anxiolytic drugs are favored by long-distance snipers, especially in the cold. They won't get rid of shaking hands entirely, but are more effective than holding your breath.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 大幅提高精准度。这类抗焦虑药深受远距离狙击手青睐，尤其在寒冷环境中。它们并不能彻底消除手抖，但比憋气更有效。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Reduces bullet spread by 66%, increasing accuracy.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 将子弹散布降低 66%，提高精准度。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Diazepam, Bow, Hegemony Rifle, Hexagun, Laser Rifle, M1, Sniper Rifle, or Winchester Rifle Increases damage by 50% while any of the synergising weapons are held.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 地西泮（Diazepam）、弓、帝国步枪、六角枪、激光步枪、鲁布-亚达因型2号、狙击步枪或温彻斯特步枪 只要持有任意一种协同武器，伤害就会提高 50%。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This item is a reference to similar muscle relaxant drugs in the Metal Gear Solid series, such as Diazepam or Pentazemin.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这件道具是在致敬《合金装备》系列里类似的肌肉松弛剂药物，例如 地西泮（Diazepam） 或 Pentazemin（Pentazemin）。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Distracts enemies, then explodes. Invented by Winchester but eventually discarded in frustration after he spent hours trying to coax someone into playing his game, only to find it was his own decoy.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 先吸引敌人注意，然后爆炸。由温彻斯特发明，但在他花了几个小时哄别人来玩他的游戏、最后却发现那只是自己的诱饵后，最终愤而弃用。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Places a decoy that enemies will target. The decoy will explode after taking enough damage or after roughly 11 seconds, dealing 30 damage to nearby enemies.; Can be used to steal from shops while placed (until it explodes).
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 放置一个会吸引敌人攻击的诱饵。诱饵在承受足够伤害后，或者大约 11 秒后会爆炸，对附近敌人造成 30 点伤害。; 放置期间可以用来偷店里的东西（直到它爆炸为止）。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Deadlier Distraction If the player also has Monster Blood, the Explosive Decoy explodes and creates a large poison pool when attacked.; Decoy Octorok If the player also has Abyssal Tentacle, the decoy will become a charmed enemy.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 更致命的干扰 如果玩家同时拥有怪物血，炸弹诱饵在被攻击时会爆炸并生成一大滩毒池。; 诱饵章鱼 如果玩家同时拥有深渊触手，诱饵会变成一个被魅惑的敌人。

entries.unlock: Complete Boss Rush.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Deals a large amount of damage to all enemies in a room. A remnant from when the Gungeon was being built. Gungeon architects would use these artifacts to quickly make their way through Gundead infested chambers. Though this one has lost a portion of its power to the ages, it is still a potent weapon.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 对房间内所有敌人造成大量伤害。它是地牢建造时期留下的遗物。地牢建筑师会利用这些神器快速穿过布满地牢亡灵的房间。虽然这件道具因岁月流逝而失去了一部分力量，但它仍然是一件强力武器。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Deals 150 damage to all enemies in the room.; Prevents additional enemy waves from spawning when used.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 对房间内所有敌人造成 150 点伤害。; 使用时可阻止额外敌潮生成。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Hacker Increases damage by 25% while the Lower Case r is held.; Square Brace If the player also has Polaris, it gains 20% increased damage, higher ammo capacity and magazine size, faster fire rate, and a new appearance.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 黑客 如果玩家手持小写字母 r（r），伤害提高 25%。; 方括号 如果玩家同时拥有北极星，它会获得 20% 的伤害加成、更高的弹药量和弹匣容量、更快的射速，以及全新的外观。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Thrown guns will explode (without destroying them), dealing 30 damage to all nearby enemies.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 被扔出的枪会爆炸（但不会被摧毁），对附近所有敌人造成 30 点伤害。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Thrown guns will explode (without destroying them), dealing 30 damage to all nearby enemies.; Guns can be thrown by holding the fire button with an empty gun equipped.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 被扔出的枪会爆炸（但不会被摧毁），对附近所有敌人造成 30 点伤害。; 装备空枪时按住开火键即可投掷枪械。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Alternative Rock If the player has Face Melter, instead of firing four streams, Face Melter fires two parallel columns of notes. Reloading fires a guitar pick with a chance to stun.; Backdraft Touching enemies sets them on fire.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 另类摇滚 如果玩家拥有变脸熔炉，变脸熔炉就不再发射四股音符流，而是发射两列平行的音符。装填时会射出一枚有几率造成眩晕的吉他拨片。; 回燃 接触敌人会把他们点燃。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Thrown Guns must still be manually re-collected before leaving the room, otherwise they will be stolen by the Resourceful Rat.; Only real guns that are actually thrown by the player will count for the Ruby Bracelet. Projectiles that are sprited to resemble thrown guns, like those of the Bullet or Slinger will not count.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 离开房间前，扔出的枪仍然必须手动捡回，否则会被机灵老鼠偷走。; 只有玩家实际扔出去的真枪才会计入红宝石手链的判定。那些只是做成了被扔出去的枪样子的投射物，例如子弹或甩枪发出的投射物，都不算数。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The emeralds in this bracelet are extremely jealous. They will force any thrown gun to return, just so no other hand can hold them.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这颗祖母绿手链里的祖母绿嫉妒心极强。它们会强迫任何被扔出的枪飞回来，只为不让别的手碰到它们。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Thrown guns slide back towards the player across the floor for easier collection.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 被扔出的枪会沿着地面滑回玩家身边，便于回收。
entries.englishUsageNotes: It is unknown why this item was cut.; On 28/03/2016, Dodge Roll developer Brent Sodman teased the behaviour of the Emerald Bracelet in a gif posted to twitter with the caption "bonk".
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 不清楚这件道具为何被删减。; 2016 年 3 月 28 日，Dodge Roll（Dodge Roll）开发者 Brent Sodman（Brent Sodman）在推特（Twitter）上发了一张动图，配文为 “bonk”（bonk），借此预告翡翠手链的表现。

entries.unlock: Kill Blockner.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: A policeman's badge. It belongs to the officer on duty in the Gungeon's precinct. It seems to be well worn. Whoever owns this badge is probably close to retirement.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 一枚警徽。它属于地牢辖区值勤警员。看起来已经很旧了。拥有这枚警徽的人大概也快退休了。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Detective Mode If the player has 38 Special, its maximum ammo is increased, its reload time is halved, and its damage is increased by 20%. The police officer will also show the contents of nearby chests while 38 Special is held.; If the player has revealed the contents of a chest, the contents of that chest will be permanently locked in as that item. If a chest with a locked-in item attempts to drop a random item when broken, it will always drop the item that was locked in, overriding the usual quality reduction.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 侦探模式 如果玩家持有 38 特种手枪（38特种手枪），其最大弹药会增加，换弹时间减半，伤害提高 20%。这名警员还会在玩家持有 38 特种手枪（38特种手枪）时显示附近宝箱中的内容。; 如果玩家已经看到了某个宝箱里的内容，那么那个宝箱里的物品就会被永久锁定为该物品。若某个锁定了物品的宝箱在被打碎时尝试掉落随机道具，它总会掉出锁定的物品，覆盖通常的品质衰减。
entries.englishUsageNotes: While the police officers health is not insignificant, his inability to dodge enemy bullets makes him very vulnerable.; Because of this, Badge essentially only gives 20% damage up at the cost of curse, making it worse than even lower-rarity items such as +1 Bullets
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 虽然这名警员的生命值并不算低，但他不会躲子弹，所以非常脆弱。; 因此，警徽本质上只是在付出诅咒代价的情况下提供 20% 伤害加成，甚至不如 +1 子弹这类更低稀有度的道具。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Trorc for 20 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Nuclear arms were forbidden by the Third Interstellar Armistice, but as large sections of the Gungeon existed before that accord was signed, it is a bit of a grey area legally.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 核武器在《第三次星际停战协定》下被禁止，但地牢很大一部分在该协定签署前就已存在，所以从法律上说有点打擦边球。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Calls down a missile at the crosshair, causing a large nuclear explosion that deals 150 damage and leaves behind a large pool of poison goop.; Enemies within a large radius of the explosion turn into Mutant Bullet Kin. This effect can transform enemies that are normally invulnerable, such as Gunreapers.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 在准星位置呼叫一枚导弹，引发一次巨大的核爆，造成 150 点伤害，并留下大块毒液池。; 爆炸范围内的敌人会变成突变子弹枪兵。这一效果甚至能把本来免疫的敌人也变过去，比如枪魂收割者（Gunreapers）。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Meltdown If the player also has Gamma Ray, Gamma Ray branches twice to form a spread of 5 beams, and using Big Boy refills 100 ammo on the Gamma Ray. Ammo restoration only works if Gamma Ray is held when activating Big Boy.; Natural Selection If the player also has Evolver, it evolves after every 3 unique enemy types killed instead of 5.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 熔毁（Meltdown） 如果玩家同时拥有伽玛射线，伽玛射线会分叉两次形成 5 道光束，使用大男孩时还会为伽玛射线补充 100 发弹药。只有在发动大男孩时手持伽玛射线时，补充弹药才会生效。; 自然选择（Natural Selection） 如果玩家同时拥有进化枪，它会在每击杀 3 种不同的敌人后进化一次，而不是 5 种。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The damage done upon use will contribute to its recharge, even without Ice Cube.; The Big Boy's explosion transforming enemies into Mutant Bullet Kin is a reference to the mutagenic effects of radiation, such as would contaminate the environment in the wake of a nuclear explosion.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这件道具造成的伤害也会计入其充能，即使没有冰块（Ice Cube）也是如此。; 大男孩的爆炸会把敌人变成突变子弹枪兵（Mutant Bullet Kin），这参考了辐射造成的变异效应，比如核爆过后污染环境的情形。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: This trident is immaculately crafted, and powerful runes etched into its length allow it to channel mighty bullet magics. Sometimes when the Gungeon shifts, entire regions are submerged.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把三叉戟做工极其精美，长度上刻着强大的符文，使它能够导引强力的子弹魔法。有时地牢会发生位移，整片区域都会被淹没。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires an extremely fast moving ray of light that can pierce once.; While reloading, nearby enemy bullets are destroyed, and nearby enemies are pushed away from the player.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射一道速度极快的光束，能够穿透一次。; 装填时会摧毁附近敌方子弹，并把附近敌人推离玩家。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Brave New World If the player also has Siren, while it is held, a fish companion follows the player that can block bullets and shows contents of chests without opening them.; If the player has revealed the contents of a chest, the contents of that chest will be permanently locked in as that item. If a chest with a locked-in item attempts to drop a random item when broken, it will always drop the item that was locked in, overriding the usual quality reduction.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 壮丽新世界（Brave New World） 如果玩家同时拥有塞壬女妖，在持有时会有一只鱼伙伴跟随玩家，它既能挡子弹，也能在不打开宝箱的情况下显示宝箱内容。; 如果玩家已经看到了某个宝箱里的内容，那么那个宝箱里的物品就会被永久锁定为该物品。若某个锁定了物品的宝箱在被打碎时尝试掉落随机道具，它总会掉出锁定的物品，覆盖通常的品质衰减。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Spamming the fire button while dodge rolling causes the gun to fire considerably faster for a brief time after the dodge roll has concluded.; This weapon emits light from its tip, illuminating a small area.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 在翻滚时狂按开火键，会让枪在翻滚结束后的短时间内射得快得多。; 这把武器会从枪口发光，照亮一小片区域。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The Scrambler fires unhatched bullet eggs, each close to hatching. Upon impact, a swarm of newborn bullets is released, hungry for their first meal!
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把武器发射尚未孵化的子弹蛋，每颗都已接近孵化。命中后会释放一群刚出生的子弹，迫不及待想吃第一顿饭！
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires eggs which hatch into 5 270 bullets on impact.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射会在命中时孵化成 5 到 270 发子弹的蛋。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Bacon and Eggs Player Projectile Speed is increased by 50% while the Scrambler is held.; Bullet or the Egg Scrambler shots become larger and split into 10 seekers instead of 5.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 培根和鸡蛋（Bacon and Eggs） 持有爬行者（The Scrambler）时，玩家投射物速度提高 50%。; 子弹（子弹枪） 或 鸡蛋爬行者（Egg Scrambler） 的射击会变得更大，并分裂成 10 个追踪弹，而不是 5 个。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The seeking pellets will always track the enemy closest to the player, not those closest to the point of impact.; The seeking pellets from the egg can be caught by Gunjurers, and will retain their homing, making them a formidable threat.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 追踪弹会始终锁定离玩家最近的敌人，而不是离命中点最近的敌人。; 蛋中孵出的追踪弹也能被地牢法师（Gunjurers）接住，并保留追踪效果，让它们变成极具威胁的存在。

entries.unlock: Defeat the boss of the Keep of the Lead Lord without getting hit.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Use to block bullets. This old and battered shield has seen better days, but it still gets the job done. A useful addition to any Gungoneer's arsenal when used in moderation. Shields are nice, but not if they engender passivity.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 用来挡子弹。这面老旧破损的盾牌早已风光不再，但还能把活干好。适度使用时，它是任何持枪者武库里都很有用的补充。盾牌当然不错，但前提是别让人变得只会龟缩。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Pulls up a shield that protects the player from bullets and contact damage.; The player is immobile while the shield is active.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 举起一面盾牌，保护玩家免受子弹和接触伤害。; 盾牌激活时，玩家无法移动。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Mirror Shield If the player also has the Rolling Eye, Shield of the Maiden will reflect bullets while it is active.; Shield Night If the player also has Knight's Gun, reloading the gun will leave a shield on the floor, just like the Betrayer's Shield. It will break automatically after 4 seconds.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 镜盾（Mirror Shield） 如果玩家同时拥有翻紫眼儿，少女的盾激活时会反射子弹。; 盾夜（Shield Night） 如果玩家同时拥有骑士之枪，换弹时会在地上留下一面盾牌，就像背弃者护罩一样。它会在 4 秒后自动破裂。
entries.englishUsageNotes: If the player has Shield of the Maiden active when swallowed by a Tarnisher, the player will not take damage but will instead lose the item. The item can be recovered after killing the Tarnisher.; Certain effects like explosions, poison, fire, and electricity can still damage the player through the shield.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 如果玩家在被吞噬者（Tarnisher）吞下时仍处于少女的盾激活状态，就不会受到伤害，但会失去该道具。击杀吞噬者后可以找回这件道具。; 爆炸、毒液、火焰和电击等效果仍然可以穿透盾牌伤害玩家。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Boomerangs predate Gun technology, but can still be useful in a pinch. A good throw is quite stunning!
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 回飞镖早在枪械技术出现之前就已存在，但在紧要关头依然有用。扔得好，真能把人晃得一愣！
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Throws a boomerang that travels around the room and attempts to stun all enemies.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 扔出一枚回飞镖，在房间里绕行并尝试击晕所有敌人。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Crave the Glaive If the player also has the Kruller Glaive, the Glaive will try to hit every enemy in the room before returning, similar to the Boomerang.; Gunnerang If the player also has Utility Belt, thrown guns deal 50% more damage.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 渴望戟枪（Crave the Glaive） 如果玩家同时拥有神光飞镖，神光飞镖在返回前会试图击中房间里的每个敌人，效果类似回飞镖。; 枪镖（Gunnerang） 如果玩家同时拥有实用皮带，扔出的枪伤害提高 50%。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Boomerang can locate and target Wall Mimics before they reveal themselves, making it an ideal tool for finding them out.; This item is a reference to the Magical Boomerang from The Legend of Zelda: A Link to the Past.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 回飞镖甚至能在墙边拟像（Wall Mimics）现身前就定位并锁定它们，因此是找出它们的理想工具。; 这件道具是对《塞尔达传说 众神的三角力量》里魔法回旋镖的致敬。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 22 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Teleports the user. A Gungeoneer who became annoyed with the Gungeon's inconvenient rules on teleportation developed this prototype. While it can be used at any time, its aim is unpredictable.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 传送使用者。某位对地牢繁琐传送规则感到恼火的持枪者发明了这个原型。它虽然随时都能用，但落点完全不可预测。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: If the player is in the Forge or Bullet Hell, this outcome will instead do nothing if chosen.; If the player is in combat when using the Teleporter Prototype, this outcome will never trigger. If it would have triggered, the teleport will instead take the player to a random special room as detailed below.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 如果玩家身处锻造厂（Forge）或弹幕地狱（Bullet Hell），选到这个结果时会什么都不发生。; 如果玩家在战斗中使用传送原型机（Teleporter Prototype），这个结果绝不会触发。若本应触发，传送会改为把玩家送到下面列出的随机特殊房间。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Production Model If the player also has Prototype Railgun, its shots can ricochet up to five times.; Second Accident If the player also has Shotbow, its firing pattern is changed to a line of nine arrows perpendicular to the direction the player is facing.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 生产型号（Production Model） 如果玩家同时拥有原型磁轨炮（磁轨炮原型机），它的子弹最多能弹射 5 次。; 第二次事故（Second Accident） 如果玩家同时拥有霰弹弓，它的射击模式会变成与玩家面朝方向垂直的 9 支箭组成的一列。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Teleporting into the eyeball room will unlock the Yellow Chamber if it has not already been unlocked.; This item is based upon the static Teleporters used to traverse the chambers of the Gungeon.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 传送进眼球房间会解锁黄色膛室，前提是它还没解锁过。; 这件道具基于用于在地牢各个房间间移动的静态传送器。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Occasionally produces armor. Less effective if rattled.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 偶尔产出护甲。被晃得太厉害时效果会差些。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Adds a 10% chance to gain armor upon completing a room without taking damage. The armor will spawn on top of the player.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 在无伤完成房间时，有 10% 概率获得护甲。护甲会在玩家头顶生成。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Synthetic Shield If the player has Heart Synthesizer or Ammo Synthesizer, grants a familiar that orbits the player and blocks shots. If all three synthesizers are picked up, grants three familiars.; The familiar follows the player with almost no delay and represents the synthesizer the player does not currently have (i.e. if the player has Armor Synthesizer and Ammo Synthesizer, it will appear to be a Heart).
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 合成护盾（Synthetic Shield） 如果玩家拥有心形合成器（爱心合成器）或弹药合成器，则会获得一个环绕玩家并挡子弹的伙伴。如果三种合成器全都拾取，还会获得 3 个伙伴。; 这个伙伴几乎没有延迟地跟随玩家，并会显示玩家当前没有的那种合成器（例如，如果玩家拥有护甲合成器和弹药合成器，它看起来就会是一个心形）。

entries.unlock: Reward from [[Frifle and the Grey Mauser#List of Quests
entries.englishGameplaySummary: A strange pig. This pig... there's nothing obviously wrong with him. His shifty glances and uncanny stares make you wonder about his motivations. Maybe not the greatest pig to have around.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 一头古怪的猪。这头猪……看不出有什么明显不对劲的地方。它那鬼鬼祟祟的斜视和古怪的凝视，让人不禁怀疑它的动机。也许并不是最适合带在身边的猪。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Summons a pig companion who mostly does nothing but follow the player around.; If the player dies, the pig will jump in the way of the finishing shot, sparing the player and effectively granting an extra life. This fully heals the player and removes the item from the player's inventory.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 召唤一只猪伙伴，它大多数时候什么也不做，只是跟着玩家到处跑。; 如果玩家死亡，这头猪会扑到终结一击前，救下玩家，相当于提供一次额外生命。它会将玩家完全治疗，并把该道具从背包中移除。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Bacon and Eggs Player Projectile Speed is increased by 50% while the Scrambler is held.; The Elephant in the Room If the player has Elephant Gun, it becomes an elephant head and shoots elephants instead of bullets.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 培根和鸡蛋（Bacon and Eggs） 持有爬行者时，玩家投射物速度提高 50%。; 房间里的大象（The Elephant in the Room） 如果玩家拥有猎象枪，它会变成一个象头，并射出大象而不是子弹。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Does not revive a player in coop mode if they are not the last player standing, and may softlock the game.; If the player has Baby Good Mimic, acquiring Pig creates a second identical Pig companion. Both companions will sacrifice themselves to save the player.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 如果在联机模式中，玩家不是最后一个存活者，则不会复活该玩家，而且可能会让游戏卡死。; 如果玩家拥有拟身怪乖宝宝，获得英雄猪会再生成一只一模一样的英雄猪伙伴。两个伙伴都会牺牲自己来拯救玩家。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Professor Goopton for 6 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Removes all goop in a small radius continuously. A normal sponge, useful for cleaning up messes. Holding it, you hear the whispers of an alien tongue.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 持续清除小范围内的所有泥浆。就是一块普通海绵，清理脏东西很有用。拿着它时，你会听到某种外星语言的低语。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Removes all goops in a radius around the player.; Allows the player to understand Professor Goopton's dialogue.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 清除玩家周围一定半径内的所有泥浆。; 使玩家能够听懂教授·古普顿（Professor Goopton）的对白。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Soft Air If the player also has JK-47, when holding the JK-47, the player regains ammo when walking over liquids, and increases fear range while reloading.; Spengbab If the player also has Tangler, its knockback and range are increased by 50%.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 软空气（Soft Air） 如果玩家同时拥有 JK-47，持有 JK-47 时，玩家在液体上行走会回弹药，而且在换弹时恐惧范围会增加。; 斯彭巴比（Spengbab） 如果玩家同时拥有缠绕者（矩形枪），其击退和射程提高 50%。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Sponge cannot be sold.; Godliness is a reference to the idiom, Cleanliness is next to Godliness.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 海绵无法出售。; “清洁仅次于虔诚”（Cleanliness is next to Godliness）这句格言是在引用这个俗语。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Prevents poison damage. A useful, if terrifying, piece of equipment. One size fits all!
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 防止中毒伤害。一件有用但也挺吓人的装备。大小通吃！
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Grants immunity to poison.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 使玩家免疫中毒。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Super Serum If the player also has Plague Pistol or the Plunger, the guns' ammo capacity is increased by 50%, their projectiles can bounce, and the size of the projectiles increase.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 超级血清（Super Serum） 如果玩家还拥有瘟疫手枪（Plague Pistol）或 the Plunger（the Plunger），这些枪的弹药容量提高 50%，投射物可以反弹，投射物体积也会变大。

entries.unlock: Defeat the boss of the Black Powder Mine without getting hit.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Immunity to fire, poison, and electricity. Nothing gets through this thing, with the notable exception of bullets.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 免疫火焰、中毒和电击。除了子弹之外，几乎什么都挡得住。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Grants immunity to fire, poison, and electricity.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 使玩家免疫火焰、中毒和电击。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Super Serum If the player also has Plague Pistol or the Plunger, the guns' ammo capacity is increased by 50%, their projectiles can bounce, and the size of the projectiles increase.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 超级血清（Super Serum） 如果玩家还拥有瘟疫手枪（Plague Pistol）或 the Plunger（the Plunger），这些枪的弹药容量提高 50%，投射物可以反弹，投射物体积也会变大。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Hazmat Suit grants immunity to the Shockwave modifier's electricity links in Challenge Mode.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 防护服在挑战模式中可免疫 Shockwave（Shockwave）修正带来的电击连线。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Summons bullets on active item use. This ring bestows upon its bearer the now obvious knowledge that within the walls of the Gungeon all items are actually guns in strange, distorted form. An artifact of the Order's belief in transgunstantiation.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 在使用主动道具时召唤子弹。这枚戒指让佩戴者终于明白，地牢的墙壁之内，所有道具其实都是以奇怪而扭曲的形式存在的枪械。这是教团相信“转枪化”（transgunstantiation）的遗物。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: While using an active item, rapidly fires the currently held weapon in a counterclockwise ring. This does not consume ammo, nor does it require the held gun to have any ammo remaining.; The effect has a cooldown of about 10 seconds.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 在使用主动道具时，会以逆时针方向快速射出当前手持武器。; 这一效果有约 10 秒冷却。
entries.englishUsageNotes: While not a synergy in the traditional sense, active items with no cooldown such as Sense of Direction, Jetpack, or IBomb Companion App are strongly recommended to maximize usage of this item's effect. However, because of the Ring of Triggers' independent cooldown, it can't be used all the time.; The player can also maximize the benefit of this item by using a gun or bullet modifier that allows the shots fired to bounce or be retargeted, such as Serious Cannon or Remote Bullets.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 虽然严格来说不算协同，但像方向指针、喷气包或 IBomb Companion App（IBomb Companion App）这类没有冷却的主动道具，非常适合配合这件道具来最大化收益。不过由于扳机之戒本身有独立冷却，它不可能一直使用。; 玩家还可以通过使用能够让射出的子弹反弹或重新锁定目标的枪械/子弹修正来进一步发挥这件道具的价值，例如严肃加农炮（强力加农炮）或远程子弹。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Greatly increases dodge roll damage. The barbs on this suit of armor are sure to ruin anyone's day, as long as that "anyone" is within a few inches of you.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 大幅提升翻滚伤害。这套护甲上的尖刺足以毁掉任何人的一天，只要那个“任何人”（anyone）离你只有几英寸。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Increases damage dealt by dodge rolling into enemies by 600% (7x multiplier).; For most characters this increases damage dealt per roll from 3 to 21.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 将翻滚撞击敌人的伤害提高 600%（7 倍）。; 对多数角色来说，每次翻滚的伤害从 3 提高到 21。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Backdraft, Ruby Bracelet, or Copper Ammolet Touching enemies sets them on fire.; Careful Iteration If the player has Casey, Casey becomes spiked and fires a spread of 6 nails each time it is swung.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 反冲燃烧（Backdraft）、红宝石手链或铜制护身符 接触敌人会把他们点燃。; 小心迭代（Careful Iteration） 如果玩家拥有凯西（卡西），凯西会长出尖刺，并在每次挥舞时发射 6 枚钉子。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Even with this item, Gatling Gulls melee swipe and Wallmongers body still deal contact damage.; Prior to the Advanced Gungeons & Draguns Update, Armor of Thorns multiplied dodge roll damage by 16.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 即使有这件道具，机枪鸥（Gatling Gulls）的近战挥击和墙霸（Wallmongers）的身体仍会造成接触伤害。; 在《先进地牢与喷龙（Advanced Gungeons & Draguns）》更新之前，荆棘之甲会将翻滚伤害乘以 16。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Temporary incorporeality. This mysterious ring briefly allows one to traverse the etheral planes. In addition to incorporeality, this bestows flight. Take care not to fall upon return!
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 短暂的无形化。这枚神秘戒指能让人短暂穿越以太位面。除了无形之外，它还会赋予飞行能力。回来时可别摔着！
entries.englishEffectHighlights: While active, the player is invulnerable to damage, can walk through enemies and obstacles, and is capable of flight, but cannot dodge roll.; The player can steal from merchants while in ethereal form.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 激活期间，玩家免疫伤害，可以穿过敌人和障碍物，并且能够飞行，但无法翻滚。; 玩家在以太形态下可以从商人那里偷东西。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Ghost With the Most If the player has Gunslinger's Ashes, its ghosts will become larger and freeze enemies, and its reload time is decreased by 20%.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 幽灵最多（Ghost With the Most） 如果玩家拥有枪手骨灰，其幽灵会变得更大、会冻结敌人，而且换弹时间减少 20%。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Ammonomicon quote "Get Ethereal!" is a play on the phrase 'get real'. It may also be a reference to the chorus line "Get Physical", from the Olivia Newton-John song Physical.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 枪弹百科中的引言“变成以太吧！”（Get Ethereal）是在玩“get real”（get real）这个短语的梗。它也可能是在致敬奥利维亚·纽顿-约翰（Olivia Newton-John）的歌曲《Physical》（Physical）中的副歌“Get Physical”（Get Physical）。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Trorc for 13 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Stuns all enemies. This grenade is full of small, shiny particles. Any enemies caught in the blast radius will be completely enthralled for a short time. Popular with special ops units and children's entertainers!
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 让所有敌人眩晕。这枚手榴弹里满是细小闪亮的颗粒。爆炸范围内的任何敌人都会在短时间内彻底被迷住。深受特种部队和儿童艺人欢迎！
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Stuns enemies in the room for 10 seconds.; Can be used to steal items from merchant npcs and the Shop if used in the same room. The length of time that players can steal after using the Chaff Grenade is the same as its stun duration, 10 seconds.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 使房间内的敌人眩晕 10 秒。; 可以用来在同一房间里从商人 NPC 和商店里偷东西。使用干草手榴弹后，玩家能够偷窃的时间与其眩晕持续时间相同，也就是 10 秒。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Camera Shy If the player has Camera, the Camera has a chance to stun enemies.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 镜头羞怯（Camera Shy） 如果玩家拥有照相机（Camera），照相机有几率使敌人眩晕。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Chaff Grenade can be found multiple times in a single run, and will grant 3 uses each time it is picked up.; It can still be sold for its full sell price at 2 or 1 uses left.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 干草手榴弹在一轮中可以拾取多次，每次拾取都会提供 3 次使用次数。; 即使只剩 2 次或 1 次使用次数，它仍可以按完整售价出售。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Triggers a blank on active item use. Raised in the Gungeon and bored of gunfire, he gets excited whenever an item is used.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 使用主动道具时会触发一次空响弹。这个在地牢里长大、对枪声早已腻味的家伙，每次有人使用道具时都会兴奋起来。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Grants a living blank companion who activates a Blank effect each time an active item is used.; Has a cooldown of 10 seconds between each activation.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 每次使用主动道具时，都会获得一位活着的空响弹伙伴，发动一次空响效果。; 两次触发之间有 10 秒冷却。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Blank Generation If the player has Elder Blank, the companion becomes a smaller version of Old Red, and will automatically fire a second blank after Elder Blank's effect ends (if the player uses a different active item then there will still be a delay in the blank effect).; Keep The Change If the player has M16, the companion will occasionally trigger a blank upon shooting the last bullet in a magazine of the M16.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 空响生成（Blank Generation） 如果玩家拥有远古空响弹（旧式空响弹），这个伙伴会变成旧红（Old Red）的较小版本，并会在远古空响弹效果结束后自动再发射一次空响（如果玩家改用其他主动道具，空响效果仍会有延迟）。; 别客气（Keep The Change） 如果玩家拥有 M16，这个伙伴偶尔会在 M16 弹匣里最后一颗子弹被打出时触发一次空响。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The blank effect activates in the room the companion is currently in, not necessarily the one the player is in. This is important to note when using the item to open secret rooms.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 伙伴触发空响的房间，是它当前所在的房间，不一定是玩家所在的房间。用它来开启隐藏房间时，这一点尤其重要。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Temporary invisibility.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 短暂隐身。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Temporarily Stealths the player, rendering them invisible to enemies.; Can be used to steal items from shops.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 暂时使玩家进入潜行状态，让敌人看不见。; 可用于从商店偷东西。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Prior to the Supply Drop Update, Smoke Bomb was a B item.; Any action, besides walking and stealing, will remove the invisibility.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 在“空投补给”更新之前，烟雾弹曾是 B 级道具。; 除了走路和偷窃之外，任何动作都会解除隐身。

entries.unlock: Defeat the first two phases of the Resourceful Rat.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: A ring once worn by the Resourceful Rat. Represents a tenuous kinship with a one-time foe.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 曾经被机智大鼠戴过的戒指。象征着与一位旧敌之间那点脆弱的情分。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: If the Resourceful Rat steals an item or gun, he will drop another item or gun of the same type and quality.; The Rat can be traded with once per chamber after acquiring the ring. Unused trades will carry over to subsequent floors, allowing multiple trades on a single chamber.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 如果机智大鼠偷走了某件道具或枪，他会掉落另一件同类型、同品质的道具或枪。; 在获得这枚戒指后，每个房间可与老鼠交易一次。未使用的交易次数会保留到后续楼层，因此在一个房间里就能进行多次交易。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Ring of the Resourceful Rat will not be stolen by the Resourceful Rat.; The Resourceful Rat will not trade with the player while in the Resourceful Rat's Lair.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这枚机智大鼠之戒不会被机智大鼠偷走。; 在机智大鼠的巢穴里，机智大鼠不会与玩家交易。

entries.unlock: Reward from [[Frifle and the Grey Mauser#List of Quests
entries.englishGameplaySummary: The pinnacle of Nuign's investigations into necromantic guns. Forged from a dying Shelleton, this gun reconstitutes itself when reloaded. Revolvations 22:12 As with all things, the Gun must eventually end; the final Bullet will leave the chamber, and all will be reloaded.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 努因格（Nuign）对死灵枪械的研究巅峰之作。它由一只濒死的贝壳骷髅（Shelleton）锻造而成，换弹时会自行重构。启示录 22:12 正如万物终将归于终结；最后一发子弹会离开弹膛，随后一切又将重新装填。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Alternates between a pistol form and a continuous beam form when reloaded.; Increases by 1 while in the inventory.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 换弹时会在手枪形态和持续光束形态之间切换。; 处于物品栏时，其数值会增加 1。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Dawn of the Gundead If the player also has Zombie Bullets, the chance for Shellegun ammo to be refunded upon missing is doubled. This does not apply to Shellegun's beam form.; This synergy does not work properly with Lich's Eye Bullets, because 2 * 0 is still 0.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 亡灵黎明（Dawn of the Gundead） 如果玩家还拥有僵尸子弹，在射失时返还 Shellegun（Shellegun） 弹药的几率翻倍。这对 Shellegun（Shellegun） 的光束形态无效。; 这项协同无法与巫妖之眼子弹正常配合，因为 2 * 0 仍然是 0。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The gun's sound effects are identical to the Shelleton's sounds.; The entry for the Shellegun in the Physical Ammonomicon has a small doodle of a Shelleton.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪的音效与贝壳骷髅（Shelleton）的音效完全相同。; 在实体枪弹百科里，Shellegun（Shellegun） 的条目旁边还有一幅小小的贝壳骷髅涂鸦。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: This ancient technique briefly stuns enemies whenever a table is flipped. Chapter one of the "Tabla Sutra." And when a table is masterfully flipped, what a most magnificent sight! Surely all who witness the flip of a true master can only stand transfixed, agog.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 每当翻起桌子时，这门古老技艺都会短暂眩晕敌人。是“Tabla Sutra”（Tabla Sutra） 的第一章。桌子被高手翻起时，那景象何其壮观！凡亲眼见过真正高手翻桌的人，都会只能呆若木鸡，目瞪口呆。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Flipping a Table briefly stuns nearby enemies.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 翻桌时会短暂眩晕附近敌人。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Paperwork If the player has Origuni, the first shot of each magazine will fire three planes.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 纸工作（Paperwork） 如果玩家拥有折纸枪，每个弹匣的第一发子弹会发射三架纸飞机。
entries.englishUsageNotes: "Tabla" is Hindi for "Table", while a sutra is a kind of short Indian literary composition intended to teach rituals, literature, philosophy, law, or a great number of other concepts in a brief form, requiring interpretation. Famous examples include the Brahma Sutras, Yoga Sutras, or Nyāya Sutras.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: “Tabla”（Tabla）在印地语中是“Table”（Table）；而 sutra（sutra） 是一种简短的印度文学体裁，用来以简洁形式教授仪式、文学、哲学、法律或其他许多概念，需要读者自行阐释。著名例子包括《梵经》、瑜伽经或《尼雅耶经》。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Chance to heal upon taking damage. The Green Guon stone abhors pain, and has a small chance to heal its bearer upon being wounded. It seems to grow more desperate as the risk of death rises.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 受伤时有几率治疗。绿色滚石厌恶疼痛，在持有者受伤时有小概率为其回复生命。随着死亡风险上升，它似乎会变得越来越焦急。
