entries.englishEffectHighlights: Orbits the player, blocking enemy shots on contact.; Adds a 20% chance to heal upon taking damage. This chance increases to 50% if the damage would have killed the player.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 围绕玩家旋转，触碰时会挡下敌方子弹。; 受到伤害时有 20% 概率回复生命；若这次伤害本可致死，该概率提高到 50%。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Greener Guon Stone If the player has +1 Bullets, Pea Shooter, or Amulet of the Pit Lord, the size of the guon stone is increased, it rotates at a fixed distance from the player while they are moving instead of on a slight delay, and the chance for the stone to heal the player if damage would have otherwise killed them is raised to 70%. 20 coin also appears whenever Green Guon Stone heals the player.; Tile Match If the player also has Tetrominator, whenever the player shoots, Green Guon Stone will occasionally shoot an S Tetromino.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 更绿的滚石（Greener Guon Stone） 如果玩家拥有 +1 子弹、豌豆枪（射豆枪）或深坑之主护符（深坑之王的护身符），滚石体积会增大，在玩家移动时会以固定距离绕行而不是稍有延迟，并且当伤害本可致死时为玩家回复生命的概率提高到 70%。当绿色滚石治疗玩家时，还会额外出现 20 枚硬币。; 方块配对（Tile Match） 如果玩家还拥有俄罗斯方块终结者，玩家每次射击时，绿色滚石偶尔会发射一个 S 形四格骨牌。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Green Guon Stone is incapable of healing The Robot.; Prior to the A Farewell to Arms Update, Green Guon Stone was a S item.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 绿色滚石无法治疗机器人（The Robot）。; 在《永别了，武器》（A Farewell to Arms）更新之前，绿色滚石曾是 S 级道具。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Grants a heart container.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 奖励一个红心容器。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Grants a heart container.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 奖励一个红心容器。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Chief Master If the player has Alien Sidearm and any two Master Rounds, the Alien Sidearm has a much larger magazine and cannot be charged, but becomes fully automatic and the final two shots in the magazine are fully-charged shots.; Master's Chambers Each Master Round the player carries permanently unlocks the Chamber Gun's mode of its respective floor. Reloading the Chamber Gun with a full magazine cycles through the unlocked modes.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 主修大师（Chief Master） 如果玩家拥有外星武器以及任意两个胜者之弹，则外星武器会获得更大的弹匣且无法蓄力，但会变成全自动，并且弹匣里最后两发子弹会变成满蓄力射击。; 大师的房间（Master's Chambers） 玩家携带的每一枚胜者之弹都会永久解锁枪膛之枪在对应楼层的模式。使用满弹匣给枪膛之枪换弹，会在已解锁模式之间循环。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Master Rounds are one of the necessary materials to unlock shortcuts. When they are used for this purpose, the Tinker will take away one Master Round, and therefore remove a heart container from the player.; Master Rounds will not appear if the player takes any kind of damage during a boss fight, including falling into pits and other kinds of damage not inflicted by the boss itself.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 胜者之弹是解锁捷径所需的材料之一。将其用于此目的时，修补匠会拿走一枚胜者之弹，因此会从玩家身上移除一个红心容器。; 如果玩家在 Boss 战中受到任何伤害，胜者之弹就不会出现，包括掉进深坑，以及任何并非 Boss 本身造成的伤害。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Grants a heart container.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 奖励一个红心容器。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Grants a heart container.

entries.chineseUsageNotes: 胜者之弹是解锁捷径所需的材料之一。将其用于此目的时，修补匠会拿走一枚胜者之弹，因此会从玩家身上移除一个红心容器。; 如果玩家在 Boss 战中受到任何伤害，胜者之弹就不会出现，包括掉进深坑，以及任何并非 Boss 本身造成的伤害。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Gungeonologists have long debated what is truly the worst gun in the Gungeon. More Gungeoneers have perished with Klobbes in their inventory than any other gun. Coincidence?
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 地牢学者们长期争论，究竟哪把枪才是地牢里最糟的。比起任何其他枪械，更多持有可洛比枪的人死在了身上。巧合吗？
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Klobbering Time If the player also has AU Gun or Moonscraper, the Klobbe is doubled and fires two shots at a time.; No Odd Job If the player also has Makarov, the two guns are dual-wielded. Their damage is increased by 20% and spread is increased by 60%, decreasing accuracy.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 克洛贝时间（Klobbering Time） 如果玩家还拥有金枪（金色手枪）或月球平土机，可洛比枪会变成双倍并一次发射两发子弹。; 没有奇怪差事（No Odd Job） 如果玩家还拥有马卡洛夫枪，这两把枪会双持。它们的伤害提高 20%，散布增加 60%，精度下降。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun is among those Gunsling King and Manservantes can challenge the player to clear a room with.; This gun is a reference to the Klobb from GoldenEye 007 (itself based on the real-life Škorpion), a notoriously bad gun with similar weaknesses as the Klobbe.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪是枪械王（Gunsling King）和曼瑟文特斯（Manservantes）可能会要求玩家用来清理房间的枪之一。; 这把枪致敬了《黄金眼 007》（GoldenEye 007）中的 Klobb（Klobb）（其本身基于现实中的 斯科皮翁（Škorpion）），这是一把臭名昭著的烂枪，和可洛比枪有着类似的缺点。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Increases active item capacity and maximum ammo counts. Ever since the Hegemony caught him with a few questionably legal goods, the Pilot has turned to more clandestine storage methods.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 增加主动道具携带量和最大弹药上限。自从帝国（Hegemony）逮到他藏着几件来路不太正的货之后，飞行员就改用更隐秘的储物方式了。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Grants an extra active item slot.; Grants 10% increased maximum ammo for all weapons.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 额外提供 1 个主动道具槽。; 所有武器的最大弹药提高 10%。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Cannot be dropped.; Item is unique to The Pilot and cannot be obtained by other gungeoneers.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 无法丢弃。; 这件道具是飞行员（The Pilot）独有的，其他持枪者无法获得。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Professor Goopton for 15 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: A horrifying tentacle, cloven from some abyssal fiend. It moves in very disquieting ways.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 一只恐怖的触手，从某个深渊邪物身上剜下。它活动起来的方式极其令人不安。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The tentacle can grip enemies through walls.; The tentacle can damage disappearing bosses like Cannonbalrog and High Priest if they are connected and kept while vanished.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 触手可以隔着墙抓住敌人。; 如果触手与像 Cannonbalrog（Cannonbalrog） 和 High Priest（High Priest） 这类会消失的 Boss 连在一起并在其消失期间保持连接，它就可以对它们造成伤害。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: This strange artifact fires an extremely powerful blast of Moon energy. While incredibly slow, it cannot be halted.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这件奇异遗物会发射极其强力的月球能量冲击。虽然速度慢得离谱，但无法被打断。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Jumping... is useless If the player also has Moonscraper, four laser beams shoot from each side of Quad Laser's bullets. If the player drops either Quad Laser or Moonscraper, the four lasers will stay in place and stop following the Quad Laser bullet. Doubles Quad Laser's shot speed and triples its reload time.; Primitive Shapes If the player has Tangler, Quad Laser's shots become rectangular and travel faster. Tangler's shots become much larger and deal 50% more damage, but travel very slowly.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 跳起来……没用（Jumping... is useless） 如果玩家还拥有月球平土机，四道激光束会从 Quad Laser（Quad Laser） 子弹的两侧射出。若玩家丢弃 Quad Laser（Quad Laser） 或月球平土机，那四道激光会停留在原地，不再跟随 Quad Laser（Quad Laser） 子弹。Quad Laser（Quad Laser） 的射速翻倍，换弹时间变为三倍。; 原始形状（Primitive Shapes） 如果玩家拥有缠绕者（矩形枪），Quad Laser（Quad Laser）的射击会变成矩形并且飞得更快。缠绕者的射击会变得大得多且伤害提高 50%，但飞得非常慢。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun is a reference to the gun used by the Mooninites in the show Aqua Teen Hunger Force.; Jumping... Is Useless quotes a scene in the show where the Mooninites use the Quad Laser in an underwhelming battle against a character who retaliates with laser eyes.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪参考了动画《Aqua Teen Hunger Force》（Aqua Teen Hunger Force）中月族人（Mooninites）使用的武器。; “跳起来……没用” 这句台词引用了该节目中的一幕：月族人（Mooninites）用 Quad Laser（Quad Laser） 在一场惨淡的战斗中对抗一个会用激光眼反击的角色。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 100 HC, or purchase the Microtransaction Gun DLC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Everyone involved in the production of this gun thought it was a bad idea, but the higher-ups made them build it anyway. Later, management shut down that gun factory for making a gun no one liked.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 参与这把枪研发的人都觉得这是个坏主意，但高层还是逼着他们做了出来。后来，管理层因为造出一把没人喜欢的枪而关掉了那家枪厂。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Uses coin instead of ammo.; Fires a variety of objects such as gems, books, money, and gungeoneer figurines. Different objects have different effects and damage values;
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 使用硬币而不是弹药。; 发射宝石、书籍、钞票和持枪者模型等各种物件。不同物件有不同效果和伤害值。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: http://merch.devolverdigital.com If the player also has Mustache, Microtransaction Gun's damage is doubled.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 商店网址（merch.devolverdigital.com） 如果玩家还拥有络腮胡，微交易枪的伤害翻倍。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The expression "Pay To Win" is derived from micro-transaction-heavy games, where an advantage over other players can be achieved by investing more money in the game.; The green crystals this gun fires and uses as its ammo counter may be a reference to "Dungeon Keeper", an iOS game by EA which famously blocked player progress unless they separately purchased green crystals which would greatly speed the game up.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: “Pay To Win”（Pay To Win）这一说法来自重度微交易游戏，在这类游戏里，玩家只要投入更多金钱就能获得相对其他人的优势。; 这把枪发射并用作弹药计数器的绿色水晶，可能参考了《Dungeon Keeper》（Dungeon Keeper）——一款 EA 的 iOS（iOS） 游戏，它臭名昭著地会阻止玩家推进，直到他们另外购买绿色水晶，而这些水晶能大幅加快游戏进度。

stats.value: Assuming each bullet only hits once. Assuming each bullet only hits once.

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 6 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: This gun, incredibly enough, has been folded entirely out of paper. Only a true master gunsmith could create something this elegant.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把枪居然完全是用纸折出来的。只有真正的大师级枪匠才能造出如此优雅的东西。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Blade Runner If the player also has Deck4rd, magazine size of both guns is increased by 50%.; Paperwork If the player also has the Ballot or any Table Tech item except for Heat or Shotgun (Blanks, Money, Rage, Rocket, Sight, or Stun), the first shot after reloading will fire three planes.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 刀锋跑者（Blade Runner） 如果玩家还拥有德克福德，两把枪的弹匣容量提高 50%。; 纸上作业（Paperwork） 如果玩家还拥有选票（the Ballot）或除 加热（Heat） 和 霰弹枪（Shotgun） 之外的任意桌技道具（空响弹、金钱、愤怒、火箭、视域或眩晕），换弹后的第一发子弹会发射三架纸飞机。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Bananas resemble guns, and are high in potassium. A convenient snack and/or weapon for Gungeoneers.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 香蕉看起来像枪，而且富含钾。对持枪者来说，这是方便的零食和/或武器。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Flings a banana that bounces once, and explodes upon destruction dealing 30 damage to nearby enemies.; Each time this banana hits a wall, regardless of whether it bounces or explodes, it creates two more bananas. These sub-bananas look identical to the original, and also bounce once, but they cannot create more bananas, and their smaller explosions only deal 10 damage.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 扔出一根香蕉，它会弹跳一次，并在被摧毁时爆炸，对附近敌人造成 30 点伤害。; 每当这根香蕉撞到墙上时，不管是弹跳还是爆炸，它都会再生成两根香蕉。这些子香蕉看起来与原香蕉完全相同，也会弹跳一次，但无法继续生成香蕉，而且它们更小的爆炸只造成 10 点伤害。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Hornucopia If the player has Charm Horn, the number of sub-bananas created each time the original banana bounces is increased from 2 to 4. Additionally, using Charm Horn while the Banana is equipped fires a banana at each enemy it charms. These bananas deal 1.1 damage on impact, and explode on impact dealing 10 additional damage to the impacted enemy and enemies nearby.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 号角盛宴（Hornucopia） 如果玩家拥有魅惑号角（魔力号角），每次原始香蕉弹跳时生成的子香蕉数量会从 2 根增加到 4 根。此外，在装备香蕉时使用魅惑号角会对每个被魅惑的敌人发射一根香蕉。这些香蕉在命中时造成 1.1 点伤害，并在命中时爆炸，对被击中的敌人和附近敌人额外造成 10 点伤害。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun likely is a reference to the game Gorillas, itself referenced with a weapon of the same name from Worms.; The pickup quote is a reference to the plantain, a banana cultivar subgroup.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪很可能致敬了《Gorillas》（Gorillas），而那款游戏本身又通过同名武器被《Worms》（Worms）致敬。; 拾取时的台词是在致敬大蕉（plantain），一种香蕉栽培品系。

stats.value: 45.0 (assuming blades do not rebound to hit enemies multiple times)

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Made of meat. Holding this gun allows its wielder to move just a little bit faster.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 由肉做成。握着这把枪，持枪者的移动速度会稍微快一点。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires piercing, bouncing sawblades.; Increases movement speed by 1.5 while held (base movement speed is 7).
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射能穿透且会弹跳的锯片。; 持有时移动速度提高 1.5（基础移动速度为 7）。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: I Studied The Blade If the player has Buzzkill, the two guns are dual wielded.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 研究过刀锋的人（I Studied The Blade） 如果玩家拥有锯杀（锯枪），这两把枪会双持。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun is a reference to the game Super Meat Boy.; The sawblades fired by Super Meat Gun are a reference to the abundance of sawblade traps in every area of Super Meat Boy.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪参考了《Super Meat Boy》（Super Meat Boy）。; Super Meat Gun（Super Meat Gun） 发射的锯片参考了《Super Meat Boy》（Super Meat Boy）各个区域里随处可见的锯片陷阱。

entries.unlock: Reward from [[Frifle and the Grey Mauser#List of Quests
entries.englishGameplaySummary: A makeshift weapon filled with gunpowder and shrapnel. Immensely powerful, but it can only be fired once.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这是一件临时拼凑的武器，里面装满了火药和金属碎片。威力巨大，但只能发射一次。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Return If the player also has Pig, the Pig turns green to resemble Cannon, and shoots bat projectiles at nearby enemies.; The Makeshift Cannon is one of the few guns able to ignore the Boss DPS cap. Because it only has one shot, it is recommended to only use it during boss fights.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 归来者（The Return） 如果玩家还拥有英雄猪，英雄猪会变成绿色，长得像炮（Cannon），并向附近敌人发射蝙蝠弹体。; 临时加农炮是少数能够无视 Boss DPS（Boss DPS） 上限的枪之一。由于它只有一发，建议只在 Boss 战中使用。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: A camera brought to the Gungeon by a journalist. The camera is shaped enough like a gun to survive in the Gungeon's depths.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 一把被记者带进地牢的照相机。它的外形勉强像枪，因此才能在地牢深处幸存。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires a charged shot that deals 10 damage to all enemies in the current room.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射一次蓄力射击，对当前房间内所有敌人造成 10 点伤害。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Camera Shy If the player has Chaff Grenade, the Camera has a chance to stun enemies.; Get Equipped With -F- Enables Time Stopper mode on the Megahand, which makes its charged shots stop time for 1 second and deal 10 damage to all enemies onscreen. In this mode, the Megahand takes 1.5s to charge, and consumes 5 ammo when firing a charged shot. Modes can be switched by reloading the Megahand with a full magazine.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 镜头羞怯（Camera Shy） 如果玩家拥有干草手榴弹，照相机有几率使敌人眩晕。; 配备即获（Get Equipped With -F-） 为 洛克手炮 解锁时间停止模式，使其蓄力射击在 1 秒内停住时间，并对屏幕内所有敌人造成 10 点伤害。在此模式下，洛克手炮 充能需要 1.5 秒，发射蓄力射击时消耗 5 发弹药。可通过在满弹匣状态下换弹来切换模式。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Shooting the Camera will not activate mimics, damage chests, reveal secret walls, or break curse pots.; The Camera can be used to attack bosses during attacks where they are invincible like Cannonbalrog and the High Priest
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 射击照相机不会激活拟身怪、伤害宝箱、揭示隐藏墙，或打碎诅咒罐。; 照相机可用于攻击那些在某些攻击中处于无敌状态的 Boss，比如 Cannonbalrog（Cannonbalrog） 和 高祭司（High Priest）。

entries.unlock: Reward from [[Frifle and the Grey Mauser#List of Quests
entries.englishGameplaySummary: An ancient zither instrument possessed by vengeful spirits. Difficult to play, but deadly in the hands of a master.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 一件被复仇幽灵附身的古老筝形乐器。难以上手，但在高手手里致命。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Rapidly fires 350 arrows in a very wide spread. Each arrow can pierce up to 3 enemies.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 以极宽的散布快速发射 350 支箭。每支箭最多可穿透 3 个敌人。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Shredder Doubles the spread of the player's bullets while Gunzheng is held, decreasing accuracy.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 碎纸机（Shredder） 在持有枪筝（Gunzheng）时，会将玩家子弹散布翻倍，降低精准度。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Prior to the Supply Drop Update, the arrows did not home in on enemies.; If all arrows land on enemies, this gun deals very high damage per second. However, without accuracy upgrades, this will be nigh impossible to do even on relatively large enemies without getting dangerously close to them.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 在“空投补给”更新之前，这些箭不会追踪敌人。; 如果所有箭都命中敌人，这把枪的每秒伤害非常高。不过，没有精准度加成的话，哪怕面对体型相对较大的敌人，也几乎不可能做到，而且还必须危险地贴近他们。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 28 HC
entries.englishGameplaySummary: The Tetrominator shoots every possible configuration of four bullets. Strangely, the "line" configuration seems rarer than others.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 俄罗斯方块终结者会发射所有可能的四弹配置。奇怪的是，“线型”（line）配置似乎比其他形状更罕见。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires random tetromino-shaped bullets that stick to enemies.; If a line-piece tetromino hits an enemy, it will explode. This explosion deals more damage the more tetrominos are stuck to that enemy.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射随机的四格骨牌形子弹，这些子弹会黏在敌人身上。; 如果一个线型四格骨牌击中敌人，它就会爆炸。黏在该敌人身上的四格骨牌越多，这次爆炸的伤害越高。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Circle of Bricks If the player also has the Brick Breaker, both guns are dual-wielded.; Tile Match If the player also has any non-glass Guon Stone, whenever the player shoots, the Guon Stone will occasionally shoot a Tetromino corresponding to the type of Guon Stone.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 砖块圈（Circle of Bricks） 如果玩家还拥有砖块破坏者，两把枪会双持。; 方块配对（Tile Match） 如果玩家还拥有任意一种非玻璃滚石，每当玩家射击时，滚石会偶尔发射一个与其类型对应的四格骨牌。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun is a reference to Tetris.; The description is a reference to jokes about the line piece not appearing when needed.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪是对《俄罗斯方块》（Tetris）的致敬。; 这段描述是在致敬关于玩家需要时线型却总不出现的梗。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 10 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Can reduce any target (or situation) to a more debased state. Smells of rum.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 能把任何目标（或情境）降格到更堕落的状态。带着朗姆酒味。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Contractual Obligation If the player has Gungine, a pool of oil spawns underneath enemies killed using it.; Cool Kids Club If the player has Strafe Gun, continuously moving with the Strafe Gun held gives the player a yellow glow, increasing movement speed. The glow disappears if the player stops moving.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 契约义务（Contractual Obligation） 如果玩家拥有喷气式枪，被它击杀的敌人脚下会生成一滩油。; 酷小子俱乐部（Cool Kids Club） 如果玩家拥有横移枪（Strafe Gun），在持枪状态下持续移动会让玩家发出黄色光芒，提高移动速度。若玩家停止移动，光芒会消失。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: With this orange, your style... it's impetuous. Your defense, impregnable.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 有了这颗橙子，你的风格……那叫一个急躁。你的防御，坚不可摧。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Increases Coolness by 2 while held.; Has the following effects on use;
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 持有时冷静度提高 2。; 使用时会产生以下效果：
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: AK-47 (Island Forme) If the player has AK-47, reloading the gun with a full magazine toggles Island Forme. Island Forme AK-47 fires oranges, which deal more damage than regular AK-47 shots. The synergy will be lost once the Orange is used. If the Orange is eaten while the AK-47 is in Island Forme, it will remain in Island Forme; however reloading with a full magazine will return it to its original form, and cannot be reversed.; Cactus Flower If the player has Cactus, it has a chance to shoot out a prickly pear that bounces off walls and shoots needles in all directions. The synergy will be lost once the Orange is used.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: AK-47（岛屿形态） 如果玩家拥有 AK-47，满弹匣换弹会切换到岛屿形态。岛屿形态下的 AK-47 会发射橙子，伤害比普通 AK-47 射击更高。橙子被使用后，该协同会失效。若在 AK-47 处于岛屿形态时把橙子吃掉，它仍会保持岛屿形态；但之后满弹匣换弹会将其恢复为原形态，且无法再次逆转。; 仙人掌花（Cactus Flower） 如果玩家拥有仙人掌，它有几率射出一颗仙人掌梨，仙人掌梨会从墙上反弹并向四面八方射出刺。橙子被使用后，该协同会失效。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Prior to the Supply Drop Update, Orange was a C item.; This item is a reference to the PS2 video game God Hand.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪很可能是对《Gorillas》（Gorillas）的致敬，而《Gorillas》本身又被《Worms》（Worms）里的同名武器致敬。; 拾取时的引言是在致敬大蕉（plantain），一种香蕉栽培品系。

entries.unlock: Shoot a mimic chest to awaken it
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Improves the contents of broken chests. The collected learnings of generations of treasure hunters. This handy book details the mysterious inner mechanisms of the dungeon chests.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 提升被打碎宝箱里的内容。这是世代寻宝者的学识结晶。这本实用的小书详细介绍了地牢宝箱神秘的内部构造。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Improves drops from broken chests.; 45% chance to drop a random pickup.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 提升被打碎宝箱掉落的内容。; 有 45% 的概率掉落一个随机拾取物。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Research The Lower Case r's damage is increased to 5, and it can fire the words CHEST and MIMIC. Letters from these words will unlock locked chests and doors.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 研究（Research） 小写字母 r（r）的伤害提高到 5，并且可以发射 CHEST 和 MIMIC 这两个单词。单词中的字母可解锁上锁的宝箱和门。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Has no impact on the likelihood of finding Gold Junk.; Prior to the A Farewell to Arms Update, Book of Chest Anatomy was a B item.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 对找到金垃圾的概率没有影响。; 在《永别了，武器》（A Farewell to Arms）更新之前，宝箱构造指南曾是 B 级道具。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Heals upon breaking a chest open. This ring, crafted from the frame of a powerful mimic, still yearns to devour chests.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 打破宝箱时会治疗玩家。这枚用强大拟身怪的骨架打造的戒指，至今仍渴望吞噬宝箱。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Breaking unopened chests and killing Mimics heals the player for.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 打破未开启的宝箱并击杀拟身怪会为玩家回复生命。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: blade If the player also has Kruller Glaive, its damage is increased by 20%, enemies hit will visually bleed, and jammed enemies and bosses will be reverted to normal on hit.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 刀锋（blade） 如果玩家还拥有神光飞镖，其伤害提高 20%，被击中的敌人会在视觉上流血，且被诅咒的敌人和 Boss 被命中后会恢复为正常状态。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Breaking chests has no effect on the health of The Robot.; Prior to the A Farewell to Arms Update, Ring of Chest Vampirism was a B item.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 打碎宝箱不会影响机器人（The Robot）的生命值。; 在《永别了，武器》（A Farewell to Arms）更新之前，吸血鬼宝箱之戒曾是 B 级道具。

entries.unlock: Defeat the High Dragun.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Grants a second chance upon death. A piece of a legendary Gungeoneer's soul. Though they may have failed in their quest, an encouraging aura emanates from the spirit.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 死亡时提供第二次机会。传奇持枪者灵魂的一部分。即便他们在旅途中失败，其灵魂仍散发着鼓舞人心的气息。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Adds a heart container.; Upon death, the player respawns at the start of the current floor with one heart container (or 2 as The Robot), retaining all of their items and guns. The floor layout will remain the same, but all enemies previously killed will respawn. If the player reaches the location where they died and interacts with their soul, they will return to normal.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 增加一个红心容器。; 死亡后，玩家会在当前楼层起点以 1 个红心容器复活（机器人则为 2 个），并保留所有道具和枪械。楼层布局保持不变，但此前击杀的所有敌人都会重新生成。若玩家回到死亡地点并与自己的灵魂互动，就会恢复正常。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Crestfallen Soul If the player also has Crestfaller, dodge roll speed is increased by 20% and Crestfaller deals 50% more damage if the player dies and has not yet retrieved their soul.; Praise the Gun If the player has Old Knight's Flask, entering the Shop, exit elevator room, or Old Crest room will summon a bonfire. If the player dies, they will respawn at the last bonfire they activated instead of at the start of the floor. Additionally, dodge roll recovery time is reduced.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 沮丧之魂（Crestfallen Soul） 如果玩家还拥有沮丧之枪，翻滚速度提高 20%；若玩家死亡且尚未取回灵魂，沮丧之枪造成的伤害提高 50%。; 赞美枪（Praise the Gun） 如果玩家拥有老骑士的酒壶，进入商店、退出电梯房或古老纹章房时都会召唤篝火。若玩家死亡，会在最近一次激活的篝火处复活，而不是楼层起点。此外，翻滚恢复时间会缩短。
entries.englishUsageNotes: There is no limit to the number of times that the player can resurrect themselves with Gun Soul, provided they are able to return to their soul and reclaim it without perishing.; Bug: Using the Cryo Button to save and quit a run while in this spirit form will cause the player to be returned to normal upon re-entering the run. They will, however, have forfeited Gun Soul by leaving it behind.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 使用枪灵复活没有次数上限，只要玩家能回到自己的灵魂并把它捡回而不死，就可以不断复活。; 漏洞：在这种灵体状态下使用冷冻按钮存档并退出，再重新进入时，玩家会恢复正常；但他们会因为把枪灵留在原地而失去它。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Reveals secret doors. This can be used to pay off unscrupulous Snitch Bricks, who are willing to betray their mortared brethren for cold, hard cash. Not legal tender.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 揭示隐藏门。这可以用来贿赂那些毫无操守的告密砖块，它们愿意为了冷冰冰的真钞背叛自己抹灰的同胞。不是法定货币。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Causes a living 'Snitch Brick' to appear outside the entrances to Secret rooms, giving away their location.; Does not reveal Secret Rooms which cannot be opened with a Blank, such as the Trapdoor Room.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 会在秘密房间入口外生成一个活着的“告密砖块”，从而暴露其位置。; 无法揭示不能用空响弹开启的秘密房间，例如活板门房间。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Cash Rules Everygun Around Me If the player has Briefcase of Cash, firing any gun occasionally fires money which charms enemies.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 现金统治我的每一把枪（Cash Rules Everygun Around Me） 如果玩家拥有装满现金的公文包（一公文包的现金），发射任何枪械时偶尔会发射金钱，并魅惑敌人。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Prior to the Supply Drop Update, Brick of Cash was an A item.; When bought, Brick of Cash will not reveal a secret room next to the shop room until the shop is reentered.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 在《空投补给》更新之前，现金砖曾是 A 级道具。; 买下后，现金砖不会立即揭示商店房间旁边的秘密房间，直到玩家再次进入商店。

entries.unlock: Kill The Pilot's past.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Through thick and thin, this guy has always had your back. Now, he can say the same about you.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这家伙无论风雨都一直在你身后。现在，他也能这么说你。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Orbits the player, firing homing 20-damage rockets at enemies every 5 seconds.; These missiles will ignite any flammable goop they pass over.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 环绕玩家，每 5 秒向敌人发射 20 点伤害的追踪火箭。; 这些导弹会点燃它们经过的任何可燃泥浆。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Pilot Wingsman Wingman turns blue, and will fire 4 rockets at once.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 飞行员僚机（Pilot Wingsman） 僚机驾驶员（Wingman） 会变成蓝色，并一次发射 4 枚火箭。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The missiles fired by the Wingman will target a single enemy, and will seek it out until it impacts or the target dies. If the target of a missile dies while it is in flight, the missile will switch to a new target.; The Wingman is a miniature version of Z's ship from The Pilot's Past.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 僚机驾驶员（Wingman） 发射的导弹会锁定单个敌人，并一直追踪它直到命中或目标死亡。若导弹在飞行中目标死亡，它会切换到新的目标。; 僚机驾驶员（Wingman） 是飞行员过去里 Z（Z）的飞船缩小版。

entries.unlock: Kill The Hunter's past.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Faithful companion. Waited years for his master's return. Kept the Hunter company, long ago. Reunited with his master through the fractured timestream.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 忠诚的伙伴。等待主人的归来已有多年。很久以前，它一直陪伴着猎手（The Hunter）。通过破碎的时间流与主人重聚。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Summons a wolf companion who chases and bites enemies, dealing 5 damage per bite.; Wolf can pick up coin and Powerups, but will not actively seek them out.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 召唤一只狼伙伴，它会追击并撕咬敌人，每次咬击造成 5 点伤害。; 狼可以拾取硬币和强化道具（Powerups），但不会主动去找它们。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: I need scissors! 61! If the player also has Trank Gun, the gun changes appearance and its bullets will inflict slow.; The Red Hood If the player has Huntsman, while Huntsman is held, the Wolf's attacks will significantly weaken enemies.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 我需要剪刀！61！ 如果玩家还拥有麻醉枪（M9），这把枪会改变外观，子弹会附带减速。; 红斗篷（The Red Hood） 如果玩家拥有猎人之枪（斧头枪），在持有猎人之枪（斧头枪）时，狼的攻击会显著削弱敌人。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Wolf will not cross pits to attack.; The Wolf interacts unusually with certain bosses;
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 狼不会跨越深坑攻击。; 狼（Wolf） 与某些 Boss 的互动方式不同寻常；

entries.unlock: Kill The Convict's past.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: All the pain and suffering, the personal sacrifice... all the lies, the anger, the betrayal, and the revenge; was it worth it? Yes.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 所有痛苦与煎熬、个人牺牲……所有谎言、愤怒、背叛与复仇；这一切值得吗？值得。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Grants 250 coin and 3 HC when first picked up.; Dropping the Briefcase of Cash does not revoke the granted coin or HC, meaning it can be safely sold once picked up for an additional 41 coin.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 首次拾取时获得 250 枚硬币和 3 个红心容器。; 丢弃一公文包的现金不会收回已获得的硬币或红心容器，因此在拾取后可以安全出售，并额外获得 41 枚硬币。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Cash Rules Everygun Around Me If the player has Brick of Cash, firing any gun occasionally fires money which charms enemies.; Wicked Sister If the player also has Magnum, it gets 200 max ammo and a knife on the front of the gun that will block bullets when reloading.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 现金统治我的每一把枪（Cash Rules Everygun Around Me） 如果玩家拥有现金砖，发射任何枪械时偶尔会发射金钱，并魅惑敌人。; 邪恶姐妹（Wicked Sister） 如果玩家还拥有马格南手枪，它会获得 200 发最大弹药，并在枪前端长出一把会在换弹时挡子弹的刀。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Purchasing the Briefcase of Cash in a shop will result in a net gain of coin.; The Cash Rules Everygun Around Me Synergy is a reference to Wu-Tang Clan's "C.R.E.A.M" quote "Cash rules everything around me".
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 在商店购买一公文包的现金会净赚硬币。; “现金统治我周遭的一切”（C.R.E.A.M）这一协同参考了 Wu-Tang Clan（Wu-Tang Clan）的名句 “Cash rules everything around me”（Cash rules everything around me）。

entries.unlock: Kill The Marine's past.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Significantly increases damage dealt to powerful foes. Medal awarded for bravery in the face of certain doom. But most importantly, you didn't let down the unit. Good work, Marine.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 显著提高对强敌造成的伤害。象征着在某种毁灭命运面前仍然表现英勇的奖章。最重要的是，你没有让部队失望。干得好，海军陆战队员。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Deal 30% more damage to Bosses.; Halves reload time.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 对 Boss 造成的伤害提高 30%。; 换弹时间减半。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Decorated The Hegemony Carbine fires three bullets in a tight spread.; Hegemony Special Forces Hegemony Rifle changes form, and fires accurate instantaneous piercing laser blasts.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 装饰过的（Decorated） 如果玩家拥有帝国卡宾枪，它会发射三发紧密散布的子弹。; 帝国特种部队（Hegemony Special Forces） 如果玩家拥有帝国步枪，它会变形并发射精准、瞬时、穿透性的激光爆发。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Will carry over to a Gungeoneer's past.; The exception to this is in the Pilot's past, where the item doesn't appear within the player's inventory, but will appear in the ending screen.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 会继承到持枪者的过去中。; 唯一例外是飞行员（The Pilot）的过去，在那里该道具不会出现在玩家物品栏中，但会出现在结局画面里。

entries.unlock: Have The Breach fully populated.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Increased combat effectiveness per gun. This ring takes a small amount of power from each gun carried and adds it to the currently equipped gun.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 按持有枪械数量提升战斗力。这枚戒指会从每把携带的枪中抽取少量力量，并加到当前装备的枪上。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Increases damage based on the other guns the player has.; 2% of the total damage of the player's non-equipped guns is added as flat damage to the player's currently equipped gun.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 根据玩家拥有的其他枪械提高伤害。; 玩家未装备枪械总伤害的 2% 会作为固定伤害加到当前装备的枪上。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Captain Plant It If the player has Portable Turret, Portable Turret gains Unity's damage bonus.; Garbage Collecting If the player has Trashcannon, hitting an enemy with it causes it and its bullets to briefly freeze.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 舰长栽种它（Captain Plant It） 如果玩家拥有便携式炮塔，便携式炮塔会获得 Unity（Unity）的伤害加成。; 垃圾回收（Garbage Collecting） 如果玩家拥有垃圾加农炮，用它击中敌人会让它和它的子弹短暂冻结。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 25 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Chain-fires homing rockets. A legendary weapon manufactured by Zilla Industries. This one was created bespoke for a powerful warrior, whose name has been lost to shadow.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 连发追踪火箭。一把由 Zilla Industries（Zilla Industries） 制造的传奇武器。这把武器是为一名强大战士量身定制的，而那位战士的名字已被阴影抹去。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Rapidly fires tightly 220 rockets that create small explosions upon hitting an enemy.; The damage dealt by these rockets (both their impact damage and explosive damage) bypass the Boss DPS cap, allowing this gun to kill bosses extremely quickly.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 快速发射 220 枚紧密排列的火箭，命中敌人时会产生小爆炸。; 这些火箭造成的伤害（包括命中和爆炸伤害）会无视 Boss 每秒伤害上限，让这把枪能极快击杀 Boss。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Hail To The King If the player also has Oiled Cylinder, Yari Launcher's magazine size is increased by 50% and its damage is increased by 20%.; Shadow Warrior If the player also has Zilla Shotgun, when either gun is held, the player gains an orbiting Demon Head that fires on empty magazine reload. Reduces the guns' spread by 60%, increasing their accuracy.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 向国王致敬（Hail To The King） 如果玩家还拥有油缸，Yari Launcher（Yari Launcher）的弹匣容量提高 50%，伤害提高 20%。; 暗影战士（Shadow Warrior） 如果玩家还拥有齐拉霰弹枪，只要持有任意一把枪，玩家就会获得一个环绕的恶魔头（恶魔首脑），它会在空弹匣换弹时开火。枪械散布降低 60%，提高精准度。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The gun is a reference to the rocket launcher in the 2013 reboot of Shadow Warrior.; The orbiting Demon Head gained through the Shadow Warrior synergy is likely a reference to one of the game's weapons, a demon head that shoots a laser out of its mouth.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪致敬了 2013 年重启版《Shadow Warrior》（Shadow Warrior）中的火箭发射器。; 通过暗影战士协同获得的环绕恶魔头，很可能参考了游戏中的一种武器：一个会从嘴里射激光的恶魔头。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Unlike normal blanks, the Elder Blank may be reused. Feared strongly by the Order of the True Gun. Anathema to all Gunkind.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 不同于普通空响弹，旧式空响弹可以重复使用。被真枪教团深深畏惧。对所有枪类生物的异端。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Upon use, activates a blank.; Increases by 2 while held.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 使用时触发一次空响。; 持有时增加 2。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Blank Generation If the player has Blank Companion's Ring, the companion becomes a smaller version of Old Red and will automatically fire a second blank after Elder Blank's effect ends.; Bullet Kiln If the player also has The Kiln or Luxin Cannon, Elder Blank creates a Glass Guon Stone upon use if either gun is held, up to a maximum of four at a time. This limit can be worked around by dropping excess glass guon stones on the floor before using the Elder Blank, and then collecting them again.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 空响生成（Blank Generation） 如果玩家拥有空响弹伙伴之戒（Blank Companion's Ring），该伙伴会变成旧红（Old Red）的较小版本，并会在旧式空响弹效果结束后自动再发射一次空响。; 子弹窑（Bullet Kiln） 如果玩家还拥有窑枪（The Kiln）或鲁信加农炮（Luxin Cannon），只要持有任意一把枪，使用旧式空响弹时都会生成一个玻璃滚石，最多同时 4 个。玩家可以在使用旧式空响弹之前先把多余的玻璃滚石丢在地上，再重新捡起，以绕过这个上限。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Elder Blank does not activate the Blank Shrine.; Elder Blank and Daruma are the only active items that can be used while dodge rolling.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 旧式空响弹不会激活空响神龛。; 旧式空响弹和达摩是唯一可以在翻滚时使用的主动道具。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Fires a bullet upon reloading.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 发射一发子弹，作为换弹的附带效果。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Reloading a weapon fires a single bullet from it for free. The bullet fired is always perfectly accurate, even if the gun is not.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 换弹时会免费从武器中发射一发子弹。射出的子弹始终完全精准，即使原枪并不精准。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: All Out Of Law If the player has Colt 1851, it fires three tight spreads of three bullets upon reloading. These projectiles can ignore tables when fired from behind them, and they can reveal secret rooms without angering the shopkeeper Bello.; Pretty Good If the player has SAA, coolness is increased by 2.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 一网打尽（All Out Of Law） 如果玩家拥有柯尔特1851，换弹时它会一次射出三组紧密的三发齐射。这些投射物在从掩体后射出时可以无视桌子，并且能在不激怒商店老板贝洛（Bello）的情况下揭示秘密房间。; 相当不错（Pretty Good） 如果玩家拥有单动左轮（柯尔特单动左轮），冷静度提高 2。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This item works well with single shot weapons, effectively doubling their firepower.; This item appears to fire the "Default" version of a projectile - for example, on Charged weapons that have an "uncharged" state like the Megahand and Heroine, the Hip Holster will fire the uncharged projectile.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这件道具与单发武器配合良好，实际上能把火力翻倍。; 这件道具似乎会发射弹体的“默认”（Default）版本。例如，对于像洛克手炮和女英雄这类拥有“未蓄力”（uncharged）状态的蓄力武器，臀部皮套会发射未蓄力弹体。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 25 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Chain-fires homing rockets. A legendary weapon manufactured by Zilla Industries. This one was created bespoke for a powerful warrior, whose name has been lost to shadow.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 连发追踪火箭。一把由 Zilla Industries（Zilla Industries） 制造的传奇武器。这把武器是为一名强大战士量身定制的，而那位战士的名字已被阴影抹去。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Rapidly fires tightly 220 rockets that create small explosions upon hitting an enemy.; The damage dealt by these rockets (both their impact damage and explosive damage) bypass the Boss DPS cap, allowing this gun to kill bosses extremely quickly.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 快速发射 220 枚紧密排列的火箭，命中敌人时会产生小爆炸。; 这些火箭造成的伤害（包括命中和爆炸伤害）会无视 Boss 每秒伤害上限，让这把枪能极快击杀 Boss。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Hail To The King If the player also has Oiled Cylinder, Yari Launcher's magazine size is increased by 50% and its damage is increased by 20%.; Shadow Warrior If the player also has Zilla Shotgun, when either gun is held, the player gains an orbiting Demon Head that fires on empty magazine reload. Reduces the guns' spread by 60%, increasing their accuracy.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 向国王致敬（Hail To The King） 如果玩家还拥有油缸，Yari Launcher（Yari Launcher）的弹匣容量提高 50%，伤害提高 20%。; 暗影战士（Shadow Warrior） 如果玩家还拥有齐拉霰弹枪，只要持有任意一把枪，玩家就会获得一个环绕的恶魔头（恶魔首脑），它会在空弹匣换弹时开火。枪械散布降低 60%，提高精准度。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The gun is a reference to the rocket launcher in the 2013 reboot of Shadow Warrior.; The orbiting Demon Head gained through the Shadow Warrior synergy is likely a reference to one of the game's weapons, a demon head that shoots a laser out of its mouth.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪致敬了 2013 年重启版《Shadow Warrior》（Shadow Warrior）中的火箭发射器。; 通过暗影战士协同获得的环绕恶魔头，很可能参考了游戏中的一种武器：一个会从嘴里射激光的恶魔头。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: This strange gun, shaped like a bullet, fires bullets that are shaped like guns. Those gun-shaped bullets continue to fire bullets in-flight, but those bullets look like bullets. Straightforward Gungeon engineering!
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把奇怪的枪长得像一颗子弹，却发射长得像枪的子弹。那些枪形子弹会在飞行中继续发射子弹，但那些子弹看起来又像普通子弹。非常直白的地牢工程！
entries.englishUsageNotes: Blammo! If the player also has Shell, the guns are dual-wielded.; This gun seems to be in reference to two colloquial sayings that mean relatively the same thing - "Firing a gun" and "Firing a bullet". The meanings are swapped, but still technically are true.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 砰！ 如果玩家还拥有壳（Shell），这两把枪会双持。; 这把枪似乎参考了两句意思相近的俗语——“开枪”（Firing a gun）和“发射子弹”（Firing a bullet）。它们的含义互换了，但从技术上说仍然成立。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 22 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Shots that impact foes are refunded. A weapon once carried by a brave wanderer, whose exploits are lost to the drifts of time. Designed to work in tandem with a blade, this one has been modified to recharge itself.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 命中敌人的射击会返还弹药。一把曾由勇敢流浪者携带的武器，其事迹已湮没于时间洪流之中。它本来就为与剑协同而设计，而这把武器经过改造后，能够自行充能。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires pink lasers, with high damage per shot.; Has an extremely low maximum ammo, however landing a shot on an enemy will restore 1 ammo to the gun.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射粉色激光，每发伤害很高。; 最大弹药极少，不过命中敌人会为这把枪回复 1 发弹药。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Hard Light If the player also has the Light Gun, Hyper Light Blaster's magazine size and maximum ammo is increased by 50% and it gains homing. Light Gun gains a chance to regenerate one or two ammo when hitting enemies.; When reloading with the new appearance caused by the Hard Light synergy, the appearance will revert to the original for the duration of the reload.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 硬光（Hard Light） 如果玩家还拥有光之枪，光超霸（Hyper Light Blaster）的弹匣容量和最大弹药提高 50%，并获得追踪效果。光之枪在命中敌人时有几率回复 1 或 2 发弹药。; 由硬光协同造成的新外观在换弹时会暂时恢复为原始外观。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Shot creatures do not need to be hostile to restore ammo to this gun. As such, shooting chickens and rats will still restore ammunition.; Shooting an enemy that is in the midst of its death animation will still restore ammo, as long as the enemy hitbox still blocks bullets.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 被射中的生物不必是敌对状态，也能为这把枪补充弹药。因此，射鸡和射老鼠仍会回复弹药。; 射击一个正处于死亡动画中的敌人，只要该敌人的命中框仍能挡住子弹，也仍会回复弹药。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Reload for momentary safety. A misbegotten attempt to combine melee and ranged combat, the axe portion of this gun is mostly worthless. Reloading it involves swinging the blade around wildly, which might protect you from a stray bullet.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 换弹时能获得短暂安全。把近战与远程战斗硬凑到一起的拙劣尝试，这把枪的斧头部分基本没什么用。换弹时会疯狂挥舞刀刃，或许能替你挡下一发流弹。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Insight If the player also has Trick Gun, a creature that resembles the Interdimensional Horror appears at entrances to secret rooms, revealing their location.; Iron Stance If the player also has Heavy Boots, the gun's damage and knockback are increased by 20%, its shot speed is increased by 50%, and its reload time is decreased by 20%.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 直觉（Insight） 如果玩家还拥有魔术枪，一种看起来像跨维度恐怖的生物会出现在秘密房间入口处，从而揭示其位置。; 铁姿（Iron Stance） 如果玩家还拥有重靴子，这把枪的伤害和击退提高 20%，射击速度提高 50%，换弹时间减少 20%。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Peculiarly, the Huntsman is a part of the FULLAUTO gun class despite not being remotely fully automatic. This is probably to classify it with other weapons that delete bullets on reload, such as Excaliber and Fightsabre.; Because the Huntsman is not SHOTGUN type despite being a shotgun, it does not benefit from the Shotgun Affinity synergy.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 奇怪的是，斧头枪（Huntsman） 在枪械类别里属于 FULLAUTO，尽管它一点也不全自动。这大概是为了把它和其他会在换弹时清掉子弹的武器归类在一起，比如亚瑟王的神剑和军刀。; 因为斧头枪（Huntsman） 虽然是霰弹枪却不是 SHOTGUN 类型，所以它无法受益于霰弹枪亲和（Shotgun Affinity）协同。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 28 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Energizes companionable listeners. Barely a gun at all, but a very, very special lute. Or so were[sic] told. Seems to get out of tune when blue fire is around.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 让伙伴听众振作起来。它几乎算不上枪，只是一把非常、非常特别的鲁特琴。至少据说如此。蓝色火焰出现时，它似乎会走音。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires a spread of 7 musical note bullets that each have an 8.5% chance to charm enemies for 6 seconds.; While firing, buffs the players companions- doubling their damage.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射 7 发音符子弹的散布，每发音符有 8.5% 的几率让敌人魅惑 6 秒。; 射击时会强化玩家的伙伴，使其伤害翻倍。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Three Part Harmony If the player also has Metronome, the gun's spread is drastically decreased to about half its normal amount.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 三部和声（Three Part Harmony） 如果玩家还拥有节拍器，这把枪的散布会大幅降低，大约减半。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun is completely unaffected by accuracy increasing items, such as Muscle Relaxant.; This gun’s description is a reference to Patrick Rothfuss’s Kingkiller Chronicle book series. The main character, Kvothe, plays the lute, and searches throughout the series for a way to defeat the Chandrian, a magical group that cause flames to turn blue when they are near.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪完全不受提升精准度道具影响，例如肌肉松弛剂。; 这把枪的描述致敬了帕特里克·罗斯福斯（Patrick Rothfuss）的《国王杀手编年史》（Kingkiller Chronicle）系列小说。主角科沃斯（Kvothe）会弹鲁特琴，并在整个系列中寻找击败钱德里安（Chandrian）的方法。钱德里安（Chandrian）是一个会让附近火焰变成蓝色的魔法团体。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 20 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Charge sequentially for more shots! A Watering can used by the Bullet Kin, who lack even a fundamental understanding of agriculture.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 按顺序充能，就能发射更多弹丸！这是一把由子弹枪兵（Bullet Kin）使用的喷水壶，而他们甚至连农业的基本概念都不懂。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Charges up to fire droplets of water. This gun has multiple levels of charge, and each level increases the number of droplets fired.; No Charge - Fires a single droplet.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 充能后发射水滴。这把枪有多个充能等级，每一级都会增加发射的水滴数量。; 未充能时 - 发射一滴水。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Pea Cannon If the player also has Pea Shooter, Pea Shooter shots become larger, deal more damage, and explode.; Recycling Bin If the player also has Trashcannon, Trashcannon is transformed into a recycling bin, gaining higher damage and a larger magazine size, and no longer creating poison projectiles.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 豌豆炮（Pea Cannon） 如果玩家还拥有豌豆枪（射豆枪），豌豆枪子弹会变大、伤害更高，并会爆炸。; 回收桶（Recycling Bin） 如果玩家还拥有垃圾加农炮，垃圾加农炮会变成回收桶，获得更高伤害和更大的弹匣容量，并且不再生成毒液投射物。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun is a reference to the Watering Can tool in the game Stardew Valley, a tile-based agricultural game. As the player upgrades their watering can, they can 'charge' it to cover a greater area of farmland. This is mirrored in the Starpew creating a wider grid of water projectiles the longer it is charged.; Originally, Starpew's magazine size was 100 and it did not need to reload. This was changed in the Advanced Gungeons & Draguns Update, at which point it instead had a magazine size of 1, effectively slowing down the fire rate by requiring a reload after every shot. This change was reverted in A Farewell to Arms, and the charging speed was increased as well, meaning it can fire fully-charged shots faster and has less delay in between them.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪参考了《星露谷物语》（Stardew Valley）里的喷水壶工具，这是一款基于格子的农业游戏。随着玩家升级喷水壶，他们可以“充能”它，以覆盖更大的农田范围。星露喷水壶（Starpew）的水弹覆盖网格会随着充能时间变长而变得更宽，这与之相呼应。; 最初，星露喷水壶（Starpew）的弹匣容量是 100，而且不需要换弹。到了《先进地牢与喷龙》（Advanced Gungeons & Draguns）更新时，这一点被修改为弹匣容量 1，从而因为每次射击都要换弹而有效降低了射速。后来在《永别了，武器》（A Farewell to Arms）中这一改动被撤销，充能速度也被提高，因此它能更快发射满充能射击，而且两次射击之间的延迟更短。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 20 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Uses no ammo, but recharges like an item. A thousand worlds away on a war-torn planet, this pistol is used in duels to the death. Its powerful beam consumes no ammo, but takes time to recharge. A hasty shot comes with a price.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 不消耗弹药，但像道具一样充能。这把手枪在千里之外一颗战火纷飞的星球上，被用于决斗至死。它强力的光束不耗弹药，但需要时间充能。仓促开枪是要付出代价的。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Banshee Cry If the player has Screecher, it fires three sound waves per shot instead of one.; Death Square If the player has Dueling Pistol, damaging enemies with the Dueling Pistol rapidly recharges the Dueling Laser.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 女妖哭喊（Banshee Cry） 如果玩家拥有尖啸者（声波枪），它每次射击会发射三道声波，而不是一道。; 死亡方阵（Death Square） 如果玩家拥有决斗手枪，用决斗手枪伤害敌人会快速为决斗激光充能。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Noodle shaped like a gun. Frightens enemies. Long, flat, gun shaped noodle. A staple of gundead cuisine. However, Gundead have a culturally embedded fear of being hit by a spinning gun-noodle, as adolescent Gundead claim that the limp and wiggly properties of the noodle are transferred to new carriers on contact.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 长得像枪的面条。会吓到敌人。又长又平、枪形的面条。地牢亡灵餐桌上的主食。不过，地牢亡灵文化里对被旋转的枪面条击中有一种根深蒂固的恐惧，因为未成年的地牢亡灵声称，这种面条柔软又扭曲的特性会在接触时转移给新的持有者。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Killing Joke If the player also has AK-47, the two guns are dual-wielded.; Soft Air If the player also has Sponge, when holding the JK-47, the player regains ammo when walking over liquids, and increases fear range while reloading.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 杀戮玩笑（The Killing Joke） 如果玩家还拥有 AK-47，这两把枪会双持。; 软空气（Soft Air） 如果玩家还拥有海绵，持有 JK-47 时，玩家在液体上行走会回复弹药，并在换弹时增加恐惧范围。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 28 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Allows for direct control of foes. Purchased as a gift for a child of the Gungeon, upon their first successful trip to the mines. Due to an unfortunate combination of exceptional clumsiness and a living space full of pits, the controller was soon lost to the depths of the Gungeon. One of the sticks is extremely wiggly.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 直接操控敌人。它原本是送给地牢里一个孩子的礼物，那孩子第一次顺利下矿后便收到了它。可惜这份礼物兼具惊人的笨拙和满地坑洞的居住环境，这个手柄很快就沉入了地牢深处。它的一个摇杆晃得特别厉害。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Mad Cats If the player also has Cat Bullet King Throne, the bullets shot from Cat Bullet King Throne home in on enemies while 3rd Party Controller is equipped.; Controlled enemies do not deal contact damage to the player, and can be killed safely by rolling over them.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 疯猫帮（Mad Cats）如果玩家还拥有 猫弹王王座，装备 第三方手柄（3rd Party Controller）时，猫弹王王座 发射的子弹会自动追踪敌人。; 被操控的敌人不会对玩家造成接触伤害，而且可以安全地滚过去将其击杀。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: This strange gun, shaped like a shotgun shell, fires bullets that are shaped like shotguns. Those shotgun-shaped bullets will fire a spray of rounds upon impact, much like a shotgun would.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把奇怪的枪外形像霰弹壳，却发射出形状像霰弹枪的子弹。这些霰弹枪形状的子弹在撞击时会喷出一片弹丸，就像真正的霰弹枪一样。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Blammo! If the player also has Bullet, the guns are dual-wielded.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 爆轰（Blammo）！如果玩家还拥有 子弹枪，这两把枪会双持。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun seems to be in reference to two colloquial sayings that mean relatively the same thing - "Firing a gun" and "Firing a shell". The meanings are swapped, but still technically are true.; The smaller bullets fired by launched shotgun are not affected by the player's Damage stat.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪似乎在引用两个意思相近的口语说法，分别是“开枪”（Firing a gun）和“打壳”（Firing a shell）。意思被对调了，但严格说也都没错。; 发射出去的霰弹枪子弹所喷出的较小子弹不受玩家伤害属性影响。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: This souped-up T-Shirt Cannon fires tainted apparel. Enemies defeated after contracting the pox will leave a pool of deadly ooze behind.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这台强化版定制衬衫加农炮（T恤加农炮）会发射受污染的衣物。被疱疹感染后击败的敌人会留下致命的污泥。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: The Return If the player has Pig, it turns green and fires flaming bats.; Well Dressed If the player also has T-Shirt Cannon, both guns fire explosive wardrobes at the end of their magazines.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 回归（The Return）如果玩家还拥有 猪，这把枪会变成绿色并发射燃烧的蝙蝠。; 盛装打扮（Well Dressed）如果玩家还拥有 定制衬衫加农炮（T恤加农炮），两把枪会在弹匣打空时射出爆炸性的衣柜。

stats.value: One Row, no Fireball: 20.7 All Rows, no Fireball: 82.8 One Row, Fireball: 52.6 All Rows, Fireball: 210.3

entries.englishGameplaySummary: When this gun runs out of ammo, it is destroyed, creating a chest. This pad was once used as the summons for an ancient convocation of wizards. It is crusted from years of use, notably Back, Back, Low Punch.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 当这把枪的弹药耗尽时，它会被摧毁并生成一个宝箱。这个方向键曾被用作一场古代巫师集会的召唤道具。它因为年复一年的使用而结满污垢，尤其是“后、后、低拳”（Back, Back, Low Punch）这套招式。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Wrath Of The Blam If the player has Tear Jerker, Tear Jerker is replaced with a crying bullet head that can only fire in cardinal directions but deals double damage.; The grappling hook can be used to steal items from shops.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 爆怒之威（Wrath Of The Blam）如果玩家拥有 催泪枪，催泪枪 会被替换成一个哭泣的子弹头，它只能朝四个正方向开火，但伤害翻倍。; 抓钩可以用来从商店里偷东西。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 22 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Fires a tracking beam which, when held on an enemy target, calls down an orbital strike. Persists while the trigger is held. Can be guided.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 发射一束追踪光束，当它停留在敌人目标上时，会呼叫一次轨道打击。按住扳机时持续存在。可手动引导。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires a thin red targeting laser that does no damage.; Focusing the targeting beam on an enemy will, after a short delay, call down an extremely powerful orbital laser strike at their location.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射一束细红色瞄准激光，不造成伤害。; 将瞄准光束对准敌人后，短暂停顿即可在其位置呼叫一次极其强力的轨道激光打击。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Chest High is the Best High If the player also has Cog of Battle, damage is increased by 25% and the player will glow yellow after flipping a table, increasing damage by 100% for a brief time.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 胸口高才最棒（Chest High is the Best High） 如果玩家还拥有 战斗齿轮（Cog of Battle），伤害提高 25%，并且在掀翻桌子后会发黄光，短时间内伤害提高 100%。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Inactive mimics will not be activated by the tracking beam, and cannot be targeted for a strike.; The tracking beam will destroy destructibles, such as the Beholster's RC rockets.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 未激活的拟态不会被追踪光束激活，也无法成为打击目标。; 追踪光束会摧毁可破坏物，例如 贝霍尔斯特（Beholster）的 RC 火箭。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 28 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Transforms between three forms based on current ammo. Though it appears at first to be a gun like any other, this gun is in actuality a very rare plant.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 会根据当前弹药在三种形态之间切换。虽然乍看只是普通枪械，但它实际上是一株极为罕见的植物。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Transitions between different forms based on its current ammo count.; When at 70% ammo on the Revolver form (175 ammo if ammo capactiy has not been modified) it will transition to Machine Gun form.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 会根据当前弹药数在不同形态之间转换。; 在左轮形态下弹药达到 70% 时（如果弹容量未被修改，则为 175 发），会转变为机枪形态。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Plant Power If the player also has Broccoli, the gun transforms from machine gun to beam at 150/500 ammo.; some even larger number If the player also has Quad Laser, enemies killed will shoot out a quad laser shot aimed towards the nearest enemy.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 植物之力（Plant Power） 如果玩家还拥有 西兰花，这把枪会在 150/500 弹药时从机枪形态转为光束形态。; 甚至更大的数字（some even larger number） 如果玩家还拥有 四联激光炮（方正激光炮），被击杀的敌人会朝最近的敌人射出一发四联激光。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun is a reference to the anime Trigun, with its first form's appearance resembling the revolver used by its main character, Vash the Stampede. Its second form is in reference to the main character's arm machine gun, and the third to his Angel Arm.; The line, "this gun is in actuality a very rare plant," is a reference to the Plants in Trigun, interdimensional beings whose bodies produce seemingly endless amounts of luminous yellow energy, similar to the third form's beam attack.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪参考了动画《枪神》（Trigun），其第一形态的外观类似于主角 瓦什·斯坦佩德（Vash the Stampede） 使用的左轮手枪。第二形态参考的是主角手臂上的机枪，第三形态则对应他的 天使臂（Angel Arm）。; 这句“这把枪其实是一株极其稀有的植物”（this gun is in actuality a very rare plant）是对《枪神》（Trigun）里 植物（Plants） 的引用，那些跨维度生命体的身体会产生看似无穷无尽的黄色发光能量，和第三形态的光束攻击很像。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Pass judgement on your enemies.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 审判你的敌人。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: A green bullet that deals 4 damage, poison enemies, and leaves a small puddle of poison goop.; A flare that deals 4 damage and sets enemies on fire.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 一发造成 4 点伤害、使敌人中毒并留下少量毒液污渍的绿色子弹。; 一发造成 4 点伤害并点燃敌人的信号弹。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: To Serve Android The police officer turns into a robot and becomes invincible.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 为安卓人服务（To Serve Android） 警察会变成机器人，并进入无敌状态。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun is a reference to Judge Dredd's gun, the Lawgiver.; The pickup quote "Hot Shot" is one of the Lawgiver's settings.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪参考了 法官德雷德（Judge Dredd） 的武器 裁决者（Lawgiver）。; 便条上的“热射”（Hot Shot）是 裁决者（Lawgiver） 的一个设定。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Pass judgement on your enemies.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 审判你的敌人。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: A green bullet that deals 4 damage, poison enemies, and leaves a small puddle of poison goop.; A flare that deals 4 damage and sets enemies on fire.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 一发造成 4 点伤害、使敌人中毒并留下少量毒液污渍的绿色子弹。; 一发造成 4 点伤害并点燃敌人的信号弹。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: To Serve Android The police officer turns into a robot and becomes invincible.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 为安卓人服务（To Serve Android） 警察会变成机器人，并进入无敌状态。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun is a reference to Judge Dredd's gun, the Lawgiver.; The pickup quote "Hot Shot" is one of the Lawgiver's settings.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪参考了 法官德雷德（Judge Dredd） 的武器 裁决者（Lawgiver）。; 便条上的“热射”（Hot Shot）是 裁决者（Lawgiver） 的一个设定。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 26 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Alternates between firing pulse blasts and an extremely powerful ball of dark energy. Alien technology, co-opted by the Hegemony of Man after the successful liberation of Planet 17.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 在脉冲爆裂和一团极其强大的暗能量球之间交替发射。外星科技，在 17 号星球成功解放后被人类霸权政权接管。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Reloading alternates between two different firing modes.; The first firing mode is a rapid-fire rifle.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 换弹时会在两种射击模式之间切换。; 第一种射击模式是一把连发步枪。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Combined Rifle is a reference to the Overwatch Standard Issue Pulse Rifle, also known as the AR2, from Half-Life 2.; The name is a direct reference to the Combine from Half-Life 2.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 组合步枪（Combined Rifle）是《半衰期 2》（Half-Life 2）中的守望先锋标准制式脉冲步枪，也称 AR2。; 这个名字直接引用了《半衰期 2》里的 合成人（Combine）。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Grants flight while held, but pops when damage is taken. Can be reinflated with an ammo box. A common party favor at Gungeon parties. Gungeon parties are, to be fair, fairly uncommon.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 持有时可飞行，但受到伤害时会爆掉。可用弹药箱重新充气。是地牢派对上常见的派对礼物。不过说实话，地牢派对也并不常见。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Get Equipped With -A- Enables Air Shooter mode on the Megahand, which fires piercing and 400 tornadoes when uncharged. Modes can be switched by reloading the Megahand with a full magazine.; Paper Lanterns If the player also has Origuni, while holding either gun in a room with enemies, paper lanterns periodically spawn, which drift towards enemies and deal damage.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 获取装备 -A- 会为 洛克手炮 启用 空中射手 模式，在未蓄力时发射可穿透并造成 400 点伤害的龙卷风。可以通过在满弹匣时重装 洛克手炮 来切换模式。; 纸灯笼（Paper Lanterns） 如果玩家还拥有 折纸枪，持有任意一把枪并进入有敌人的房间时，会周期性生成纸灯笼，它们会飘向敌人并造成伤害。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Balloon gun will still pop if the player takes damage to Armor.; If the Balloon Gun loses its ammo due to taking damage, it will be rendered invisible, having no sprite until ammo is restored. Running out of ammo in the regular fashion does not 'pop' the balloon gun or alter its sprite.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 如果玩家受到的是护甲伤害，气球枪也一样会爆。; 如果 气球枪（Balloon Gun） 因受伤而失去弹药，它会变得不可见，在弹药恢复前都不会显示贴图。常规方式打空弹药不会让气球枪“爆掉”，也不会改变它的贴图。

entries.unlock: Reach the Black Powder Mine in challenge mode.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Sometimes fires bullets from other carried guns. These projectiles create tiny spacetime rifts inside each of the wielder's carried guns, occasionally teleporting bullets from one to another.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 有时会发射来自其他携带枪械的子弹。这些投射物会在持有者随身携带的每把枪里制造微小的时空裂隙，偶尔把子弹从一把枪传送到另一把枪。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Upon firing, adds a chance to fire projectiles from the player's other guns. Shots fired this way from other guns do not consume ammo from that gun.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 开火时会有概率发射玩家其他枪械中的投射物。通过这种方式从其他枪发射的子弹不会消耗那把枪的弹药。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Maximize Spell If the player also has Flame Hand, Flame Hand becomes green and creates pools of green fire. Green fire does not damage the player, and enemies that touch green fire are permanently aflame.; Turret Link If the player also has Portable Turret, Portable Turret will sometimes fire shots from guns in the player's inventory.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 最大化咒语（Maximize Spell） 如果玩家还拥有 火焰之手，火焰之手 会变成绿色并生成绿色火焰池。绿色火焰不会伤害玩家，接触绿色火焰的敌人会永久着火。; 炮塔联动（Turret Link） 如果玩家还拥有 便携炮塔（便携式炮塔），便携炮塔 有时会发射来自玩家物品栏中枪械的子弹。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 12 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Increases damage at close range. These bullets were taken from Frifle's private collection, but lost to the labyrinth during his first attempt at the Gungeon.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 提升近距离伤害。这些子弹来自弗里夫尔（Frifle）的私人收藏，但在他第一次闯入地牢时迷失在迷宫里。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: At close range, bullets are 50% larger and deal significantly more damage.; The damage multiplier at close range is based on the projectiles original range stat, equal to 1.125 + 0.625 * (range - 7) / 15, with a minimum multiplier of 1.125x and a maximum multiplier of 1.75x.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 在近距离下，子弹体积会增大 50%，并造成显著更高的伤害。; 近距离的伤害倍率基于投射物原始射程属性，等于 1.125 + 0.625 * (射程 - 7) / 15，最低倍率为 1.125 倍，最高倍率为 1.75 倍。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Dwarven Stout If the player also has Double Vision, the item will triple shots fired instead of double.; Iron Slug If the player also has Big Iron, the gun fires one very large, slow moving iron bullet that does increased damage.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 矮人烈酒（Dwarven Stout） 如果玩家还拥有 双重视野（复视药酒），该道具会让每次射击变成三连而不是双连。; 铁弹头（Iron Slug） 如果玩家还拥有 大铁枪，这把枪会发射一枚巨大、缓慢移动的铁制子弹，造成更高伤害。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Thrown guns will also increase in size and remain large after being picked up.; If the player also has Fat Bullets, bullets will become extremely large. Upon firing, they may make contact with a wall and disappear instantly.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 被扔出的枪械体积也会增大，并在捡起后仍保持巨大。; 如果玩家还拥有 胖胖子弹，子弹会变得极大。开火时，它们可能会撞到墙壁并立刻消失。

entries.unlock: Use Lament Configurum 20 times.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Rare chance for a projectile to go berserk. Say one thing for these bullets, say they are coated with the blood of vanquished enemies.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 投射物偶尔会陷入暴走。说一样子弹好的话，就得说它们浸透了被击败敌人的鲜血。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Adds an 8% chance per second for a bullet to be replaced by a fast, homing, piercing, and bouncing bullet that flies around the room damaging enemies.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 每秒有 8% 的几率把一发子弹替换成一枚高速、追踪、穿透且会弹跳的子弹，它会在房间里飞来飞去伤害敌人。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Venom Veins If the player has Mutation, Mutation poisons enemies.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 毒脉（Venom Veins） 如果玩家拥有 变异手臂，变异手臂 会使敌人中毒。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The chance to fire a berserk round is higher for slower weapons. For example, it is nearly 100% for a fully charged BSG.; This item can be detrimental with certain items, such as the Black Hole Gun, since it completely replaces the gun’s regular shot.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 暴走弹的触发概率会随着武器射速变慢而提高。例如，完全蓄满的 大射机枪 几乎是 100%。; 这个道具和某些物品搭配时会有副作用，比如 黑洞枪，因为它会完全替换掉枪械的常规射击。

entries.unlock: Rescue Daisuke from a [[File:cellicon.png
entries.englishGameplaySummary: This puzzle box plays beautiful, melodic tones as it is solved. Who knows what mysterious wonders it contains?
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这个谜题盒在被解开时会发出优美悠扬的音调。谁知道它里面藏着什么神秘奇观？
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Upon use, spawns 3 to 5 enemies. If opened, it will spawn a gun or item. The Lament Configurum must be used a certain number of times before it is successfully opened, and each time it spawns a gun or item, the number of uses it takes to open increases by 1. It always spawns rewards on the 2nd, 5th, 9th, 14th, 20th, etc. uses.; There is a 25% chance that it will damage the player upon spawning a gun or item.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 使用时会生成 3 到 5 个敌人。若将其打开，它会生成一把枪或一个道具。悲伤拼图盒必须使用一定次数后才能成功打开，而且每次生成枪械或道具后，打开它所需的使用次数都会增加 1。它总是在第 2、5、9、14、20 次等使用时生成奖励。; 生成枪械或道具时，有 25% 的几率会对玩家造成伤害。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Heart-Shaped Box If the player has Heart Lunchbox, Lament Configurum will heal the player instead of dealing damage.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 心形盒子（Heart-Shaped Box） 如果玩家拥有 心形饭盒，悲伤拼图盒 会治疗玩家而不是造成伤害。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Possible enemies spawned include Ashen Bullet Kin, Fallen Bullet Kin, Creeches, Executioners, Bloodbulons, and Poopulons.; Lament Configurum is sold for the price of an A item in shops even though it is a B item.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 可能生成的敌人包括 灰烬子弹枪兵、堕落子弹枪兵、蠕爬怪、刽子手、血泡怪和粪泡怪。; 悲伤拼图盒在商店里的售价和 A 级道具一样，尽管它其实是 B 级道具。

entries.unlock: Kill 15 Keybullet Kin.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Allows a second dodge while rolling. Originally worn by a legendary thief to scale impossible heights, the peculiar properties of these boots allow a Gungeoneer to extend their dodge roll - and are therefore a tremendously powerful item.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 允许在翻滚中再进行一次闪避。最初由一位传奇盗贼穿着，以攀越不可能的高处；这双靴子的特殊属性让地牢探险者可以延长翻滚，因此是极其强力的道具。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Allows the player to dodge roll again mid-roll, interrupting their initial roll and allowing them to quickly change directions.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 允许玩家在翻滚途中再次闪避，打断原本的翻滚并让他们更快改变方向。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Double Down If the player also has Gunboots, its cooldown is removed and every roll will fire bullets.; Firing With Flair If the player also has Flare Gun, it turns green and is guaranteed to inflict enemies with greenfire, which has a massively increased duration.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 再来一次（Double Down） 如果玩家还拥有 枪靴（长靴），其冷却会被移除，而且每次翻滚都会发射子弹。; 炫技开火（Firing With Flair） 如果玩家还拥有 信号枪（照明弹枪），它会变成绿色，并且必定让敌人感染绿火，持续时间大幅增加。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This item is a reference to Spring-heeled Jack, an English urban legend from the Victorian era.; Its Ammonomicon entry is a reference to the Boots of Springheel Jak from The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion, which are used to survive a long fall as part of The Ultimate Heist quest.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这件物品参考了弹簧脚杰克（Spring-heeled Jack），一则维多利亚时代的英国都市传说。; 它的阿莫诺米康词条参考了春脚杰克靴子（Springheel Jak Boots），出自《上古卷轴 IV：湮没》（The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion），它们是 “终极劫案”（The Ultimate Heist）任务中用来承受长距离坠落的道具。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 14 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: A new type of ammunition developed after careful study of the Shotgun Full of Love. Each round is forged then quenched in the tears of young and unnoticed Bullet Kin.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 一种在仔细研究了爱之霰弹枪后开发出的新型弹药。每一发子弹都先锻造，再用年轻且不被注意的子弹枪兵的眼泪淬火。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Bullets have a 7.5% chance to charm enemies, indicated by being tinted pink.; The chance for any given projectile to charm is multiplied by the effect chance scalar of the player's current gun. This means that faster firing guns trigger the effect less often, while slower firing guns are more likely to be effected.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 子弹有 7.5% 的几率魅惑敌人，表现为染成粉色。; 任意投射物的魅惑概率会乘以玩家当前枪械的效果几率倍率。这意味着射速更快的枪触发效果更少，而射速更慢的枪更容易触发。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Ravishing The Lower Case r's damage is increased to 5, and it can the words HANDSOME, CHARM, and CUTE. Letters from these words have a 50% chance to charm enemies.; Unbelievably Charming If the player also has Shotgun Full of Love or Charmed Bow, while either gun is held, all shots fired by the player (even shots fired via items other than either gun) and any companions are guaranteed to charm enemies. In addition, the player is followed by a fairy that blocks bullets and displays the contents of chests.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 炫目迷人（Ravishing） 这个小写字母的伤害提高到 5，并且它能组成“英俊”“魅力”和“可爱”这些单词。这些单词中的字母有 50% 几率魅惑敌人。; 难以置信的迷人（Unbelievably Charming） 如果玩家还拥有 爱之霰弹枪 或 魅惑弓，只要持有任意一把枪，玩家发射的所有子弹（甚至包括通过除这两把枪之外的道具发射的子弹）以及所有随从都会必定魅惑敌人。此外，玩家还会跟着一位精灵，她会挡子弹并显示宝箱内容。
entries.englishUsageNotes: A depiction of Charming Rounds can be seen in the opening scroll of the Supply Drop Trailer.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 《空投补给》（空投补给）预告片的开场卷轴里可以看到一幅魅力弹丸的描绘。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Occasionally refunds ammo when bullets miss. Missed shots sometimes return from the dead, mindlessly seeking the closure they never found in life.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 子弹没命中时，有时会返还弹药。没中的射击有时会从坟墓里回来，漫无目的地寻找生前未曾得到的了结。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: 33% chance for missed shots to refund 1 ammo to their source gun.; Projectiles are considered to have missed if they have hit zero enemies by the time they are destroyed.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 未命中的射击有 33% 几率返还 1 发弹药给其来源枪械。; 如果投射物在被摧毁时一个敌人都没击中，就视为“未命中”。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Dawn of the Gundead, Shellegun, Skull Spitter, Fossilized Gun, or VertebraeK-47 Chance for Zombie Bullets to refund missed shots is doubled to 66%.; Electron Pack Kills with the electric beam of the Proton Backpack spawn Gunslinger's Ashes ghosts that attack enemies. This does not activate if enemies are killed by the Proton Backpack's other beam.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 地牢亡灵黎明（Dawn of the Gundead）、贝壳枪、颅骨吐射器、化石枪或 脊椎 K-47（脊椎K-47） 时，僵尸子弹返还未命中射击的几率翻倍至 66%。; 电子背包（Electron Pack） 用质子背包的电弧击杀敌人会生成 枪手骨灰 幽灵去攻击敌人。如果敌人是被质子背包的另一条光束击杀的，则不会触发此效果。

entries.unlock: By the end of a floor, have two companions at once, or upgrade Ser Junkan to Angelic Knight.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Improves the effectiveness of companions and charmed enemies. Before the advancement of Gundead society, belligerent bands of Bullet Kin would rally around these banners before their raids upon the upper chambers.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 提升随从和被魅惑敌人的效果。早在地牢亡灵社会进步之前，性情暴烈的子弹枪兵团伙会在袭击上层房间前围着这些旗帜集结。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Increases the damage of most companions and charmed enemies by 80%.; Has no effect on Dog or Blank Companion's Ring.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 使大多数随从和被魅惑敌人的伤害提高 80%。; 对狗和空响弹伙伴之戒没有效果。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Having the Clown Mask along with the Drill and/or the Loot Bag will unlock this item.; This item appears on the character's back when picked up, making it one of the few passive items that affects the character's appearance.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 若同时持有 小丑面具、电钻和/或 战利品袋（战利品），就会解锁此物品。; 拾取后此物品会显示在角色背上，因此它是少数会影响角色外观的被动道具之一。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: All projectiles can be guided after they are fired. These tiny engines can be controlled remotely, allowing the wielder to change trajectories at will.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 所有投射物在发射后都可以被引导。这些微型引擎可以远程控制，让持有者随心改变弹道。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fired bullets curve according to the player's crosshair movement, or by using the directional movement buttons.; Effectively provides 100% accuracy to most weapons, which is especially potent for shotguns.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射出去的子弹会根据玩家准星的移动，或者方向键移动，弯曲轨迹。; 对大多数武器来说，这几乎等同于 100% 命中率，尤其适合霰弹枪。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Bullets can be curved around cover, allowing the player to attack from a place of safety.; Guns with extremely fast moving projectiles, such as the Flash Ray, are still affected by this item, but their extreme speed makes guiding their bullets effectively impossible.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 子弹可以绕过掩体弯转，让玩家能在安全位置攻击。; 像 闪光枪 这类投射物速度极快的枪械也会受到这个道具影响，但它们的速度实在太快，几乎不可能有效引导。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 28 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Projectiles fired explode into smaller bullets on impact. Though technically not how flak works, the Gungeon has always operated more on the naive assumption of how guns work than how they actually do.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 弹射出去的投射物在撞击时会炸裂成更小的子弹。虽然严格说这并不是高射炮弹的工作方式，但地牢一贯更像是按人们对枪械的天真想象来运作，而不是按真实原理。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Whenever a bullet hits an enemy or wall, or reaches its maximum range, it splits into several smaller, lower-damage bullets that travel outwards within a limited range. Beams do not split.; These smaller bullets do not adopt any special properties of the original projectile.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 每当一发子弹击中敌人或墙壁，或到达最大射程时，它会分裂成几发更小、伤害更低的子弹，向外散射到有限范围内。光束不会分裂。; 这些较小的子弹不会继承原始投射物的任何特殊属性。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Anti-Aircraft If the player has RPG, it spawns seven homing flak bullets on impact.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 防空（Anti-Aircraft） 如果玩家拥有 火箭推进式榴弹枪（火箭推进式榴弹），它会在撞击时生成 7 发追踪高射炮弹。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Piercing bullets will not split when hitting enemies, but will split when hitting a wall or reaching their maximum range.; The beam damage multiplier granted by Flak Bullets does not stack with the beam damage multipliers of Shock Rounds, Katana Bullets, Explosive Rounds, Shadow Bullets, Vorpal Bullets, Blank Bullets, Devolver Rounds or Hungry Bullets.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 穿透子弹在击中敌人时不会分裂，但在撞墙或到达最大射程时会分裂。; 高射炮子弹提供的光束伤害倍率不会与 电击炮子弹（电击炮）、武士刀子弹、爆炸弹丸、阴影子弹、斩首子弹、空响弹子弹、反转子弹（Devolver子弹） 或 饥饿子弹 的光束伤害倍率叠加。

entries.unlock: Purchase all items and guns from Doug.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Wealth increases damage. Bullets forged from the throne of an opulent ruler whose reign predates the Gungeon.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 财富会提升伤害。子弹由一位奢华统治者的王座铸成，而这位统治者的统治年代早于地牢。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Increases damage based on the amount of coin the player has.; Damage can increase up to a maximum of 100% at 500 coin. Any coin beyond 500 will not increase damage any further.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 根据玩家拥有的金币数量提高伤害。; 伤害最多可在 500 枚金币时提高到 100%。超过 500 枚的金币不会再进一步提高伤害。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Alternative Rock If the player has Face Melter, instead of firing four streams, Face Melter fires two parallel columns of notes. Reloading fires a guitar pick with a chance to stun.; The Ecstasy of Gold If the player also has Gilded Hydra or Old Goldie, their damage is increased by 25%.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 另类摇滚（Alternative Rock） 如果玩家拥有 脸融炉（变脸熔炉），脸融炉 不再发射四道火力，而是发射两列平行的音符。重装时会发射一枚吉他拨片，并有几率使敌人眩晕。; 黄金的狂喜（The Ecstasy of Gold） 如果玩家还拥有 镀金九头蛇 或 古金枪（古金色枪），其伤害提高 25%。
entries.englishUsageNotes: With this item, most bullets will turn gold in appearance.; If duplicates of this item are somehow obtained, further increases the damage based on the amount of coin the player has.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 拥有此道具后，大多数子弹外观会变成金色。; 如果以某种方式获得了此道具的重复品，伤害还会根据玩家拥有的金币数量进一步提高。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 18 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Grants all bullets a small chance to transmogrify. Each of these rounds has been enchanted by a sorceress of great power, though they seem incredibly old.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 赋予所有子弹一点变形的概率。每一发子弹都被一位强大女巫施过法，尽管它们看起来已经古旧得惊人。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Every bullet fired has a 4%† chance to transmogrify enemies it hits into harmless Chickens.; † The chance for any given projectile transmogrify in is multiplied by the effect chance scalar of the player's current gun. This means that faster firing guns trigger the effect less often, while slower firing guns are more likely to be effected.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 每发射一颗子弹，都有 4%† 的几率把命中的敌人变成无害的鸡。; † 任意投射物触发变形的概率会乘以玩家当前枪械的效果几率倍率。这意味着射速更快的枪触发效果更少，而射速更慢的枪更容易触发。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Chicken Arise If the player also has Bundle of Wands, Hexagun, Staff of Firepower, or Witch Pistol, bullet size and transmogrification chances are increased.; Runic The Lower Case r can fire the words ABRA and KADABRA. Letters from these words are tinted a deep purple, and have a flat 5% chance per bullet to transmogrify hit enemies into Chickens.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 鸡鸣重生（Chicken Arise） 如果玩家还拥有 杖束（一束魔杖）、六角枪、火力法杖 或 女巫手枪，子弹体积和变形概率都会提高。; 符文（Runic） 小写字母会发射单词 ABRA 和 KADABRA。这些单词中的字母会被染成深紫色，并且每发子弹有 5% 的固定几率把命中的敌人变成鸡。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The tagline is a reference to the third Clarke's Law (formulated by Arthur C. Clarke): "Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic."; The synergy Chicken Arise is a reference to Aqua Teen Hunger Force season 3 episode 1, entitled "Video Ouija"
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这句标语参考了亚瑟·C·克拉克提出的第三条克拉克定律：“任何足够先进的技术都与魔法无异。”; 组合技“鸡鸣重生”（Chicken Arise）参考的是《Aqua Teen Hunger Force》（Aqua Teen Hunger Force）第 3 季第 1 集“视频通灵板”（Video Ouija）。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The classic Bow will never go out of style.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 经典的弓箭永不过时。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Charges to shoot arrows.; If fired fully charged, its arrows will move faster, deal more damage, and pierce enemies.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 蓄力后射出箭矢。; 满蓄力射出时，箭矢会移动更快、伤害更高，并能穿透敌人。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Cerebral Bros If the player also has Bullet Bore, Bullet Bore turns red and fires two drills at a time.; Diazepam Increases damage by 50% while the Bow is held.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 脑力兄弟（Cerebral Bros） 如果玩家还拥有 子弹钻头（钻头枪），子弹钻头 会变成红色并一次发射两支钻头。; 地西泮（Diazepam） 在持有弓时，伤害提高 50%。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Arrowkin wield the Bow.; The charge effect is likely a reference to the game "Titan Souls".
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 箭人（Arrowkin） 使用弓。; 蓄力效果很可能是对游戏《泰坦之魂》（Titan Souls）的引用。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Briefly absorbs enemy bullets and converts them to ammo. The molecules in this rare piece of stone are naturally aligned such that all of their bullets face the same direction.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 会短暂吸收敌方子弹并将其转化为弹药。这块稀有石头中的分子天然排列，因此它的所有子弹都朝向同一个方向。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: While active, attracts nearby bullets and converts them to ammo.; Halves reload times when held.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 激活时会吸引附近子弹并把它们转成弹药。; 手持时会将换弹时间减半。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Relodestar If the player has any Ammolet, after Relodestone's effect ends, the bullets that were absorbed are shot out of the player dealing damage to enemies.; Relodestone prevents damage from bullets while it's active, but does not prevent other damage such as falling, burning, poison and contact damage.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 重装星（Relodestar） 如果玩家拥有任何护弹符，在 瑞罗德石（Relodestone） 的效果结束后，被吸收的子弹会从玩家体内射出，对敌人造成伤害。; 瑞罗德石（Relodestone） 在生效时会阻止子弹伤害，但不会阻止坠落、燃烧、中毒和接触伤害等其他伤害。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 20 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Occasionally deals massive damage. This striking handgun was forged hundreds of years ago by a forgotten gunsmith. Though its power has weakened, it occasionally recalls its former might.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 偶尔造成巨额伤害。这把醒目的手枪是数百年前由一位被遗忘的枪匠锻造的。尽管其力量已经减弱，但它仍会偶尔想起昔日的威力。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Every shot has a 1% chance to be replaced by a crit-shot that instantly hits the nearest enemy in the direction the player is aiming, dealing 100 damage.; Crit-shots are more common the higher the player's Coolness stat is. Each level of coolness increases the percentage chance of firing a crit-shot by 1.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 每发子弹都有 1% 的几率被一发暴击子弹替代，这颗子弹会立刻击中玩家瞄准方向上最近的敌人，造成 100 点伤害。; 玩家越冷静，暴击子弹出现得越频繁。每提升 1 点冷静值，发射暴击子弹的概率就提高 1%。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Critcaliber If the player also has Bullet Idol, after taking damage with the gun held, the next Vorpal Gun shot is guaranteed to be a critical shot.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 暴击铠甲（Critcaliber） 如果玩家还拥有 子弹偶像，在持枪时受到伤害后，下一发斩首枪射击必定是暴击。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Because crit-shots instantly hit the nearest enemy in the aimed direction, they do not interact with environmental objects such as barrels, cannot break chests or secret room walls, or awaken Mimics.; The word 'Vorpal' is a nonsense word coined by Lewis Carrol in his nonsense poem 'Jabberwocky'. It describes a blade which is supposedly very sharp.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 由于暴击子弹会立刻击中瞄准方向上最近的敌人，它们不会与木桶等环境物体互动，也无法打碎宝箱或隐藏房间墙壁，或唤醒拟态。; “沃帕尔”（Vorpal） 这个词是刘易斯·卡罗尔在他的荒诞诗《贾巴沃基》（Jabberwocky）中造出的无意义词，用来形容一把据说锋利无比的刀刃。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 8 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Massively increased damage to the Jammed. Also somewhat effective against bosses. These bullets have been individually blessed to strike down the accursed.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 对被诅咒者造成巨额额外伤害。对首领也算相当有效。这些子弹都被逐一祝福，用来击倒被诅咒之物。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Increases damage to jammed enemies by 225% for a total damage output of 325%.; Increases damage to bosses by 25%.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 对被诅咒敌人的伤害提高 225%，总伤害输出达到 325%。; 对首领的伤害提高 25%。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Blessing and a Curse If the player has Cursed Bullets, every jammed enemy killed grants a persistent, additive 0.0025 (0.25%) damage buff.; Chance On Hit If the player has Gunderfury, it gains a chance to slow enemies and make Gunderfury's bullets act like they have Shock Rounds.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 祝福与诅咒（Blessing and a Curse） 如果玩家拥有 被诅咒的子弹，每击杀一个被诅咒敌人都会获得一个持续叠加的 0.0025（0.25%）伤害加成。; 命中时概率（Chance On Hit） 如果玩家拥有 枪王怒火（Gunderfury），它会获得几率减速敌人，并让枪王怒火的子弹表现得像带有 电击炮子弹（电击炮） 一样。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This item is a reference to the common folklore trope of silver bullets, often spoken of as the only effective weapon capable of dispatching werewolves, vampires, or other supernatural entities.; The name of the synergy Hell Singing is in reference to Abraham Van Helsing, a fictional doctor and scientist from Bram Stoker's Dracula. In the original novel, Van Helsing is a normal man who assists in studying the mysterious vampire-induced illness afflicting Lucy Westenra. In subsequent adaptations of the Dracula story Van Helsing has been reimagined in popular culture as an active vampire expert and hunter.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这件物品参考了民间传说中“银子弹”这一常见母题，人们常说它是唯一能对付狼人、吸血鬼或其他超自然存在的有效武器。; 组合技 Hell Singing 的名字参考了亚伯拉罕·范·海辛（Abraham Van Helsing），一个出自布拉姆·斯托克《德古拉》的虚构医生和科学家。在原著里，范·海辛只是个帮助研究困扰露西·韦斯特恩拉的神秘吸血鬼病症的普通人。后来的《德古拉》改编作品则把范·海辛重新塑造成了一个活跃的吸血鬼专家与猎手。

entries.unlock: Defeat the first two phases of the Resourceful Rat.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Shoots a boxing glove, sort of. Crafted by the Resourceful Rat as a way to cheat at fisticuffs, this boxing glove has been modified to spring out in a humorous manner.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 某种程度上算是会发射拳击手套。由机灵鼠王（Resourceful Rat）制作，作为在拳斗中作弊的一种手段，这只拳击手套经过改装后会以滑稽的方式弹出。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires a limited range punch with a 30% chance to stun enemies for 3 seconds. Despite being a charged gun, the base punch has a charge time of 0 seconds, and can be rapid fired.; Killing an enemy with the Boxing Glove adds a star to the gun, shown on the UI above the ammo counter, to a maximum of 3 stars. Taking damage or switching to another gun will remove all accumulated stars.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射一记射程有限的拳击，有 30% 几率使敌人眩晕 3 秒。尽管它是把蓄力枪，基础拳击的蓄力时间却是 0 秒，而且可以连发。; 用拳击手套击杀敌人会在枪上增加一颗星，显示在弹药计数器上方的界面（UI）中，最多可叠 3 颗星。受到伤害或切换到其他枪械会移除所有已积累的星星。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun is a reference to Mike Tyson's Punch Out!!.
