Its Ammonomicon quote is a reference to Piston Honda (renamed in later games to Piston Hondo), one of the boxers in the Punch-Out! franchise.; It is also a reference to (and example of) the Extendo Boxing Glove, which has appeared broadly in film, television, and literature.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪参考了《迈克·泰森拳击赛》（Mike Tyson's Punch-Out!!）。它的阿莫诺米康台词参考了 活塞本田（Piston Honda）（后来的游戏里改名为 活塞本多（Piston Hondo）），这项《拳击出击》（Punch-Out!）系列中的拳手之一。; 它同时也是可伸缩拳击手套（Extendo Boxing Glove）的引用与实例，这种拳击手套广泛出现在电影、电视和文学作品中。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Powerful, but shatters upon taking damage. Normally, a gun made of glass would shatter instantaneously, but the Gungeon's energies have reinforced this inadvisable device to the point of near usability.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 威力强大，但受到伤害时会碎裂。通常来说，玻璃制成的枪会立刻碎掉，但地牢的能量把这个不合时宜的装置强化到了几乎可用的程度。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Charges up to shoot a powerful piercing bolt of light.; This projectile ignores the Boss DPS cap.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 蓄力后发射一道强力、可穿透的光束。; 这枚投射物会无视 Boss 每秒伤害上限。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Max Pane If the player has Glass Guon Stone, Glass Cannon will change appearance and will not break if the player takes damage. Instead, the Guon Stones will be destroyed, losing the synergy but granting one extra hit before it breaks.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 满盘皆碎（Max Pane） 如果玩家拥有 玻璃滚石，玻璃大炮 的外观会改变，并且在玩家受到伤害时不会碎裂。取而代之的是，护身石会被摧毁，失去这项联动，但会额外多承受一次伤害前才碎。
entries.englishUsageNotes: While shattered (empty due to taking damage), the Glass Cannon has no sprite, effectively making it invisible.; If the Glass Cannon is emptied by using up its ammo reserve instead of taking damage, the gun remains unshattered and can be dropped and retrieved like any other. It can still be shattered if held while taking damage.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 处于碎裂状态（因受伤而弹药耗尽）时，玻璃大炮没有贴图，因此看起来会隐形。; 如果玻璃大炮是通过耗尽弹药储备而不是受伤来清空，它就不会碎裂，仍然可以像其他武器一样丢弃和捡回。即使持有时受到伤害，它仍然可以碎裂。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 12 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: A standard baseball bat, modified to hit bullets instead of balls. Launches enemy projectiles back with a vengeance! Nothing can happen until you swing the bat.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 标准的棒球棒，改造后不再击球而是击打子弹。把敌方投射物狠狠打回去！在你挥棒之前什么都不会发生。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Careful Iteration With Armor of Thorns, Shotgun Full of Hate, Nail Gun, or Eyepatch, Casey fires a spread of 6 nails when swung, and takes on a spiked appearance. When an enemy is hit with Casey, they will become dark red and take damage over time.; This also changes the sound effect of "readying" Casey. This change seems to be affected by Scattershot causing the new sound effect to multiply.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 小心迭代（Careful Iteration） 如果玩家还拥有 荆棘之甲、充满仇恨的霰弹枪、钉枪 或 眼罩，卡西（Casey） 挥击时会发射 6 根钉子，并呈现带刺外观。敌人被 卡西（Casey） 击中后会变成深红色并持续受伤害。; 这也会改变 卡西（Casey）的准备动作（readying）音效。这个变化似乎会受到 散射 影响，从而让新的音效成倍增加。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Jammed bullets and enemies do not deal additional damage when reflected/launched.; Firing Casey nudges the player forward a moderate amount. Be mindful near pits to avoid falling.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 被诅咒的子弹和敌人在被反弹/击飞时不会造成额外伤害。; 挥动 卡西（Casey） 会让玩家向前轻微移动一段距离。靠近深坑时要小心，别掉下去。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 26 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Fires explosive nails that detonate when the trigger is released, or after a brief period of time. This particular model is from the 1996 Gun of the year re-release edition.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 发射爆炸钉子，在扳机松开时或短暂一段时间后爆炸。这款特别的型号来自 1996 年年度枪械重发版。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Rapidly fires extremely fast moving nails that stick into walls and enemies.; Nails that stick into enemies will trigger a cosmetic bleed effect, with the enemy gushing blood onto the ground.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 高速发射极快飞行的钉子，它们会钉进墙壁和敌人。; 钉进敌人的钉子会触发纯视觉流血效果，让敌人把血喷到地上。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Cool Kids Club If the player has Devolver, continuously moving with the Strafe Gun held gives the player a yellow glow, increasing movement speed. The glow disappears if the player stops moving.; In The Mood! If the player has BSG or Thunderclap, slightly increases movement speed and increases the shot speed of the guns by 25%.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 酷孩俱乐部（Cool Kids Club） 如果玩家拥有 反转子弹（Devolver），持枪持续移动时会让玩家发出黄色光芒，提高移动速度。停止移动后光芒消失。; 情绪正合适！ 如果玩家拥有 大射机枪 或 雷霆拍击（霹雳枪），会略微提高移动速度，并将这些枪械的射击速度提高 25%。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Nails from this gun cannot be caught by Gunjurers.; Emptying an entire magazine into a boss all at once is inadvisable, as the boss DPS cap will severely limit the damage potential of a large number of nails exploding simultaneously. Firing in brief bursts can circumvent this issue by spreading the explosion damage out over several seconds.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪发射的钉子无法被 枪术师（Gunjurers） 接住。; 一口气把整个弹匣都倾泻到 Boss 身上并不明智，因为 Boss 每秒伤害上限会严重限制大量钉子同时爆炸的伤害潜力。短促点射可以把爆炸伤害分散到几秒钟内，从而绕开这个问题。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 28 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Locks on. Tracks enemy heat signatures. This shoulder-mounted plasma cannon was used by an alien hunter. Generally, the Gundead do not bleed, but this gun can still make short work of them.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 锁定目标。追踪敌人热源信号。这门肩扛式等离子炮曾被一位外星猎手使用。通常地牢亡灵并不会流血，但这把枪依然能迅速解决它们。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Locks onto enemies and fires high speed 720 lasers.; Upon reloading an empty clip, The Predator grants, which prevents enemies from noticing the player and allows the player to steal from shops.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 锁定敌人并发射高速 720 激光。; 在重新装填空弹匣后，掠食者（The Predator）会赋予玩家隐身效果，使敌人无法察觉玩家，并允许玩家从商店偷东西。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Thermal Imaging If the player also has Sunglasses, The Predator fires two lasers instead of one.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 热成像（Thermal Imaging） 如果玩家还拥有 墨镜，掠食者 会发射两束激光而不是一束。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The homing laser of The Predator cannot be caught by Gunjurers.; This gun is a reference to the film Predator.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 掠食者 的追踪激光无法被 枪术师（Gunjurers） 接住。; 这把枪参考了电影《铁血战士》（Predator）。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Trorc for 12 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: A powerful machine gun that once belonged to a forgotten hero. This gun's mechanism is overly complicated, but it proves extremely effective in the field. Beloved by many, despite its flaws.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 一把曾属于某位被遗忘英雄的强大机枪。这把枪的机件过于复杂，但在实战中极为有效。尽管有缺点，却受到很多人喜爱。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires high-accuracy bullets that can pierce up to 3 times.; Rate of fire increases the longer the trigger is held.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射高精度子弹，最多可穿透 3 次。; 扣住扳机的时间越长，射速就越快。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Gunderlord If the player has Ice Breaker, Patriot shots are connected with electricity. Ice Breaker fires single high-velocity shots, and its ammo slowly regenerates over time.; What A Thrill If the player has Ration, Cigarettes, Fortune's Favor, Ancient Hero's Bandana, or Box, Patriot has a chance to transmogrify enemies into snakes.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 枪神领主（Gunderlord） 如果玩家拥有 破冰者，爱国者 的射击会带电。破冰者 会发射单发高速射击，并随时间缓慢回复弹药。; 多么刺激啊（What A Thrill） 如果玩家拥有 口粮、香烟、财富的青睐、古代英雄的头巾 或 箱子（Box），爱国者 有几率把敌人变成蛇。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun is a reference to the weapon of the same name in Metal Gear Solid 3: Snake Eater.; The Ammonomicon quote "Gun Eater" is a reference to the title of the game- "Snake Eater".
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪参考了《合金装备 3：食蛇者》（Metal Gear Solid 3: Snake Eater）中同名武器。; 阿莫诺米康台词“枪食者”（Gun Eater）参考的是游戏标题“蛇食者”（Snake Eater）。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Becomes more powerful while its bearer is armored. The engineers behind this gun originally tried to devise a system to see if any specific bullet would hit its target, but the math was so unintuitive that they gave up entirely. A few no longer speak to each other!
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 在穿戴护甲时会变得更强。设计这把枪的工程师最初试图设计一种系统来判断某一发子弹是否会命中目标，但数学过于反直觉，最后只好彻底放弃。后来甚至有几个人互相不说话了！
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Has two different forms, transforming between them depending on whether or not the player has Armor.; Without Armor, this gun fires low-damage purple laser blasts at a high rate of fire.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 有两种不同形态，会根据玩家是否拥有护甲在两者之间转换。; 没有护甲时，这把枪会以高射速发射低伤害的紫色激光爆裂。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Armored Corps If the player also has Void Core Assault Rifle, both guns gain increased fire rate and shot speed.; Steel Skin If the player also has Nanomachines, it will remain in its powered-up form without having armor.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 装甲部队（Armored Corps） 如果玩家还拥有 虚空核心突击步枪（真空核心突击步枪），两把枪的射速和弹速都会提高。; 钢铁之肤（Steel Skin） 如果玩家还拥有 纳米机械，它会在没有护甲的情况下仍保持强化形态。
entries.englishUsageNotes: If all armor is lost while AC-15 is in its armored form, it plays a short breaking animation when returning to its original form.; The Robot will always have the armored form due to The Robot having armor instead of hearts.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 如果 AC-15 处于装甲形态时失去了全部护甲，在它回到原始形态时会播放一个短暂的破碎动画。; 机器人（The Robot） 由于是用护甲而不是心来承受伤害，它会一直保持装甲形态。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Transforms into a powerful weapon under mysterious circumstances. This Bullet Sprite will transform into an enormously powerful radiant energy weapon under certain circumstances. Traditionally, this means showing proficiency in bridge delivery and maintenance. If no bridge is available, however, it will take less important things like courage or determination into consideration.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 在神秘情况下会变成一把强力武器。这个子弹精灵会在某些条件下变成一把威力惊人的光能武器。传统上，这意味着它在桥梁运输和维护方面表现出色。不过如果没有桥，它就会把勇气或决心之类没那么重要的东西也算进去。
entries.englishUsageNotes: It cannot be dropped.; While Windgunner is held, no other guns can be used or switched to.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 它不能被丢弃。; 持有风行枪时，不能使用或切换到其他任何枪械。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 28 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Unloads firepower at foes, digs. This trusty shovel was gifted to one of the first Gungeoneers, by a traveling race of sentient yachts.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 向敌人倾泻火力，还会挖掘。这把可靠的铲子被一群会说话的游艇送给了最早的一批地牢探险者之一。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires five bullets in a fixed arrow-shaped spread.; Upon reloading an empty magazine, the player digs into the ground with the gun, potentially unearthing one of a number of items from the below tables.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 以固定的箭形散布发射 5 发子弹。; 在重装空弹匣后，玩家会用这把枪在地面上挖掘，有可能从下方的表格里挖出若干物品。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Green Thumb If the player also has Pea Shooter, nothing happens. This synergy does nothing.; Two Kinds of People If the player also has Colt 1851, the maximum number of good digs is increased to 10, and after the limit is reached, it can still dig up 5 coin and Junk. The loot table is also modified, resulting in much better quality drops.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 绿色拇指（Green Thumb） 如果玩家还拥有 豌豆射手（射豆枪），什么都不会发生。这项联动没有任何效果。; 两种人（Two Kinds of People） 如果玩家还拥有 柯尔特 1851（柯尔特1851），良好挖掘的最大次数提升到 10 次，而在达到上限后，它仍然可以挖出 5 枚金币和垃圾。战利品表也会被修改，从而获得更高品质的掉落。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The digging effect bypasses the item acquirement restrictions of Rainbow Mode.; If the player has used Spice, drops have a chance to be replaced with more Spice (even the 1 casing after all good digs have been expended).
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 挖掘效果会绕过彩虹模式对物品获取的限制。; 如果玩家使用过香料，掉落物有几率被更多香料替换（即使所有良好挖掘都已用尽，只剩 1 个弹壳也是如此）。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Fires rapidly in all directions. This unwieldy crown signifies sovereignty over bullets.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 高速向四面八方开火。这顶笨重的王冠象征着对子弹的主权。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires rapidly in all directions simultaneously.; Consumes 3 ammo and fires 3 bullets per shot.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 同时向各个方向快速开火。; 每次射击消耗 3 发弹药，并发射 3 发子弹。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Alas, Sniperion If the player also has Crescent Crossbow, Crown of Guns becomes Sailor Moon's tiara and shoots crescent shaped bullets that do more damage.; Blast Crown If the player has Blast Helmet, Crown of Guns gains a chance to fire explosives.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 哎呀，狙击派（Alas, Sniperion） 如果玩家还拥有 新月弩（新月形弩），枪之冠 会变成水兵月的头饰，并射出月牙形子弹，造成更高伤害。; 爆裂王冠（Blast Crown） 如果玩家还拥有 爆炸头盔，枪之冠 有几率发射爆炸物。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun is likely a reference to the Crown of Guns in Nuclear Throne, a passive companion that increases the amount of gun drops in levels.; The name of the Blast Crown synergy is also a reference to a crown in Nuclear Throne.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪很可能是在致敬《核子王座》（Nuclear Throne）里的枪之冠（Crown of Guns），它是一个被动伙伴，会增加关卡里的枪械掉落数量。; 爆裂王冠 这个联动名也参考了《核子王座》中的一顶王冠。

entries.unlock: Defeat the Shadow Magician.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Can hold hearts, ammo or other pickups for use later. Use once to collect something, and use again to drop!
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 可以装入心、弹药或其他拾取物，留到之后使用。用一次来收集物品，再用一次把它丢出来！
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Upon use, stores an extra pickup.; Using the Bottle again consumes the pickup.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 使用时会储存一件额外拾取物。; 再次使用瓶子会消耗掉其中的拾取物。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Clearer Guon Stone If the player has Clear Guon Stone, it grants immunity to poison, fire, and electricity and it rotates at a fixed distance from the player while they are moving instead of on a slight delay. Shooting enemies while standing on fire or ice will burn or freeze them, respectively.; Empty Vessels If the player has Holey Grail, if damage is taken while Bottle is empty, it fills with a purple soul that deals 100 damage to all enemies in the room upon use.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 更清澈的护身石（Clearer Guon Stone） 如果玩家拥有 更清澈的护身石，它会免疫中毒、火焰和电击，而且在玩家移动时会以固定距离围绕玩家转动，而不是稍有延迟地跟随。站在火焰或冰面上射击敌人会分别让敌人着火或结冰。; 空瓶之器（Empty Vessels） 如果玩家拥有 空洞圣杯（剩杯），在瓶子为空时受到伤害，它会装入一颗紫色灵魂；使用后会对房间内所有敌人造成 100 点伤害。
entries.englishUsageNotes: When playing as The Robot, Patches and Mendy may give this item to The Robot even if it has not yet been unlocked.; When playing as The Robot, the friendly fairy will do nothing and will disappear after a while, due to the fact that he has no heart containers.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 当以机器人（The Robot）进行游戏时，帕奇斯和门迪（Patches and Mendy）即使这个道具尚未解锁，也可能把它给机器人。; 当以机器人（The Robot）进行游戏时，友善精灵什么都不会做，并且会在一段时间后消失，因为机器人没有心容器。

entries.unlock: Defeat the High Dragun as The Paradox.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Fires projectiles from the target position towards the gun. Because Tachyons are particles that move faster than light, the Hegemony of Man has long used them for interstellar communication. As with all technology, it was eventually weaponized. However- tachyons travel backward in time, making this gun hard to aim.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 向枪口方向的目标位置发射投射物。由于泰奇昂（Tachyon）是比光还快的粒子，人类霸权政权早已把它用于星际通信。和所有技术一样，它最终也被武器化了。不过，泰奇昂会逆向穿越时间，所以这把枪很难瞄准。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires purple particles, which start at the furthest wall in the direction that the gun is aimed, and travel back towards the gun. These particles will travel through walls to reach the player.; These projectiles are spread out in the same way as regular bullets, but in reverse. Just like how a regular guns spread increases with distance, The Fat Line's spread increases with the players distance from the target wall.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射紫色粒子，这些粒子从瞄准方向最远处的墙壁开始，随后沿着相反方向朝枪口移动。这些粒子会穿墙并回到玩家身边。; 这些投射物的散布方式与普通子弹相同，只是方向相反。就像普通枪械的散布会随着距离增加一样，加粗线条（The Fat Line）的散布也会随着玩家与目标墙壁之间的距离增加。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Does not reveal Secret Rooms.; In early versions of the AG&D Update, this gun could appear in Blessed Mode- despite not being finished or officially released.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 不会揭示隐藏房间。; 在这次更新的早期版本中，这把枪即使尚未完成或正式发布，也可能出现在祝福模式里。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 26 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Fires homing rockets that erupt into short-range swarms. Comes with a helpful pal. Though this gun was built unimaginably far away, it seems it was destined to eventually find its way to the Gungeon.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 发射会追踪敌人的火箭，命中后会炸成短程弹群。还会带一个有用的小帮手。虽然这把枪是在极其遥远的地方制造出来的，但它似乎注定最终会来到地牢。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires an explosive missile that can pierce up to 10 enemies. When the missile impacts an enemy or obstacle, it will create 5 smaller 440 rockets that seek out enemies and explode again.; While held, grants a small robotic companion that blocks bullets and reveals the contents of nearby chests.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射一枚爆炸导弹，最多可穿透 10 个敌人。导弹撞上敌人或障碍物时，会生成 5 枚更小的 440 火箭，它们会寻找敌人并再次爆炸。; 持有时会获得一个小型机器人伙伴，它可以挡子弹并显示附近宝箱的内容。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Exotic is a reference to the exotic-rarity rocket launcher Gjallarhorn from Destiny, one of the most beloved and memetic exotics in the game. "Pack of Wolves" is a reference to the Gjallarhorn's exotic perk; Wolfpack Rounds.; The robot companion is a reference to the Ghosts from Destiny.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪很可能是在致敬《命运》（Destiny）里稀有度为异域者（Exotic）的火箭发射器嘉拉尔号角（Gjallarhorn），它是游戏里最受喜爱、也最常被拿来当梗的异域者之一。“狼群齐射”（Pack of Wolves）是嘉拉尔号角的异域特性“狼群弹头”（Wolfpack Rounds）的引用。; 机器人伙伴则是在致敬《命运》里的幽灵（Ghosts）。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Automatically triggers available Blanks when in danger. An original Gungeon item. This protective garment, laser cut whole from a massive Blank, can detect when its bearer is threatened.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 在危险时会自动触发可用的空响弹。地牢原生道具。这个保护性服装是从一枚巨大的空响弹上直接激光切割出来的，它能察觉持有者是否受到威胁。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Automatically uses one of the player's Blanks if they are about to take damage, preventing it.; This can negate contact damage, which regular blanks do not normally prevent.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 如果玩家即将受到伤害，就会自动消耗一枚空响弹来阻止伤害。; 这可以抵消接触伤害，而普通空响弹通常无法阻止接触伤害。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: The Line of Fire If the player has Composite Gun, the bullets leave a trail of fire.; To Serve Android If the player also has the Badge, the police officer turns into a robot and cannot die.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 火线（The Line of Fire） 如果玩家还拥有 复合枪，子弹会留下一道火焰轨迹。; 为安卓人服务（To Serve Android） 如果玩家还拥有 徽章（警徽），警察会变成机器人，且不会死亡。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Full Metal Jacket is extremely valuable for collecting Master Rounds.; When damaged by harmful Status Effects, Full Metal Jacket will still use a blank, despite the damage not being caused by bullets.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 全金属外衣（Full Metal Jacket） 对于收集大师弹丸（Master Rounds）非常有价值。; 当它受到有害状态效果的伤害时，全金属外衣（Full Metal Jacket） 仍会使用一枚空响弹，尽管这种伤害并不是由子弹造成的。

entries.unlock: Use a [[Shrines
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Blocks projectiles, but shatters if its owner is wounded. A gift from the Lady of Pane. Gungeoneers who say a prayer to this silly goddess receive her blessing of three Glass Guon Stones.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 挡住投射物，但持有者受伤时会碎裂。来自面板女士（Lady of Pane）的一份礼物。那些会向这位滑稽女神祈祷的地牢探险者，会得到她赐下的三枚玻璃滚石。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Orbits the player, blocking enemy shots on contact.; Breaks if the player takes damage.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 围绕玩家旋转，接触到敌方子弹时将其挡下。; 如果玩家受到伤害，就会碎裂。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Max Pane If the player also has Glass Cannon, if hit, the Glass Guon Stone will be destroyed, losing the synergy, but the gun will keep its ammo. Also changes appearance while active.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 满盘皆碎（Max Pane） 如果玩家还拥有 玻璃大炮，在被击中时，玻璃滚石 会被摧毁，失去这项联动，但枪械会保留弹药。激活时外观也会改变。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Bullet Kiln synergy grants a Glass Guon Stone whenever Elder Blank is used, up to a maximum of 4.; This can be circumvented by dropping Glass Guon Stones until the player only has 3 and using Elder Blank, though this may require wasting a charge of Elder Blank outside of combat due to the difficulty in dropping items during combat.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 子弹窑联动会在使用 旧式空响弹 时赐予一枚玻璃滚石，最多可叠到 4 枚。; 这可以通过不断丢弃玻璃滚石、把数量压到只剩 3 枚后再使用 旧式空响弹 来绕开，不过这可能需要在战斗外浪费一次 旧式空响弹 的充能，因为战斗中很难丢东西。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Active reload provides stacking benefits for bad enough dudes (and chicks).
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 主动换弹会提供可叠加的收益，专门奖励那些足够‘带劲’的家伙和姑娘。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Passively grants 2 coolness.; When reloading the gun, a mark appears on the reload bar, similar to the Cog of Battle. Pressing reload or firing at the right time will increase the gun's damage. Each successful reload will also make the reload time shorter, making another successful reload harder to pull off. As the gun's damage increases, the projectiles become larger and turn into faces wearing sunglasses after four successful reloads. Missing a reload will reset the bonuses. After 14 reloads, the gun will reload instantly and the active reload will be missed, resulting in the damage bonus resetting.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 被动提供 2 点冷静值。; 换弹时，换弹条上会出现一个标记，类似于战斗齿轮（Cog of Battle）。在正确时机按下换弹键或开火会提升这把枪的伤害。每次成功换弹还会让换弹时间更短，使下一次成功换弹更难打出。随着枪械伤害提高，投射物会变得更大，并在成功换弹四次后变成戴着墨镜的脸。漏掉一次换弹会重置所有加成。成功换弹 14 次后，这把枪会瞬间完成换弹，而主动换弹会被判定为失败，导致伤害加成重置。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Kung Fu Hippie, Rappin' Surfer If the player has Sunglasses, Rad Gun's magazine size is increased to 20 and its reload time is increased, giving more time to hit the mark. Grants 1.33 coolness. The maximum amount of reloads is increased from 14 to 17, although getting the 16th reload will require two Super Hot Watchs.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 功夫嬉皮，说唱冲浪者（Kung Fu Hippie, Rappin' Surfer） 如果玩家拥有 墨镜，拉德枪（Rad Gun） 的弹匣容量会提升到 20，换弹时间也会增加，从而给玩家更多时间去打中标记。它还会额外提供 1.33 点冷静值。可成功换弹的上限会从 14 次提高到 17 次，不过想打出第 16 次换弹需要两块 超级热的手表。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Refilling the Rad Gun with an Ammo pickup or taking the elevator to the next chamber is considered an automatic reload.; Swapping to another weapon for a few seconds will automatically reload the Rad Gun. This will cause the damage bonus to swap to the passive reload corresponding to its level, which caps at 25 damage per bullet.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 用弹药拾取物给拉德枪（Rad Gun）补弹，或乘电梯前往下一层，都会被视为一次自动换弹。; 在切换到别的武器并持续几秒后，拉德枪（Rad Gun）也会自动换弹。这会让伤害加成切换到与当前等级对应的被动换弹加成，而这个加成上限是每发子弹 25 点伤害。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 12 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Produces a bomb when dodge rolling. This strange mechanism dispenses explosives when spun.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 在翻滚闪避时会生成一枚炸弹。这种奇怪的机关在旋转时会吐出爆炸物。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Dodge rolling drops a bomb behind the player that explodes after a few moments, dealing 20 damage to all nearby enemies.; If this bomb touches an enemy before it explodes, it will deal an additional 5 damage to that enemy on contact.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 翻滚闪避会在玩家身后掉下一枚炸弹，几秒后爆炸，对附近所有敌人造成 20 点伤害。; 如果这枚炸弹在爆炸前碰到敌人，还会对该敌人额外造成 5 点接触伤害。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: AI Assistant If the player has iBomb Companion App, roll bombs will bounce around instead of detonating immediately, and can be manually detonated with the iBomb Companion App.; y cant u crawl If the player is holding Heroine, roll bombs have larger explosions.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: AI 助手（AI Assistant） 如果玩家拥有 炸弹伙伴应用程序，滚动炸弹不会立刻爆炸，而是会到处弹跳，并且可以用炸弹伙伴应用程序手动引爆。; “不能爬吗”（y cant u crawl） 如果玩家持有 女英雄，滚动炸弹 的爆炸范围会更大。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Dropped bombs do not damage the player, and do not anger Bello.; Dropped bombs can reveal secret room entrances by cracking the walls, but will not break the secret wall down completely like other explosions.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 掉落的炸弹不会伤害玩家，也不会激怒贝洛（Bello）。; 掉落的炸弹可以通过震裂墙壁来暴露隐藏房间入口，但不会像其他爆炸那样把隐藏墙完全炸开。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 16 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Causes guns to fire an additional shot. Bullets to move in a helical pattern, and apply marginally less damage. Fossilized bullets containing the DNA of some forgotten Gungeon creature.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 让枪械额外发射一发子弹。子弹会沿着螺旋轨迹飞行，并造成略低的伤害。那些封存着某种被地牢遗忘的生物 DNA 的化石子弹。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Doubles the player's bullets and causes them to travel through the air in a helical pattern.; Each bullet deals 66% of its original damage, for a net 32% increase in damage if both bullets hit their target.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 让玩家的子弹数量翻倍，并让它们沿着螺旋轨迹飞行。; 每发子弹只造成原始伤害的 66%，所以如果两发都命中目标，总伤害实际上会增加 32%。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Double Double Helix If the player also has Helix, instead of the Helix Bullets effect being applied to each bullet, Helix's projectiles will be doubled (2 bullets will fire on each side while following the original pattern), damage is increased by 25%, and shot speed is increased by 50%.; Dualing Pistol If the player also has Dueling Pistol, it gains homing and changes appearance.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 双重双螺旋（Double Double Helix） 如果玩家还拥有 螺旋枪（Helix），则不会把螺旋子弹的效果套到每发子弹上，而是让 螺旋枪（Helix） 的投射物翻倍（原始轨迹两侧各发射 2 发子弹），伤害提高 25%，弹速提高 50%。; 双持手枪（Dualing Pistol） 如果玩家还拥有 决斗手枪，它会获得追踪并改变外观。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Explosion damage will not be affected by damage modifiers, including damage reduction. As such, Helix Bullets will massively buff explosive weapons.; When used on a gun with non-zero bullet spread, each shots angle variance will be mirrored between the two helix projectiles.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 爆炸伤害不会受到伤害修正的影响，包括伤害减免。因此，螺旋子弹 会极大强化爆炸型武器。; 当用在带有非零散布的枪上时，每一发子弹的角度偏差都会在两个螺旋投射物之间镜像对应。

entries.unlock: Defeat the High Dragun in Challenge Mode, or attempt Challenge Mode and fail 30 times.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Bullets have a chance to do... something to foes. These unpredictable bullets change from moment to moment. Always destructive, never boring!
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 子弹有机会对敌人做点……什么。这些不可预测的子弹每一刻都在变化。永远在破坏，从不无聊！
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Slightly randomises the speed of the players bullets.; Each shot fired has a chance to be affected by a number of random modifiers from the following list. These effects are not mutually exclusive, and multiple can be applied to the same shot.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 会轻微随机化玩家子弹的速度。; 每次射击都有几率受到以下列表中的若干随机修正影响。这些效果并不互斥，同一发子弹可以叠加多个效果。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Kaliber's Grip If the player has Abyssal Tentacle, Abyssal Tentacle grabs two enemies at a time.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 卡利伯之握（Kaliber's Grip） 如果玩家拥有 深渊触手，深渊触手 一次会抓住两个敌人。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Ammonomicon quote "Taste the Painbow" is a reference to the slogan of the Skittles brand of confectionery, "Taste the Rainbow".; This item bearing butterfly wings is a reference to the concept of the butterfly effect in chaos theory.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 阿莫诺米康台词“味觉彩虹派”（Taste the Painbow）是糖果品牌 Skittles 口号“品尝彩虹”（Taste the Rainbow）的戏仿。; 这件带着蝴蝶翅膀的道具，参考的是混沌理论中的蝴蝶效应概念。

entries.unlock: Kill 10 Confirmed, or teleport to the eyeball room with Teleporter Prototype.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Etched into its chambers is a single worn glyph. Allows the Kin to see, as you might.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 枪膛上刻着一个磨损的符文。让枪灵们像你一样看见。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Upon entering a room, there is a 60%Float ChanceToHappen in class YellowChamberItem. While this value is set to 0.25f in the code, the actual value on the item prefab for Yellow Chamber is set to 0.6f. chance that an enemy will become charmed for the duration of the room.; Like all charmed enemies, attacks from this enemy can still harm the player.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 进入房间时，有 60% 的几率让一名敌人在整个房间持续被魅惑。代码里这个值虽然写成 0.25f，但黄色膛室（Yellow Chamber）这个道具预制体上的实际值是 0.6f。; 和所有被魅惑的敌人一样，这名敌人发起的攻击仍然会伤害玩家。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Hellhole If the player has Singularity, it spawns a hell portal that sucks enemies in and deals high damage.; Just Like The Real Thing If the player has Shotgrub, it fires a wide spread of five bullets, which bounce back and split into waving bullets after hitting a wall, similar to the Shotgrub enemy's attack.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 地狱洞（Hellhole） 如果玩家拥有 奇点，它会生成一个地狱传送门，把敌人吸进去并造成高额伤害。; 如同真的一样（Just Like The Real Thing） 如果玩家拥有 射蛆，它会发射一片宽阔的五发散射子弹，这些子弹在撞墙后会反弹并裂成摆动子弹，类似射蛆敌人的攻击。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Enemies are only charmed in the initial combat wave. Reinforcement enemy waves are unaffected.; Enemies encountered when using the Lament Configurum, a Challenge Shrine, or the Drill can be charmed by this item on the first wave of any encounter as normal.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 敌人只会在初始战斗波次中被魅惑。增援波次不受影响。; 使用 悲伤拼图盒、挑战神龛或 电钻 时遇到的敌人，在任何遭遇战的第一波里也能像正常情况一样被这件道具魅惑。

entries.unlock: Defeat the Shadow Magician 5 times.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Curse increases damage. Bullets straight from HELLLLL!
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 诅咒会增加伤害。直接来自地狱深处的子弹！
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Increases damage by 10% per point of the player has, to a maximum of +100% damage at 10 curse.; Increases by 1.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 每一点诅咒值都会让伤害提高 10%，最高在 10 点诅咒时达到 +100% 伤害。; 诅咒值还会额外再增加 1 点。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Blessing and a Curse If the player has Silver Bullets, every jammed enemy killed grants a persistent, additive 0.0025 (0.25%) damage buff.; Kailber k'pow uboom k'bhang If the player also has High Kaliber, the soul spawned by hitting an enemy with High Kaliber initially moves towards the player instead of away.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 祝福与诅咒（Blessing and a Curse） 如果玩家还拥有 银子弹，每击杀一个被诅咒敌人都会获得一个持续叠加的 0.0025（0.25%）伤害加成。; 卡伊尔伯的砰、嘣、砰、碰（Kailber k'pow uboom k'bhang） 如果玩家还拥有 高卡利波尔（至高卡利波尔枪），用高卡利波尔击中敌人后生成的灵魂一开始会朝玩家移动，而不是远离玩家。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Ammonomicon quote "Too Spooky" is a reference to the internet meme '2spooky4me'.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 阿莫诺米康台词“太吓人了”（Too Spooky）是对网络梗“二次恐怖梗”的引用。

entries.unlock: Kill The Bullet's past.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: The sounds from this strange instrument seem to have summoned a chicken. How useful!
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这支奇怪的乐器似乎召唤出了一只鸡。多有用！
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Spawns a chicken that follows the player, blocks bullets, and deals 2.5 contact damage per frame to enemies it touches.; If the chicken takes damage 8 or more times in quick succession, it will summon an army of 20 chickens to attack all enemies in the room.Method HandleDamaged in class CuccoController
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 生成一只会跟着玩家、挡子弹并对接触到的敌人每帧造成 2.5 点接触伤害的鸡。; 如果这只鸡在短时间内连续受到 8 次或以上伤害，它就会召唤一支由 20 只鸡组成的军队攻击房间里的所有敌人。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Bullet or the Egg If the player has The Scrambler, its shots become larger and split into 10 seekers instead of 5.; The Elephant in the Room If the player has Elephant Gun, it becomes an elephant head and shoots elephants instead of bullets.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 子弹还是蛋 如果玩家拥有 乱枪（爬行者），其子弹会变得更大，并分裂成 10 个追踪弹，而不是 5 个。; 房间里的大象 如果玩家拥有 猎象枪，它会变成一个象头，并射出大象而不是子弹。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This item is a reference to Cuccos in the Legend of Zelda series, where if Link attacks a Cucco three times, an army of Cuccos will appear, attacking the player.; The appearance of the item itself is also a reference to The Fairy Ocarina in the Legend of Zelda series, which can play different songs which serve different purposes.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这件道具参考了《塞尔达传说》系列里的库可。林克如果打库可三次，就会冒出一群库可攻击玩家。; 这个道具本身的外观也参考了《塞尔达传说》系列里的精灵陶笛，它能演奏不同的曲子并对应不同用途。

entries.unlock: Kill The Robot's past.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Moves a chest to the next floor. This unusual adventuring tool moves a chest forward in the timestream, causing it to age and possibly level up!
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 把一个宝箱送到下一层。这件奇特的冒险工具会把宝箱推进时间流，让它老化，甚至可能升级！
entries.englishEffectHighlights: When used on a chest, teleports it to the next chamber.; Teleported chests will either appear in the starting room or the room right before the boss room.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 对宝箱使用时，会把它传送到下一层。; 被传送的宝箱会出现在起始房间，或者 Boss 房之前的那间房里。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Second Accident If the player also has Shotbow, its firing pattern is changed to a grid of nine arrows.; Telefrag If the player also has Teleporter Prototype, uses it, and gets teleported to an uncleared room, all enemies in the room will be killed instantly. If it teleports the player to a special room, Teleporter Prototype's cooldown is decreased. Also grants an extra active item slot.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 第二次事故（Second Accident） 如果玩家还拥有 霰弹弓，其射击模式会变成九支箭的网格。; 传送重击（Telefrag） 如果玩家还拥有 传送原型机，使用它并把自己传送到未清空的房间里，房间内所有敌人都会立刻死亡。如果它把玩家传送到特殊房间，传送原型机的冷却时间会减少。此外还会额外提供一个主动道具槽。

entries.unlock: Defeat the High Dragun as The Bullet.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Betrayer!
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 叛徒！
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires a piercing rainbow sword projectile when swung.; This projectile is only spawned if the player is at full health. The Robot is never considered at full health, and as such, cannot fire the sword projecitle.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 挥动时会发射一把可穿透的彩虹剑投射物。; 这个投射物只有在玩家满血时才会生成。机器人永远不会被视为满血，因此它无法发射这把剑投射物。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Professor Goopton for 7 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Creates poison on dodge roll, also grants immunity to poison.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 在翻滚闪避时会生成毒液，同时还会赋予中毒免疫。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Dodge rolling leaves a trail of poison goop.; Grants immunity to poison.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 翻滚闪避会留下一条毒液污渍轨迹。; 赋予中毒免疫。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Buggin' Out If the player has Gungeon Ant, while it is held, Bug Boots spread oil instead of poison, and the player becomes immune to fire.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 打虫子去 如果玩家拥有 地牢蚁，持有它时，臭虫靴子 会散播油而不是毒液，而且玩家会免疫火焰。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Use of this item allows the player to spread poison over the entrance to Bullet Hell, despite there visually being no ground to spread it on.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 使用这件道具可以让玩家把毒液铺到子弹地狱入口上，尽管那里视觉上看起来根本没有可铺洒的地面。

entries.unlock: Kill The Robot's past.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: The left hand of an assault robot that fled to the Gungeon. It turns out most robots are left-handed.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这只入侵机器人逃到地牢后留下的左手。结果大多数机器人似乎都是左撇子。
entries.englishUsageNotes: In the Robot's past, the Robot starts equipped with this gun.; The Player's Character can wield this weapon in their right hand.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 在机器人（The Robot）的过去里，机器人开局就会装备这把枪。; 玩家角色也可以把这把武器拿在右手使用。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: While reloading, any further attempts to reload increase a damage multiplier. Years ago, savvy Gungeoneers built devices to automatically pull the trigger faster than a human hand. For some reason, they have fallen out of favor.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 换弹时，再次尝试换弹会提高伤害倍率。多年前，精明的地牢探险者们造出了一些装置，能比人手更快地自动扣扳机。可不知为何，它们已经不再受欢迎了。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Pressing the reload button while this gun is reloading will increase the damage of its next magazine.; The first 5 button presses each add an additional 20% damage, while any subsequent presses add 10%.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 按下换弹键时，如果这把枪正在换弹，就会提高下一匣的伤害。; 前 5 次按键每次额外提高 20% 伤害，之后每次按键提高 10%。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Requiring a click rate of 25 clicks per second, the player will likely be unable to achieve full damage every time.; This can be worked around on PC by temporarily binding the player's reload keys to ScrollUp and ScrollDown on the scroll wheel.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 由于需要每秒 25 次点击，玩家很可能没法每次都打出满额伤害。; 在 PC 上可以临时把玩家的换弹键绑定到鼠标滚轮的向上和向下滚动，来绕过这个限制。

entries.unlock: Play more than 6 runs after the release of A Farewell To Arms.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Transforms into a powerful weapon under mysterious circumstances. This Bullet Sprite will transform into an enormously powerful radiant energy weapon under certain circumstances. Traditionally, this means showing proficiency in bridge delivery and maintenance. If no bridge is available, however, it will take less important things like courage or determination into consideration.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 在神秘的情况下会变成一把强力武器。这个子弹精灵会在特定条件下变成一把威力惊人的光能武器。传统上，这意味着它擅长桥梁运输和维护。如果没有桥，它就会把勇气或决心之类没那么重要的东西也算进去。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Summons a friendly green sprite to follow the player. This sprite can block enemy bullets.; When picked up, Sprun will select a random trigger from a list of possible events. When this trigger is met, the sprite will vanish, and the player will be granted the Windgunner for around 10 seconds.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 召唤一个友善的绿色精灵跟随玩家。这个精灵可以挡住敌方子弹。; 拾取后，弹簧支撑 会从一系列可能事件里随机选择一个触发条件。触发后，精灵会消失，玩家会在大约 10 秒内获得风行枪。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Sprun can trigger even while in a Blessed Run.; If Sprun's trigger is falling into a pit, entering the Oubliette may trigger Sprun until the player falls into a pit again.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 弹簧支撑 即使在祝福之旅中也可能触发。; 如果弹簧支撑的触发条件是掉进坑里，那么进入遗忘间（Oubliette）可能会触发弹簧支撑，直到玩家再次掉进坑里。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 28 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Projectile impacts can trigger a short range Blank. Not content to have guns that shoot bullets to kill Bullets that shoot guns which fire bullets, these bullets were devised to kill the bullets fired from Bullet's guns. Bullet.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 子弹撞上敌人或障碍物时，有几率触发一次短距离空响。地牢可不满足于只造出会射子弹的枪、会杀子弹的枪，再让这些枪去杀别的子弹，它们干脆造出了会把敌人枪械射出的子弹统统清掉的子弹。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Bullets have a chance of triggering a short-range blank when they hit obstacles or enemies.; Doubles the damage of beam style Guns.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 子弹击中敌人或障碍物时，有几率触发一次短距离空响。; 光束类枪械的伤害翻倍。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Elder Blank Bullets If the player also has Elder Blank, the blank effects reflect all projectiles instead of deleting them.; Blanks triggered by Blank Bullets are affected by Ammolets and causes the short ranged blanks to function strangely. For instance, a blank triggered by Blank Bullets while holding the Gold Ammolet causes the damaging radius of the blank to affect entire rooms. This phenomenon can also be seen in the mini-blanks generated by Houston, the Owl, and Ser Junkan's Holy Knight form.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 旧式空响弹如果玩家还拥有旧式空响弹，空响效果会反射所有投射物，而不是直接清掉它们。; 由空响弹子弹触发的空响会受护弹符影响，并让短距离空响的表现变得很怪。比如，玩家手持金护弹符时，空响弹子弹触发的空响会把伤害半径扩展到整个房间。这个现象也能在休斯顿、猫头鹰和赛尔·江肯的圣骑士形态生成的迷你空响里看到。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Just some junk.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 就只是一堆垃圾。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Junk has no inherent effect, however it does interact with some other systems and items.; When playing as The Robot, each piece of Junk increases damage by a permanent additive 5%. The damage increase persists no matter what happens to the Junk.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 垃圾没有固有效果，不过它会和某些其他系统和道具互动。; 当玩家扮演机器人时，每一件垃圾都会永久叠加 5% 伤害。这个伤害加成无论垃圾发生什么都会保留。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Grouch Junk increases the damage of the Trashcannon by 25%. This effect does not stack with multiple Junk.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 邋遢会让垃圾加农炮的伤害提高 25%。这项效果不会因为拥有多件垃圾而叠加。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Junk has a chest destruction loot weight of 0.45.; If the player is in possession of Ser Junkan, the chest destruction loot weight of junk is multiplied by 1.5.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 垃圾的破箱掉落权重是 0.45。; 如果玩家持有 赛尔·江肯，垃圾的破箱掉落权重会乘以 1.5。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 28 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Traditionally used by the Void Core for ship-to-ship combat, the VCC weapon fires an accelerating ball of plasma that delivers a devestating [sic] punch. This hand-held model is a retrofit design made specifically for the Thunderbolt.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 传统上，虚空核心把它用于舰对舰作战；VCC 武器会发射一团不断加速的等离子球，冲击力极强。这台手持型号是专门为雷霆号改造的版本。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: The Void Corps If the player has Void Core Assault Rifle or Void Shotgun, whenever one of the guns is held, the others orbit the player. Reloading causes the orbiting gun(s) to fire towards the crosshair. If the player has all three guns, the guns that aren't being used will orbit the player. This does not consume ammo from the orbiting guns.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 虚空军团 如果玩家拥有 真空核心突击步枪或真空霰弹枪，只要手持其中一把，另外几把就会围绕玩家旋转。重新装填会让环绕的枪朝准星方向开火。如果玩家拥有三把枪，未使用的枪都会围绕玩家。这不会消耗环绕枪械的弹药。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun uses the same sprite as the unused Void Core Rocket Launcher.; This gun is a reference to the Plasma Projector carried by the Assault T-Synth from Void 1.1.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪使用了未启用的虚空核心火箭发射器的同一张精灵图。; 这把枪参考了《虚空 1.1》中突击 T-合成体携带的等离子投射器。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Fires moonlight. Royal symbol of society that once inhabited Gunymede’s oldest moon, Sniperion. This tiara was gifted to an ancient queen by a mysterious bearded traveler from planet-side. Folk tales insinuate that the traveler sought the queen’s affection and was rebuffed.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 发射月光。曾经居住在枪尼墨得最古老卫星 斯尼皮里昂 上的社会，把它视为王权象征。这顶头冠曾被一位神秘的留胡子来客从地表献给一位古代女王。民间故事暗示，这位来客想赢得女王的芳心，却被拒绝了。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Moonlight Tiara was re-used as an alternate form of the Crown of Guns with the Alas, Sniperion synergy.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 月光头冠后来被复用为枪之冠的另一种形态，并与“唉，斯尼皮里昂”协同一起出现。

entries.unlock: Find and use the Blood Shrine twice.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Drains will from foes. An item to be held by a Gungeoneer. Can be used to weaponize stolen will against the holder's enemies.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 汲取敌人的意志。给地牢探险者持有的道具。可用来把偷来的意志武器化，反过来对付持有者的敌人。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The reload attack is based on enemies killed with gunfire while holding the Life Orb, not necessarily kills with the Life Orb. Enemies killed by armed companions such as R2G2 will still charge the gun's special attack.; It is possible to break the damage cap with the Life Orb, but only against the Lich. If you kill the 1st or 2nd form with the Life Orb, you can use the reload attack to 1-shot the next form and instantly kill it. This only works if you do at least 1000 damage with the Life Orb, which will usually require an ammo/damage increase, otherwise the Life Orb will run out before you kill the boss with it alone.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 换弹攻击统计的是玩家手持生命球时用枪击杀的敌人，而不一定非得是生命球本身击杀。像 R2G2 这类武装同伴击杀的敌人，也会为这把枪的特殊攻击充能。; 生命球有可能打破伤害上限，但只对巫妖有效。如果你用生命球杀死第一或第二形态，就能用换弹攻击一击干掉下一形态，瞬间击杀它。只有当生命球累计至少造成 1000 点伤害时这才可行，通常需要额外的弹药或伤害加成，否则在你单靠它击杀 Boss 之前，生命球就会耗尽。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Ignites nearby enemies while reloading. Reloading this teapot heats up the contained water's H2O monocules.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 换弹时点燃附近敌人。重新装填这把茶壶会加热其中 H2O 分子的水。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires heart-shaped clouds of steam.; The final shot of every magazine is pink, and deals additional damage.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射心形蒸汽云。; 每个弹匣的最后一发是粉色，并造成额外伤害。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Monsters and Monocles If the player also has Mustache, the AoE effect range of Teapot is increased.; Tea for Two If the player has almost any familiar (including Ser Junkan, Wolf, Turkey, Clown Mask, Chicken Flute, Baby Good Mimic, Baby Good Shelleton, Pig, R2G2, Super Space Turtle, Blank Companion's Ring, or Badge), the companion will also gain a fire aura while the Teapot is reloading.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 怪物与单片眼镜 如果玩家还拥有 胡子，茶壶的效果范围会增加。; 双人茶会 如果玩家拥有几乎任何同伴（包括赛尔·江肯、狼、火鸡、小丑面具、鸡长笛、乖宝宝拟身怪、乖宝宝骷髅、猪、R2G2、超级太空龟、空响弹同伴之戒或徽章），在茶壶换弹时，该同伴也会获得火焰光环。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The AoE effect only lasts as long as the weapon's reload time. This means that any item that decreases reload speed (such as Galactic Medal of Valor) nerfs the AoE effect by ending it early.; This also applies to Cog of Battle, in which case the effect is also canceled early by the active reload, making it often favorable to not use the active reload to prolong the AoE effect.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 效果只会持续到武器换弹完成为止。这意味着任何降低换弹速度的道具（例如银河勇士奖章）都会因为提前结束效果而削弱它。; 这同样适用于 战斗齿轮，在这种情况下主动换弹也会更早取消效果，因此通常最好不要用主动换弹来延长效果。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Fires replicas of planets from a fictional solar system. Collect all eight! Due to a trick in perspective, these two-dimensional planets appear spherical. Though much smaller than the source material, the planets created by this device will pack quite a punch.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 发射来自虚构太阳系的行星复制品。集齐全部八颗！由于透视技巧，这些二维行星看起来是球形的。虽然比原型小得多，但这台装置发射出的行星依旧相当有劲。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Moonplanet If the player also has Moonscraper, a moon that blocks enemy shots orbits the player while held.; Orrery if the player has Orbital Bullets, it causes the planets fired by Mr. Accretion Jr. to have smaller bullets orbiting them like moons; these bullets persist when the missed shots start orbiting the player. Each planet only has 1 "moon" bullet, regardless of how many moons the corresponding planet has in real life.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 月球平土机 如果玩家还拥有 月球平土机，手持时会有一颗能挡敌方子弹的月亮环绕玩家。; 天体仪 如果玩家拥有 环绕子弹，小冲积先生发射的行星会带有更小的子弹像月亮一样环绕其周围；这些子弹在未命中的行星开始环绕玩家时仍会保留。每颗行星都只有 1 颗“月亮（moon）”子弹，不管现实里对应行星有多少颗卫星。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Firing or reloading Mr. Accretion Jr. releases a cloud of gas with a space texture. This effect is purely visual.; If the player attempts to reload when the gun is already full, it will still release this gas.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 发射或重新装填 小冲积先生 时会释放一团带有宇宙纹理的气体。这个效果纯属视觉。; 如果玩家在枪已装满时尝试换弹，也还是会喷出这种气体。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 26 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Spits bullets, fear. Chiseled from a large slab of the rare element Cranium, this terrifying stony visage is a totem of an angry god.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 喷吐子弹与恐惧。由稀有元素颅骨的一整块巨大板材雕琢而成，这张骇人的石质面容是愤怒神祇的图腾。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Rapidly fires 360 projectiles.; While held, any non-boss enemies within 90° of the angle the player is aiming will become afraid, fleeing the player.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 迅速发射 360 发投射物。; 持有时，玩家瞄准角度正前方 90° 范围内的非 Boss 敌人会陷入恐惧并逃离玩家。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Heads Up Stone Dome shoots skulls, which deal 6 damage and have increased homing.; Hot Head Stone Dome shots fire enemies.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 抬头看看 如果玩家还拥有 石质圆顶，会发射造成 6 点伤害并具有更强追踪的骷髅。; 热头 如果玩家还拥有 石质圆顶，其射击会发射敌人。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The fear status effect can compel enemies to walk backwards into hazards such as dangerous goop or pits.; Bug: Switching to another gun causes currently afraid enemies to be permanently afraid. These enemies will always flee the player after coming within a 6 tile range, regardless of the direction the player is aiming. This persists forever, or until the player switches back to the Stone Dome.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 恐惧状态会迫使敌人倒着走进危险污渍或坑洞等陷阱里。; 漏洞：切换到另一把枪会让当前处于恐惧状态的敌人永久保持恐惧。这些敌人会在进入 6 格范围后无论玩家朝向哪里都一直逃离玩家。这个效果会永久持续，直到玩家切回石质圆顶。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Shoots bubbles. Uniquely effective under the right circumstances. Doubles as an amusing toy for babies.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 发射泡泡。在合适的条件下尤其好用。顺便也是给婴儿玩的有趣玩具。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Rapidly fires slow moving bubble projectiles. These bubbles are off various sizes, but all deal the same amount of damage.; Bubbles create a pool of water when popping on impacting a wall, object, or enemy. This allows them to extinguish chest fuses and the fireplace.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 快速发射缓慢移动的泡泡投射物。这些泡泡大小各不相同，但造成的伤害相同。; 泡泡在撞上墙壁、物体或敌人时会破裂并生成一滩水。这能熄灭宝箱引线和壁炉。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Bubble Trouble If the player has Siren, Siren will fire a single large shot that deals 18 damage, and Bubble Blaster's shots home in on enemies.; Get Equipped With -B- Enables Bubble Lead mode on the Megahand, which fires lingering 12 damage bubbles while uncharged. Unlike other forms of the Megahand, this form will constantly fire uncharged shots while charging up to fire its energy blast. Modes can be switched by reloading the Megahand with a full magazine.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 泡泡麻烦 如果玩家拥有 塞壬，塞壬会发射一发造成 18 点伤害的大型射击，并让泡泡喷射枪的射击自动追踪敌人。; 装备 -B- 为 洛克手炮 解锁泡沫铅模式，使其在未充能时发射持续存在、造成 12 点伤害的泡泡。与 洛克手炮 的其他形态不同，这种形态在充能释放能量爆发时，会持续发射未充能射击。可以通过在 洛克手炮 弹匣已满时重新装填来切换模式。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Bubble Blaster appears to be a Gunzookie.; Like the Gunzookie, the Bubble Blaster is a reference to Bub from the Bubble Bobble franchise, a green lizard that creates bubbles.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 泡泡喷射枪看起来像一只枪蜥蜴。; 和枪蜥蜴一样，泡泡喷射枪参考了泡泡龙系列里的巴布，那只会制造泡泡的绿色蜥蜴。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 26 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: A big shotgun. In comparison with the Regular Shotgun, this one is bigger.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 一把大霰弹枪。和常规霰弹枪相比，这把更大。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Big Shotgun Gun If the player also has BSG, the Big Shotgun fires five projectiles instead of three.; If the player also has Backup Gun, the backwards shot will only fire three.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 大霰弹枪枪 如果玩家还拥有 大射机枪，大型霰弹枪会发射五发投射物而不是三发。; 如果玩家还拥有 备用枪，向后射出的那一发只会发射三颗。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The maximum ammo of the Big Shotgun was increased from 50 to 70 in the Farewell to Arms update.; Despite being a shotgun, the Big Shotgun is not in the SHOTGUN gun class.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 大型霰弹枪的最大弹药量在《告别武装》更新中从 50 提升到 70。; 尽管它是霰弹枪，大型霰弹枪并不属于霰弹枪类别。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 28 HC
entries.englishGameplaySummary: This brightly colored gun changes shape at regular intervals, making it a little hard to hold onto. That said, you're sure to have a whale of a time firing it!
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把色彩鲜艳的枪会按固定间隔变形，所以不太好拿稳。不过，开火时肯定能让你乐在其中！
entries.englishUsageNotes: Heads Up If the player also has Stone Dome, Stone Dome will shoot skulls instead.; Whale of a Time If the player also has Backpack, there's a chance a skull will spawn when getting hit to recover lost health, even if the player has another weapon equipped while getting hit.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 抬头看 如果玩家还拥有 石质圆顶，石质圆顶会改为射出骷髅。; 玩得像鲸一样 如果玩家还拥有 背包，被打中时有几率生成一颗骷髅来回复失去的生命，即使玩家在挨打时还装备着别的武器也一样。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: This gun is still in the process of being forged! It barely functions in its current state, but could be a viable choice in a truly desperate situation. A small hourglass is embossed on the cylinder.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把枪仍在锻造中！它目前几乎没法用，但在真正绝望的情况下也许还是个可行选择。枪管上压着一个小沙漏。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Phoenix Up If the player has Phoenix, while Phoenix is held, summons a phoenix companion that fires at enemies.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 凤凰再起 如果玩家还拥有 凤凰，在手持凤凰时，会召唤一只会向敌人射击的凤凰同伴。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Despite not actually igniting enemies, the Unfinished Gun is in the FIRE gun class.; As a consequence, having the Unfinished Gun in the player's inventory makes them less likely to find other guns in the FIRE class that actually burn enemies.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 尽管它并不会真正点燃敌人，未完成的枪仍属于火焰枪械类别。; 因此，背包里有未完成的枪，会让玩家更不容易刷到其他真正能点燃敌人的火焰类枪。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Infinite ammo. Does not reveal secret walls. Brought to the Gungeon by a legendary gunplay expert. Called the gunslinger by his foes not because of his ability to aim and shoot but because of his unusual habit of literally slinging his gun once it is out of ammo and replacing it with another from his magical belt of a million guns.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 无限弹药。不显露秘密墙。由一位传奇枪法高手带入地牢。敌人之所以叫他枪手，不是因为他瞄得准、打得快，而是因为他一旦没弹药，就会真的把枪甩出去，再从那条装着一百万把枪的魔法腰带里换一把新的。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: When reloading an empty magazine, the gun itself is thrown forwards. If this tossed gun hits an enemy, it has a chance to stun them.; Bug: After dodge rolling, the firerate of the Slinger is temporarily boosted.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 在空弹匣上重新装填时，枪本身会被甩出去。如果这把被甩出的枪击中敌人，有几率使其眩晕。; 漏洞：翻滚闪避后，甩枪的射速会暂时提升。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Slinger has zero bullet spread and its accuracy cannot be decreased, making it one of the most precise guns in the game.; The Slinger is the fastest-firing of all the starter weapons.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 甩枪的子弹散布为零，而且准确度不会降低，因此它是游戏中最精准的枪之一。; 甩枪也是所有初始武器里射速最快的。

entries.unlock: Pick it up from a shop, either by stealing it or angering the shopkeeper
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Grants wealth, prone to tearing. Perfectly proportioned for light travel or a trip to the gym, this classic duffle features a timeless aesthetic and a padded removable shoulder strap. Not bulletproof.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 赋予财富，但容易撕裂。体积和轻装旅行或健身房之行完美匹配，这款经典旅行包外观永不过时，还带有可拆卸的加厚肩带。不过它不防弹。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Doubles coin drops from the following sources;; Enemy & Boss Drops.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 使以下来源掉落的硬币数量翻倍：; 敌人与首领掉落。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Dropped coin that falls into a pit will teleport back to the player's current location, making it easier to pick back up.; Dropped coin that falls into an elevator shaft cannot be recovered..
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 掉进坑里的掉落硬币会传送回玩家当前所在位置，更容易捡回。; 掉进电梯井的掉落硬币则无法找回。

entries.unlock: Pick it up from a shop, either by stealing it or angering the shopkeeper
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Grants anonymity, friendship. Masks of this design were used to explore primitive Gungeon-like structures filled with money, now referred to as "Mungeons". Anonymity was important to Mungeoneers of this time. The friendly clown design is thought to have helped Mungeoneers make peace with the native inhabitants.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 赋予匿名感和友谊。这种设计的面具曾被用来探索装满金钱的原始地牢式结构，如今这些结构被称为“地下城（Mungeons）”。在那个年代，匿名性对当时的地牢探险者至关重要。人们认为，这种友善的小丑设计有助于这些探险者与当地居民和解。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Visually changes the players appearance to Dallas from the Payday franchise.; Summons one of the following clown-masked companions;
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 把玩家外观视觉上改成《劫薪日》系列中的达拉斯。; 召唤下列小丑面具同伴之一；
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Tea for Two If the player also has Teapot, when reloading Teapot, Wolf, Houston, and Chains will have a small red aura around them. Every enemy in this aura will be ignited.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 双人茶会 如果玩家还拥有 茶壶，在重新装填茶壶时，狼、休斯顿和锁链周围会出现一圈小红色光环。光环内的每个敌人都会被点燃。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Despite being a companion item, Clown Mask cannot be obtained from the Companion Shrine. This because the shrine searches for items with the CompanionItem code class, while the Clown Mask uses the class BankMaskItem.; The Clown Mask and its companions are a reference to PAYDAY 2, and were added in a cross-promotional event.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 尽管是同伴类道具，小丑面具却无法从同伴神龛中获得。这是因为神龛会搜索同伴道具代码类的道具，而小丑面具使用的是银行面具道具代码类。; 小丑面具及其同伴参考自《劫薪日 2》，并作为一次联动活动加入游戏。

entries.unlock: Create 10 guns using any Muncher.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: A horrific consequence of radiation exposure. At least the arm is still somewhat useful.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 辐射暴露带来的可怕后果。至少这条手臂还算有点用。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Contrail If the player has Alien Engine, its flame will turn green, igniting enemies with greenfire. Alien Engine also grants flight while held.; Neo Tech, Yo If the player has Bionic Leg or Shock Rounds, Mutation's beam turns blue, leaves puddles of electrified water, and its ammo capacity is increased to 800. The player is immune to electricity while Mutation is held.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 拖尾 如果玩家拥有 外星引擎，其火焰会变成绿色，用绿火点燃敌人。外星引擎在手持时也会赋予飞行能力。; 新科技，哟 如果玩家拥有 仿生腿或电击炮，突变的光束会变成蓝色，留下带电水洼，弹药容量提升至 800。手持突变时，玩家免疫电击。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The synergy between the Mutation and Bionic Leg/Shock Rounds may be a reference to Tetsuo from the 1982 manga series Akira. Tetsuo similarly possesses a bionic arm, and famously undergoes extreme and disturbing mutations. The synergy's name, "Neo Tech, Yo" also seems to allude to Neotokyo, the setting where the story takes place.; "Didn't Need Two Anyway" refers to the look of the weapon in-game, which envelops the player's whole arm.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 突变与仿生腿/电击炮的协同，可能参考了 1982 年漫画《阿基拉》中的铁雄。铁雄同样拥有一条仿生手臂，并以经历极端而骇人的变异而闻名。该协同名称“新科技，哟”似乎也在暗指故事发生地新东京。; “不需要两只（Didn't Need Two Anyway）”指的是游戏中这把武器的外观，它会把玩家整条手臂包起来。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: An extremely powerful ricochet rifle. Cobbled together from the compatible parts of the RUBE-ADYNE and its prototype, this makeshift gun provides maximum lethality in one convenient package.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 一把极其强力的跳弹步枪。由鲁贝-阿迪恩及其原型机的兼容部件拼装而成，这把临时拼凑的枪以一个方便的包装提供最大杀伤力。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Rapidly fires pink laser blasts that can bounce once.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 快速发射会反弹一次的粉色激光束。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun is not needed for completion. The Finished Gun can be unlocked without having this gun's Ammonomicon entry filled.; Despite its considerable power, Rubenstein's Monster is in the SHITTY gun class.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪并非完成收集所必需。即使没有填满这把枪的阿莫诺米康条目，也能解锁完成之枪。; 尽管威力惊人，鲁本斯坦的怪物仍属于糟糕枪械类别。

entries.unlock: Give health to the Vampire 3 times.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: A wooden beam, often used in construction. Not technically a gun, but you could probably smack some Bullet Kin around with it.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 一根木梁，常用于建筑。严格来说它不是枪，但你大概也能拿它去揍几下子弹怪。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: While the trigger is held, this gun will extend in the form of a stiff beam until reaching the end of its range.; Swinging the beam into enemies deals considerably more damage and knockback than direct hits.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 按住扳机时，这把枪会延伸成一根坚硬的长梁，直到达到射程尽头。; 把梁挥向敌人造成的伤害和击退都比直接命中更高。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Pea Cannon If the player also has Pea Shooter, Pea Shooter shots become larger, deal more damage, and explode.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 豌豆炮 如果玩家还拥有 射豆枪，射豆枪的子弹会变大、造成更高伤害，并且爆炸。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Wood Beam deals no damage to chests. For this reason, it can be an excellent way to check for Mimics. Its length can also bypass locked doors, to check if the chest inside is a mimic.; Wood Beam's damage multiplier from swing speed applies after Unity's flat damage bonus. This makes Unity especially effective with Wood Beam, as Unity's damage bonus will be multiplied by 2, 8, 16, or 26 depending on how fast the beam is swung.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 木梁不会对宝箱造成伤害。因此，它是检查拟身怪的极佳手段。它的长度也能穿过上锁的门，用来确认里面的宝箱是不是拟身怪。; 木梁挥击速度带来的伤害倍率，会在统一的固定伤害加成之后计算。这让统一与木梁尤其契合，因为统一的伤害加成会按 2、8、16 或 26 倍放大，具体取决于梁挥得有多快。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The AK-47 is in many ways the gun against which all other guns are judged. This affordable and reliable piece of hardware has proven itself in nearly any terrain or situation. Desert, jungle, snow, and dungeon were all accounted for in its timeless design. It can even fire underwater.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: AK-47 在很多方面都是其他枪衡量的标杆。这件价格亲民、可靠耐用的装备几乎适用于任何地形或场合。沙漠、丛林、雪地和地牢都被它的经典设计考虑在内。它甚至能在水下射击。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: AK-47 (Island Forme) If the player has Orange, pressing reload with a full magazine toggles Island Forme. Island Forme AK-47 fires oranges, which deal more damage than regular AK-47 shots. Each orange deals 7 damage. If the Orange is eaten while the AK-47 is in Island Forme, it will remain in Island Forme, but if the player switches away from Island Forme, they will not be able to switch back. It can be reloaded by any means except manual reload. Such as firing when empty.; Regular Old Guns If the player also has Regular Shotgun, both guns fire four times as fast, but their damage is decreased by 25%.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: AK-47（岛屿形态） 如果玩家拥有 橙子，弹匣装满时按下重新装填会切换到岛屿形态。岛屿形态的 AK-47 会发射橙子，每颗橙子造成的伤害都高于普通 AK-47 子弹。每颗橙子造成 7 点伤害。若 AK-47 处于岛屿形态时把橙子吃掉，它会继续保持岛屿形态；但如果玩家切离岛屿形态，就再也切不回去了。它可以通过除手动换弹之外的任何方式重新装填，比如打空后开火。; 普通老枪 如果玩家还拥有 常规霰弹枪，两把枪的射速都会变成原来的 4 倍，但伤害会降低 25%。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The AK-47 is wielded by some Bullet Kin, Tankers, and Hollowpoints.; If the player feeds the AK-47 and either the Flame Hand or Megahand to a regular Muncher, it will always spit out a Machine Fist.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 一些子弹怪、坦克手弹和幽灵子弹都会持有这把枪。; 如果玩家把 AK-47 以及 火焰之手 或 洛克手炮 任何一种喂给普通吞枪怪，它总会吐出一只机械拳头。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 13 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: The arm of a famous bounty hunter. This arm cannon has seen substantial use, but its upkeep has been immaculate.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 著名赏金猎人的手臂。这门臂炮曾被大量使用，但保养得无可挑剔。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Hyper Beam If the player has Pig, when Pig dies, Heroine's ammo is fully refilled and it temporarily switches to Hyper Beam mode, where uncharged shots deal 80 damage and charged shots deal 160 damage. Heroine will automatically revert to its original form after 30 seconds. This synergy is not enabled by Lich's Eye Bullets.; y cant u crawl If the player also has Roll Bomb, its explosions are larger.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 超级光束 如果玩家拥有 猪，在猪死亡时，女英雄的弹药会被完全补满，并暂时切换到超级光束模式。此时，未充能射击造成 80 点伤害，充能射击造成 160 点伤害。30 秒后，女英雄会自动恢复原形。这项协同不会被巫妖之眼子弹触发。; 你咋爬 如果玩家还拥有 滚动炸弹，其爆炸范围会更大。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Heroine is a reference to the Arm Cannon wielded by Samus Aran, the heavily armored bounty hunter and protagonist in the Metroid series.; Its in-game model and its alternative modes match its appearance in Metroid Prime.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 女英雄参考了萨姆斯·阿兰所持的臂炮，也就是《银河战士》系列里那位重装赏金猎人兼主角的武器。; 它在游戏中的模型和各个替代模式都与《银河战士·普莱姆》中的外观一致。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 13 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: The arm of a famous bounty hunter. This arm cannon has seen substantial use, but its upkeep has been immaculate.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 著名赏金猎人的手臂。这门臂炮曾被大量使用，但保养得无可挑剔。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Hyper Beam If the player has Pig, when Pig dies, Heroine's ammo is fully refilled and it temporarily switches to Hyper Beam mode, where uncharged shots deal 80 damage and charged shots deal 160 damage. Heroine will automatically revert to its original form after 30 seconds. This synergy is not enabled by Lich's Eye Bullets.; y cant u crawl If the player also has Roll Bomb, its explosions are larger.

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 12 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: A standard baseball bat, modified to hit bullets instead of balls. Launches enemy projectiles back with a vengeance! Nothing can happen until you swing the bat.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 一根标准棒球棒，经过改造，可以打子弹而不是球。会狠狠把敌方投射物打回去！在你挥棒之前，什么都不会发生。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Careful Iteration With Armor of Thorns, Shotgun Full of Hate, Nail Gun, or Eyepatch, Casey fires a spread of 6 nails when swung, and takes on a spiked appearance. When an enemy is hit with Casey, they will become dark red and take damage over time.; This also changes the sound effect of "readying" Casey. This change seems to be affected by Scattershot causing the new sound effect to multiply.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 谨慎迭代 如果玩家还拥有 荆棘之甲、充满仇恨的霰弹枪、钉枪或眼罩，挥动卡西时会发射一圈 6 根钉子，并呈现带刺外观。敌人被卡西击中后会变成深红色，并持续掉血。; 这也会改变卡西“准备就绪（readying）”时的音效。看起来散射会让这种新音效叠加放大。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Jammed bullets and enemies do not deal additional damage when reflected/launched.; Firing Casey nudges the player forward a moderate amount. Be mindful near pits to avoid falling.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 被诅咒的子弹和敌人在反弹或发射时不会造成额外伤害。; 发射卡西会把玩家向前顶出一段不小的距离。靠近坑时要小心，别掉下去。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The Megahand is a relic of the Ten Days' War against the robots. The most powerful robot masters would modify it for their own styles of combat. This one is basic, but it still works well.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 洛克手炮是对抗机器人的十日战争时期的遗物。最强大的机器人大师会把它改造成适合自己战斗风格的版本。这一款很基础，但依然很好用。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires small yellow pellets that deal 6 damage.; Charges up to fire a powerful blue energy blast that deals 45 damage and knocks enemies back.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射造成 6 点伤害的小黄弹。; 充能后可发射一记强力蓝色能量爆发，造成 45 点伤害并击退敌人。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: If the player has certain items or guns, reloading with a full magazine switches the Megahand to a different mode. If the corresponding item or gun is dropped while in an alternative mode, the mode is still kept until the player next reloads a full magazine.; Get Equipped With -A- Air Shooter, which fires piercing and 400 tornadoes when uncharged.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 如果玩家拥有某些道具或枪械，在弹匣装满时重新装填会把洛克手炮切换到另一种模式。如果对应道具或枪械在切换后的模式下被丢弃，这种模式仍会保留，直到玩家下次把弹匣装满再重新装填。; 装备 A 模式的空中射手，未充能时会发射能穿透敌人的 400 个龙卷风。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun is a reference to Mega Man's arm cannon, called the Mega Buster.; The tooltip references how in Mega Man through Mega Man 3, the Mega Buster was represented in menus by the Symbol P.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪参考了洛克人的臂炮洛克炮。; 这段提示词指的是在《洛克人》到《洛克人 3》中，洛克炮在菜单里以一个单字母符号表示。

entries.unlock: Pick it up from a shop, either by stealing it or angering the shopkeeper.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Opens locked chests. Loud. A device once used to access the innermost chambers of ancient currency reliquaries. Cheaply constructed and prone to breaking. In ancient texts, the word "drill" is commonly preceeded [sic] or followed by expletives.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 打开上锁的宝箱。声音很大。曾被用来进入古代货币遗物最深处的器具。造价低廉，而且容易损坏。在古代文本里，“钻孔机（drill）”这个词前后经常跟着脏话。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: If used on a locked chest, teleports the player to a large version of the chest room, where they must survive one to five waves of enemies. Surviving the enemies will unlock the chest.; If used on a locked door or trapdoor, unlocks the object for free.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 如果对上锁的宝箱使用，会把玩家传送到一个放大版的宝箱房，玩家必须在一到五波敌人中存活下来。存活后就能解锁宝箱。; 如果对上锁的门或活板门使用，则会免费解锁该物体。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Picking up Drill increases the chance of finding the other Payday 2 items, Loot Bag and Clown Mask.; The amount of enemies and waves is determined by the chest quality, usually having less enemies and waves when used on low-quality chests, and up to 5 waves for S quality chests. D tier (brown) chests will have a single wave, with 2-4 enemies. B tier (green) chests can have anywhere from 2-4 waves. They usually have at least 4-5 enemies per wave, but can occasionally spawn 6.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 拾起电钻会提高找到另外两件《劫薪日 2》道具“战利品袋”和“小丑面具”的几率。; 敌人和波次数量由宝箱品质决定。低品质宝箱通常敌人数和波次都更少；S 品质宝箱最多有 5 波。D 级（棕色）宝箱只有一波，通常有 2 到 4 个敌人。B 级（绿色）宝箱则可能有 2 到 4 波，通常每波至少有 4 到 5 个敌人，但偶尔也会刷出 6 个。

stats.value: Cheese ball: 5.5 Pointy cheese: 8 Cheese wheel: 15 Average damage: 7.92

entries.unlock: Pick it up after finding it in one of the [[Resourceful Rat's Lair
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Encheeses enemies. A favorite of the Resourceful Rat. He doesn't typically favor any one gun in particular, as he usually collects only to grow his hoard, but he finds this one particularly appetizing.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 把敌人变成奶酪。机灵鼠王的最爱。他通常不会特别偏爱某一把枪，因为他收集只是为了扩充自己的宝藏，但这把他觉得尤其好吃。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires chunks of cheese that encheese enemies, encasing them in cheese and freezing them. Enemies that die while encheesed spawn a large cheese pool, which encheeses any enemies that step in it.; Has a 50% chance to fire a cheese ball that deals 5.5 damage, a 33.33% chance to fire a cheese wedge that deals 8 damage, and a 16.67% chance to fire a whole cheese wheel that deals 15 damage.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射奶酪块，把敌人包进奶酪里并将其冻结。被奶酪化而死的敌人会生成一大滩奶酪池，踩进去的敌人也会被奶酪化。; 有 50% 几率发射造成 5.5 点伤害的奶酪球，33.33% 几率发射造成 8 点伤害的奶酪块，16.67% 几率发射造成 15 点伤害的整轮奶酪。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Resourceful Indeed If the player also has Partially-Eaten Cheese, Rat Boots, and Resourceful Sack, the player becomes the Resourceful Rat, preventing items from being stolen when they're left behind in rooms.; Lich's Eye Bullets does not activate this synergy on its own, but can still trigger its synergy message if the player has this gun and two other Rat items. The Lich's Eye Bullets can only act as one of the remaining items in the synergy,
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 理所当然 如果玩家还拥有 吃了一半的奶酪、鼠靴子和百宝袋，玩家就会变成机灵鼠王，从而防止物品留在房间里时被偷走。; 巫妖之眼子弹不会单独触发这个协同，但如果玩家拥有这把枪和另外两件鼠类道具，它仍然可以触发其协同提示。巫妖之眼子弹只能算作协同所需剩余道具中的一件。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Elimentaler will not reveal secret room walls, nor can be fed to Munchers.; Enemies can be encheesed while in invulnerable states (such as Shelletons while turning into a skull), forcing the player to wait until the effect wears off.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 滋补者不会显示秘密房间墙壁，也不能喂给吞枪怪。; 敌人即使处于无敌状态也能被奶酪化（比如弹壳骷髅在变成骷髅时），这会迫使玩家等效果自行结束。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 200 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: With each one served, they only grow more powerful. These shining shells have been forged and reforged hundreds of thousands of times- at least ten hundred.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 随着每一发命中，它们都会变得更强。这些闪亮的弹壳已经被锻造并重铸了无数次，至少有一千次。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Increases damage and fire rate with every bullet that hits an enemy.; Weapon fire rate doubles every 250 normalized seconds of firing (2500 shots with a ten-shots-per-second weapon), to a maximum of triple firing speed after 375 seconds of shooting.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 每一发击中敌人的子弹都会提高伤害和射速。; 武器射速每累计 250 秒的标准化射击时间就翻倍一次（对于每秒 10 发的武器，相当于 2500 发子弹），最多在持续射击 375 秒后达到 3 倍射速。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Alternative Rock If the player has Face Melter, instead of firing four streams, Face Melter fires two parallel columns of notes. Reloading fires a guitar pick with a chance to stun.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 另类摇滚 如果玩家还拥有 脸熔炉，不再发射四条弹幕，而是发射两列平行的音符。重新装填会射出一枚吉他拨片，有几率眩晕敌人。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The damage and fire rate bonuses do not update until the player switches weapons or picks up/drops an item or gun, making it possible for the bonuses to never apply.; Beam weapons stay mostly unchanged, but the increased fire rate makes their ammo drain much faster.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 伤害和射速加成在玩家切换武器或捡起/丢弃道具或枪械之前不会更新，因此加成有可能一直不生效。; 光束类武器基本不变，但更高的射速会让它们的弹药消耗快得多。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 26 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Shooting occasionally spawns additional bees. These shells contain tiny beehives. Guns and bees, of course, have a strongly symbiotic relationship.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 射击时偶尔会生成额外的蜜蜂。这些弹壳里装着小小的蜂巢。枪和蜜蜂当然有很强的共生关系。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: While holding down the fire button, the player's current gun will launch a bee projectile every second. Bees deal 3 damage on impact and apply a lingering 'swarm' effect that deals 1 damage right away, and deals 1 damage every second for 2 more seconds.; The initial 3 damage impact of the bee is affected by the players Damage stat, but the lingering swarm damage is not.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 按住开火键时，玩家当前持有的枪每秒会发射一发蜜蜂投射物。蜜蜂命中时造成 3 点伤害，并附加一个持续性的“蜂群”效果：立刻造成 1 点伤害，并在接下来的 2 秒里每秒再造成 1 点伤害。; 蜜蜂的初始 3 点伤害会受玩家伤害属性影响，但持续的蜂群伤害不会。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: BEES If the player has Bee Hive, the size of the Bee Hive's bees is doubled, their damage is increased by 25%, and the Bee Hive's rate of fire is decreased by 34%.; Hidden Tech Bees If the player has Table Tech Blanks, a swarm of bees replaces enemy bullets when a table is flipped.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 蜜蜂 如果玩家拥有 蜂巢，蜂巢里的蜜蜂体型会翻倍，伤害提高 25%，但蜂巢的射速会降低 34%。; 隐藏科技：蜜蜂 如果玩家拥有 桌技：空响弹，翻桌时会用一群蜜蜂替换敌人的子弹。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Because bee spawning is based on an independent cooldown while the fire key is held. Holding down the fire key with a charge-style weapon allows the player to spawn one bee a second at no ammo cost.; This includes infinite ammo weapons such as Casey.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 因为产蜂是基于一个独立冷却，只要按住开火键就会持续触发。使用蓄力型武器时按住开火键，玩家可以在不消耗弹药的情况下每秒生成一只蜜蜂。; 这也包括像 卡西 这种无限弹药武器。

entries.unlock: Defeat the Advanced Dragun.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Triggers Blank effect upon taking damage, refills ammo. This artifact of Kaliber was lost to time until the coming of the Mine Flayers and their interdimensional kin.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 受到伤害时触发空响效果，并补满弹药。这件来自卡利伯的圣物曾湮没于时间之中，直到矿掘妖和他们的跨维度同族到来才重见天日。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Upon taking damage, triggers a full screen Blank effect and refills 50% of the ammo of all the player's guns, rounded up.; Increases by 1.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 受到伤害时，会触发一次全屏空响效果，并补满玩家所有枪械 50% 的弹药，向上取整。; 额外提高 1 点。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Empty Vessels If the player has Bottle and takes damage while it is empty, it fills with a purple flame that deals 100 damage to all enemies in the room upon use.; Hellhole If the player has Singularity, it spawns a hell portal that sucks enemies in and deals high damage.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 空瓶 如果玩家还拥有 空瓶子，并且在它是空的状态下受到伤害，它会装满紫色火焰，使用时对房间内所有敌人造成 100 点伤害。; 地狱洞 如果玩家还拥有 奇点，它会生成一个地狱传送门，把敌人吸进去并造成高额伤害。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Blank effect of this item can open Secret Rooms.; The item's chest tier might be a reference to Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade, where the true Holy Grail is a simple ceramic cup instead of a golden chalice.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这件道具的空响效果可以打开秘密房间。; 这件道具的宝箱等级可能是在致敬《夺宝奇兵 3：圣战奇兵》里的圣杯，真正的圣杯只是一个普通陶杯，而不是金制圣爵。

entries.unlock: Use the Companion Shrine 2 times.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Recovers a small amount of ammo on landing three sequential shots. According to historical records, birds such as this were frequently given out for killing groups of creatures named 'pins' with large, rudimentary projectiles.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 连续命中三次后回复少量弹药。根据历史记录，这种鸟类经常被作为奖品送给用简陋大号投射物击杀一群名为“球瓶”的生物的人。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Recovers 1 ammo after landing three sequential shots.; For guns that shoot multiple projectiles, landing multiple projectiles from the same volley still only counts as landing one shot.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 连续命中三次后，回复 1 点弹药。; 对于发射多发投射物的枪械来说，同一轮齐射里命中的多发子弹仍然只算一次命中。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: The Elephant in the Room If the player has Elephant Gun, it becomes an elephant head and shoots elephants instead of bullets.; Tea For Two If the player also has Teapot, while reloading the Teapot, a small red aura will appear around the turkey. Every enemy in this aura will be ignited.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 房间里的大象 如果玩家拥有 猎象枪，它会变成一个象头并射出大象而不是子弹。; 双人茶会 如果玩家还拥有 茶壶，在重新装填茶壶时，火鸡周围会出现一圈小红色光环。光环内的每个敌人都会被点燃。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The item's icon resembles a drawing of a turkey, created by tracing the outline of a right hand.; This item and it's Ammonomicon description are a reference to scoring three strikes in a row in bowling, referred to as a 'turkey'. It's mechanical function and Ammonomicon quote are also based on the 'Triple-Tap' weapon perk from the Destiny franchise.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 该道具图标看起来像一幅火鸡图，是通过描出右手轮廓画出来的。; 这件道具及其阿莫诺米康描述参考了保龄球里连续三次全中被称作“火鸡（turkey）”的说法。它的机械效果和阿莫诺米康台词也基于《命运》系列里的“三连击（Triple-Tap）”武器特性。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: This ancient technique will fire a vicious shotgun blast when a table is flipped. Chapter six of the "Tabla Sutra." In flipping, there is both a momentary creation and a permanent destruction. Both should be cherished.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这门古老技艺会在翻桌时发射一记凶狠的霰弹。来自《塔布拉经（Tabla Sutra）》的第六章。翻转之间，既有转瞬即逝的创造，也有永恒的毁灭。二者都值得珍惜。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Flipping a table releases a shotgun blast of 10 homing bullets in the direction the table was flipped.; These bullets deal 6 damage each, with a combined damage of 60 per table flip if all bullets find a target.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 翻转一张桌子会沿着桌子翻起的方向释放一轮由 10 发追踪子弹组成的霰弹。; 这些子弹每发造成 6 点伤害；如果所有子弹都命中目标，每次翻桌总计造成 60 点伤害。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Hidden Tech Big Shotgun If the player has Big Shotgun, Table Tech Shotgun shoots Big Shotgun bullets when Big Shotgun is held.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 隐藏科技 大型霰弹枪 如果玩家拥有 大型霰弹枪，手持大型霰弹枪时，桌技：霰弹枪会射出大型霰弹枪子弹。
entries.englishUsageNotes: There is a small chance for the bullets to overlap with the table when flipped, destroying them instantly and giving the illusion that nothing was fired. This is more common for tables flipped upwards.; The chance greatly increases with items that increase bullet size, like Fat Bullets and Stout Bullets.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 翻起桌子时，子弹有极小概率和桌面重叠并瞬间被摧毁，让人以为什么都没发射。向上翻起桌子时这种情况更常见。; 提高子弹尺寸的道具会大幅提高这种情况发生的概率，例如胖胖子弹和肥壮弹。

entries.unlock: Defeat High Dragun in Turbo Mode.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Provides invulnerability when reloading an empty clip. This stone resonates strongly throughout the fourth dimension, allowing the bearer to step out of the frame of reality. Strangely, only functions under certain circumstances.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 在重新装填空弹匣时提供无敌。此石头会在第四维度中强烈共振，使持有者能够踏出现实的画框。奇怪的是，它只会在某些特定情况下生效。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Grants invulnerability while reloading an empty magazine.; A voice clip of Doseone saying "Reload" plays every time a gun's magazine is emptied.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 在重新装填空弹匣时赋予无敌。; 每当一把枪的弹匣被打空时，都会播放一段 Doseone 说“重新装填（Reload）”的语音剪辑。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Human Shield If the player also has Melted Rock, it causes each corpse to spawn a shield after exploding, similar to the Betrayer's Shield.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 人肉盾牌 如果玩家还拥有 熔岩岩，每具尸体爆炸后都会生成一面护盾，效果类似背弃者护罩。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This item is a reference to the Namco light gun arcade shooter series Time Crisis. In Time Crisis, the player must take cover in order to reload, preventing them from taking damage.; A voice alerting the player that their magazine is empty is a reference to Time Crisis'.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这件道具参考了南梦宫光枪街机射击系列《时间危机》。在《时间危机》中，玩家必须找掩体才能重新装填，从而避免受到伤害。; 提醒玩家弹匣已空的语音提示，参考的是《时间危机》里的同类提示。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 26 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Bullets grow in size and damage as they travel. These bullets draw ambient bullet particles from the Gungeon's atmosphere, steadily increasing in size. Bullet Kin have been seen stacking them for fun. Arguments frequently break out over the sole scarf in the Gungeon.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 子弹在飞行途中会变大并提升伤害。这些子弹会从地牢的氛围中不断吸取游离的子弹粒子，体积稳步增长。子弹怪们甚至会把它们叠起来玩。地牢里那条唯一的围巾经常因此引发争执。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Bullets increase in size and damage as they travel.; Bullets gain 2.5% additional damage for every tile they travel.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 子弹在飞行途中会变大并提高伤害。; 每飞行一格，子弹额外获得 2.5% 伤害。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Arctic Warfare If the player has A.W.P., it turns orange and white, deals 62.5% more damage, and its shots are guaranteed to freeze enemies.; Ice Accumulation If the player has Cold 45 or Ice Breaker, the size of their shots is significantly increased, and the amount of damage they gain as they travel is increased.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 北极战争 如果玩家拥有 狙击枪，它会变成橙白配色，伤害提高 62.5%，而且子弹会保证冻结敌人。; 冰层累积 如果玩家拥有 冷 45 或 破冰者，子弹尺寸会显著增加，而且它们在飞行途中获得的伤害也会提高。
entries.englishUsageNotes: 150% Damage is reached with 20 tiles; Max damage is reached at 60 tiles or greater.; The item's name and primary function is a reference to the popular trope of snowballs increasing in size, often to huge snow boulders, when rolling down a hill.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 达到 150% 伤害时需要飞行 20 格；飞行 60 格或更远时达到最大伤害。; 这件道具的名字和主要功能参考了雪球在坡上滚动时会不断变大、最后变成巨大雪球的常见套路。

entries.unlock: Enter the Resourceful Rat's Lair for the first time.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Gestates over time. Use to acquire... something. A strange egg found in the Gungeon. High in protein.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 随时间慢慢孵化。用来获取……某种东西。地牢里发现的一枚奇怪的蛋。蛋白质含量很高。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Using the egg while having empty hearts will restore the player to full health.; Dropping the egg and shooting it will break the egg, either spawning a random item or gun, or spawning a harmless slug-like yolk creature that follows the player around until they kill it. The player will only receive an item or gun after carrying the egg through a certain amount of floors.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 在玩家没有空心心时使用这枚蛋，会把生命回满。; 把蛋丢下并射击它会打碎蛋，要么生成一件随机道具或枪，要么生成一只无害的蛞蝓状蛋黄生物，跟着玩家直到被杀死。玩家需要把蛋带过一定数量的楼层后，才会真正获得一件道具或枪。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Phoenix Up If the player has Phoenix, summons a phoenix companion that fires at enemies.; Two Eggs Over Easy The seeking sub-projectiles from The Scrambler will poison enemies.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 凤凰再起 如果玩家拥有 凤凰，会召唤一只向敌人射击的凤凰同伴。; 两个蛋都不太简单 爬行者发射的追踪子弹会让敌人中毒。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Pits in the Forge don't count as sources of fire and the egg will be lost upon dropping it in.; Dropping the egg on green fire will break the egg and no serpent will appear.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 熔炉里的坑不算作火源，把蛋丢进去会直接失去它。; 把蛋丢到绿色火焰上会打碎蛋，而且不会出现蛇。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 26 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Grants all bullets a small chance to devolve enemies. Each bullet is subject to a standard bullet-gun contract. Each bullet is recoupable.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 让所有子弹都有小概率让敌人退化。每发子弹都签着一份标准的子弹-枪械合同。每发子弹都可以回收。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Bullets have a chance to devolve enemies into Arrowkin.; Gives beam style Guns a small chance every second while firing to gain double damage for one second, creating random seconds of double damage.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 子弹有几率把敌人退化成箭怪。; 对于光束类枪械，在射击时每秒都有小概率在 1 秒内造成双倍伤害，从而制造出随机出现的双倍伤害时段。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The devolution effect can trigger on some enemies that are normally invulnerable, such as the Gunreaper or Lead Cube, turning them into vulnerable Arrowkin.; The name and appearance of Devolver Rounds are in reference to Devolver Digital, the publishers of Enter the Gungeon.
