entries.chineseUsageNotes: 退化效果可以作用在某些通常处于无敌状态的敌人身上，比如枪镰怪或头盔方块，把它们变成可击败的箭怪。; 这件道具的名称和外观参考了德沃尔弗数字（Devolver Digital），也就是《挺进地牢》的发行商。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 26 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Occasionally fires a special round that deals massive damage. These hip bullets are fickle by nature and only fire when they feel like it, and probably never when you really need it.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 偶尔会发射一发造成巨量伤害的特殊子弹。这些时髦的子弹天生就很挑剔，只在它们自己想开火的时候才会开火，而且大概从不会在你最需要的时候出现。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Whenever the player fires a gun, occasionally fires a special high-damage bullet, similar to the critical shot fired by the Vorpal Gun.; This crit shot deals 100 damage, and is affected by the player's Damage stat.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 玩家每次开火时，偶尔会发射一发特殊的高伤害子弹，类似于斩首枪射出的暴击射击。; 这发暴击子弹造成 100 点伤害，并受玩家伤害属性影响。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Snicker-snack If the player has Excaliber, it fires a spread of 3 homing shots that deal 20% less damage.; The beam damage multiplier sometimes granted by Vorpal Bullets does not stack with the beam damage multipliers of Shock Rounds, Flak Bullets, Explosive Rounds, Shadow Bullets, Katana Bullets, Blank Bullets, Devolver Rounds or Hungry Bullets.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 咔嚓咔嚓 如果玩家拥有 亚瑟王的神剑，它会发射 3 发追踪射击组成的散射，伤害降低 20%。; 斩首子弹（Vorpal Bullets）偶尔赋予的光束伤害倍率不会与电击炮、高射炮子弹、爆炸弹丸、阴影子弹、武士刀子弹、空响弹子弹、Devolver 子弹或饥饿子弹的光束伤害倍率叠加。

entries.unlock: Destroy a red, black, or rainbow [[Chests
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Worth its weight. A nearly-perfect replica of a sack of junk, lovingly rendered in pure gold.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 值这个分量。一个几乎完美复刻的垃圾袋，采用纯金精心打造。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Grants 500 coin upon pickup.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 拾取后获得 500 枚硬币。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Gold Junk has a chest destruction loot weight of 0.005.; If the player has Ser Junkan, the weight of Gold Junk in the chest destruction loot table is multiplied by 3, making it more likely to appear.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 金垃圾的破箱掉落权重是 0.005。; 如果玩家拥有 赛尔·江肯，金垃圾在破箱掉落表中的权重会乘以 3，因此更容易出现。

entries.unlock: Get grabbed by a Gripmaster.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Only usable for a brief period of time after successfully dodging a bullet. Use to counter with a Blank. This small idol is a focus for one's fighting spirit. Brings luck in the heat of battle.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 只有在成功躲过一发子弹后的短暂时间内才能使用。用来反制并释放一次空响。这个小偶像是战斗意志的凝聚。能在激战中带来好运。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Can only be used shortly after rolling through a bullet, and activates a blank effect.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 只能在翻滚躲过一发子弹后的短暂时间内使用，并触发一次空响效果。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Like other active items, Daruma needs to recharge by damaging enemies; it cannot be used immediately after every dodged bullet. However, its recharge is extremely short compared to other items that recharge by damaging enemies.; If the player has Whiter Guon Stone, Daruma's recharge is halved. However, Daruma itself is not part of the synergy.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 和其他主动道具一样，达摩需要通过伤害敌人来充能；它不能在每次躲开子弹后立刻使用。不过，相比其他靠伤害敌人充能的道具，它的充能时间要短得多。; 如果玩家拥有 白色护弹石，达摩的充能速度会减半。不过，达摩本身并不属于这个协同的一部分。

entries.unlock: Roll over tables 50 times.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Advanced polymers reinforce this state-of-the-art handheld dining surface.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 先进的高分子材料强化了这块先进的手持用餐台面。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Once charged, this item can be used 3 times before needing to charge again.; Spawns a small table, which can be flipped to provide cover.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 充能后可使用 3 次，然后才需要再次充能。; 生成一张小桌子，可以把它翻起来充当掩体。
entries.englishUsageNotes: During the second boss phase of High Dragun, flipping a table clears out nearby bullets immensely.; Bug: The Ammoconda may become stuck on tables spawned by this item.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 在高拖龙的第二阶段 Boss 战中，翻桌会极大地清除附近子弹。; 漏洞：弹药王蛇可能会卡在由这件道具生成的桌子上。

entries.unlock: Defeat the High Dragun with Super Space Turtle.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Attracts normal turtles. You’ve just inherited a big problem.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 会吸引普通乌龟。你刚刚继承了一个大麻烦。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Upon clearing a room, spawns a turtle familiar.; Turtles can block bullets and deal contact damage to enemies. They will die if they take a certain amount of damage.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 清理一间房后会生成一只乌龟同伴。; 乌龟可以挡子弹并对敌人造成接触伤害。它们受到一定量伤害后就会死亡。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Turtle Solutions If the player has Super Space Turtle, each room clear will add another Super Space Turtle to a maximum of 4. These Super Space Turtles will no longer block bullets or collide with enemies. Dropping either item removes all active turtles.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 乌龟方案 如果玩家拥有 超级太空龟，每清理一间房就会再增加一只超级太空龟，最多 4 只。这些超级太空龟将不再挡子弹或与敌人碰撞。丢弃任意一个道具都会移除所有激活的乌龟。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Ammonomicon entry for this item existed unused in the game since the Advanced Gungeons & Draguns Update, but the item was only added properly in A Farewell to Arms.; This item may be a reference to the 'Turtles all the way down' method of expressing Infinite Regress.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这件道具的阿莫诺米康条目自《先进地牢与地龙》更新起就在游戏中处于未使用状态，但它直到《永别了，武器》（A Farewell to Arms）才被正式加入。; 这件道具可能参考了“乌龟一路向下（Turtles all the way down）”这一表达无限倒退的说法。

entries.unlock: Visit all Chambers at least once
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Transforms based on Chamber. This gun uses an advanced shape-memory alloy. When exposed to different environmental stimuli it reacts with the salts in Gungeoneer’s bodies and transforms into a location-specific gun. Master rounds can also influence the shape of this curious weapon.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 根据枪膛变化而变形。这把枪使用了先进的形状记忆合金。暴露在不同环境刺激下时，它会与地牢探险者体内的盐分发生反应，并变形成符合当前位置的枪。胜者之弹也会影响这件奇特武器的形态。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Master's Chambers Each Master Round the player carries permanently unlocks the mode of its respective floor. Reloading the Chamber Gun with a full magazine cycles through the unlocked modes.; This synergy does not work with Lich's Eye Bullets.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 大师的枪膛 如果玩家携带每一枚胜者之弹，它会永久解锁对应楼层的形态。用满弹匣重新装填枪膛之枪会在已解锁的形态之间循环。; 这项协同无法与巫妖之眼子弹一起生效。
entries.englishUsageNotes: All modes share the same ammo pool. Firing a shot in one mode reduces the ammo of the other modes by a proportional amount. For example, firing one shot in its Hollow mode uses up 10 shots of the base mode, because the base mode has 10 times the max ammo.; The Chamber Gun is one of the three weapons in the NONE gun class that can be obtained in normal play, the others being the Slinger and the Kruller Glaive.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 所有形态共用同一个弹药池。在一种形态下开火会按比例消耗其他形态的弹药。例如，在空洞形态下开一枪，会消耗基础形态 10 发子弹，因为基础形态的最大弹药量是它的 10 倍。; 枪膛之枪是正常游玩中能够获得的 NONE 枪械类别三把武器之一，另外两把分别是甩枪和神光飞镖。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The letter r looks like a gun. It is rare, but not unheard of, for abstract concepts to take gun form when discussed near the Gungeon.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这个小写字形看起来就像一把枪。在地牢附近讨论抽象概念时，它偶尔会以枪械的形式出现，这并不算太罕见。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires a burst of 6 letter-shaped projectiles that spell out the word BULLET.; While firing, the gun will voice out the word "bullet".
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射一轮由 6 个字母形投射物组成的齐射，拼出“子弹（bullet）”一词。; 射击时，这把枪会念出“子弹（bullet）”这个词。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Hacker Increases damage by 25% while the Lower Case r is held.; Just In Case The Lower Case r becomes a capital letter R and transforms into a one shot rocket launcher that deals 27 damage and has a max ammo capacity of 100. It fires the word ROCKET with cloud sprites when shot, and creates a cartoon 'BOOM' cloud on impact.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 黑客 如果持有小写字形（r），伤害提高 25%。; 以防万一 小写字形（r）会变成大写字形（R），并化作一把单发火箭筒，造成 27 点伤害，最大弹药量为 100。开火时它会用云朵特效射出“火箭”一词，命中时还会生成一团卡通“BOOM”烟云。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Lower Case r is voiced by Doseone, the composer of Enter the Gungeons soundtrack.; This gun, while obviously a surface level reference to the basic shape of the letter r, may also be a reference to early computer adventure games. These early games used ASCII art comprised of letters and numbers to render a game world.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 小写字形（r）的配音由作曲家（Doseone）担任，他也是《挺进地牢》原声带的作曲者。; 这把枪除了明显是在致敬字母的基本形状外，也可能是在致敬早期电脑冒险游戏。这些早期游戏用字母和数字组成的 ASCII 图形来渲染游戏世界。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The letter r looks like a gun. It is rare, but not unheard of, for abstract concepts to take gun form when discussed near the Gungeon.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这个大写字形看起来就像一把枪。在地牢附近讨论抽象概念时，它偶尔会以枪械的形式出现，这并不算太罕见。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires a burst of 6 letter-shaped projectiles that spell out the word BULLET.; While firing, the gun will voice out the word "bullet".
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射一轮由 6 个字母形投射物组成的齐射，拼出“子弹（bullet）”一词。; 射击时，这把枪会念出“子弹（bullet）”这个词。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Hacker Increases damage by 25% while the Lower Case r is held.; Just In Case The Lower Case r becomes a capital letter R and transforms into a one shot rocket launcher that deals 27 damage and has a max ammo capacity of 100. It fires the word ROCKET with cloud sprites when shot, and creates a cartoon 'BOOM' cloud on impact.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 黑客 如果持有小写字形（r），伤害提高 25%。; 以防万一 小写字形（r）会变成大写字形（R），并化作一把单发火箭筒，造成 27 点伤害，最大弹药量为 100。开火时它会用云朵特效射出“火箭”一词，命中时还会生成一团卡通“BOOM”烟云。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Lower Case r is voiced by Doseone, the composer of Enter the Gungeons soundtrack.; This gun, while obviously a surface level reference to the basic shape of the letter r, may also be a reference to early computer adventure games. These early games used ASCII art comprised of letters and numbers to render a game world.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 大写字形（R）的配音由作曲家（Doseone）担任，他也是《挺进地牢》原声带的作曲者。; 这把枪除了明显是在致敬字母的基本形状外，也可能是在致敬早期电脑冒险游戏。这些早期游戏用字母和数字组成的 ASCII 图形来渲染游戏世界。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: This modified shotgun has been refitted for one-handed use. The Winchester shotgun packs the same punch as a regular shotgun, but chambers more efficiently.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把改装过的霰弹枪被重新设计成单手使用。温彻斯特霰弹枪的火力和普通霰弹枪一样猛，只是装填得更高效。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Not So Sawed-Off If the player has Buzzkill, Buzzkill's saw blades are linked with lightning.; The Winchester is in the SHOTGUN gun class, meaning that it benefits from the Shotgun Affinity synergy.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 不那么锯短 如果玩家拥有 嗡嗡杀手，嗡嗡杀手的锯片会连上闪电。; 温彻斯特属于霰弹枪类别，因此能受益于霰弹枪亲和协同。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Winchester is wielded by Blue Shotgun Kin.; The quote "Better Than A Box Of Roses" is a reference to a scene in the movie Terminator 2: Judgement Day, where the Terminator pulls a Winchester out of a box full of roses.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 温彻斯特由蓝色霰弹怪持有。; “比一箱玫瑰还好”这句台词参考了电影《终结者 2：审判日》中的一个场景，终结者正是从一箱玫瑰里拿出了温彻斯特。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The Rogue Special, given to the Pilot by his partner. It's never let him down. This hip shooter has been known to fire half-cocked and often gets itself into more trouble than it can handle.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 流氓专用枪是飞行员的搭档送给他的。它从没让他失望过。这把腰射枪有时会半挂着走火，还总会把自己卷进超出它承受能力的麻烦里。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Cannot be dropped.; Cannot be obtained by any Gungeoneer other than The Pilot or The Paradox.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 无法丢弃。; 除飞行员（The Pilot）和悖论者（The Paradox）外，其他枪牢者都无法获得。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: This Budget Revolver was brought to the Gungeon by an infamous fugitive. Provided by the Hegemony Regional Magistrate. The Convict won their plea to face the Gungeon in lieu of life imprisonment; undo their crimes, or face an eternity in the Gungeon. With no cost to the state, it was an acceptable arrangement. Cheaply made and prone to jams, the Budget Revolver is used by only the most desperate Gungeoneers.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把廉价左轮被一名臭名昭著的逃犯带进了枪牢，由霸权地方裁判官（Hegemony Regional Magistrate）提供。罪犯（The Convict）成功争取到以闯入枪牢代替终身监禁；要么改写自己的罪行，要么在枪牢里度过永恒。对国家毫无成本，这笔安排也算得上可以接受。做工粗糙、还容易卡壳，廉价左轮只会被最绝望的枪牢者使用。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Cannot be dropped.; Cannot be obtained by any Gungeoneer other than The Convict or The Paradox.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 无法丢弃。; 除罪犯（The Convict）和悖论者（The Paradox）外，其他枪牢者都无法获得。

entries.unlock: Get caught by a Tarnisher.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Some bullets gain the ability to cannibalize. The magic of the Gungeon brings sentience to these just-fired bullets, and they resort to their most basic instinct to feed.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 一些子弹获得了吞噬同类的能力。枪牢的魔法让这些刚射出的子弹有了意识，而它们会回到最原始的本能，去进食。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Adds a chance for the player's bullets to become blue. Blue projectiles will 'eat' any enemy projectiles within a radius of 1.5 tiles around them, destroying them.; For each bullet 'eaten', the projectile will gain a 10% damage and size increase.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 让玩家的子弹有几率变成蓝色。蓝色投射物会“吃掉”其周围 1.5 格半径内的任何敌方投射物，并将其摧毁。; 每“吃掉”一发子弹，投射物的伤害和体积都会增加 10%。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Hungry Bullets is usually more effective for guns that fire many bullets in a large spread, such as shotguns.; Does nothing against enemy beams, such as those fired by the Shelleton, Beholster, or Det.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 饥饿子弹通常对会一次发射大量子弹、弹幕又很散的枪更有效，比如霰弹枪。; 对敌方光束无效，比如壳怪龙（Shelleton）、嗜枪怪（Beholster）或德特（Det）发出的光束。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 28 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: This shiny piece of die-cast metal was purchased from an ancient mall kiosk. The buyer’s mom sold it at a flea market when they moved out to a middle-aged collector. That person swore it would eventually be worth many times what he paid for it. Unfortunately, he was disappointed, and it was valueless at the time of his death. Now it's in the Gungeon!
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这块闪亮的压铸金属曾在一家古老的商场柜台买下。买家搬出时，他妈妈把它拿到跳蚤市场卖给了一位中年收藏家。那人发誓它总有一天会比自己买来时值钱许多。可惜他失望了，在他死时它一文不值。如今它就在枪牢里！
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Charges up to throw a glaive projectile. This glaive travels in an arc, returning to the player like a boomerang.; This glaive can come in on enemies while it travels, deviating from its arc.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 蓄力后投出一枚飞镖弹幕。飞镖会沿弧线飞行，并像回旋镖一样飞回玩家身边。; 飞镖在飞行过程中可以撞上敌人，从而偏离原本的弧线。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: blade If the player also has the Blood Brooch or the Ring of Chest Vampirism, Kruller Glaive's damage is increased by 20%, enemies hit will visually bleed, and jammed enemies and bosses will be reverted to normal on hit.; Crave the Glaive If the player also has the Boomerang, the Glaive will try to hit every enemy in the room before returning, similar to the Boomerang.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 刀刃（blade） 如果玩家同时拥有鲜血胸针或胸前吸血戒指（吸血鬼宝箱之戒），神光飞镖的伤害提高 20%，命中的敌人会出现视觉流血效果，而且被祝福的首领会在命中时恢复为正常状态。; 渴望飞镖（Crave the Glaive） 如果玩家同时拥有回旋镖（回飞镖），飞镖会像回旋镖一样，在返回前尝试先命中房间里的每一个敌人。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Kruller Glaive is one of the three weapons in the NONE gun class that can be obtained in normal play, the others being the Chamber Gun and the Slinger.; If the player has Helix Bullets, glaives lose their homing.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 神光飞镖是普通游玩中能获得的 3 把 NONE 枪类武器之一，另外两把是枪械之枪（枪膛之枪）和甩枪。; 如果玩家拥有螺旋子弹，飞镖就会失去追踪。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 6 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: The trusty sidearm of a spacefaring hero. Featuring a stylish design and solid performance, this blaster is almost always worth keeping around.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这是太空英雄可靠的副武器。造型时髦、性能扎实，这把爆能枪几乎总值得一直带在身上。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Ice Cap If the player also has Freeze Ray, it freezes enemies much quicker.; Savior of the Universe If the player also has Camera, Flash Ray gains double magazine size, unlimited piercing, a thicker beam, one bounce, increased fire rate, and causes a Camera flash when reloading an empty magazine. Camera also fires two laser beams whenever fired.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 冰封帽（Ice Cap） 如果玩家同时拥有冰冻射线，它冻结敌人的速度会快得多。; 宇宙救世主（Savior of the Universe） 如果玩家同时拥有照相机，闪光枪会获得双倍弹匣容量、无限穿透、更粗的光束、一次弹跳、提升射速，并在空弹匣换弹时触发照相机闪光。照相机每次开火时也会射出两道激光束。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Deals extra damage to ghosts and spectres. Originally brought to the Gungeon by a team of investigators who suspected that something strange was going on.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 对幽灵和鬼怪会造成额外伤害。最初是被一队怀疑某些怪事正在发生的调查员带进枪牢的。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires two slow-moving simultaneous beams;; A thick 420 red laser that deals very low damage.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射两道缓慢前进、同时射出的光束；一条厚重的 420 红色激光，伤害极低。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Electron Pack or Ghost Bullets Kills with electric beam of the Proton Backpack spawn Gunslinger's Ashes ghosts that attack enemies. This does not activate if enemies are killed by the Proton Backpack's other beam.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 电子背包（Electron Pack）或幽灵子弹 用质子背包的电击光束击杀敌人时，会生成枪手骨灰幽灵攻击敌人。若敌人是被质子背包的另一道光束击杀，则不会触发。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun is a reference to the iconic Proton Pack ghost fighting weapon from the Ghostbusters franchise.; The Ammonomicon quote "Crossing Streams" is in reference to the repeated warning in Ghostbusters (1984) "Don't cross the streams", as crossing the streams from multiple Proton Backpacks can result in a cataclysm called 'total proton reversal', destroying all life.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪致敬了《捉鬼敢死队》系列中标志性的质子背包驱鬼武器。; 《枪械图鉴》里的 “Crossing Streams” 是在引用《捉鬼敢死队（1984）》里反复出现的警告 “别交叉水流（Don't cross the streams）”，因为多个质子背包同时交叉射流时，会引发名为 “完全质子反转（total proton reversal）” 的灾难，毁灭所有生命。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 26 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Fires homing rockets that erupt into short-range swarms. Comes with a helpful pal. Though this gun was built unimaginably far away, it seems it was destined to eventually find its way to the Gungeon.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把枪会发射追踪火箭，炸开后会散成短距离蜂群。还附带一个贴心小伙伴。虽然它的制造地远得难以想象，但它似乎注定会最终找到通往枪牢的路。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires an explosive missile that can pierce up to 10 enemies. When the missile impacts an enemy or obstacle, it will create 5 smaller 440 rockets that seek out enemies and explode again.; While held, grants a small robotic companion that blocks bullets and reveals the contents of nearby chests.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射一枚可穿透最多 10 个敌人的爆炸导弹。导弹撞上敌人或障碍物时，会生成 5 枚更小的 440 火箭，它们会寻找敌人并再次爆炸。; 手持时，会获得一个小型机器人伙伴，它能挡子弹并显示附近宝箱的内容。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Exotic is a reference to the exotic-rarity rocket launcher Gjallarhorn from Destiny, one of the most beloved and memetic exotics in the game. "Pack of Wolves" is a reference to the Gjallarhorn's exotic perk; Wolfpack Rounds.; The robot companion is a reference to the Ghosts from Destiny.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪是在致敬《命运》中那把稀有度为异域（exotic）的火箭发射器嘉拉尔号角（Gjallarhorn），它是游戏里最受喜爱、也最常被拿来当梗的异域武器之一。“狼群齐射（Pack of Wolves）” 是嘉拉尔号角异域特性“狼群弹头（Wolfpack Rounds）”的引用。; 机器人伙伴则是在致敬《命运》里的幽灵（Ghosts）。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: A regular shotgun. There's nothing special about it! Favored by the Shotgun Kin that roam the Gungeon, as it reminds them of their home.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 一把普通霰弹枪。没什么特别的！枪牢里游荡的霰弹怪都很偏爱它，因为这让它们想起了自己的家。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Iron Stance If the player also has Heavy Boots, the gun's damage and knockback are increased by 20%, its shot speed is increased by 50%, and its reload time is decreased by 20%.; Not So Sawed-Off If the player also has Buzzkill, its saw blades are linked with lightning, the saw blades move slower, and it changes appearance.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 铁之姿态（Iron Stance） 如果玩家同时拥有重靴，这把枪的伤害和击退提高 20%，射击速度提高 50%，装填时间降低 20%。; 不那么锯短（Not So Sawed-Off） 如果玩家同时拥有嗡嗡杀手（Buzzkill），它的锯片会连上闪电，锯片移动更慢，而且外观也会改变。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Regular Shotgun has an equip animation in which the gungeoneer racks the pump.; The Regular Shotgun is in the SHOTGUN gun class, meaning it benefits from the Shotgun Affinity synergy.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 常规霰弹枪的装备动画会让持枪者拉动泵柄。; 常规霰弹枪属于霰弹枪（SHOTGUN）枪械类别，因此能享受霰弹枪亲和协同。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 28 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Missed shots orbit. Development of these bullets began immediately after the field tests of the Mr. Accretion Jr.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 未命中的射击会环绕飞行。这些子弹的研发始于小冲积先生实测之后不久。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: The players bullets, after hitting a wall or obstacle, will instantly return to the player and begin to orbit around them for 15 seconds. These orbiting bullets retain all of their special effects.; Bullets orbit at a random distance from the player, between 2 and 5 tiles.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 玩家的子弹在撞到墙壁或障碍后，会立刻返回玩家身边，并在其周围环绕 15 秒。这些环绕子弹会保留所有特殊效果。; 子弹会在距玩家 2 到 5 格的随机距离上环绕。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Battle Mode If the player has Bomb or Ice Bomb, three orbiting bombs will appear around the player. These bombs block enemy projectiles, and explode upon contact with enemies dealing 40 damage. Exploded bomb orbitals will reappear after 5 seconds.; Orrery if the player has Mr. Accretion Jr., it causes the planets fired by the gun to have smaller bullets orbiting them like moons; these bullets persist when the missed shots start orbiting the player. Each planet only has 1 "moon" bullet, regardless of how many moons the corresponding planet has in real life.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 战斗模式（Battle Mode） 如果玩家拥有炸弹或冰炸弹，玩家周围会出现 3 枚环绕的炸弹。这些炸弹能挡住敌方投射物，并在接触敌人时爆炸，造成 40 点伤害。爆炸后的炸弹环绕体会在 5 秒后重新出现。; 太阳系仪（Orrery） 如果玩家拥有小冲积先生，枪发射的行星会带着更小的子弹像“月亮（moon）”一样环绕它们；当未命中的射击开始环绕玩家时，这些子弹会继续存在。每颗行星只有 1 颗“月亮（moon）”子弹，不管现实中那颗行星有多少颗月亮。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Orbiting bullets can still destroy chests. Care should be taken when entering chest rooms if any orbiting bullets are still present.; Orbiting bullets do not reveal secret rooms, even if they came from a weapon that could.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 环绕中的子弹仍然可以摧毁宝箱。若场上仍有环绕子弹，在进入宝箱房时要格外小心。; 即使环绕子弹原本来自能显露密室的武器，它们也不会显示密室。

entries.unlock: Pick it up after finding it in one of the [[Resourceful Rat's Lair
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Temporarily changes what game you're playing. Aged in an old arcade cabinet for decades, this cheese has become something of a delicacy, but only to those with refined palates.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这块奶酪会暂时改变你在玩的游戏。它在老街机柜里陈放了几十年，如今已经成了某种美味，不过只有口味挑剔的人才会这么觉得。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: While active, the player turns into Pac-Man, becoming invincible, granting flight, and instantly killing any enemies they come in contact with. The player can still shoot in this mode.; This item can eat enemies that are usually invulnerable: this includes the Gunreaper, Lead Cube and Flesh Cube. The only non-boss enemies unaffected are the Gripmaster, Dead Blow and the Lord of the Jammed.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 激活时，玩家会变成吃豆人（Pac-Man），获得无敌、飞行，并能立刻秒杀接触到的敌人。此模式下玩家仍可射击。; 这件物品还能吃掉通常无敌的敌人：包括枪镰死神（Gunreaper）、铅立方（Lead Cube）和肉立方（Flesh Cube）。唯一不受影响的非首领敌人是抓握大师（Gripmaster）、死击（Dead Blow）和染污领主（Lord of the Jammed）。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Resourceful Indeed If the player also has Rat Boots, Elimentaler, and Resourceful Sack, the player becomes the Resourceful Rat, preventing items from being stolen when they're left behind in rooms.; Eating a Mimic used to cause it to not drop an item, but this has since been patched.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 机灵鼠（Resourceful Rat）精明能干的协同：如果玩家同时拥有鼠靴子、切片奶酪（滋补者）和百宝袋，玩家会变成机灵鼠（Resourceful Rat），这样房间里掉落后留下的物品就不会被偷走。; 吃掉拟身怪过去会让它不掉落物品，但这个问题后来已经修复。

entries.unlock: Pick it up after finding it in one of the [[Resourceful Rat's Lair
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Allows the theft of enemy projectiles out of the air. Use to fire stolen bullets. An otherwise normal sack, used by the Right People for acts of thievery. It has thirteen patches of various materials.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 允许从空中偷走敌方投射物。用来发射偷来的子弹。它本来只是个普通的袋子，却被“正经人”拿去干偷盗勾当。上面缝着 13 块不同材质的补丁。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Rolling through bullets collects them in the sack.; This effect works even if the Resourceful Sack is not the currently selected item.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 翻滚穿过子弹会把它们收进袋子里。; 即使百宝袋（Resourceful Sack）不是当前选中的道具，这个效果也依然生效。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Resourceful Indeed If the player also has Partially-Eaten Cheese, Elimentaler, and Rat Boots, the player becomes the Resourceful Rat, preventing items from being stolen when they're left behind in rooms.; The bullets dissipated from the Bloodied Scarf's teleportation ability will not be collected into the sack, nullifying the sack's ability to ever collect bullets while having the scarf equipped.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 机灵鼠（Resourceful Rat）精明能干的协同：如果玩家同时拥有吃了一口的奶酪、切片奶酪（滋补者）和鼠靴子，玩家会变成机灵鼠（Resourceful Rat），这样房间里掉落后留下的物品就不会被偷走。; 浸血围巾（浸血的围巾）的传送能力释放出的子弹不会被收进袋子里，因此一旦装备这条围巾，百宝袋就再也无法收集子弹。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: This abandoned baby mimic misses its siblings, and imprints on the first follower it sees.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这只被抛弃的拟身怪宝宝很想念自己的兄弟姐妹，于是会把自己认定给第一个见到的跟班。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Follows the player around. When in a room with enemies, Baby Good Mimic will sit still and pretend to be a chest. If an enemy shoots Baby Good Mimic in this state, it will open and shoot projectiles in random directions for a few moments before resuming its pretence.; Enemies that touch Baby Good Mimic directly will take contact damage.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 它会跟在玩家身边。遇到有敌人的房间时，拟身怪乖宝宝会静静待着，假装自己是一只宝箱。若敌人在这种状态下射击它，它就会打开并在短时间内朝四面八方射出弹幕，然后再继续装样子。; 直接碰到拟身怪乖宝宝的敌人会受到接触伤害。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Tea For Two If the player also has Teapot, while reloading the Teapot, a small red aura will appear around Baby Good Mimic. Every enemy in this aura will be ignited.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 茶壶双人组（Tea For Two） 如果玩家还拥有茶壶，在给茶壶换弹时，拟身怪乖宝宝周围会出现一圈小小的红色光环。光环里的每个敌人都会被点燃。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Finishing a run or causing a chest to explode with Baby Good Mimic unlocks Baby Good Shelleton.; While hiding in its base form, player-owned explosions can trigger Baby Good Mimic to begin attacking.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 一局通关结束，或者用拟身怪乖宝宝把宝箱炸开，都会解锁拟身怪乖宝宝的下位形态：拟身怪乖宝宝（弹壳骷髅宝宝）。; 当它躲在基础形态里时，玩家自己的爆炸会让拟身怪乖宝宝开始攻击。

entries.unlock: Buy from Synergrace 3 times.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: This training device promotes growth in bullets. Shots are more powerful when coming out of a Dodge Roll. Does not affect speed. Training to be the very best takes commitment, and hard work.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这件训练器具会让子弹变得更强。翻滚后射出的子弹威力更大。它不会影响速度。要成为最强，既要下决心，也要下苦功。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: After dodge rolling, the player briefly gains a yellow aura for 0.4 seconds. The first shot fired with this aura will break it, but deal 30% more damage.; If the player shoots bullets during their dodge roll (either using an item or by firing before coming to a complete stop) they will break the aura prematurely, but will not gain any damage increase. Despite not giving any damage increase, breaking the aura in this way will still tint the players bullet yellow.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 翻滚后，玩家会短暂获得一个持续 0.4 秒的黄色光环。第一发带着这个光环射出的子弹会打破光环，但会造成 30% 更多伤害。; 如果玩家在翻滚期间射击子弹（无论是使用道具，还是在完全停稳前开火），就会提前打破光环，但不会获得任何伤害加成。即使没有获得伤害加成，这样打破光环仍会把玩家的子弹染成黄色。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Blunderbrace If the player also has Blunderbuss, it shoots bigger and faster bullets and charge time is reduced.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 喇叭增强（Blunderbrace） 如果玩家同时拥有喇叭枪，它会发射更大、更快的子弹，并缩短充能时间。
entries.englishUsageNotes: When playing as The Paradox, the glow around the player appears pink and white.; Bullets that are shot by projectiles such as Bullet are not affected by Macho Brace.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 当玩家使用悖论者（The Paradox）时，玩家周围的光芒会呈现粉白色。; 由子弹（子弹枪）这类投射物射出的子弹，不受强制锻炼器影响。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The new age table technique will create heat and flame upon the flipping of a table. Appendix E of the "Tabla Sutra." Time is the fire in which we burn. Tables are but embers of the past.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 现代桌技会在掀桌时制造热量与火焰。“Tabla Sutra” 附录 E（E）。时间是我们燃烧的火焰。桌子不过是过去的余烬。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Flipping a table creates a burning aura with a 5 tile radius around the table, which lasts for 10 seconds. All enemies caught in this aura are set on fire.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 掀翻一张桌子会在桌子周围生成一个半径 5 格、持续 10 秒的燃烧光环。被卷入光环的敌人都会着火。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Hidden Tech Flare If the player also has Hot Lead, the aura of Table Tech Heat has its radius increased to 20 tiles, and ignites enemies with greenfire.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 隐藏科技：火焰（Hidden Tech Flare） 如果玩家同时拥有热铅（赤焰弹头），桌技灼热的光环半径会增大到 20 格，并用绿火点燃敌人。
entries.englishUsageNotes: "Tabla" is Hindi for "Table", while a sutra is a kind of short Indian literary composition intended to teach rituals, literature, philosophy, law, or a great number of other concepts in a brief form, requiring interpretation. Famous examples include the Brahma Sutras, Yoga Sutras, or Nyāya Sutras.; Despite the other Table Techs being included in the Paperwork synergy with Origuni, Table Tech Shotgun and Table Tech Heat are not part of the synergy.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: “Tabla” 是印地语里对“Table”的说法，而梵经（sutra）是一种简短的印度文学体裁，通常用于简洁地讲授仪式、文学、哲学、法律等大量内容，需要读者自行诠释。著名例子包括《梵书经》（Brahma Sutras）、《瑜伽经》（Yoga Sutras）或《正理经》（Nyāya Sutras）。; 尽管其他桌技都被算入与折纸枪的“纸面协同”中，桌技：霰弹枪和桌技灼热（Table Tech Heat）并不属于这个协同。

entries.unlock: Pick it up after finding it in one of the [[Resourceful Rat's Lair
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Grants temporary invulnerability and flight when the wearer walks out over a pit. The Resourceful Rat's prolific thievery is legendary - and these boots helped him do it. Stolen off a hapless pointy-eared adventurer.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 当穿戴者踩着坑洞边缘走出去时，会获得短暂无敌和飞行能力。机灵鼠（Resourceful Rat）靠偷窃发家，这双靴子可没少帮忙。它们是从一个倒霉的尖耳冒险者身上偷来的。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Grants temporary invulnerability and flight when the wearer walks out over a pit for about 1 second.; Increases by 1.5.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 穿戴者踩出坑洞边缘大约 1 秒时，会获得短暂无敌和飞行。; 增加 1.5。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Resourceful Indeed If the player also has Partially-Eaten Cheese, Elimentaler, and Resourceful Sack, the player becomes the Resourceful Rat, preventing items from being stolen when they're left behind in rooms.; Use of Cigarettes is not possible during the invincibility period.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 机灵鼠（Resourceful Rat）精明能干的协同：如果玩家同时拥有吃了一口的奶酪、切片奶酪（滋补者）和百宝袋，玩家会变成机灵鼠（Resourceful Rat），这样房间里掉落后留下的物品就不会被偷走。; 在无敌期间不能使用香烟。

entries.englishUsageNotes: The Detective has a handful of design changes between her unused appearance as Lamey in Enter the Gungeon and her first canon appearance in House of the Gundead. Her hair is noticeably a darker shade of teal than the bright neon green of the unused version. Additionally the unused version has glowing symbols flickering through her hair which are absent from the HoTG design.; Her ETG appearance also wears lipstick absent from the HoTG design.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这位探员在《枪牢猎手（Enter the Gungeon）》中曾以未使用版本的拉米（Lamey）出现，后来才在《枪匪之屋（House of the Gundead）》里首次正式登场。她的头发明显比未使用版本的亮霓虹绿更偏深青色；此外，未使用版本的头发里有发光符号闪烁，而这些在《枪匪之屋》的设计里没有。她在《枪牢猎手》里的外观也会涂口红，而《枪匪之屋》的设计没有这一点。

entries.unlock: Find it in a [[Secret Rooms
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Immaculately balanced, rapid fire. Will ignite foes. Though long thought to be nothing but a legend, this gun's recent discovery proves the undeniable truth that it was always within the halls of the Gungeon, and you just weren't looking hard enough.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把枪拥有极其完美的平衡和极快的射速，还会点燃敌人。虽然长久以来都被当成传说，但它最近的现身证明了一个无可否认的事实：它一直都在枪牢的走廊里，只是你之前没找仔细。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The secret room containing the High Dragunfire contains six friendly cultists kneeling to a red chest, with various dialogue:; First time: "Welcome, fellow acolyte! It appears that Gun Cult fashion has changed substantially since our forefathers were sealed into this holy chamber. Be at peace, for inside the chest before you...lies the fabled Gun That Can Kill The Past! Your long pilgrimage is finally at an end. Join us in eternal worship! Prostrate thyself!
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 高龙枪之火的秘密房间里有 6 名友善的教徒跪在一只红宝箱前，旁边有几段对话：; 第一次：“欢迎你，同行的侍从！看来，自从我们的先祖被封进这间神圣密室以来，枪教会的装束已经大不相同。放心吧，因为你面前的宝箱里……藏着传说中的能杀死过去的枪（Gun That Can Kill The Past）！你漫长的朝圣终于到头了。加入我们的永恒崇拜吧！俯伏下拜吧！”

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 2 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: This archaic laser has been studied for centuries. Gungeonologists can only conclude that it was used by primitive people to poison each other with radiation.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这种古老的激光已经被研究了几个世纪。枪牢学者只能得出结论：它曾被原始人用来用辐射互相下毒。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires a green laser beam that slightly curves towards enemies.; Continually shooting an enemy with the laser for 0.25 seconds will poison them for 3.5 seconds.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射一道会轻微向敌人弯曲的绿色激光束。; 用这束激光持续命中敌人 0.25 秒，就会让其中毒 3.5 秒。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Beta Ray If the player also has Irradiated Lead, Gamma Ray's beam grows larger and deals 23 damage per second, but no longer travels instantaneously.; Gungeonite If the player also has Clear Guon Stone, Gamma Ray will leave a trail of poison.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 贝塔射线（Beta Ray） 如果玩家同时拥有辐射铅弹（Irradiated Lead），伽玛射线的光束会变大，每秒造成 23 点伤害，但不再是瞬时飞行。; 枪牢岩（Gungeonite） 如果玩家同时拥有透明滚石（Clear Guon Stone），伽玛射线会留下毒液轨迹。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Prior to the Supply Drop Update, Gamma Ray did not curve towards enemies.; The Ammonomicon quote "Mean Green" may be a reference to The Hulk, who was transformed by exposure to gamma radiation.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 在空投补给更新之前，伽玛射线不会朝敌人弯曲。; 《枪械图鉴》里的“Mean Green”可能是在致敬浩克（The Hulk），他是被伽马辐射照射后变异而成的。

entries.unlock: Reward from [[Frifle_and_the_Grey_Mauser#List_of_Quests
entries.englishGameplaySummary: An inelegant weapon for a less civilized age. These guns were once used to make pianos out of teeth.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这是一个属于更不文明时代的粗粝武器。这些枪曾被用来用牙齿做钢琴。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires a conical spread of bullets with strong knockback.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射锥形散布的子弹，击退很强。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Iron Stance If the player also has Heavy Boots, the gun's damage and knockback are increased by 20%, its shot speed is increased by 50%, and its reload time is decreased by 20%.; The Elephant In The Room If the player also has Pig, Turkey, Owl, Chicken Flute, Super Space Turtle, Bait Launcher, or Compressed Air Tank the Elephant Gun becomes an elephant head and shoots a pink elephant instead of bullets. The elephant deals 30 damage and has strong knockback, but decreased fire rate.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 铁之姿态（Iron Stance） 如果玩家同时拥有重靴，这把枪的伤害和击退提高 20%，射击速度提高 50%，装填时间降低 20%。; 象群问题（The Elephant In The Room） 如果玩家同时拥有猪、火鸡、猫头鹰、鸡长笛、超级太空龟、饵枪或压缩空气罐，猎象枪会变成一个象头，发射一只粉色大象而不是子弹。大象造成 30 点伤害并有很强击退，但射速下降。
entries.englishUsageNotes: So called elephant guns were large guns designed for the hunting of large animals (such as elephants) during safaris in Africa in the 19th century. Real-world elephant guns fired single large slugs, rather than shot.; The Ammonomicon description "These guns were once used to make pianos out of teeth." is a reference to the practice of hunting elephants to harvest their tusks for ivory, a material once used to make piano keys.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 所谓猎象枪，是 19 世纪非洲狩猎大型动物（比如大象）时使用的大口径枪械。现实中的猎象枪发射的是单发大口径弹头，而不是霰弹。; 图鉴描述“这些枪曾被用来用牙齿做钢琴。”是在致敬猎杀大象取象牙的做法，而象牙曾被用来制作钢琴键。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The Machine Pistol is a small but powerful hand-held machine gun. It is a favorite of Bandana wearing Gundead, whose impatience with reloading is legendary.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 机枪是一种小巧但威力十足的手持机枪。它是戴着头巾的枪匪最爱，他们对换弹的急躁几乎是传奇。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Behold! If the player also has Com4nd0, M1911, Void Marshal, Eye of the Beholster, and Trank Gun (the weapons the Beholster uses in game), when the Eye of the Beholster is held, the other five guns rotate around the player and shoot at nearby enemies, still using up ammo from each gun. Obtainable through the Beholster shrine, although it can be activated without.; Pistol Machine If the player also has Fortune's Favor, Laser Sight, Nanomachines, Bionic Leg, Shock Rounds, or +1 Bullets, Machine Pistol becomes perfectly accurate, its shots are linked with electricity that can damage enemies, and its shots gain the Angry Bullets effect.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 看吧（Behold!） 如果玩家同时拥有魔鬼司令、M1911、虚空元帅、嗜枪怪之眼和缓冲枪（Trank Gun）（这些都是游戏中嗜枪怪使用的武器），当持有嗜枪怪之眼时，其余 5 把枪会围绕玩家旋转并攻击附近敌人，而且仍会消耗各自的弹药。可通过嗜枪怪神龛获得，不过即使没有通过神龛也能触发。; 枪械手枪（Pistol Machine） 如果玩家同时拥有财富的青睐、激光瞄准镜、纳米机械、仿生腿、电击炮或子弹+1，机枪会变得完全精准，子弹会用电流连接并能伤害敌人，而且会获得愤怒的小子弹效果。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun resembles a Mini Uzi, a compact, blowback-operated machine pistol developed in 1980, chambered in 9x19mm Parabellum.; This gun is used by Bandana Bullet Kin, and is one of the six guns wielded by the Beholster.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪外形像一把迷你乌兹（Mini Uzi），一种 1980 年开发的紧凑型反冲式机枪手枪，使用 9×19 毫米帕拉贝鲁姆弹。; 这把枪由头巾枪兵（Bandana Bullet Kin）使用，也是嗜枪怪持有的 6 把枪之一。

entries.unlock: Complete the tutorial.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Traditionally given to Gungeoneers when they first arrive at the Gungeon. It is incredibly weak.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 传统上，新到枪牢的枪牢者会得到这把枪。它弱得离谱。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Greener Guon Stone If the player also has Green Guon Stone, the size of the guon stone is increased, it rotates at a fixed distance from the player while they are moving instead of on a slight delay, and the chance for the stone to heal is raised to 70% if the player is one hit from dying. 20 coin also appears whenever Green Guon Stone heals the player.; Pea Cannon If the player also has Old Knight's Helm, Old Knight's Shield, Crutch, Mahoguny, Starpew, Cactus, Wood Beam, or Broccoli, Pea Shooter's damage is increased and shots cause small explosions.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 更绿的滚石（Greener Guon Stone） 如果玩家同时拥有绿色滚石（Green Guon Stone），护石体积会增加，移动时会以固定距离环绕玩家而不是略有延迟，并且当玩家离死只差一击时，护石治疗的几率会升到 70%。每当绿色滚石治疗玩家时，还会出现 20 枚金币。; 豌豆炮（Pea Cannon） 如果玩家同时拥有老骑士头盔、老骑士盾牌、拐杖、桃花心木枪、星辉枪、仙人掌、木梁或西兰花，射豆枪的伤害会提高，射击还会引发小型爆炸。
entries.englishUsageNotes: A peashooter is a type of toy blowgun. The term "pea shooter" is also used derogatorily to describe a weak, small-caliber firearm.; The Pea Shooter is given to you by Ser Manuel in the tutorial.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 豌豆枪是一种玩具吹箭。“豌豆枪（pea shooter）” 也常被贬义地用来形容威力弱、口径小的枪械。; 射豆枪是在教程里由塞尔·曼努埃尔（Ser Manuel）送给你的。

stats.value: Assuming each bullet only hits once.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Fires ricocheting musket balls. This most ancient of pistols has settled many a lovers' quarrel. This particular flintlock would be fairly useless in a duel, as the ricochet would probably kill several bystanders.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 发射会弹跳的火枪弹。这把最古老的手枪解决过许多情场纠纷。若放到决斗里，这把燧发手枪其实相当没用，因为弹跳的子弹大概会把周围好几位看客一起送走。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Dead Prez If the player also has Derringer, Derringer fires bouncing Dueling Pistol shots, and Dueling Pistol fires a wide spread of 4 bullets alongside its normal shots.; Death Square If the player also has Dueling Laser, damaging enemies with the Dueling Pistol rapidly recharges the Dueling Laser.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 决斗名流（Dead Prez） 如果玩家同时拥有短管手枪（Derringer），短管手枪会发射会弹跳的决斗手枪子弹，而决斗手枪会在正常子弹之外再发射一大扇 4 发弹幕。; 死亡方格（Death Square） 如果玩家同时拥有决斗激光（Dueling Laser），用决斗手枪伤害敌人会迅速为决斗激光充能。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Hell Singing synergy is likely a reference to Van Helsing, the vampire hunter created by Bram Stoker.; The Dead Prez synergy is likely a reference to the death of Abraham Lincoln, who was shot with a Derringer, and the Dueling Pistol likely is referencing the many duels that Andrew Jackson had in his lifetime.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: Hell Singing 协同很可能是在致敬范·海辛（Van Helsing），这位吸血鬼猎人是布拉姆·斯托克（Bram Stoker）创造的。; 死亡名流（Dead Prez）协同很可能是在致敬亚伯拉罕·林肯之死——他是被短管手枪（Derringer）射杀的，而决斗手枪本身也很可能是在影射安德鲁·杰克逊一生中打过的许多决斗。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: A commonplace energy weapon. The Laser Rifle is the AK-47 of the future! Known for its low manufacturing costs and lower maintenance requirements, the Laser Rifle is used throughout the galaxy by hunters and miscreants alike.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 一种常见的能量武器。激光步枪就是未来版的 AK-47！因制造成本低、维护需求也低而闻名，猎人和恶棍都在整个银河系里使用它。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Diazepam Increases damage by 50% while the Laser Rifle is held.; Laser Light Show If the player also has Scattershot, Laser Rifle becomes blue and gold, and fires 3 sets of 3 shots in a spread per trigger pull. Each shot bounces once.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 地西泮（Diazepam） 当持有激光步枪时，伤害提高 50%。; 激光秀（Laser Light Show） 如果玩家同时拥有散射弹，激光步枪会变成蓝金配色，并在每次扣动扳机时发射 3 组、每组 3 发的散射射击。每发子弹会弹跳一次。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The weapon is likely a reference to the Laser Rifle from X-COM: UFO Defense, which it strongly resembles in both appearance and function. In addition, the description may be a reference to the fact that the Laser Rifle could be manufactured for a low cost and sold at a profit, in addition to costing nothing but money; these factors made it an extremely ubiquitous weapon, much like the AK-47 in modern culture.; It may also be a reference to the more recent X-COM games, which also sport similar looking laser weapons.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这件武器很可能是在致敬《X-COM：UFO防御》里的激光步枪，在外形和功能上都和它极其相似。另外，描述也可能是在说，这把激光步枪可以低成本制造并转手盈利，除了花钱几乎没有别的成本；这让它变成了一种极其普及的武器，就像现代文化里的 AK-47 一样。; 它也可能是在致敬较新的 X-COM 游戏，那些作品里也有外形相似的激光武器。

entries.unlock: Defeat the High Dragun.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Finely balanced, rapid fire. Can ignite foes. An Edwin original. The Dragunfire was forged deep in the heart of the Gungeon, crafted to emulate the wrath of the beast from which it takes its name.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 平衡精良、射速极快。能点燃敌人。出自埃德温（Edwin）之手的原创作品。龙焰枪是在枪牢核心深处锻造而成，目的是模仿其名字来源那头野兽的怒火。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Dragunice If the player has the Heart of Ice, the Dragunfire will shoot blue fire that has a chance to burn and/or freeze an enemy.; Kalibreath If the player has Yellow Chamber or Holey Grail, the Dragunfire and its projectiles turn gray. It gains increased rate of fire and knockback, but loses piercing projectiles.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 龙焰冰火（Dragunice） 如果玩家拥有冰之心（Heart of Ice），龙焰枪会射出蓝火，有几率点燃和/或冻结敌人。; 卡利布雷斯（Kalibreath） 如果玩家拥有黄色膛室（Yellow Chamber）或剩杯（Holey Grail），龙焰枪及其弹丸会变成灰色。它会获得更高的射速和击退，但会失去穿透弹丸。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The design of the Dragunfire is that of the Bolter from the dystopian science-fantasy universe of Warhammer 40,000.; The name of the gun comes from the Dragonfire round which the Bolter can fire. Dragonfire Bolts are hollow-shelled bolts that explode with a gout of superheated gas that can eliminate the value of cover.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 龙焰枪的造型来自反乌托邦科幻奇幻宇宙《战锤 40,000》里的爆弹枪（Bolter）。; 枪名来自爆弹枪（Bolter）可以发射的龙焰弹（Dragonfire）弹丸。龙焰弹丸（Dragonfire Bolts）是一种中空外壳弹，爆炸时会喷出高温气体，足以抵消掩体的价值。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Used mostly by farmers who seek to defend their farms from hungry giants, the Blunderbuss fires anything you put into it. Hold to charge and launch projectiles in an inaccurate short spray. Not as effective against sly dragons.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 主要被农夫使用，他们想用它保卫农场，免受饥饿巨人侵袭。喇叭枪能发射你塞进去的任何东西。按住充能，就能把投射物以不太准的短喷流发射出去。对狡猾的龙没那么有效。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Blunderbrace If the player also has Macho Brace, Blunderbuss shoots bigger and faster bullets and charge time is reduced.; Hell Singing If the player also has Silver Bullets, Blunderbuss will deal an extra 50% damage to jammed enemies for a total of 487.5% damage.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 喇叭增强（Blunderbrace） 如果玩家同时拥有强制锻炼器，喇叭枪会发射更大、更快的子弹，并缩短充能时间。; 地狱高歌（Hell Singing） 如果玩家同时拥有银子弹，喇叭枪对被祝福敌人会额外造成 50% 伤害，总计 487.5%。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Despite firing like a shotgun, the Blunderbuss is not in the SHOTGUN gun class, and as such does not benefit from the Shotgun Affinity synergy.; There is a glitch where firing Blunderbuss by charging until just before the fully charged animation causes the gun to fire without using ammo.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 虽然喇叭枪的射击方式像霰弹枪，但它并不属于 SHOTGUN 枪械类别，因此无法享受霰弹枪亲和协同。; 这把枪有个漏洞：如果一直充能到几乎进入完全充满动画前再开火，它会在不消耗弹药的情况下射击。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: This weapon was constructed the single time the Gungeon experienced a snow day. New Gundead simply appeared with these cannons strapped to their bodies and pelted everything in sight with powdery projectiles. There were also many chipped teeth.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把武器诞生于枪牢唯一一次下雪天。新枪匪们直接把炮管绑在身上，向眼前的一切发射粉雪弹丸。顺带还撞掉了不少牙。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Frosty the Bullet Tyrant If the player has Frost Bullets, Snowballer shots increase in size and damage the further they travel.; This effect is similar to Snowballets and stacks with it, leading to rapid growth.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 寒霜暴君（Frosty the Bullet Tyrant） 如果玩家拥有霜子弹（Frost Bullets），雪球枪的弹丸飞得越远，体积和伤害就越大。; 这一效果与雪球子弹（Snowballets）类似，并且会叠加，从而导致迅速膨胀。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The snowballs leave behind pools of water, which can be used to put out chest fuses and the fireplace in the Keep of the Lead Lord.; The Frosty the Bullet Tyrant synergy may be a reference to the boss Bleak from Donkey Kong Country 3, a snowman that throws snowballs that appear to increase in size as they travel towards the player.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 雪球会留下水坑，可用来扑灭宝箱引信和领主要塞里的壁炉。; “霜冻子弹暴君（Frosty the Bullet Tyrant）” 协同可能是在致敬《大金刚国度 3》里的首领 Bleak（Bleak）——一个会丢雪球的雪人，而雪球在飞向玩家时似乎会越飞越大。

entries.unlock: Map all 5 non-secret chambers for The Lost Adventurer and talk to him in The Breach.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Reload to clear the air of bullets. This abominable weapon angers the Jammed. The weapon of a mythical hero, said to have mastered the Gungeon. Reloading initiates a defensive flurry of slashes, each positioned to carve a bullet from the air.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 换弹时清空子弹。这件可憎的武器会激怒被诅咒者。它属于传说英雄的武器，据说那英雄曾精通枪牢。换弹会触发一阵防御性的挥斩乱舞，每一击都像是在把一颗子弹从空中剜掉。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Buster Gun If the player has RPG, Excaliber fires three or four shots in a cone whenever it is reloaded.; Snicker-snack If the player has Vorpal Bullets, Excaliber fires a spread of 3 homing shots that deal 20% less damage.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 爆破枪（Buster Gun） 如果玩家拥有 RPG，亚瑟王的神剑（Excaliber）每次换弹时都会以锥形一次发射 3 或 4 发子弹。; 咔嚓咔嚓（Snicker-snack） 如果玩家拥有斩首子弹（Vorpal Bullets），亚瑟王的神剑（Excaliber）会发射 3 发追踪射击，伤害降低 20%。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The sidearm of choice for investigative efforts.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 侦查行动常用的副武器。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Detective Magnum If the player also has Magnum, the guns are dual-wielded.; Detective Mode If the player also has Badge, the gun's maximum ammo is increased, its reload time is halved, and its damage is increased by 20%. The police officer will also show the contents of nearby chests while 38 Special is held.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 侦探马格南（Detective Magnum） 如果玩家同时拥有马格南手枪，双持这两把枪。; 侦探模式（Detective Mode） 如果玩家同时拥有警徽，这把枪的最大弹药量提高、装填时间减半，且伤害提高 20%。持有 38 特种手枪时，警官还会显示附近宝箱的内容。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Spamming the fire button while dodge rolling causes the gun to fire considerably faster for a brief time after the dodge roll has concluded.; With a fire rate of 0.07, the 38 Special requires a minimum of ~14 clicks per second to fire at maximum DPS, meaning the player is likely to be unable to take full advantage of the high fire rate.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 连按射击键并在翻滚时开火，会让这把枪在翻滚结束后的短时间内射得快得多。; 射速为 0.07 时，38 特种手枪每秒至少要点击约 14 次才能打出最高 DPS，这意味着玩家很可能没法完全发挥它的高射速。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Professor Goopton for 6 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Fires poisonous rounds.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 发射有毒弹丸。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Bullets fired from the Plague Pistol have a 50% chance to inflict the poison effect on enemies.; These bullets also leave a small pool of lingering poison goop on the ground when destroyed.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 瘟疫手枪（Plague Pistol）射出的子弹有 50% 几率让敌人中毒。; 这些子弹被摧毁时，还会在地面上留下少量持续存在的毒液。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Pandemic Pistol If the player also has Monster Blood, Gundromeda Strain, or Irradiated Lead, the pistol turns into the Pandemic Pistol, increasing ammo capacity, and its bullets bounce off walls and are linked like VertebraeK-47's bullets.; If the player has both Pandemic pistol and the Machine Pistol with the Pistol Machine synergy, bullets from both weapons link up with each other as if shot from the same gun.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 瘟疫手枪（Pandemic Pistol） 如果玩家同时拥有怪物血（Monster Blood）、天外来菌（Gundromeda Strain）或辐射铅弹（Irradiated Lead），手枪会变成瘟疫手枪（Pandemic Pistol），弹药上限提高，子弹会像脊椎K-47的子弹那样反弹并彼此连线。; 如果玩家同时拥有瘟疫手枪（Pandemic Pistol）和带有枪械手枪协同（Pistol Machine）的机枪，那么两把武器射出的子弹会像出自同一把枪一样彼此连线。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Because bullets from the Plague Pistol leave non-flammable goop on the ground, they can be used to extinguish chest fuses and the fireplace.; The entry for the Plague Pistol in the Physical Ammonomicon has a small doodle of a Mutant Bullet Kin.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 因为瘟疫手枪射出的子弹会在地面留下不可燃的毒液，所以它们可用来扑灭宝箱引信和壁炉。; 实体《枪械图鉴》里瘟疫手枪的条目旁边还有一幅突变子弹枪兵（Mutant Bullet Kin）的小涂鸦。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: One of the first energy weapons created in the Gungeon. When lightning struck an old gunsmith's gun-rack, he decided to sand it down into a gun. The result is crude, as far as energy weapons go, but effective.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 枪牢里的早期能量武器之一。闪电击中一位老枪匠的枪架后，他把那东西磨成了一把枪。按能量武器的标准来看，这东西很粗糙，但确实管用。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Quickly fires small balls of electricity.; Any pools of water that these balls pass over will be electrified, dealing considerable damage to enemies.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 快速射出小小的电球。; 这些电球经过的水坑会被带电，对敌人造成相当可观的伤害。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Alistair's Ladder If the player has Shock Rounds, Thunderclap fires two parallel balls of lightning with every shot, linking the bullets together in a ladder pattern.; If the synergy is obtained through Lich's Eye Bullets, the Shock Rounds effect will not be applied.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 阿利斯泰尔之梯（Alistair's Ladder） 如果玩家拥有电击炮（Shock Rounds），霹雳枪每次射击都会发射两颗平行的闪电球，把子弹连成梯子状。; 如果该协同是通过巫妖之眼子弹（Lich's Eye Bullets）获得的，则不会应用电击炮效果。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Altered: Diazepam Prior to the Advanced Gungeons & Draguns Update, this gun was included in Diazepam.; The damaging field while reloading was added in A Farewell to Arms.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 更名：地西泮（Diazepam）。在《高级地牢与龙（Advanced Gungeons & Draguns）》更新之前，这把枪被收录在地西泮（Diazepam）中。; 换弹时产生的伤害场是在《永别了，武器（A Farewell to Arms）》更新中加入的。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The most famous rifle in history. This gun's usefulness and reliability have become legend. Though not native to the Gungeon, its arrival seemed to be expected by the Gundead.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 历史上最著名的步枪。这把枪的实用性和可靠性早已成为传说。虽然它并非枪牢原产，但它的到来似乎早就被枪匪们预料到了。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Diazepam Increases damage by 50% while the M1 is held.; M1 Multi-Tool If the player also has Scope, Drum Clip, Ammo Belt, Backpack, or Utility Belt, M1's reload time is decreased by 20%, its magazine size is increased by 50%, and its maximum ammo is increased by 80%. Movement speed is also increased while M1 is held.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 地西泮（Diazepam） 持有 M1 时伤害提高 50%。; M1 多用途工具（M1 Multi-Tool） 如果玩家同时拥有瞄准镜、鼓夹、弹药带、背包或实用皮带，M1 的装填时间减少 20%，弹匣容量提高 50%，最大弹药量提高 80%。持有 M1 时移动速度也会提高。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Although classified as semi-automatic, the M1 is functionally automatic, as its rate of fire does not benefit from tapping the fire button instead of holding it down.; There are several real guns with the name 'M1', however the shape (such as the band around the rifle's forend), distinctive pinging reload sound, and Ammonomicon entry of the weapon (Coupled with the fact that it is referred to as the 'Grand Rifle' in the Apple Arcade version of Exit the Gungeon) suggest that this rifle is the M1 Garand, a famous semi-automatic rifle that served as the mainstay of the US Army in World War 2.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 虽然它被归类为半自动，但 M1 的实际表现是全自动，因为它的射速不会因为反复点按开火键而比一直按住更快。; 名为“ M1 ”的真枪有好几种，不过这把枪的外形（比如枪管前端的金属箍）、独特的“叮”声换弹音效，以及图鉴条目（再加上它在苹果街机（Apple Arcade）版《Exit the Gungeon》里被称作“Grand Rifle（Grand Rifle）”这一点）都说明，这把步枪指的应该是 M1 加兰德（M1 Garand）——这是一种著名的半自动步枪，曾在二战中作为美军主力装备。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 1 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: A favorite of organized criminals and Hollow Points, this gun has accumulated nicknames over its hundreds of years of use. Known affectionately as the "Tommy Gun," the "Trench Broom", the "Chicago Typewriter", and the "Teetotaller's Thursday."
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 有组织犯罪分子和空心点枪兵都很喜欢这把枪。它在数百年的使用中积累了许多绰号。人们亲切地叫它“汤米枪（Tommy Gun）”、“战壕扫帚（Trench Broom）”、“芝加哥打字机（Chicago Typewriter）”以及“禁酒派星期四（Teetotaller's Thursday）”。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Future Gangster If the player has Bionic Leg, Laser Sight, Shock Rounds, or Nanomachines, the Thompson Sub-Machinegun fires lasers. Each laser does 6.5 damage instead of the normal 5 damage.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 未来黑帮（Future Gangster） 如果玩家拥有仿生腿、激光瞄准镜、电击炮或纳米机械，汤普森冲锋枪会发射激光。每道激光造成 6.5 点伤害，而不是平常的 5 点。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Thompson Sub-Machinegun is wielded by Hollowpoints.; "Myeah, See!" references a line spoken by Edward G. Robinson's gangster character in the 1931 film Little Caesar.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 汤普森冲锋枪由空心点枪兵（Hollowpoints）持用。; “哎呀，看哪（Myeah, See!）” 引用的是爱德华·格（G）·罗宾逊在 1931 年电影《小凯撒》里扮演黑帮角色时说过的一句台词。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Circumnavigates the room, then explodes. Many years ago, Gungeon mariners used wind to propel their bullets instead of combustion. The trips would take so long to cross a room that the bullets would sometimes mutiny and change course entirely.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 它会绕着房间飞一圈，然后爆炸。很多年前，枪牢里的航海者曾用风而不是火药来推进子弹。旅程长到子弹飞过整个房间时，它们有时甚至会哗变，彻底改道。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires slow moving bullets that accelerate and bounce around the room.; These bullets have a slight homing effect, curving towards enemies.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射移动缓慢的子弹，这些子弹会加速并在房间里弹跳。; 这些子弹带有轻微追踪效果，会向敌人弯曲。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Black Flag If the player also has Grappling Hook or Serious Cannon, each Corsair shot will periodically fire two bouncing cannonballs perpendicular to itself as it travels.; Swift Sloop If the player also has Sense of Direction, increases Corsair's shot speed by 50%, decreases its charge time by 33%, and decreases its reload time by 20%.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 黑旗（Black Flag） 如果玩家同时拥有抓钩（Grappling Hook）或重炮（Serious Cannon），每次发射海盗船都会在飞行过程中定期向自身垂直方向发射两枚会弹跳的炮弹。; 快速单桅帆船（Swift Sloop） 如果玩家同时拥有方向感（Sense of Direction），海盗船的射速提高 50%，充能时间减少 33%，装填时间减少 20%。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Prior to the Supply Drop Update, the bullets did not curve.; Corsair's bullets cannot be caught by Gunjurers.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 在空投补给更新之前，这把枪的子弹不会弯曲。; 海盗船的子弹不能被枪匠（Gunjurers）抓走。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Freezes enemies. This unique weapon was brought to the Gungeon by a disgraced warrior who discarded it when he gave up. The projectiles it fires are extremely low-energy, delivering a cold and highly depressing death.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 会冻结敌人。这把独特武器曾被一位战败后弃枪的失意战士带进枪牢。它发射的弹丸能量极低，会带来一种冰冷而无比消沉的死亡。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Crestfallen Soul If the player also has Gun Soul, dodge roll speed is increased by 20% and Crestfaller deals 50% more damage if the player dies and has not yet retrieved their soul.; Five O'Clock Somewhere If the player also has Shotga Cola, Shotgun Coffee, Double Vision, Potion of Gun Friendship, Potion of Lead Skin, or Old Knight's Flask, reloading will fire a glass bottle that has a chance to stun enemies hit. Reloading while standing on a liquid replenishes the ammo missing in the current magazine, similar to Gungine.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 沮丧之魂（Crestfallen Soul） 如果玩家同时拥有枪魂（Gun Soul），翻滚速度提高 20%，且如果玩家死亡后还没捡回灵魂，沮丧之枪会造成 50% 更多伤害。; 五点钟方向都一样（Five O'Clock Somewhere） 如果玩家同时拥有霰弹可乐、霰弹咖啡、复视药酒、枪之友谊药水、铅皮药水或老骑士的酒壶，换弹时会发射一个玻璃瓶，被命中的敌人有几率被眩晕。在液体上换弹时，会补回当前弹匣缺失的弹药，类似喷气式枪（Gungine）。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Bananas resemble guns, and are high in potassium. A convenient snack and/or weapon for Gungeoneers.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 香蕉长得就像枪，而且钾含量很高。对枪牢者来说，这既是方便的零食，也是一件武器。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Flings a banana that bounces once, and explodes upon destruction dealing 30 damage to nearby enemies.; Each time this banana hits a wall, regardless of whether it bounces or explodes, it creates two more bananas. These sub-bananas look identical to the original, and also bounce once, but they cannot create more bananas, and their smaller explosions only deal 10 damage.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 扔出一根香蕉，香蕉会弹跳一次，撞坏时会爆炸，对附近敌人造成 30 点伤害。; 每当这根香蕉撞到墙壁，不管是弹跳还是爆炸，都会再生成两根香蕉。这些子香蕉和原版外观相同，也会弹跳一次，但它们不能再生成香蕉，而且更小的爆炸只造成 10 点伤害。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Hornucopia If the player has Charm Horn, the number of sub-bananas created each time the original banana bounces is increased from 2 to 4. Additionally, using Charm Horn while the Banana is equipped fires a banana at each enemy it charms. These bananas deal 1.1 damage on impact, and explode on impact dealing 10 additional damage to the impacted enemy and enemies nearby.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 魔力丰收（Hornucopia） 如果玩家拥有魅惑号角（Charm Horn），原始香蕉每次弹跳时生成的子香蕉数量会从 2 增加到 4。此外，装备香蕉时使用魅惑号角会对每个被魅惑的敌人发射一根香蕉。这些香蕉命中时造成 1.1 点伤害，撞击后会爆炸，对被撞到的敌人和附近敌人再造成 10 点额外伤害。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun likely is a reference to the game Gorillas, itself referenced with a weapon of the same name from Worms.; The pickup quote is a reference to the plantain, a banana cultivar subgroup.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪很可能是在致敬《大猩猩（Gorillas）》，而《大猩猩（Gorillas）》本身又被《蠕虫（Worms）》中同名武器引用。; 这句拾取台词是在致敬大蕉（plantain），一种香蕉品种亚群。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Professor Goopton for 15 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: A horrifying tentacle, cloven from some abyssal fiend. It moves in very disquieting ways.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 一根可怖的触手，从某个深渊恶魔身上斩下。它的移动方式非常令人不安。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The tentacle can grip enemies through walls.; The tentacle can damage disappearing bosses like Cannonbalrog and High Priest if they are connected and kept while vanished.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 触手能隔着墙抓住敌人。; 若与消失时仍保持连接，触手还能对像炮弹魔（Cannonbalrog）和高祭司（High Priest）这样会消失的首领造成伤害。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Gungeonologists have long debated what is truly the worst gun in the Gungeon. More Gungeoneers have perished with Klobbes in their inventory than any other gun. Coincidence?
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 枪牢里公认最烂的枪之一。枪牢学者们长期争论，到底哪把枪才是真正的“最差”。带着可洛比枪（Klobbe）死掉的枪牢者，比带着任何其他枪死掉的人都多。这是巧合吗？
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Klobbering Time If the player also has AU Gun or Moonscraper, the Klobbe is doubled and fires two shots at a time.; No Odd Job If the player also has Makarov, the two guns are dual-wielded. Their damage is increased by 20% and spread is increased by 60%, decreasing accuracy.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 砸枪时刻（Klobbering Time） 如果玩家同时拥有 AU 枪（AU Gun）或月球平土机（Moonscraper），可洛比枪（Klobbe）会翻倍，并一次发射两发子弹。; 没有奇葩活（No Odd Job） 如果玩家同时拥有马卡洛夫（Makarov），这两把枪会被双持。它们的伤害提高 20%，散布提高 60%，精度下降。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun is among those Gunsling King and Manservantes can challenge the player to clear a room with.; This gun is a reference to the Klobb from GoldenEye 007 (itself based on the real-life Škorpion), a notoriously bad gun with similar weaknesses as the Klobbe.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪是枪王（Gunsling King）和门萨文特（Manservantes）可能挑战玩家清空一整间房间的武器之一。; 这把枪是在致敬《黄金眼 007（GoldenEye 007）》里的可洛比（Klobb）（它本身又基于现实中的斯科皮恩（Škorpion）），这是一把臭名昭著的烂枪，弱点和可洛比枪（Klobbe）很像。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Launches Molotovs. The Molotov Launcher takes the principle of incendiary bottles and removes arm pain.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 发射燃烧瓶。燃烧弹发射器把燃烧瓶的原理变成了不伤手臂的操作。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Special Reserve If the player has Hot Lead, Napalm Strike, or Double Vision, Molotovs create pools of green napalm. Green napalm does not damage the player, and inflicts greenfire on enemies, which has a massively increased duration.; The green flame from the synergy Special Reserve will not activate Sprun, even if being lit on fire is the activation trigger.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 特别储备（Special Reserve） 如果玩家拥有热铅（Hot Lead）、凝固汽油弹打击（Napalm Strike）或复视药酒（Double Vision），燃烧瓶会生成绿色凝固汽油池。绿色凝固汽油不会伤害玩家，但会让敌人着上持续时间大幅延长的绿火。; 协同“特别储备”产生的绿色火焰不会触发弹簧支撑（Sprun），即便点火本来就是它的触发条件。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Unlike the regular Molotov, the Molotov Launcher will work in The Gorgun's arena.; Child projectiles created by Flak Bullets will not create puddles of fire.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 与普通燃烧瓶不同，燃烧弹发射器在高戈恩（The Gorgun）的竞技场里也能正常使用。; 由高射炮子弹（Flak Bullets）生成的子弹碎片不会产生火池。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: This ancient tool is theorized to have been used in bizarre pagan rituals involving spiders and flame.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这种古老工具被推测曾用于涉及蜘蛛与火焰的怪异异教仪式。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Careful Iteration If the player has Casey, Casey becomes spiked and fires a spread of 6 nails each time it is swung.; Hammer and Nail If the player also has H4mmer, maximum ammo is increased by 50% for both guns. H4mmer additionally gets 5 hammer shots at the end of every magazine and spins a wood beam around the player when reloading an empty magazine.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 小心迭代（Careful Iteration） 如果玩家拥有卡西（Casey），卡西会长出尖刺，并且每次挥动时发射 6 枚钉子。; 锤与钉（Hammer and Nail） 如果玩家同时拥有悍锤（H4mmer），两把枪的最大弹药量都提高 50%。悍锤（H4mmer）还会在每个弹匣结束时额外发射 5 发锤弹，并在换弹空弹匣时围绕玩家旋转一束木梁。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun is among those Gunsling King and Manservantes can challenge the player to clear a room with.; The Ammonomicon entry is a reference to the 1990s horror film Arachnophobia.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪是枪王（Gunsling King）和门萨文特（Manservantes）可能挑战玩家清空一整间房间的武器之一。; 《枪械图鉴》条目是在致敬 1990 年代恐怖电影《蜘蛛恐惧症》（Arachnophobia）。

stats.value: (hit once normal) (hit twice) (hit thrice) (hit seven times rare)

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Fires a large ricochet round. In an attempt to combine the combat efficiency of bullets with the stealth and recoverability of arrows, modern archers developed the Gunbow. Though it proved ineffective in normal combat, it has taken on new life in the Gungeon.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 发射一发巨大的可弹跳弹丸。为了把子弹的战斗效率与箭矢的隐蔽性和可回收性结合起来，现代弓手发明了弩炮。虽然它在常规战斗中证明不太好用，但在枪牢里却焕发了新生。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Shot Across The Bow If the player has Rocket-Powered Bullets, Air Strike, iBomb Companion App, or Explosive Rounds, the Gunbow will fire rockets that explode on contact with enemies. Rockets deal 35 damage on contact and the explosion deals 35 damage. This removes the Gunbow's piercing shot.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 弓上加弦（Shot Across The Bow） 如果玩家拥有火箭驱动的子弹（Rocket-Powered Bullets）、空袭（Air Strike）、iBomb 伙伴应用（iBomb Companion App）或爆炸弹丸（Explosive Rounds），弩炮会发射在命中敌人时爆炸的火箭。火箭接触时造成 35 点伤害，爆炸再造成 35 点伤害。这样会移除弩炮的穿透射击。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Enemies killed by the gunbow are vaporised, and leave no corpse behind.; The name of this gun could be a reference to the Monster Hunter series, which features Bowguns.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 被弩炮击杀的敌人会被汽化，不会留下尸体。; 这把枪的名字可能是在致敬《怪物猎人》系列，那里面有弩弓（Bowgun）。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The Big Iron is a strange revolver, created by attaching additional barrels to a magnum. The barrels are not actually connected to the chamber, but they fire nonetheless. Decades ago, Bullet Kin learned of the existence of human gunsmiths. In the intervening years, they have attempted to replicate the art of guncraft with mixed results.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 大铁枪是一把奇怪的左轮，它是在马格南上加装额外枪管做出来的。那些枪管其实并没有真正连到弹膛上，但它们照样能开火。几十年前，子弹枪兵得知了人类枪匠的存在。此后的岁月里，他们试图复刻枪械工艺，结果成败参半。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Cast Iron If the player has Bundle of Wands, Witch Pistol, or Hexagun, each of Big Iron's bullets are replaced with one from Bundle of Wands, Witch Pistol, and Hexagun. These bullets have infinite range.; Iron Slug If the player also has Stout Bullets, Scope, Heavy Boots, Heavy Bullets, or Fat Bullets, Big Iron fires one large, explosive iron bullet that does increased damage.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 魔杖铸铁（Cast Iron） 如果玩家拥有一束魔杖（Bundle of Wands）、女巫手枪（Witch Pistol）或六角枪（Hexagun），大铁枪的每一发子弹都会分别替换成这些武器中的一种。这些子弹拥有无限射程。; 铁弹（Iron Slug） 如果玩家同时拥有结实子弹（Stout Bullets）、瞄准镜（Scope）、重靴（Heavy Boots）、重子弹（Heavy Bullets）或胖胖子弹（Fat Bullets），大铁枪会发射一发更大、会爆炸的铁弹，伤害更高。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Despite Big Iron using bullets in its ammo bar, shell cartridges come out of its compartment when reloading.; Despite firing a spread of multiple bullets like a shotgun, the Big Iron is not in the SHOTGUN gun class, instead residing in the PISTOL class.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 尽管大铁枪弹药条里用的是子弹，它在换弹时从弹仓里弹出来的却是弹壳。; 尽管它像霰弹枪一样一次发射多发子弹，但大铁枪并不属于 SHOTGUN 类别，而是归在 PISTOL 类别里。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 22 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Shots that impact foes are refunded. A weapon once carried by a brave wanderer, whose exploits are lost to the drifts of time. Designed to work in tandem with a blade, this one has been modified to recharge itself.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 命中敌人的射击会返还弹药。曾有一把勇敢流浪者随身携带的武器，他的事迹早已湮没在时间的风沙里。这把枪原本就是为了配合一把刀而设计的，如今又被改造成了可自行充能。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires pink lasers, with high damage per shot.; Has an extremely low maximum ammo, however landing a shot on an enemy will restore 1 ammo to the gun.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射粉色激光，每发伤害都很高。; 最大弹药量极低，不过命中敌人就会为这把枪返还 1 发弹药。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Hard Light If the player also has the Light Gun, Hyper Light Blaster's magazine size and maximum ammo is increased by 50% and it gains homing. Light Gun gains a chance to regenerate one or two ammo when hitting enemies.; When reloading with the new appearance caused by the Hard Light synergy, the appearance will revert to the original for the duration of the reload.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 硬光（Hard Light） 如果玩家同时拥有光之枪（Light Gun），超光之铳的弹匣容量和最大弹药量都会增加 50%，并获得追踪效果。光之枪命中敌人时则有几率恢复一到两发弹药。; 触发硬光协同后，重新换弹时武器外观会在换弹期间恢复成原始样式。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Shot creatures do not need to be hostile to restore ammo to this gun. As such, shooting chickens and rats will still restore ammunition.; Shooting an enemy that is in the midst of its death animation will still restore ammo, as long as the enemy hitbox still blocks bullets.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 被射击的生物不必是敌对目标也能为这把枪返弹药。因此，射鸡和老鼠同样会补充弹药。; 命中敌人死亡动画进行到一半时开火，只要敌人的判定箱仍能挡住子弹，也一样会返还弹药。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The Hegemony of Man has fought, and won, three major wars with alien races. Hundreds of these pistols were salvaged after the second of these wars.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 霸权人类与外星种族打过三场大战并都赢了。这些手枪中有数百把是在第二次大战后回收的。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Chief Master If the player also has any two Master Rounds, Alien Sidearm gains an increased maximum ammo of 500 and a larger magazine of 30. It becomes fully automatic, and the final two shots in the magazine become fully-charged shots.; Spartan Loadout If the player has Cat Claw, Alien Sidearm can be charged twice to fire a more powerful shot. Cat Claw pierces enemies, attaching its explosive to every enemy hit.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 首席大师（Chief Master） 如果玩家同时拥有任意两枚大师圆环（Master Rounds），外星副手枪的最大弹药量会提高到 500，弹匣容量增至 30。它还会变成全自动，且弹匣里的最后两发子弹会变成满充能射击。; 斯巴达配置（Spartan Loadout） 如果玩家拥有猫爪（Cat Claw），外星副手枪可以充能两次以发射更强的一击。猫爪会穿透敌人，并把自己的爆炸附着到命中的每个敌人身上。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun is a reference to the alien pistols usable in Halo.; Shield Breaker is a reference to Halo's famous shield mechanic.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪是在致敬《光环》（Halo）里可用的外星手枪。; “护盾破坏者（Shield Breaker）” 是对《光环》著名护盾机制的致敬。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The Shock Rifle uses a modified battery and coil to propel electricity.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 电击步枪使用改装过的电池和线圈来推动电流。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Assault and Battery If the player also has the M16, the guns are dual wielded.; Battery Powered If the player has R2G2 or Shock Rounds, Shock Rifle gains a smartphone battery-esque look and automatically regenerates 1 ammo every 4 seconds.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 突击与电池（Assault and Battery） 如果玩家同时拥有 M16，这两把枪会双持。; 电池供能（Battery Powered） 如果玩家拥有 R2G2 或电击炮（Shock Rounds），电击步枪会获得一种类似智能手机电池的外观，并每 4 秒自动恢复 1 发弹药。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Sets enemies aflame. Alben Smallbore, enthralled with the variety of guns he found in the Gungeon, created this spell. Upon casting, the wielder's hand bursts into flame, allowing fireballs to be thrown like bullets.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 点燃敌人。阿尔本·斯莫尔博尔（Alben Smallbore）被枪牢里丰富的枪械种类迷住了，于是创造了这个法术。施放后，持用者的手会燃起火焰，让火球能像子弹一样被扔出去。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Hotter Than Heck If the player has Pitchfork, increases the shot size and damage of the guns by 25%, and grants fire immunity while they are held.; Maximize Spell If the player also has Chance Bullets or Gungeon Pepper, the Flame Hand turns green, is always guaranteed to roll at least a 12 (after intelligence modifiers), and fires green flames that no longer pierce enemies but leave pools of green napalm upon hitting enemies. Green napalm does not damage the player, and inflicts greenfire on enemies, which has a massively increased duration.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 更热的地狱（Hotter Than Heck） 如果玩家拥有干草叉（Pitchfork），枪械的子弹尺寸和伤害提高 25%，并在持有时赋予火焰免疫。; 最大化法术（Maximize Spell） 如果玩家同时拥有幸运子弹（Chance Bullets）或枪牢胡椒（Gungeon Pepper），火焰之手会变成绿色，总会至少掷出 12 点（加上智力修正后），并发射不会再穿透敌人的绿火；这些绿火在命中敌人时会留下绿色凝固汽油池。绿色凝固汽油不会伤害玩家，并会让敌人着上持续时间大幅延长的绿火。
entries.englishUsageNotes: As the Flame Hand deals fire-type damage, it deals no damage to Muzzle Wisps and Muzzle Flares.; Due to the high knockback and large size of the fireballs, they can hit the same enemy multiple times.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 由于火焰之手造成的是火焰伤害，它对口气怨灵（Muzzle Wisps）和口气焰光（Muzzle Flares）不造成伤害。; 由于火球的击退很高，而且体积很大，它们可以多次命中同一个敌人。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The standard issue rifle for all Hegemony of Man soldiers. Packs a decent punch, but the accuracy leaves much to be desired. Typical Hegemony work.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 霸权人类士兵的标准制式步枪。威力还算不错，但精度实在不敢恭维。典型的霸权做派。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires blue energy bolts with considerable spread.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射带有明显散布的蓝色能量弹。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Diazepam Increases damage by 50% while the Hegemony Rifle is held.; Hegemony Special Forces, Galactic Medal of Valor, or Ammo Belt Hegemony Rifle changes form, and fires accurate instantaneous piercing laser blasts.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 地西泮（Diazepam） 持有霸权步枪时伤害提高 50%。; 霸权特种部队（Hegemony Special Forces）、银河勇士奖章（Galactic Medal of Valor）或弹药带（Ammo Belt） 霸权步枪会变形，并发射精准、瞬时、可穿透的激光爆破。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun appears to be based on the DH-17 Carbine from Star Wars.; The comment about accuracy likely references the historically bad aim of Stormtroopers in Star Wars. However, Stormtroopers never used the DH-17.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪看起来是基于《星球大战》里的 DH-17 卡宾枪。; 关于精度的吐槽很可能是在影射《星球大战》里风暴兵历史上很烂的枪法。不过风暴兵其实从未使用过 DH-17。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Low damage, high rate of fire. Spiny! Remnants of Gun Cacti can be found throughout the Gungeon, but no one is certain as to their source. Perhaps they hail from a yet undiscovered Chamber? Regardless, their impressive needle capacity is a boon to any Gungeoneer.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 伤害低，射速高。带刺！枪仙人掌的残骸遍布枪牢，但没人知道它们从何而来。也许它们来自某个尚未被发现的膛室？不管怎样，它们惊人的针刺容量对任何枪牢者都是好东西。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Cactus Flower If the player has Broccoli or Orange, Cactus has a chance to fire a prickly pear that bounces off walls and fires needles in all directions.; The chance to fire a prickly pear also applies to guns Duct Taped to Cactus with the synergy.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 仙人掌花（Cactus Flower） 如果玩家拥有西兰花或橙子，仙人掌有几率发射一颗仙人掌果，它会从墙壁上弹开并向四面八方发射针刺。; 这颗仙人掌果的发射几率也适用于与仙人掌通过协同胶带黏在一起的枪。
entries.englishUsageNotes: "1000 Needles!" is a reference to a move used by the Cactuar, a recurring enemy from the Final Fantasy series, who resembles a walking cactus.; "Succulent DOOM" may possibly be a reference to the album Special Herbs by MF DOOM.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: “一千针刺（1000 Needles!）” 是对《最终幻想》系列中常见敌人仙人掌怪（Cactuar）使用的招式的致敬，它长得像会走路的仙人掌。; “多汁末日（Succulent DOOM）” 可能是在致敬说唱人 MF DOOM（MF DOOM）的专辑《特殊草药（Special Herbs）》。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Rapid fire with a big finale. This tricky prism requires guile to wield, but with the right lens, fires shreds of solidified light that slice enemies in their path. Falsely rumored to have natural healing abilities.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 快速射击并以盛大收尾。这块棱镜很难驾驭，需要一点机巧，不过只要配上合适的镜片，就能发射切开敌人的固化光碎片。它还被错误传言有自然治愈能力。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Bullet Kiln If the player has Elder Blank, using it while Luxin Cannon is held gives one Glass Guon Stone, up to a maximum of four.; Uses of Elder Blank triggered by Full Metal Jacket do not grant a Glass Guon Stone.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 子弹窑（Bullet Kiln） 如果玩家拥有旧式空响弹，在持有鲁信加农炮时使用它，会获得 1 枚玻璃滚石，最多可叠加到 4 枚。; 由全金属外衣触发的旧式空响弹不会奖励玻璃滚石。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun is a reference to The Lightbringer book series by Brent Weeks. The main character's last name is Guile, he is the Prism, Luxin is the name of the solidified light that is used by the magic users of that world, and Lord Omnichrome is a major antagonist of the series.; "Falsely rumored to have natural healing abilities" is a reference to crystal healing, a pseudoscientific alternative medicine technique that employs stones and crystals.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪是在致敬布伦特·威克斯（Brent Weeks）的《光明使者》（The Lightbringer）系列。主角姓氏叫 Guile，他是棱镜（Prism），Luxin 是那个世界里法师们使用的“固化光”的名字，而奥秘之主（Lord Omnichrome）则是系列中的主要反派。; “被错误传言拥有自然治愈能力”是在致敬水晶疗法，一种使用石头和水晶的伪科学替代疗法。

stats.value: 40 (Assuming an enemy is only hit by one stream of notes)

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 10 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: A normal electric guitar. Drops an amplifier on reload for double the power! Unfortunately, musical talent and Gungeoneering skill do not often overlap. Any damage caused by this "gun" has little to do with the Gungeon.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 一把普通电吉他。换弹时会放下一个音箱，威力直接翻倍！可惜，音乐天赋和枪牢技巧往往不会同时出现在同一个人身上。由这把“枪（gun）”造成的任何伤害，和枪牢本身其实没什么关系。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Simultaneously fires four streams of musical notes at 90° intervals.; Creates an amplifier on the ground when reloading. While firing, the active amplifier will fire bullets of its own in sync with the main gun, including aim angle.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 同时以 90° 间隔发射四条音符流。; 换弹时会在地上生成一个音箱。开火时，正在工作的音箱会按照主武器的节奏射出自己的子弹，包括瞄准角度。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Alternative Rock If the player has Drum Clip, Melted Rock, Gilded Bullets, Platinum Bullets, Heavy Bullets, or Ruby Bracelet, instead of firing four streams, Face Melter fires two parallel columns of notes. Reloading fires a guitar pick with a chance to stun. The pick can reveal secret rooms. This synergy also gives Face Melter a new, blue sprite.; When the guitar pick from this synergy hits an enemy it will cause them to bleed. This effect is purely visual.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 另类摇滚（Alternative Rock） 如果玩家拥有鼓夹、熔岩、镀金子弹、白金子弹、重子弹或红宝石手链，变脸熔炉（Face Melter）不再发射四条音符流，而是发射两列平行的音符。换弹会发射一枚有几率使敌人眩晕的吉他拨片。这枚拨片还能显露密室。这个协同还会给变脸熔炉（Face Melter）换上一张新的蓝色贴图。; 这个协同里的吉他拨片命中敌人时会让其流血，不过这个效果纯属视觉表现。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Amplifiers do not have hitboxes, meaning that enemies can potentially stand on top of them and be damaged by all four note streams at once. This is particularly easy to achieve with enemies with large hitboxes, such as bosses.; Bug: In co-op, if playing as The Cultist, reloading will drop the amplifier at the other player's location.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 音箱没有碰撞箱，这意味着敌人有可能直接站在上面，并同时被四条音符流击中。这对碰撞箱很大的敌人尤其容易做到，比如首领。; Bug：在联机合作中，如果玩家扮演拾荒者（The Cultist），换弹会把音箱掉到另一名玩家所在的位置。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Shoots bees. A beehive is nature's gun! Give it a good shake and let the bullets fly.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 它会射出蜜蜂。蜂巢就是大自然的枪！只要好好抖一抖，子弹就会飞出来。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires bees that label=home in on and damage enemies. Bees deal 3 damage on impact and apply a lingering 'swarm' effect that deals 1 damage right away, and deals 1 damage every second for 2 more seconds.; The initial 3 damage impact of each bee is affected by the players damage stat, but the lingering swarm damage is not.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射会自动锁定并伤害敌人的蜜蜂。蜜蜂命中时造成 3 点伤害，并附加一个持续存在的“蜂群”效果：立刻造成 1 点伤害，然后在接下来的 2 秒里每秒再造成 1 点伤害。; 每只蜜蜂最初造成的 3 点命中伤害会受玩家伤害属性影响，但持续存在的蜂群伤害不会。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Apiary If the player has Box, Bee Hive turns into an apiary and automatically regenerates ammo over time.; BEES If the player has Honeycomb or Bumbullets, while Bee Hive is held, projectile size is doubled, damage is increased by 25%, and rate of fire is decreased by 34%.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 养蜂场（Apiary） 如果玩家拥有盒子（Box），蜂巢会变成养蜂场并随时间自动恢复弹药。; BEES 如果玩家拥有蜂窝或大黄蜂弹，持有蜂巢时，投射物尺寸翻倍、伤害提高 25%，而射速降低 34%。
entries.englishUsageNotes: If the player feeds the Bee Hive and the RPG to a regular Muncher, it will always spit out a Stinger.; Bees will not home in on enemies that are not necessary for room clear.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 如果玩家把蜂巢和火箭推进式榴弹喂给普通吞枪怪，它总会吐出一把刺针枪（机尾炮）。; 蜜蜂不会追踪那些对清房并非必要的敌人。

entries.unlock: Reach the Oubliette.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: An improvised gun that fires trash, sending poison in all directions. A threat to anyone in the room, including the wielder. Becomes more powerful the more Junk a Gungeoneer is carrying.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 一把用简陋办法拼出来的枪，打出去的是垃圾，还会把毒液撒得到处都是。它对房间里任何人都危险，包括持枪的人自己。携带的垃圾越多，它就越强。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Garbage Collecting If the player has Unity, hitting an enemy with Trashcannon causes it and its bullets to briefly freeze. Bullets slow down to a very low percentage of its original travel speed, having a very slight amount of motion.; Grouch Junk increases the damage of the Trashcannon by 25%. This effect does not stack with multiple Junk (despite the Ammonomicon entry claiming otherwise).
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 垃圾回收（Garbage Collecting） 如果玩家拥有统一，用垃圾加农炮命中敌人会让目标及其子弹短暂冻结。子弹会减速到原始飞行速度的极低百分比，只剩下极轻微的运动。; 坏脾气（Grouch） 每有一份垃圾，垃圾加农炮的伤害就提高 25%。这个效果不会和多份垃圾叠加（尽管图鉴条目声称会）。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 6 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: The trusty sidearm of a spacefaring hero. Featuring a stylish design and solid performance, this blaster is almost always worth keeping around.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 太空英雄可靠的副武器。造型时髦、性能扎实，这把爆能枪几乎总值得一直带在身上。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Ice Cap If the player also has Freeze Ray, it freezes enemies much quicker.; Savior of the Universe If the player also has Camera, Flash Ray gains double magazine size, unlimited piercing, a thicker beam, one bounce, increased fire rate, and causes a Camera flash when reloading an empty magazine. Camera also fires two laser beams whenever fired.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 它的外形和基础能力都和蝙蝠侠（Batman）系列各种媒体里冰霜先生（Mr. Freeze）使用的武器很像。; 这把枪的风味文本是在致敬阿诺德·施瓦辛格在电影《蝙蝠侠与罗宾》中对冰霜先生的夸张演绎。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Sets targets aflame! Unfortunately, deep in the Gungeon, no one will see this flare but you.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 向敌人发射照明弹！可惜在枪牢深处，除了你之外没人会看到这道照明弹。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Emergency Help If the player also has Medkit, reload time is decreased by 66%, damage is increased by 50%, and random enemies will periodically have explosions erupt around them, damaging them and hurting other enemies around them in a short distance. This explosion can also do damage to the player.; Firing With Flair If the player also has Amulet of the Pit Lord, Master of Unlocking, Copper Ammolet, or Springheel Boots, the Flare Gun turns green and is guaranteed to inflict enemies with greenfire, which has a massively increased duration.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 紧急救助（Emergency Help） 如果玩家同时拥有急救包，装填时间减少 66%，伤害提高 50%，并且随机敌人周围会周期性爆发爆炸，对它们和周围一小段距离内的其他敌人造成伤害。这个爆炸也会伤到玩家。; 火光更靓（Firing With Flair） 如果玩家同时拥有深坑之王的护身符、解锁大师、铜制护身符或跳跟靴，照明弹枪会变成绿色，并必定让敌人着上持续时间大幅延长的绿火。
entries.englishUsageNotes: After hitting a wall, fired flares will continue burning for a time. These lingering flares produce light, but have no combat utility.; The Synergy with Medkit may be a reference to how flare guns and medical supplies are often kept together for emergency situations.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 击中墙壁后，发射出去的照明弹会继续燃烧一段时间。这些残留照明弹只提供光照，没有战斗用途。; 与急救包的协同很可能是在致敬照明弹枪和医疗用品常常会被一起备在紧急状况下的做法。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Favored by the huge predatory bird that nests in the Gungeon, it is a weapon to be feared.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 深受栖息在枪牢里的那只巨型掠食鸟喜爱，是一件令人畏惧的武器。
