entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Heavy Artillery If the player also has Com4nd0, both weapons are dual-wielded.; Not Quite As Mini If the player has Ammo Belt, Drum Clip, or Oiled Cylinder, the Vulcan Cannon changes its appearance, its maximum ammo is increased by 100, and its fire rate gradually increases as long as the trigger is held.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 重火力（Heavy Artillery） 如果玩家同时拥有魔鬼司令，这两把武器会被双持。; 不是那么迷你（Not Quite As Mini） 如果玩家拥有弹药带、鼓夹或油缸，火神加农炮会改变外观，最大弹药提高 100，只要扣住扳机，射速就会逐渐提高。
entries.englishUsageNotes: According to its ammonomicon entry, the Vulcan Cannon is wielded by the Gatling Gull, however its visual appearance is starkly different to the minigun the Gatling Gull can be seen holding in battle.; The gun is a reference to a common trope of action films where people will carry handheld M134 Miniguns, which in reality is very difficult and impractical.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 根据图鉴条目，火神加农炮是由盖特林海鸥（Gatling Gull）持有的，不过它的外形和盖特林海鸥战斗时拿着的那把机枪明显不同。; 这把枪是在致敬动作电影里常见的套路：角色会扛着手持式 M134 机枪，而现实中这么做其实极其困难，也很不实用。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Fires two wave projectiles. Inspired by real science, the Helix is extremely useful for hitting two things at once, as long as they are a certain distance apart.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 发射两发波形弹幕。受真实科学启发，螺旋子弹枪（Helix）在同时打中两个目标这件事上极其好用，只要它们相距合适。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Double Double Helix If the player also has Helix Bullets, instead of the Helix Bullets effect being applied to each bullet, Helix's projectiles will be doubled (2 bullets will fire on each side while following the original pattern), damage is increased by 25%, and shot speed is increased by 50%.; The Helix is a surprisingly powerful weapon, though difficult to use against regular enemies due to the way it fires. The Helix is best used against large enemies or bosses to maximize accuracy and damage.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 双重双螺旋（Double Double Helix） 如果玩家同时拥有螺旋子弹，那么原本应该套在每发子弹上的螺旋子弹效果不会生效，螺旋子弹枪（Helix）的弹幕会翻倍（每侧会发射 2 发子弹，并沿着原始轨迹前进），伤害提高 25%，射速提高 50%。; 螺旋子弹枪（Helix）这把枪强得出人意料，但因为它的发射方式，对普通敌人并不好用。螺旋子弹枪最适合对付大型敌人或首领，以最大化命中率和伤害。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Even mentioning guns in the Gungeon can have strange effects. This is an old idiom that has been given physical form through simple repetition. Note: Words are the Gungeon's second language, so slight inaccuracies may occur.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 即便只是提到枪牢里的“枪”，也会引发奇妙的效果。这是一句古老的俗语，通过简单重复被赋予了实体。注：在枪牢里，语言是第二语言，所以可能会有些微不准确。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires blue fish.; Fish have a 20% chance to stun enemies, and leave pools of water when flopping onto the ground that are capable of extinguishing chest fuses and the fireplace.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射蓝色鱼。; 鱼有 20% 几率使敌人眩晕，并且在落地乱扑时会留下水坑，可以扑灭宝箱引信和壁炉。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Like Shooting Fish If the player has Backup Gun, a fish pops out of the barrel and fires bullets. The last shot of each magazine fires a fish that flops around on the ground and fires at enemies.; One Fish Two Fish The Barrel fires two fish in a helical pattern, one of which is red and sets enemies on fire.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 像在桶里打鱼（Like Shooting Fish） 如果玩家拥有备用枪（“备”用枪），桶里会跳出一条鱼并朝敌人开火。每个弹匣的最后一发都会射出一条鱼，这条鱼会在地上乱扑并向敌人射击。; 一鱼二鱼（One Fish Two Fish） 桶枪会以螺旋形态发射两条鱼，其中一条是红色的，并会点燃敌人。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The gun itself as well as its flavor text are a reference to the idiom "Like shooting fish in a barrel" describing an effortless or simple action, with guaranteed success.; One Fish Two Fish Is a clear reference to a book of a similar name written by Dr. Seuss.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪本身以及它的图鉴文案，都在致敬短语“像在桶里打鱼（Like shooting fish in a barrel）”，意思是做一件毫不费力或很简单的事，而且几乎必定成功。; “一鱼二鱼（One Fish Two Fish）” 显然是在致敬苏斯博士（Dr. Seuss）写的一本同名书。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 7 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Freezes enemies in their tracks.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 在原地冻结敌人。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Ice Cap If the player also has Camera or Flash Ray, Freeze Ray freezes enemies much more quickly, and the weapon's appearance also changes.; Willing To Sacrifice If the player also has Ice Cube, Heart of Ice, or Frost Bullets, Freeze Ray gains piercing and slowly regenerates ammo over time.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 冰封帽（Ice Cap） 如果玩家同时拥有照相机（Camera）或闪光枪（Flash Ray），冰冻射线（Freeze Ray）会更快地冻结敌人，而且武器外观也会改变。; 愿意献祭（Willing To Sacrifice） 如果玩家同时拥有冰块（Ice Cube）、冰之心（Heart of Ice）或霜子弹（Frost Bullets），冰冻射线（Freeze Ray）会获得穿透，并会随时间缓慢恢复弹药。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Has a similar look and basic abilities as the weapon used by Mr. Freeze in various "Batman" media.; This gun's flavor text is a reference to Arnold Schwarzenegger's campy performance as Mr. Freeze from the movie Batman & Robin.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 它的外形和基础能力都和蝙蝠侠（Batman）系列各种媒体里冰霜先生（Mr. Freeze）使用的武器很像。; 这把枪的风味文本是在致敬阿诺德·施瓦辛格在电影《蝙蝠侠与罗宾》中对冰霜先生的夸张演绎。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: After a clumsy child of the Gungeon accidentally dropped this toy into a pit, they were forced to amuse themselves with the Dart Gun.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 枪牢里一个笨手笨脚的小孩不小心把这个玩具掉进了坑里，于是他们只好拿飞镖枪自娱自乐。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires an incredibly fast zap of white light capable of piercing through enemies.; The final bullet in each magazine is a mallard duck, which automatically seeks out enemies to attack them. This duck is capable of piercing once, and has extremely tight homing.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射一道极快的白色闪光，可穿透敌人。; 每个弹匣最后一发是一只绿头鸭，会自动追踪敌人攻击。这只鸭子还能穿透一次，追踪也极其精准。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: EGG MURDERER If the player has The Scrambler, the duck will periodically shoot two Scrambler shots perpendicular to itself as it travels.; Flak Bullets stops this synergy from working.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 蛋杀手（EGG MURDERER） 如果玩家拥有碎蛋枪（The Scrambler），这只鸭子在移动过程中会周期性地向自身垂直方向发射两发碎蛋枪子弹。; 高射炮子弹（Flak Bullets）会让这个协同失效。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun is a reference to the NES Zapper.; The duck being shot is a reference to Duck Hunt, one of the most well-known games to use the NES Zapper.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪是在致敬 NES 光枪（NES Zapper）。; 被射击的鸭子是在致敬《打鸭子（Duck Hunt）》，那是使用 NES 光枪最著名的游戏之一。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 8 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Damages all enemies on screen, no matter what. This cannon was built for mounting on Supersonic Attack Fighters, but has been retrofitted to be carried by infantry. An inscription on the barrel reads, "Know thy own position, and all others inevitably fall."
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 无论如何，都会对屏幕内所有敌人造成伤害。这门炮最初是为安装在超音速攻击机上而设计的，如今则改装成了可供步兵携带。炮管上刻着：“知己方位，则万物皆倒。”
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: RAIDEN If the player also has Space Friend, maximum ammo is increased by 25%, and 2 homing bullets shoot out periodically from the sides of the weapon. It also drastically reduces its ammo consumption.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 雷电（RAIDEN） 如果玩家同时拥有太空朋友（Space Friend），最大弹药提高 25%，并会从武器两侧周期性射出 2 发追踪子弹。弹药消耗也会大幅降低。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Like other guns, this will not fire if the player is up against a wall and trying to shoot into the wall, even though this gun shoots through walls.; Backup Gun indirectly doubles this gun's damage due to its direct homing.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 像其他枪一样，如果玩家背靠着墙却试图朝墙里射击，它也不会开火，尽管这把枪本来就能穿墙射击。; 备用枪（Backup Gun）会通过其直接追踪效果，间接使这把枪的伤害翻倍。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: This powerful laser was designed to carve moon rock at high speed during terraforming projects.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把强力激光原本设计用于在地形改造工程中高速切割月球岩石。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires a laser beam that reflects off of walls or obstacles once.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射一道会在墙壁或障碍物上反弹一次的激光束。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Jumping... Is Useless If the player also has Quad Laser, four Moonscraper laser beams shoot from each side of Quad Laser's bullets. Doubles Quad Laser's shot speed and triples its reload time.; Klobbering Time If the player also has Klobbe, its shots are doubled.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 跳着玩……没用（Jumping... Is Useless） 如果玩家同时拥有四管激光炮（Quad Laser），四道月镰激光束会从四管激光炮子弹的每一侧射出。四管激光炮的射速翻倍，换弹时间变成三倍。; 砸枪时刻（Klobbering Time） 如果玩家同时拥有可洛比枪（Klobbe），它的子弹会翻倍。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun is a reference to the Moonraker laser rifle from the 1979 James Bond movie Moonraker, as well as the Moonraker Laser weapon from the Nintendo 64 game, GoldenEye 007.; The synergy Land Among The Stars references the idiom, "Shoot for the moon; even if you miss, you’ll land among the stars."
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪是在致敬 1979 年詹姆斯·邦德电影《月行者（Moonraker）》里的月行者激光步枪（Moonraker Laser），也是在致敬任天堂 64 游戏《黄金眼 007（GoldenEye 007）》里的月行者激光武器（Moonraker Laser）。; 协同“仰望星空（Land Among The Stars）”是在引用“射向月亮；即使没中，也会落在星星之间。”这句俗语。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Pierce Weapon. Gifted to any who reach Level 5 in the Order of the True Gun.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 穿刺型武器。赠予任何在真枪教团达到 5 级的人。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires blue laser blasts capable of each piercing 1 enemy.; These lasers electrify any water that they pass over.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射蓝色激光爆破，每发可穿透 1 名敌人。; 这些激光会电击它们经过的任何水面。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Lotus Bloom If the player has Rolling Eye or Shock Rounds, the Laser Lotus gains the appearance of a flower. Its magazine size increases to 32, its maximum ammo increases to 300, its fire rate greatly increases, and it deals half damage.; Particle Flow If player also has Laser Sight, Laser Lotus gains a guided form of homing. A targeting reticle appears on the enemy nearest to the mouse and shots will home towards that enemy.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 莲花绽放（Lotus Bloom） 如果玩家拥有翻紫眼儿（Rolling Eye）或电击炮（Shock Rounds），激光莲花会呈现花朵外观。它的弹匣容量增至 32，最大弹药增至 300，射速大幅提高，但伤害减半。; 粒子流（Particle Flow） 如果玩家同时拥有激光瞄准镜（Laser Sight），激光莲花会获得一种引导式追踪。目标准星会出现在最靠近鼠标的敌人身上，子弹会追向那个敌人。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun is a reference to Community. The character Pierce is a "Level 5 Laser Lotus" in his Buddhist renewal community.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪是在致敬《废柴联盟（Community）》。Pierce 这个角色在他的佛教复兴社群里被称作“5 级激光莲花（Level 5 Laser Lotus）”。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Originally crafted by a gunsmith who favored revolvers but was envious of of the automatic weaponry being developed by his peers. It seems like he accidentally left one of his tools in the clip...?
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 最初由一位偏爱左轮却又嫉妒同行们正在开发自动武器的枪匠打造。看起来他好像把自己的某个工具落在了弹夹里……？
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Rapid-fires a barrage of bullets.; The last shot in every magazine is a high-damage hammer.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 快速连发一阵子弹。; 每个弹匣的最后一发是一柄高伤害锤子。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Hammer and Nail If the player also has Nail Gun, maximum ammo is increased by 50% for both guns. Nail Gun deals triple damage, while H4mmer gets 5 hammer shots at the end of every magazine and spins a wood beam around the player when reloading an empty magazine.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 锤与钉（Hammer and Nail） 如果玩家同时拥有钉枪（Nail Gun），两把枪的最大弹药量都提高 50%。钉枪的伤害变成三倍，而锤子枪（H4mmer）每个弹匣末尾会额外发射 5 发锤弹，并在换弹空弹匣时围绕玩家旋转一束木梁。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun may be a reference to the trick of "fanning the hammer", where a single-action revolver is fired by flicking the hammer of the weapon rather than pulling the trigger in order to make it shoot faster.; Bug: There is an issue with the Hammer and Nail synergy where if the ammo count exceeds what the base gun would have without the 50% maximum ammo, the current ammo count would revert to that amount. Additionally, partial ammo kits cannot have the ammo go above the base gun's amount, unless it is applied to H4mmer itself.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪可能是在致敬“转甩锤击发（fanning the hammer）”这一技巧：单动式左轮不是扣扳机，而是拨动枪锤来让它射得更快。; 漏洞（Bug）：锤与钉协同存在一个问题：如果当前弹药数超过了没有 50% 最大弹药加成时本枪应有的上限，当前弹药数会回退到那个数值。此外，部分弹药包无法把弹药抬到基础枪械上限之上，除非它应用在锤子枪（H4mmer）自己身上。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Trorc for 10 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: An extremely powerful rifle. Banned in some sectors, its ease of use caused it to be the weapon of choice for thousands of unskilled marksmen. Only handicapped by its long chambering time. Some say that it will fire faster if you put it in your backpack after every shot...
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 一把威力极强的步枪。由于太容易上手，它在某些地区被禁用，也因此成了成千上万不熟练神枪手的首选武器。唯一的缺点是上膛时间很长。有人说每次开完一枪后把它塞回背包里，射击会更快……
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: 360 Yes Scope If the player also has Scope, spinning 360 degrees before firing grants a 3-second buff that makes the next shot deal 50% more damage.; This can be activated multiple times, providing a stacking 1.5x damage multiplier for each spin. It caps at 6 rotations.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 360 度瞄准（360 Yes Scope） 如果玩家同时拥有瞄准镜（Scope），开火前先原地转 360 度可获得一个持续 3 秒的增益，使下一发子弹造成 50% 更多伤害。; 这个效果可以多次触发，每转一圈都会叠加 1.5 倍伤害倍率，最多叠到 6 圈。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Due to its slow rate of fire it is easy to fire another gun between A.W.P. shots without A.W.P. downtime.; A.W.P is an acronym for Arctic Warfare Police.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 由于射速很慢，在 A.W.P. 射击之间很容易插入另一把枪而几乎没有空档。; A.W.P. 是“北极战术警用步枪（Arctic Warfare Police）”的缩写。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 14 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: The explosive drills this gun fires will stun enemies before exploding. The Bullet Bore is an exotic weapon from the past, when the only creatures to carry guns were dinosaurs.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把枪发射的爆炸钻头会先击晕敌人再爆炸。钻头枪是过去的异域武器，那时会持枪的生物只有恐龙。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Cerebral Bros If the player also has Cluster Mine, Bow, Charmed Bow, or Explosive Rounds, Bullet Bore turns red and fires two drills at a time.; Get Equipped With -C- Enables Crash Bomber mode on the Megahand, which fires Bullet Bore drills when fully charged. Modes can be switched by reloading the Megahand with a full magazine.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 脑髓兄弟（Cerebral Bros） 如果玩家同时拥有集束地雷（Cluster Mine）、弓（Bow）、魅惑弓（Charmed Bow）或爆炸弹丸（Explosive Rounds），钻头枪会变红，并一次发射两枚钻头。; 配备即得（Get Equipped With -C-） 为洛克手炮（Megahand）解锁撞击轰炸机模式，在完全充能时会发射钻头枪的钻头。可通过在满弹匣状态下换弹来切换模式。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun can hit Cannonbalrog and High Priest during attacks where not normally possible.; Helix Bullets will cause the bullets to only shoot and have piercing abilities, without the explosion and stunning effect.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪可以在原本不可能的攻击阶段命中炮弹魔（Cannonbalrog）和高祭司（High Priest）。; 螺旋子弹（Helix Bullets）会让子弹只保留发射和穿透能力，不再有爆炸和眩晕效果。

entries.unlock: Complete the Hollow 20 times.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: A mysterious gun that grows in strength on each kill. Substantial power is lost any time its wielder is damaged. Stories are told of a rebellious android that once used this gun in a conflict deep underground. The handle is marked with two small tick marks.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 一把神秘的枪，每次击杀都会增强。持有者一旦受伤，力量就会大幅流失。传说中有一名叛逆的安卓曾在地下深处的冲突中使用过这把枪。枪柄上有两个小刻痕。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Has three different levels, with the gun leveling up after enough enemies are slain. Higher levels deal more damage.; Killing 11 enemies will level up Polaris to level 2.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 有三个等级，击杀足够敌人后会升级。更高等级会造成更多伤害。; 击杀 11 个敌人可将北极星升至 2 级。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Star Friends If the player also has Stuffed Star, while Stuffed Star is active and Polaris is held, the player continually fires maximum level Polaris shots in all directions.; Square Brace If the player also has Bracket Key or Bionic Leg, Polaris gains 20% increased damage, increased ammo capacity of 700, increased magazine size of 30, increased fire rate when leveled up, automatic firing, and a new appearance.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 星之友（Star Friends） 如果玩家同时拥有毛绒星星（Stuffed Star），当毛绒星星处于激活状态且持有北极星时，玩家会持续朝四周发射满级北极星子弹。; 方括（Square Brace） 如果玩家同时拥有支架钥匙（Bracket Key）或仿生腿（Bionic Leg），北极星的伤害提高 20%，最大弹药提高到 700，弹匣容量提高到 30，升级后的射速提高，并改为自动射击，还会获得新的外观。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Polaris' level does not affect its selling price.; While level 1 and 3 fire a single projectile of varying damage, level 2 fires two. Because of this, level 2 projectiles have double the probability of gaining chance-based bullet effects (e.g., Vorpal Bullets, Katana Bullets, Hungry Bullets, etc.).
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 北极星的等级不会影响售价。; 1 级和 3 级会发射一发伤害不同的单体弹丸，而 2 级会发射两发。因此，2 级弹丸获得概率型子弹效果（例如斩首子弹、武士刀子弹、饥饿子弹等）的概率翻倍。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Charge to fire bombs. A forgetful adventurer left a pouch full of bombs deep in the Gungeon, and they eventually sprouted into this amusing weapon. A favorite of the Gunsling King, who often sends Manservantes to pick up the bombs.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 按住充能就能发射炸弹。一个健忘的冒险者把一袋炸弹忘在枪牢深处，最后它们竟然长成了这把有趣的武器。枪王（Gunsling King）很喜欢它，经常派门萨文特（Manservantes）去捡炸弹。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Charges up to fire bouncing, exploding bombs. Like most explosive weapons, this explosion is capable of destroying some enemy bullets.; These bombs are uniquely capable of blasting open secret rooms.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 蓄力发射会弹跳、会爆炸的炸弹。和大多数爆炸武器一样，这次爆炸也能摧毁部分敌方子弹。; 这些炸弹还能独特地炸开密室。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Bomberpal If the player has Bomb, Lil' Bomber fires two bombs instead of one, charges twice as fast, and has 40% lower reload time.; King Bomber If the player has Gilded Bullets, Coin Crown, or Crown of Guns, its bombs become gold and spawn 0-7 coin upon hitting an enemy.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 炸弹伙伴（Bomberpal） 如果玩家拥有炸弹（Bomb），里尔炸弹枪一次会发射两枚炸弹，充能速度翻倍，装填时间降低 40%。; 国王炸弹（King Bomber） 如果玩家拥有镀金子弹（Gilded Bullets）、硬币王冠（Coin Crown）或枪之冠（Crown of Guns），它的炸弹会变成金色，并在命中敌人时掉落 0-7 枚硬币。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Bomberpal and Super Bomberpal stack, allowing Lil' Bomber to fire three bombs at once if the player has both Bomb and Ice Bomb.; The King Bomber synergy can provide up to 420 coin per ammo pickup, or up to 840 coin with Loot Bag.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 炸弹伙伴和超级炸弹伙伴会叠加，如果玩家同时拥有炸弹和冰炸弹，里尔炸弹枪可以一次发射三枚炸弹。; 国王炸弹协同每拾取一份弹药最多可提供 420 枚硬币，若配合战利品袋则最多可提供 840 枚。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Deals extra damage to ghosts and spectres. Originally brought to the Gungeon by a team of investigators who suspected that something strange was going on.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 对幽灵和鬼怪会造成额外伤害。最初是被一队怀疑有古怪事情正在发生的调查员带进枪牢的。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires two slow-moving simultaneous beams;; A thick 420 red laser that deals very low damage.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射两道缓慢前进的同时光束；一条厚重的 420 红色激光，伤害极低。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Electron Pack or Ghost Bullets Kills with electric beam of the Proton Backpack spawn Gunslinger's Ashes ghosts that attack enemies. This does not activate if enemies are killed by the Proton Backpack's other beam.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 电子背包（Electron Pack）或幽灵子弹（Ghost Bullets） 用质子背包的电击光束击杀敌人时，会生成枪手骨灰幽灵攻击敌人。若敌人是被质子背包的另一道光束击杀，则不会触发。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun is a reference to the iconic Proton Pack ghost fighting weapon from the Ghostbusters franchise.; The Ammonomicon quote "Crossing Streams" is in reference to the repeated warning in Ghostbusters (1984) "Don't cross the streams", as crossing the streams from multiple Proton Backpacks can result in a cataclysm called 'total proton reversal', destroying all life.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪致敬了《捉鬼敢死队》系列中标志性的质子背包驱鬼武器。; 图鉴里的“交叉水流（Crossing Streams）”是在致敬《捉鬼敢死队（1984）》里反复出现的警告“别交叉水流（Don't cross the streams）”，因为多个质子背包同时交叉射流时，会引发名为“完全质子反转（total proton reversal）”的灾难，毁灭所有生命。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Originally built to kill thick-skinned space mutants, the Jolter fires unreasonably large shells.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 最初是为干掉皮糙肉厚的太空变种人而造，震击枪（Jolter）会发射大得离谱的弹壳。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Heavy Jolt If the player has Heavy Bullets, Jolter gains increased knockback and shots are more accurate.; There Is Only War If the player also has Demon Head, the Demon Head will float around the player while Jolter is held, and will automatically fire at enemies when Jolter is reloaded; this won't consume the Demon Head's ammo.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 重击（Heavy Jolt） 如果玩家拥有重弹药（Heavy Bullets），震击枪（Jolter）的击退更强，射击也更准。; 只有战争（There Is Only War） 如果玩家还拥有恶魔头颅（Demon Head），在手持震击枪时，恶魔头颅会围着玩家漂浮；当震击枪换弹时，它会自动向敌人开火，而且不会消耗恶魔头颅的弹药。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Jolter is a reference to the Warhammer 40k weapon, the Bolter, typically used by space marines. However, unlike the Bolter, the Jolter isn't an explosive weapon. The gun's sprites also reference the Bolter, as they are named Bolt_Rifle.; Having the Demon Head orbital while using the Gun That Can Kill The Past may crash the game and force you to restart the floor.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 震击枪（Jolter）是在致敬战锤 40K（Warhammer 40k）里的爆矢枪（Bolter），那种武器通常由星际战士使用。不过和爆矢枪不同，震击枪不是爆炸武器。它的枪械贴图也在致敬爆矢枪，因为文件名叫“爆矢步枪图（Bolt_Rifle）”。; 带着恶魔头颅（Demon Head）的环绕物同时使用能杀死过去的枪（Gun That Can Kill The Past）时，游戏可能会崩溃并迫使你重开这一层。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: A favorite of Fallen Bullet Kin, who learned everything about being devils from television.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 堕落子弹幼体（Fallen Bullet Kin）最喜欢叉戟（Pitchfork），因为它们从电视上学会了当恶魔的全部知识。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Launches fireballs that set enemies on fire.; Each fireball can pierce through up to 4 enemies.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射会点燃敌人的火球。; 每个火球最多可穿透 4 个敌人。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Hail, Satan! If the player has Demon Head, Demon Head gains piercing.; Hotter Than Heck If the player has Flame Hand, the shot size and damage of the guns are increased by 25%, and grants fire immunity while either gun is held.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 地狱欢迎仪式（Hail, Satan!） 如果玩家拥有恶魔头颅（Demon Head），恶魔头颅会获得穿透。; 更热也更糟（Hotter Than Heck） 如果玩家拥有烈焰之手（Flame Hand），这把枪的子弹尺寸和伤害都会提高 25%，并且在手持任意一把枪时都能获得火焰免疫。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Fallen Bullet Kin wield the Pitchfork.; Bug: The special UI icon for both the Pitchfork and Pitch Perfect in the Chinese Mobile Version of Enter the Gungeon appear blue. This is likely due to incorrect colour encoding issues when saving the files, as the same thing can be seen in other UI textures.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 堕落子弹幼体会挥舞叉戟（Pitchfork）。; 漏洞（Bug）：在《进入地牢（Enter the Gungeon）》中文手机版里，叉戟（Pitchfork）和完美音高（Pitch Perfect）的特殊界面（UI）图标都会显示成蓝色。这很可能是因为保存文件时颜色编码不正确，因为别的界面（UI）纹理也能看到同样的问题。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Trorc for 8 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Standard box rocket. Capacity: 4. Often found atop military transports or mechanized walkers, this box rocket can be fired manually by the strongest Gungeoneers.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 标准盒式火箭。容量：4。它常见于军用运输车或机械步行机顶部，这种盒式火箭可以由最强的地牢枪手手动发射。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires explosive 220 missiles.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射爆炸性的 220 导弹。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Behold! If the player also has Eye of the Beholster, M1911, Void Marshal, Machine Pistol, and Trank Gun (the weapons the Beholster uses in game), when the Eye of the Beholster is held, the other five guns rotate around the player and shoot at nearby enemies, still using up ammo from each gun. Obtainable through the Beholster shrine, although it can be activated without.; Commammo Belt If the player also has Ammo Belt, Com4nd0 gains double magazine size and changes appearance, becoming light green and featuring an ammo belt around it.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 见证吧！ 如果玩家还拥有贝希摩斯之眼（Eye of the Beholster）、M1911、虚空元帅（Void Marshal）、机关手枪（Machine Pistol）和审讯枪（Trank Gun）这些贝希摩斯在游戏里使用的武器，那么在持有贝希摩斯之眼时，另外五把枪会围着玩家旋转并攻击附近敌人，同时仍然消耗各自的弹药。这个协同可以通过贝希摩斯神龛（Beholster Shrine）获得，不过即使没有神龛也能触发。; 通弹带（Commammo Belt） 如果玩家还拥有弹药带（Ammo Belt），Com4nd0（Com4nd0）的弹匣容量会翻倍，外观也会改变，变成浅绿色并在身上挂上一条弹药带。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun is one of the six wielded by the Beholster. When used by the Beholster, it fires homing rockets visually identical to those fired by the player.; As it is held by the Beholster, it can be placed on the Beholster Shrine.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪是贝希摩斯（Beholster）持有的六把武器之一。被贝希摩斯使用时，它会发射在视觉上与玩家发射的导弹完全相同的追踪火箭。; 因为它是贝希摩斯持有的，所以也可以放到贝希摩斯神龛（Beholster Shrine）上。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 3 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: An advanced issue rifle for Hegemony troops. Primarily wielded by elite human soldiers, as the Hegemony combat robots have superior weaponry.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 霸权卡宾枪（Hegemony Carbine）是霸权部队的高级制式步枪。它主要由精英人类士兵使用，因为霸权的战斗机器人配备了更强的武器。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Decorated The Hegemony Carbine fires three bullets in a tight spread.; Ruby Carbine, Cog of Battle, or Mimic Tooth Necklace The Hegemony Carbine changes forms, and fires red bolts that bounce once and fire enemies.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 装饰过的（Decorated） 霸权卡宾枪会以紧密的三连发射出三颗子弹。; 红宝石卡宾枪（Ruby Carbine）、战斗齿轮（Cog of Battle）或拟形怪牙项链（Mimic Tooth Necklace） 霸权卡宾枪会变形，并发射会弹跳一次、还能点燃敌人的红色能量束。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The tagline "All The Same" is possibly a reference to the Rifleman's Creed.; This gun is used in The Marine's past.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 标语“All The Same”也许是在致敬《步枪兵信条（Rifleman's Creed）》。; 这把枪在海军陆战队员（The Marine）的过去关卡中会被使用。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Fires tears. This grotesque gun is made of eyeballs bound together in a gun-like shape. Tears are a surprisingly effective projectile for exploring dungeons!
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 发射眼泪。这把恶心的枪是由眼球绑成枪状拼出来的。眼泪居然是探索地牢时相当有效的投射物！
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Shoots tears that pierce enemies and leave puddles of water on collision.; The direction of these tears is affected by the player's momentum, meaning that tears angle in the direction the player is moving.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射会穿透敌人并在撞击时留下水洼的眼泪。; 这些眼泪的飞行方向会受玩家惯性影响，也就是眼泪会朝玩家移动的方向倾斜。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Tears of Blood If the player has Bloody Eye, Tear Jerker's shots turn red and inflict slow.; Wrath Of The Blam If the player has Directional Pad, Tear Jerker is replaced with a crying bullet head that can only fire in cardinal directions but deals double damage.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 血之泪（Tears of Blood） 如果玩家拥有血眼（Bloody Eye），哭泣枪（Tear Jerker）的子弹会变红并施加减速。; 怒火之哔哔（Wrath Of The Blam） 如果玩家拥有方向键（Directional Pad），哭泣枪会被替换成一个哭泣的子弹头，它只能朝四向开火，但伤害翻倍。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Because the Tear Jerker uses the Water damage type, it deals 2x damage to Muzzle Wisps and Muzzle Flares, and does not ignite Coalers.; The Tear Jerker also puts out decorative torches and burning skeletons.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 因为哭泣枪（Tear Jerker）使用的是水属性伤害，所以它对枪口鬼火（Muzzle Wisps）和枪口闪焰（Muzzle Flares）造成 2 倍伤害，而且不会点燃煤燃妖（Coalers）。; 哭泣枪还会浇灭装饰火把和燃烧的骷髅。

entries.unlock: Speak to the Tinker after completing the [[Shortcuts
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Can unlock chests. The AKEY-47 is a masterpiece of Gungeoncraft, perfectly combining the masterful gunplay of an AK-47 with the incredibly useful ability to open locks. An inscription along the frame reads, "EX ARCHA, LIBERTAS."
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: AKEY-47（AKEY-47）可以开锁开箱。它是地牢工艺（Gungeoncraft）的杰作，把 AK-47（AK-47）的精湛枪法和开锁能力完美结合在一起。枪身上刻着“自废墟而来，自由至上。”
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Akey Breaky If the player has the Shelleton Key, AKEY-47 fires skulls that do 10 damage per skull, receives infinite ammo, and changes in appearance to resemble a Shelleton. Its shots will no longer open locks or reveal secret rooms, though chests can still be opened due to possessing the Shelleton Key.; If the player has obtained this synergy via Lich's Eye Bullets, opening a chest or door with the AKEY-47 equipped will still unlock it for free, if the player has no keys.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 钥匙骷髅化（Akey Breaky） 如果玩家拥有骷髅钥匙（Shelleton Key），AKEY-47 会发射每颗造成 10 点伤害的骷髅头，获得无限弹药，并变成骷髅怪（Shelleton）的样子。它的子弹将不再开锁或揭示隐藏房间，不过由于持有骷髅钥匙，箱子依然可以打开。; 如果玩家是通过巫妖之眼子弹（Lich's Eye Bullets）获得这个协同，那么即使没有钥匙，手持 AKEY-47 打开箱子或门时也仍然能免费解锁。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The AKEY-47 Has identical statistics to the AK-47.; Once unlocked, the AKEY-47 may appear for sale in Flynts shop for 3 keys.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: AKEY-47（AKEY-47）的各项数据与 AK-47（AK-47）完全相同。; 解锁后，AKEY-47 可能会在弗林特商店（Flynt's shop）里以 3 把钥匙的价格出售。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 28 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Blessed Gun of the Gunseeker. This gun gains experience with every kill, and is strangely resistant to the Gungeon's temporal rifts. Any accrued experience will persist throughout time. A gun spoken of in legend. Once wielded by Gunderaan, Prince of Guns, this weapon ultimately found its way to the Gungeon after being mishandled by millions of idiots for countless hours.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 受枪寻者（Gunseeker）祝福的神枪。这把枪每击杀一个敌人都会获得经验，而且对地牢的时间裂隙异常耐受。积累的经验会永远保留。一把流传于传说中的枪。它曾被枪王子冈德拉安（Gunderaan, Prince of Guns）持有，后来在无数蠢货把它乱用了无数小时之后，最终流落到地牢里。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Chance On Hit If the player also has Silver Bullets, this gun will obtain a chance to slow enemies and make Gunderfury's bullets act like they have Shock Rounds.; Worlds Of Guncraft If the player also has Mr. Accretion Jr., Gunderfury will occasionally shoot out Mr. Accretion Jr. shots.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 命中有机率（Chance On Hit） 如果玩家还拥有银子弹（Silver Bullets），这把枪会获得让敌人减速的几率，并让枪怒（Gunderfury）的子弹效果如同电击弹（Shock Rounds）一样。; 枪匠世界（Worlds Of Guncraft） 如果玩家还拥有小小聚积者（Mr. Accretion Jr.），枪怒（Gunderfury）偶尔会射出小小聚积者（Mr. Accretion Jr.）的子弹。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Rainbow Mode is an effective way to farm experience for Gunderfury, as it is possible to restart until it is acquired in the very first Rainbow Chest.; Killing infinitely spawnable enemies, such as Zombullets, Killithid illusions, or Misfire Beast projections will still grant Gunderfury experience.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 彩虹模式（Rainbow Mode） 是刷枪怒（Gunderfury）经验的有效方式，因为你可以一直重开，直到第一只彩虹宝箱（Rainbow Chest）里刷出它。; 击杀无限刷新的敌人，例如僵尸子弹（Zombullets）、灵吸怪幻影（Killithid illusions）或误射野兽投影（Misfire Beast projections），仍然会给予枪怒经验。

entries.chineseUsageNotes: 彩虹模式（Rainbow Mode） 是刷枪怒（Gunderfury）经验的有效方式，因为你可以一直重开，直到第一只彩虹宝箱（Rainbow Chest）里刷出它。; 击杀无限刷新的敌人，例如僵尸子弹（Zombullets）、灵吸怪幻影（Killithid illusions）或误射野兽投影（Misfire Beast projections），仍然会给予枪怒经验。

entries.englishUsageNotes: Brown, Blue, and Green chest mimics wield twin Magnums.; Homing bullets, full room damage effects, and companions will ignore mimics that have not yet been revealed.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 棕色、蓝色和绿色宝箱怪（chest mimics）会挥舞双持马格南（Magnums）。; 追踪子弹、整间房间伤害效果以及同伴不会攻击尚未显露的拟身怪（mimics）。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Once acquired, the Serpent will follow the player as an orbital, snaking around them in a wave pattern.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 一旦获得，蛇（Serpent）就会作为环绕物跟随玩家，像波浪一样在玩家周围蜿蜒。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Once acquired, the Serpent will follow the player as an orbital, snaking around them in a wave pattern.; The Serpent will block enemy projectiles, similarly to a guon stone.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 一旦获得，蛇（Serpent）就会作为环绕物跟随玩家，像波浪一样在玩家周围蜿蜒。; 蛇会像古翁石（guon stone）一样挡住敌方弹幕。
entries.englishUsageNotes: While the Serpent in the Rat's Lair appears behind two locked doors, the player can throw passive items through the second door, with just enough force for these items to reach and feed the serpent. This allows the player to acquire the serpent while spending only one Rat Key.; Despite being an item internally, the Serpent does not appear in the players inventory on the map screen or Ammonomicon, and has no Ammonomicon description.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 在鼠王巢穴（Rat's Lair）里，蛇会出现在两扇上锁的门后；玩家可以把被动道具从第二道门里丢过去，力道刚好让它们够到并喂给蛇。这样只要花一把鼠王钥匙（Rat Key）就能拿到蛇。; 虽然内部算作道具，但蛇不会出现在地图界面或图鉴（Ammonomicon）里的玩家库存中，而且没有图鉴说明。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The muzzle flare from this fiery handgun can ignite enemies. Return enemies to dust. Famously wielded by Two-Shot Erias on her final Gungeon attempt.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把火焰手枪喷口喷出的火焰会点燃敌人。把敌人烧成灰。著名使用者是二枪艾里亚斯（Two-Shot Erias），她在最后一次枪牢征途里拿着它。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: The muzzle flare of this gun is a fiery ejection that sets enemies caught within on fire.; Despite emerging from this fiery belch, the projectile itself does not ignite enemies.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 这把枪喷出的火焰喷口焰流会点燃被卷入其中的敌人。; 尽管子弹来自这股炽热吐焰，但真正的投射物本身不会点燃敌人。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Cryptic Cryptids If the player has Fossilized Gun, Phoenix shots pierce, deal double damage, and leave trails of fire. The player is immune to fire while either Phoenix or Fossilized Gun are equipped.; Phoenix Up If the player has Unfinished Gun, The Scrambler, Hot Lead, Copper Ammolet, Flame Hand, Weird Egg, Napalm Strike, or Gungeon Pepper, a phoenix companion that fires piercing fireballs at enemies is summoned while Phoenix is held, even while not equipped.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 神秘秘兽（Cryptic Cryptids） 如果玩家拥有化石枪（Fossilized Gun），凤凰（Phoenix）的子弹会穿透、伤害翻倍，并留下火焰轨迹。只要装备了凤凰或化石枪，玩家就免疫火焰。; 凤凰涅槃（Phoenix Up） 如果玩家拥有未完成之枪（Unfinished Gun）、碎纸机（The Scrambler）、热铅（Hot Lead）、铜弹药筒（Copper Ammolet）、烈焰之手（Flame Hand）、怪蛋（Weird Egg）、燃烧打击（Napalm Strike）或枪牢辣椒（Gungeon Pepper），在手持凤凰时会召唤一只会发射穿透火球攻击敌人的凤凰伙伴，即使没有装备它也一样。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Phoenix's blast of fire does no direct damage, only lighting the enemy on fire.; Phoenix Up is likely a reference to the revival item Phoenix Down, from the Final Fantasy series.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 凤凰的火焰爆发本身不会直接造成伤害，只会点燃敌人。; 凤凰涅槃（Phoenix Up）很可能是在致敬最终幻想系列中的复活道具凤凰羽（Phoenix Down）。

entries.unlock: Kill Blockner, and talk to Ser Manuel in the Hall of Knowledge.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Generates a protective shield upon reload. Blockner lost his knighthood when he betrayed Ser Manuel, but he did not lose his gun. He did that much later.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 举起后会生成一面防护盾。布洛克纳（Blockner）在背叛塞尔·曼努埃尔（Ser Manuel）后被剥夺了骑士身份，但他没有失去自己的枪。那是很久以后的事。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Upon reloading, creates a protective magical shield on the ground. This shield blocks enemy bullets, and will be destroyed upon taking too much damage.; All shields in a room are automatically destroyed when the player leaves it.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 换弹时会在地面生成一面防护魔法盾。它能挡住敌人的子弹，但承受过多伤害后会被打碎。; 房间内的所有护盾都会在玩家离开时自动消失。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Betrayer's Lies If the player has Lies, Betrayer's Shield gains infinite ammo, a much larger magazine size, increased accuracy, and extremely high fire rate. Like other guns with infinite ammo, it cannot reveal secret rooms.; Betrayer's Lies can be combined with other guns using Duct Tape by dropping Lies, using Duct Tape, and picking up Lies again.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 背叛者的谎言（Betrayer's Lies） 如果玩家拥有谎言（Lies），背叛者之盾（Betrayer's Shield）会获得无限弹药、更大的弹匣、提升的精准度和极高射速。和其他无限弹药枪一样，它无法揭示隐藏房间。; 背叛者的谎言还能通过丢出谎言、使用胶带（Duct Tape）再捡回谎言的方式，与其他枪组合。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Betrayer's Shield is peculiarly a member of the PISTOL gun class despite almost certainly being more at home among the members of the FULLAUTO class.; There are a few bullet patterns in certain boss fights that the shield will not block, such as the large bullets that the Cannonbalrog shoots when he disappears and the line of bullets that spins around the Resourceful Rat in his first phase.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 背叛者之盾（Betrayer's Shield）居然属于手枪（PISTOL）枪械类别，尽管它更像是属于全自动（FULLAUTO）类别。; 某些首领战里有几种弹幕它挡不住，比如大炮骷髅（Cannonbalrog）消失时射出的巨大子弹，以及资源ful 鼠王（Resourceful Rat）第一阶段围着他旋转的那条子弹环。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The letter r looks like a gun. It is rare, but not unheard of, for abstract concepts to take gun form when discussed near the Gungeon.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 小写 r（Lower Case r）看起来就像一把枪。它很稀有，但也不算闻所未闻：在枪牢附近讨论抽象概念时，它们有时会变成枪的形态。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires a burst of 6 letter-shaped projectiles that spell out the word BULLET.; While firing, the gun will voice out the word "bullet".
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射 6 发字母形投射物，拼出单词“BULLET”。; 开火时，这把枪会读出“子弹（bullet）”这个词。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Hacker Increases damage by 25% while the Lower Case r is held.; Just In Case The Lower Case r becomes a capital letter R and transforms into a one shot rocket launcher that deals 27 damage and has a max ammo capacity of 100. It fires the word ROCKET with cloud sprites when shot, and creates a cartoon 'BOOM' cloud on impact.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 黑客（Hacker） 持有小写字母时伤害提高 25%。; 以防万一（Just In Case） 小写字母会变成大写字母，并化作一把单发火箭筒，造成 27 点伤害，最大弹药量为 100。开火时会射出单词 ROCKET，并伴随云朵特效；撞击时还会生成卡通风格的“BOOM”云。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Lower Case r is voiced by Doseone, the composer of Enter the Gungeons soundtrack.; This gun, while obviously a surface level reference to the basic shape of the letter r, may also be a reference to early computer adventure games. These early games used ASCII art comprised of letters and numbers to render a game world.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪由《进入地牢》原声带作曲者配音。; 这把枪虽然显然是在致敬字母外形的基础轮廓，但也可能是在致敬早期电脑冒险游戏。那些早期游戏会用字母和数字组成 ASCII 画来渲染游戏世界。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Alternates between oily bursts and fiery blasts. When the great Bullet fell from the sky, not even the earth beneath the Gungeon was spared. The ants that made their home beneath the floors became terrifying in size, and capable of projectile spit. Nearly extinct, the last of the species occasionally hide in chests.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 在油性喷发和火焰爆发之间交替。大子弹从天而降时，连地牢下方的土地也没能幸免。住在地板下的蚂蚁长成了惊人的体型，还能朝外吐射弹体。这个物种几近灭绝，最后残存的个体偶尔会躲在箱子里。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Buggin' Out If the player has Bug Boots, while Gungeon Ant is held, Bug Boots spread oil instead of poison, and the player is immune to fire.; Great Queen Ant If the player also has Crown of Guns, Heck Blaster, Gilded Bullets, Coin Crown, or Ring of Fire Resistance, Gungeon Ant loses the alternating attack and instead fires explosive ants that destroy enemy bullets when exploding and deal 22 impact damage, 35 explosion damage.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 虫灾出动（Buggin' Out） 如果玩家拥有虫靴（Bug Boots），在持有地牢蚁（Gungeon Ant）时，虫靴喷出的会是油而不是毒，且玩家免疫火焰。; 伟大蚁后（Great Queen Ant） 如果玩家还拥有枪冠（Crown of Guns）、地狱爆射器（Heck Blaster）、镀金子弹（Gilded Bullets）、币冠（Coin Crown）或火焰抗性戒指（Ring of Fire Resistance），地牢蚁会失去交替攻击，改为发射会摧毁敌方子弹的爆炸蚂蚁，并造成 22 点撞击伤害和 35 点爆炸伤害。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun is a reference to the real-life Bullet Ant. Known for its extremely painful sting, victims have likened it to "being shot".; The Great Queen Ant synergy is a reference to Earthworm Jim, specifically The Evil Queen Pulsating, Bloated, Festering, Sweaty, Pus-filled, Malformed, Slug-for-a-Butt.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪是在致敬现实中的子弹蚁（Bullet Ant）。它以极其疼痛的蜇刺著称，受害者常把它比作“被子弹击中（being shot）”。; 伟大蚁后（Great Queen Ant）协同是在致敬《蚯蚓吉姆（Earthworm Jim）》，具体是《邪恶女王：脉动、肿胀、溃烂、汗湿、长脓、畸形、蜗牛战士（The Evil Queen Pulsating, Bloated, Festering, Sweaty, Pus-filled, Malformed, Slug-for-a-Butt）》。

stats.value: Assuming each bullet only hits once.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Fires sawblades. The marketing team assigned to the Saw Blader wanted to call it the Sawed-On Shotgun, but were overruled by the gun's designer. It's more of a handgun, anyway.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 发射锯片。分配给锯刃枪（Saw Blader）的营销团队本想把它叫作锯成霰弹枪（Sawed-On Shotgun），但最终被这把枪的设计者否决了。反正它更像一把手枪。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires sawblades that can ricochet off walls 3 times, and pierce through 2 enemies each.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 发射可从墙壁弹跳 3 次、且每片可穿透 2 个敌人的锯片。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Get Equipped With -M- Enables Metal Blade mode on the Megahand, which fires sawblades from the Buzzkill when uncharged. Modes can be switched by reloading the Megahand with a full magazine.; I Studied The Blade If the player has Super Meat Gun, the two guns are dual wielded.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 装备上吧（Get Equipped With -M-） 解锁大手炮（Megahand）的机械刃模式（Metal Blade mode），该模式在蓄力时会发射来自 Buzzkill（Buzzkill）的锯片。你可以通过在大手炮弹匣满时换弹来切换模式。; 我研究过刀刃（I Studied The Blade） 如果玩家拥有超级肉枪（Super Meat Gun），这两把枪会双持。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Buzzkill is slang for someone who ruins fun (in this case, the gun's designer from the Ammonomicon entry), and the gun's name is also a portmanteau of buzzsaw and kill.; The pickup text "Sawed On!" is a play on words, based on a "sawed-off shotgun."
entries.chineseUsageNotes: Buzzkill（Buzzkill）是“扫兴的人”这个俚语（这里指图鉴条目里的枪械设计者），它的名字也是“圆锯”和“击杀”的合成词。; 领取文本“锯成这样！”（Sawed On!）是在玩“截短霰弹枪（sawed-off shotgun）”这个双关。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Doug for 26 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Spits bullets, fear. Chiseled from a large slab of the rare element Cranium, this terrifying stony visage is a totem of an angry god.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 喷吐子弹，也喷吐恐惧。它由一大块罕见元素头骨（Cranium）雕成，是愤怒之神的恐怖图腾。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Rapidly fires 360 projectiles.; While held, any non-boss enemies within 90° of the angle the player is aiming will become afraid, fleeing the player.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 快速发射 360 发投射物。; 当玩家手持它时，凡是在瞄准角度前后 90 度内、且不是首领的敌人都会陷入恐惧并逃离。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Heads Up Stone Dome shoots skulls, which deal 6 damage and have increased homing.; Hot Head Stone Dome shots fire enemies.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 抬头看（Heads Up） 石穹顶（Stone Dome）会射出骷髅头，每个造成 6 点伤害并拥有更强追踪。; 热头（Hot Head） 石穹顶的子弹会点燃敌人。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The fear status effect can compel enemies to walk backwards into hazards such as dangerous goop or pits.; Bug: Switching to another gun causes currently afraid enemies to be permanently afraid. These enemies will always flee the player after coming within a 6 tile range, regardless of the direction the player is aiming. This persists forever, or until the player switches back to the Stone Dome.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 恐惧状态会迫使敌人往后走进危险区域，比如危险黏液或坑洞。; 漏洞（Bug）：切换到另一把枪会让当前已受惊的敌人永久保持恐惧。这些敌人只要进入 6 格范围内，就会一直逃离玩家，不管玩家正瞄准哪个方向。这个状态会一直持续，直到你切回石穹顶（Stone Dome）。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The engine of a crashed starship that has been converted into an energy weapon.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这台坠毁星舰的引擎后来被改造成了一件能量武器。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Rapidly fires tiny invisible pellets with a very short range, extending only slightly past the gun's visible muzzle flash.; Sets enemies on fire.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 快速发射极小的隐形弹丸，射程极短，只比枪口火焰稍微远一点。; 使敌人着火。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Ancient Aliens Zorgun gets three special shots at the end of each magazine instead of one. Alien Engine will also fire Zorgun bullets.; Contrail or Mutation The Alien Engine changes forms, and its muzzle flash becomes green, igniting enemies with greenfire. Alien Engine also grants flight while held.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 古代外星人（Ancient Aliens） 如果玩家还拥有佐根枪（Zorgun），佐根枪每个弹匣末尾会发射三发特殊子弹，而不是一发。外星引擎（Alien Engine）也会发射佐根枪子弹。; 尾迹（Contrail）或变异（Mutation） 外星引擎会变形，枪口火焰变成绿色，并用绿火点燃敌人。手持时还会提供飞行能力。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Despite its downsides, this gun has among the highest DPS in the Enter the Gungeon, making it useful for hit-and-run tactics in a Boss battle, or in combination with a longer range weapon.; In September of 2016, Dodge Roll programmer Brent Sodman listed the Alien Engine as his favourite gun in Enter the Gungeon, and Shotgrub as his least favourite. He did however disclaim that his opinions on Enter the Gungeons weapons change often, so these preferences may have changed over time and with the addition of more weapons."fav: alien engine least fav: shotgrub though honestly it changes from day to day" - Brent Sodman in a Twitter Post
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 尽管有缺点，这把枪在《进入地牢（Enter the Gungeon）》里拥有极高的 DPS，因此很适合打了就跑的战斗，或者和射程更长的武器配合使用。; 2016 年 9 月，Dodge Roll（Dodge Roll）程序员 Brent Sodman（Brent Sodman）说，外星引擎（Alien Engine）是他在《进入地牢》里最喜欢的枪，而 Shotgrub（Shotgrub）（Shotgrub（Shotgrub））是他最不喜欢的。他还补充说，他对本作武器的看法经常变化，所以这些偏好未必一直不变。原话大意是：“我最喜欢外星引擎，最不喜欢 Shotgrub（Shotgrub），不过老实说这会天天变。”

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Active reload provides stacking benefits for bad enough dudes (and chicks).
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 主动换弹会给“够酷”的家伙带来可叠加的收益。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Passively grants 2 coolness.; When reloading the gun, a mark appears on the reload bar, similar to the Cog of Battle. Pressing reload or firing at the right time will increase the gun's damage. Each successful reload will also make the reload time shorter, making another successful reload harder to pull off. As the gun's damage increases, the projectiles become larger and turn into faces wearing sunglasses after four successful reloads. Missing a reload will reset the bonuses. After 14 reloads, the gun will reload instantly and the active reload will be missed, resulting in the damage bonus resetting.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 被动提供 2 点酷炫值。; 换弹时，弹条上会出现一个标记，类似战斗齿轮（Cog of Battle）。在正确时机按下换弹或开火会提高这把枪的伤害。每次成功换弹还会缩短换弹时间，让下一次成功更难。随着伤害提升，投射物会变大，并在四次成功换弹后变成戴墨镜的脸。失误会重置加成。达到 14 次换弹后，这把枪会瞬间换弹，主动换弹会被判定失败并重置伤害加成。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Kung Fu Hippie, Rappin' Surfer If the player has Sunglasses, Rad Gun's magazine size is increased to 20 and its reload time is increased, giving more time to hit the mark. Grants 1.33 coolness. The maximum amount of reloads is increased from 14 to 17, although getting the 16th reload will require two Super Hot Watchs.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 功夫嬉皮，说唱冲浪手（Kung Fu Hippie, Rappin' Surfer） 如果玩家拥有墨镜（Sunglasses），辐射枪（Rad Gun）的弹匣容量会提升到 20，换弹时间也会变长，让你有更多时间按准时机。它会提供 1.33 点酷炫值。最大换弹次数从 14 次提升到 17 次，不过第 16 次换弹需要两次超级热手表（Super Hot Watch）。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Refilling the Rad Gun with an Ammo pickup or taking the elevator to the next chamber is considered an automatic reload.; Swapping to another weapon for a few seconds will automatically reload the Rad Gun. This will cause the damage bonus to swap to the passive reload corresponding to its level, which caps at 25 damage per bullet.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 用弹药拾取补充辐射枪（Rad Gun），或者搭电梯去下一层，都会被视为一次自动换弹。; 切换到别的武器几秒钟会自动给辐射枪换弹。这会让伤害加成切换到与其等级对应的被动换弹加成，最高每颗子弹 25 点伤害。

stats.value: Assuming each bullet only hits once. Assuming each bullet only hits once.

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 6 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: This gun, incredibly enough, has been folded entirely out of paper. Only a true master gunsmith could create something this elegant.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把枪不可思议地完全由纸折成。只有真正的大师枪匠才能造出这么优雅的东西。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Blade Runner If the player also has Deck4rd, magazine size of both guns is increased by 50%.; Paperwork If the player also has the Ballot or any Table Tech item except for Heat or Shotgun (Blanks, Money, Rage, Rocket, Sight, or Stun), the first shot after reloading will fire three planes.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 刀锋跑者（Blade Runner） 如果玩家还拥有 Deck4rd（Deck4rd），两把枪的弹匣容量都会提高 50%。; 文件工作（Paperwork） 如果玩家还拥有 Ballot（Ballot），或者除 Heat（Heat）和 Shotgun（Shotgun）外的任何 Table Tech（Table Tech）道具（空白弹（Blanks）、金钱（Money）、愤怒（Rage）、火箭（Rocket）、瞄准（Sight）或眩晕（Stun）），那么换弹后的第一发子弹会射出三架纸飞机。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 8 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Alternates between frigid blasts and explosive slugs. The Ice Breaker was designed by Edwin, the legendary gunsmith. The only gun to combine freezing and shattering technology into one convenient package!
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 在冰霜爆发和爆炸弹之间交替。破冰者（Ice Breaker）是传奇枪匠 Edwin（Edwin）设计的。它是唯一一把把冻结与碎裂技术合二为一的便利武器！
entries.englishEffectHighlights: The first two shots of each magazine fire a shotgun blast of freezing ice bullets.; The final shot of each magazine fires a single large, metal slug that can pierce up to 5 times.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 每个弹匣的前两发会发射一连串冻结冰弹的霰弹爆发。; 每个弹匣的最后一发会射出一颗巨大的金属弹头，最多可穿透 5 次。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Gunderlord If the player also has Patriot, Ice Breaker fires single high-velocity shots and slowly regenerates ammo over time. Patriot shots become connected with electricity.; Ice Accumulation If the player has Snowballets, Ice Breaker's shot size is greatly increased, and the amount of damage it gains from Snowballets is increased.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 枪王（Gunderlord） 如果玩家还拥有爱国者（Patriot），破冰者会发射单发高速子弹并随时间缓慢回复弹药。爱国者的子弹会连上电。; 冰块堆积（Ice Accumulation） 如果玩家拥有雪弹（Snowballets），破冰者的子弹尺寸会大幅增加，从雪弹中获得的伤害加成也会提高。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Because the ice shots of the Ice Breaker use the Ice damage type, they deal 1.5x damage to Muzzle Wisps and Muzzle Flares, and do not ignite Coalers. Additionally, these bullets will freeze any water they pass over.; Despite the Ammonomicon entry suggesting otherwise, the metal slugs fired by this gun do not deal any more damage to frozen enemies.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 因为破冰者（Ice Breaker）的冰弹属于冰属性伤害，所以它对枪口鬼火（Muzzle Wisps）和枪口闪焰（Muzzle Flares）造成 1.5 倍伤害，而且不会点燃煤燃妖（Coalers）。此外，这些子弹经过水面时会把水冻住。; 尽管图鉴条目暗示了相反的情况，这把枪射出的金属弹头对被冻结的敌人并不会造成更多伤害。

entries.unlock: Find it in a [[Secret Rooms
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Immaculately balanced, rapid fire. Will ignite foes. Though long thought to be nothing but a legend, this gun's recent discovery proves the undeniable truth that it was always within the halls of the Gungeon, and you just weren't looking hard enough.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 平衡得无懈可击，连发速度极快。会点燃敌人。虽然长期以来都被认为只是传说，但这把枪最近被发现，证明它一直都在枪牢的大厅里，只是你之前没仔细找。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The secret room containing the High Dragunfire contains six friendly cultists kneeling to a red chest, with various dialogue:; First time: "Welcome, fellow acolyte! It appears that Gun Cult fashion has changed substantially since our forefathers were sealed into this holy chamber. Be at peace, for inside the chest before you...lies the fabled Gun That Can Kill The Past! Your long pilgrimage is finally at an end. Join us in eternal worship! Prostrate thyself!
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这间秘室里有六个友好教徒跪在红箱子前，第一次见面时会说：“欢迎你，同道中人！自从我们的祖先被封进这间神圣密室后，枪教的风格已经大变。放轻松吧，因为你面前的箱子里...装着传说中的能杀死过去的枪（Gun That Can Kill The Past）！你漫长的朝圣终于结束了。加入我们的永恒崇拜吧！俯伏下拜！”

entries.unlock: Reach The Cultist's past or kill the High Dragun with a [[:Category:Companions
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Makes enemies grossly incandescent. This javelin was born from the chemistry of two heroes who conquered the Gungeon together.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 让敌人灼热得近乎发光。这支标枪诞生于两位一起征服枪牢的英雄之间的化学反应。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Charges up to throw a fast-moving, highly accurate thunderbolt that deals considerable damage and sets enemies on fire.; Lasting for 10 seconds, this is the longest lasting non-green fire effect that can be applied by any weapon in Enter the Gungeon.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 蓄力后投出一发高速且极其精准的雷电，造成可观伤害并点燃敌人。; 持续 10 秒，这是《进入地牢》里任何武器都能施加的最长时间的非绿色火焰效果。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: \o/ or Old Knight's Flask Killing an enemy with the Sunlight Javelin creates a fiery aura in a 5 tile radius around the point the enemy died. This aura lasts for 5 seconds, and sets enemies that enter it on fire.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 老骑士之药瓶（Old Knight's Flask） 用 Sunlight Javelin（Sunlight Javelin）杀死敌人会在敌人死亡位置 5 格半径内生成火焰光环。这个光环持续 5 秒，并会点燃进入其中的敌人。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun is an excellent room clearing weapon, as it one-shots most enemies even into the Forge, and is extremely accurate and ammo-efficient.; This gun can be reloaded immediately after firing to activate Hip Holster if above 100 ammo.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪是优秀的清场武器，因为它几乎能一击杀死大多数敌人，即使到了锻造厂也一样，而且非常精准、省弹。; 这把枪在开火后可以立刻重新装填，从而在弹药超过 100 时激活 Hip Holster（Hip Holster）。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The shotbow fires crossbow bolts in a shotgun burst. The shotbow is the result of a failed experiment using the Gungeon's teleportation network.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 弩霰枪（Shotbow）会以霰弹枪般的爆发射出弩箭。弩霰枪是一次失败实验的产物，源于地牢的传送网络。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Second Accident If the player has Teleporter Prototype or Chest Teleporter, Shotbow fires 9 parallel arrows straight forward.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 第二次事故（Second Accident） 如果玩家拥有传送器原型（Teleporter Prototype）或宝箱传送器（Chest Teleporter），弩霰枪（Shotbow）会向正前方射出 9 支平行箭矢。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Shotbow is in the SHOTGUN gun class and as such benefits from the Shotgun Affinity synergy.; This gun's description could be a reference to the episode Tuvix, from the TV show Star Trek Voyager, where two characters were merged into one as a result of a transporter (a sort of teleporter) accident, which is itself a reference to the film The Fly.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: Shotbow 属于霰弹枪（SHOTGUN）类别，因此能享受霰弹枪亲和（Shotgun Affinity）协同。; 这把枪的说明可能是在致敬《星际旅行：航海家号（Star Trek Voyager）》里的 Tuvix 那一集，那里两个人因为传送器事故合并成了一个，这本身又是在致敬电影《苍蝇（The Fly）》。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: A powerful, unwieldy handgun. A favorite more for its image than its efficiency, the Dungeon Eagle is capable of delivering massive damage. Not terribly accurate, but highly memorable.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 一种强力但笨重的手枪。Dungeon Eagle（Dungeon Eagle）更偏重形象而非效率，但它能打出巨额伤害。准确度不算高，但记忆点极强。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Don't Hoot the Messenger If the player also has Owl, halves time required to fire a charged shot.; Reload Roll If the player also has Easy Reload Bullets, dodge rolling reloads six bullets and dodge rolling range is slightly increased while holding the weapon.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 别打断信使（Don't Hoot the Messenger） 如果玩家还拥有猫头鹰（Owl），蓄力射击所需时间减半。; 重新装填翻滚（Reload Roll） 如果玩家还拥有轻松装弹子弹（Easy Reload Bullets），翻滚换弹会补充 6 发子弹，而且手持这把武器时翻滚距离会略有增加。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The name Dungeon Eagle is a reference to the real-world 'Desert Eagle' gun.; The description of the weapon refers to the Desert Eagle's popularity in American culture and the weapon's iconic reputation despite its shortcomings.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: Dungeon Eagle（Dungeon Eagle）这个名字是在致敬现实中的“沙漠之鹰（Desert Eagle）”手枪。; 这把武器的说明是在提及沙漠之鹰在美国文化中的流行程度，以及它尽管有缺点却依旧标志性的名声。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: This gun is unusually filthy for a handgun in the Gungeon. The Gundead spend much of their time polishing and greasing guns, though they conspicuously leave the Magnum alone.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把枪在枪牢里对一把手枪来说异常脏。亡枪族（Gundead）大多会花很多时间给枪抛光上油，但他们唯独把马格南（Magnum）晾在一边。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Detective Magnum If the player also has 38 Special, the guns are dual-wielded.; Reload Roll If the player also has Easy Reload Bullets, dodge rolling reloads six bullets.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 侦探马格南（Detective Magnum） 如果玩家还拥有 38 Special（38 Special），两把枪会双持。; 重新装填翻滚（Reload Roll） 如果玩家还拥有轻松装弹子弹（Easy Reload Bullets），翻滚换弹会补充 6 发子弹。
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Magnum is the most commonly used enemy weapon in the Gungeon, being held by Bullet Kin, Veteran Bullet Kin, Minelets, Cardinals, Shroomers, Ashen Bullet Kin, Mutant Bullet Kin, Brown, Blue, Green, and Wall Mimics, Gun Fairies, Tombstoners, Gun Cultists, Red Caped Bullet Kin, Office Bullet Kin, Bullet Fish, Candle Guys, Brollets, Kalibullets, and KBullets; The quote "5 shots or 6?" is a reference to the film Dirty Harry.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 马格南（Magnum）是枪牢里最常被敌人使用的武器，持有者包括子弹怪、资深子弹怪、子弹矿工、枢机主教、裂头子弹怪、灰色子弹怪、变异霰弹怪、棕色、蓝色、绿色和墙壁拟身怪、枪仙子、墓碑雕刻者、枪支邪教徒、红披风子弹怪、办公室子弹怪、子弹鱼、蜡烛人、布罗莱特、卡利子弹和凯子弹。; 这句"5 shots or 6?" 是在致敬电影《肮脏哈里（Dirty Harry）》。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The younger bullet brother's handgun. It is unhelpfully labelled with an 'S'. Shopkeepers found Smiley's good nature disarming, often giving him the advantage when negotiating prices.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把年轻子弹兄弟的手枪上不情愿地标着一个 “S”。微笑左轮（Smiley's Revolver）的笑脸子弹怪图案让商人觉得它性情温和，在谈价时反而容易占到便宜。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Decreases shop prices by 15% while in the players inventory.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 在玩家物品栏中时，商店价格降低 15%。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Trigger Twins If the player also has Shades's Revolver, ammo capacity is doubled and magazine size is increased by 50% for all guns, and the two guns are dual wielded.; While Lich's Eye Bullets doesn't give the dual wielding portion of the synergy, it will give the 2x ammo capacity and 50% magazine size increase.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 双生枪（Trigger Twins） 如果玩家还拥有墨镜子弹的左轮手枪，两把枪的弹药量都会翻倍，弹匣容量提高 50%，并且这两把枪会双持。; 如果通过巫妖之眼子弹触发这个协同，虽然不会给双持部分加成，但仍会提供 2 倍弹药量和 50% 弹匣容量提升。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This item's description references both the name and effect of Disarming Personality.; The entry for Smiley's Revolver in the Physical Ammonomicon has a small doodle of Smiley.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这件道具的说明同时引用了“和善个性”这个名字和它的效果。; 实体版枪之图鉴里，微笑左轮的条目旁边还有一个小小的微笑涂鸦。

entries.unlock: Purchase from Professor Goopton for 35 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: This gun adapts. While some have disputed the claim that a gun can change shape or adapt to its new environment within the Gungeon, this weapon appears to be irrefutable proof of the phenomenon. Since its discovery, the number of self-proclaimed gunvolution deniers has increased by 4%.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把枪会适应环境。虽然有人质疑一把枪是否真的能在枪牢里改变形态、适应新环境，但这把武器似乎就是这一现象的铁证。自从它被发现后，自称“枪变论”否认者的人数上涨了 4%。
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Has 6 different forms, starting as an amoeba and progressively evolving into more complex organisms. Every five different enemy types slain while the Evolver is in the players inventory (it does not need to be the active weapon) will evolve the gun.
entries.chineseEffectHighlights: 有 6 种不同形态，从变形虫开始，逐步进化成更复杂的生物。只要进化枪（Evolver）在玩家物品栏里，每击杀 5 种不同敌人种类，它就会进化一次。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Natural Selection If the player also has Irradiated Lead, Monster Blood or Big Boy, the gun evolves after every 3 unique enemy types.; The Powerhouse of the Cell If the player also has Antibody, the Evolver evolves one stage.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 自然选择（Natural Selection） 如果玩家还拥有照射铅弹、怪物之血或大男孩，这把枪每击杀 3 种不同敌人种类就会进化一次。; 细胞发电厂（The Powerhouse of the Cell） 如果玩家还拥有抗体（Antibody），进化枪会进化一级。
entries.englishUsageNotes: Enemies do not need to be killed by Evolver's bullets for it to evolve.; When Evolver evolves, its ammo will be fully replenished.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 进化枪不需要靠自己的子弹杀敌也能进化。; 当进化枪进化时，它的弹药会被完全补满。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: This strange gun, shaped like a shotgun shell, fires bullets that are shaped like shotguns. Those shotgun-shaped bullets will fire a spray of rounds upon impact, much like a shotgun would.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把奇怪的枪长得像霰弹枪弹壳，却会发射形状像霰弹枪的子弹。那些霰弹枪形状的子弹在撞击时也会像霰弹枪一样喷出一串子弹。
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Blammo! If the player also has Bullet, the guns are dual-wielded.
entries.chineseSynergyHighlights: 轰！ 如果玩家还拥有子弹，两把枪会双持。
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun seems to be in reference to two colloquial sayings that mean relatively the same thing - "Firing a gun" and "Firing a shell". The meanings are swapped, but still technically are true.; The smaller bullets fired by launched shotgun are not affected by the player's Damage stat.
entries.chineseUsageNotes: 这把枪似乎是在致敬两句意思相近的俗语：“开枪（Firing a gun）”和“发射弹壳（Firing a shell）”。两者的含义被调换了，但严格来说都还说得通。; 由发射式霰弹枪射出的较小子弹不受玩家伤害值影响。

entries.englishGameplaySummary: This strange gun, shaped like a shotgun shell, fires bullets that are shaped like shotguns. Those shotgun-shaped bullets will fire a spray of rounds upon impact, much like a shotgun would.
entries.chineseGameplaySummary: 这把奇怪的枪长得像霰弹枪弹壳，却会发射形状像霰弹枪的子弹。那些霰弹枪形状的子弹在撞击时也会像霰弹枪一样喷出一串子弹。
